- SECTION 1: GLOBAL DESIGN SYSTEM
- SECTION 2: FULL TECHNICAL SPECIFICATION

# SECTION 1: GLOBAL DESIGN SYSTEM

## Color Palette (HSL → HEX equivalents from `src/index.css`)

Tokens are defined in HSL in `src/index.css` and consumed via Tailwind semantic tokens in `tailwind.config.ts`. HEX equivalents below are derived from the HSL values in the source.

### Light Theme
| Token | HSL | HEX |
|---|---|---|
| `--background` | 0 0% 100% | #FFFFFF |
| `--foreground` | 222.2 84% 4.9% | #09090B |
| `--card` | 0 0% 100% | #FFFFFF |
| `--card-foreground` | 222.2 84% 4.9% | #09090B |
| `--popover` | 0 0% 100% | #FFFFFF |
| `--popover-foreground` | 222.2 84% 4.9% | #09090B |
| `--primary` | 222.2 47.4% 11.2% | #0F172A |
| `--primary-foreground` | 210 40% 98% | #F8FAFC |
| `--secondary` | 210 40% 96.1% | #F1F5F9 |
| `--secondary-foreground` | 222.2 47.4% 11.2% | #0F172A |
| `--muted` | 210 40% 96.1% | #F1F5F9 |
| `--muted-foreground` | 215.4 16.3% 46.9% | #64748B |
| `--accent` | 210 40% 96.1% | #F1F5F9 |
| `--accent-foreground` | 222.2 47.4% 11.2% | #0F172A |
| `--destructive` | 0 84.2% 60.2% | #EF4444 |
| `--destructive-foreground` | 210 40% 98% | #F8FAFC |
| `--border` | 214.3 31.8% 91.4% | #E2E8F0 |
| `--input` | 214.3 31.8% 91.4% | #E2E8F0 |
| `--ring` | 222.2 84% 4.9% | #09090B |
| `--radius` | 0.5rem | — |

### Brand Gradient (per project memory)
- Greenish-orange gradient used for text highlights and interactive accents.
- Suggested stops: `#16A34A` (green-600) → `#F97316` (orange-500).
- Tailwind usage: `bg-gradient-to-r from-green-600 to-orange-500 bg-clip-text text-transparent`.

### Status Colors
- Success: `#16A34A`
- Warning: `#F59E0B`
- Error / Destructive: `#EF4444`
- Info: `#3B82F6`

## Typography
- Font family: Tailwind default sans (`ui-sans-serif, system-ui, ...`). Project does not override the font stack.
- Hierarchy (Tailwind classes):
  - Display: `text-4xl md:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight`
  - H1: `text-3xl font-bold`
  - H2: `text-2xl font-bold`
  - H3: `text-xl font-semibold`
  - Body: `text-base`
  - Small / Meta: `text-sm text-muted-foreground`
  - Tiny: `text-xs`
- Weights used: 400, 500, 600, 700.

## Spacing System
- Base unit: 0.25rem (Tailwind default scale: `1=4px, 2=8px, 3=12px, 4=16px, 6=24px, 8=32px, 12=48px, 16=64px`).
- Page container: `max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8`.
- Vertical section padding: `py-8` to `py-16`.
- Card padding: `p-6` (CardContent default).
- Form field gap: `space-y-4`.

## UI Styling Rules
- Buttons: shadcn `Button` component with variants `default | destructive | outline | secondary | ghost | link` and sizes `default | sm | lg | icon`. Primary uses `bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90`.
- Inputs: `h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm`.
- Cards: `rounded-lg border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm`.
- Modals/Dialogs (shadcn Dialog): centered, max width `max-w-lg`, overlay `bg-black/80`.
- Dropdowns (shadcn): `rounded-md border bg-popover p-1 shadow-md`.
- Border radius: `--radius: 0.5rem` → `lg=0.5rem`, `md=calc(0.5rem - 2px)`, `sm=calc(0.5rem - 4px)`.
- Shadows: Tailwind defaults `shadow-sm`, `shadow`, `shadow-md`, `shadow-lg`.

# SECTION 2: FULL TECHNICAL SPECIFICATION

## 2.1 APP STRUCTURE

### Stack
- React 18 + TypeScript 5
- Vite 5
- Tailwind CSS v3
- React Router v6
- TanStack Query v5
- shadcn/ui (Radix UI primitives)
- Supabase (auth, Postgres, edge functions, storage)
- sonner (toasts), lucide-react (icons), react-hook-form + zod (forms)

### Routes (defined in `src/App.tsx`)
| Path | Component |
|---|---|
| `/` | Index |
| `/restaurants` | Restaurants |
| `/restaurant/:id` | RestaurantDetails |
| `/add-restaurant` | AddRestaurant |
| `/edit-restaurant/:id` | EditRestaurant |
| `/auth` | Auth |
| `/dashboard` | Dashboard |
| `/restaurant-dashboard` | RestaurantOwnerDashboard |
| `/restaurant/:id/dashboard` | RestaurantManagementDashboard |
| `/restaurant-management-dashboard` | RestaurantManagementDashboard |
| `/menu-management-dashboard` | MenuManagementDashboard |
| `/reviewer-dashboard` | ReviewerDashboard |
| `/admin-dashboard` | AdminDashboard |
| `/admin-setup` | AdminSetup |
| `/about` | About |
| `/contact` | Contact |
| `/pricing` | Pricing |
| `/profile-settings` | ProfileSettings |
| `/user/:id` | UserProfile |
| `/my-reviews` | MyReviews |
| `/favorites` | Favorites |
| `/claim-restaurant/:id` | ClaimRestaurant |
| `/claim-restaurant-search` | ClaimRestaurantSearch |
| `/restaurant-analytics` | RestaurantAnalytics |
| `/review-management` | ReviewManagement |
| `/menu-management` | MenuManagement |
| `/promotions-manager` | PromotionsManager |
| `/foodie-levels` | FoodieLevels |
| `*` | NotFound |

### Navigation
- **Top nav (`Header.tsx`)**: logo, search, links (Restaurants, Pricing, About, Contact), auth area (Sign In or user dropdown), notifications bell.
- **Mobile nav**: hamburger drawer with same links collapsed (responsive rules per `mem://style/header`).
- **Footer (`Footer.tsx`)**: site links, social, newsletter teaser, copyright.
- **Dashboard sidebar (`components/dashboard/DashboardSidebar.tsx`)**: tab navigation for authenticated dashboards.

## 2.2 PAGE-BY-PAGE BREAKDOWN

> Layout for every page = `<Header /> <main>...</main> <Footer />` unless noted. All pages are responsive (mobile-first, `sm/md/lg/xl` breakpoints).

### Index (`/`)
- Sections (top → bottom): Header, HeroSection, QuickFilters, PromotedSection, TrendingCarousel, RecentReviews, RestaurantBadges, MissionSection, FeaturedReviewers, RestaurantCTABlock, NewsletterSignup, Footer.
- States: loading skeletons in carousels; empty state in RecentReviews when no data.
- Interactions: hero search, quick filter chips, carousel arrows, newsletter submit.

### Restaurants (`/restaurants`)
- Layout: filter sidebar (left, collapsible on mobile) + grid of `RestaurantCard`.
- Components: `AdvancedFilters`, `AdvancedSearch`, `NearMeButton`, `SavedSearches`, `RestaurantCard`.
- States: loading (skeleton grid), empty ("No restaurants found"), error (toast).
- Interactions: text search, multi-select cuisine, price range, location radius, sort.

### RestaurantDetails (`/restaurant/:id`)
- Layout: hero image, title row (name, badges, claim banner), tabs: Overview / Menu / Reviews / Photos / Staff.
- Components: `RestaurantClaimBanner`, `HalaalVerification`, `StarRating`, `ReviewCard`, `ReviewLikeButton`, `MostViewedDishes`, `StaffCard`, `StaffTipping`.
- States: loading skeleton, 404 if not found, claim CTA if unclaimed.

### AddRestaurant (`/add-restaurant`) / EditRestaurant (`/edit-restaurant/:id`)
- Layout: single-column form. Uses `GooglePlacesSearch` to auto-populate fields (calls edge function `google-places-search`).
- Form fields: name, address, phone, website, cuisines (multi-select), price range, hours, photos (file upload), halaal certification body, certificate expiry.
- Validation: zod schema; required name + address; URL validation for website.
- States: idle, submitting (button disabled + spinner), success (toast + redirect), error (toast).

### Auth (`/auth`)
- Tabs: Sign In / Sign Up. Forgot password link → `PasswordReset`. Recovery link → `PasswordUpdate`.
- Google OAuth button.
- Validation: required email + password; min 6 chars on signup.

### Dashboard (`/dashboard`)
- Role-aware shell. Tabs from `RestaurantDashboardTabs` or `TabsSection`. Renders different overview based on user role (reviewer/owner/admin).

### RestaurantOwnerDashboard / RestaurantManagementDashboard / MenuManagementDashboard
- Sidebar + tabbed main panel: Overview, Menu, Reviews, Staff, Analytics, Promotions, Settings.

### AdminDashboard (`/admin-dashboard`)
- Tabs: Restaurants, Applications, Verification, Duplicates, Users, Settings.
- KPI cards (pending claims, completed claims) backed by Supabase counts.

### Other pages
- `Pricing`: tier cards from `SubscriptionTierCard` + `PricingPreview`.
- `About`, `Contact`, `FoodieLevels`: static content sections.
- `ProfileSettings`, `UserProfile`, `MyReviews`, `Favorites`: per-user CRUD over Supabase tables.
- `ClaimRestaurant`, `ClaimRestaurantSearch`: ownership claim flow with `RestaurantClaimForm`.
- `NotFound`: centered 404 message + link home.

## 2.3 COMPONENT LIBRARY (selected; full list in Section 3)

| Component | Purpose | Key Props | Variants/States |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Header` | Top navigation | — | desktop, mobile drawer; signed-in/out |
| `Footer` | Site footer | — | — |
| `HeroSection` | Landing hero with search | — | — |
| `RestaurantCard` | Tile in restaurant lists | `restaurant` | hover, loading skeleton |
| `StarRating` | Display/select rating | `value`, `onChange?`, `size?`, `readonly?` | interactive vs read-only |
| `ReviewCard` | Single review block | `review` | with/without photos |
| `ReviewLikeButton` | Toggle like on review | `reviewId`, `initialCount` | liked, disabled |
| `GooglePlacesSearch` | Autocomplete restaurant lookup | `onSelect` | loading, error, results |
| `RestaurantClaimForm` | Submit ownership claim | `restaurantId` | idle, submitting, success |
| `RestaurantClaimBanner` | Inline CTA on details page | `restaurantId`, `isClaimed` | claimed/unclaimed |
| `HalaalVerification` | Show certification status | `certification` | verified, pending, expired |
| `AdvancedFilters` | Filter sidebar | `value`, `onChange` | open/closed (mobile) |
| `AdvancedSearch` | Text search w/ suggestions | `onSearch` | loading |
| `CuisineMultiSelect` | Multi-select dropdown | `value`, `onChange` | open/closed |
| `MultiSelectDropdown` | Generic multi-select | `options`, `value`, `onChange` | — |
| `NearMeButton` | Geolocation trigger | `onLocate` | loading, denied |
| `SubscriptionTierCard` | Pricing tier card | `tier` | current/featured |
| `NotificationCenter` | Bell + dropdown list | — | empty, unread badge |
| `RouletteGame` | Random restaurant picker | `restaurants` | spinning, result |
| All shadcn `ui/*` | Primitive UI | per shadcn docs | per shadcn docs |

## 2.4 FUNCTIONALITY & LOGIC

### Auth flow (`AuthContext.tsx`)
- `signUp(email, password, fullName)` → `supabase.auth.signUp` with `emailRedirectTo = window.location.origin`.
- `signIn(email, password)` → `supabase.auth.signInWithPassword`.
- `signInWithGoogle()` → `supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({ provider: 'google' })`.
- `signOut()` → `supabase.auth.signOut`.
- Subscribes to `onAuthStateChange`; exposes `user`, `session`, `loading`.

### Forms
- React Hook Form + zod resolvers; controlled inputs from shadcn.
- Submit button disabled while pending; toast on success/error.

### CRUD
- All reads/writes through `supabase.from('<table>')`.
- Counts via `select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true })`.
- Mutations followed by `queryClient.invalidateQueries`.

### Conditional rendering
- Auth-gated pages redirect to `/auth` if `!user`.
- Admin pages check `has_role(user.id, 'admin')` server-side via Postgres function.
- Claim banner hidden when `restaurant.is_claimed === true` (per `mem://features/restaurant-claims`).

## 2.5 DATA STRUCTURE

### Tables (high-level)
- `profiles`: `id (uuid, FK auth.users)`, `full_name`, `avatar_url`, `bio`, `created_at`.
- `user_roles`: `id`, `user_id`, `role (enum: admin|moderator|user)`. Uniq `(user_id, role)`.
- `restaurants`: `id`, `name`, `address`, `lat`, `lng`, `phone`, `website`, `cuisines (text[])`, `price_range`, `hours (jsonb)`, `photos (text[])`, `is_claimed (bool)`, `owner_id (uuid)`, `created_at`.
- `restaurant_claims`: `id`, `restaurant_id`, `user_id`, `status (pending|approved|rejected)`, `certification_body (text)`, `certificate_expiry (date)`, `documents (jsonb)`, `created_at`.
- `reviews`: `id`, `restaurant_id`, `user_id`, `rating (1-5)`, `body`, `photos (text[])`, `created_at`.
- `review_likes`: `id`, `review_id`, `user_id`, unique `(review_id, user_id)`.
- `favorites`: `id`, `user_id`, `restaurant_id`, `list_name`.
- `menu_items`: `id`, `restaurant_id`, `name`, `description`, `price`, `category`, `photo_url`, `is_visible`.
- `staff`: `id`, `restaurant_id`, `name`, `role`, `photo_url`, `tip_link`.
- `notifications`: `id`, `user_id`, `type`, `payload (jsonb)`, `read (bool)`, `created_at`.
- `subscriptions`: `id`, `user_id`, `tier`, `status`, `current_period_end`.

### Example JSON
```json
{
  "restaurant": {
    "id": "r_001",
    "name": "Karim's Grill",
    "address": "12 High St, London",
    "cuisines": ["Indian", "Pakistani"],
    "price_range": "$$",
    "is_claimed": true,
    "photos": ["https://.../1.jpg"]
  },
  "review": {
    "id": "rv_001",
    "restaurant_id": "r_001",
    "user_id": "u_42",
    "rating": 5,
    "body": "Excellent lamb chops.",
    "photos": []
  }
}
```

## 2.6 INTERACTIONS & UX
- Toasts via `sonner` for all async outcomes.
- Hover lift on cards (`hover:shadow-md transition`).
- Skeletons during fetch (shadcn `Skeleton`).
- Errors caught in try/catch, surfaced via `toast.error(message)`.
- Notifications dropdown shows unread badge.

## 2.7 RESPONSIVENESS
- Tailwind breakpoints: `sm 640`, `md 768`, `lg 1024`, `xl 1280`, `2xl 1400` (per config).
- Grids: `grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4`.
- Header collapses to hamburger below `md` (per `mem://style/header`).
- Filter sidebar becomes a Sheet/Drawer below `md`.
- Tabs stack vertically below `sm` where applicable.

### `vite.config.ts`

```ts
import { defineConfig } from "vite";
import react from "@vitejs/plugin-react-swc";
import path from "path";
import { componentTagger } from "lovable-tagger";

// https://vitejs.dev/config/
export default defineConfig(({ mode }) => ({
  server: {
    host: "::",
    port: 8080,
  },
  plugins: [
    react(),
    mode === 'development' &&
    componentTagger(),
  ].filter(Boolean),
  resolve: {
    alias: {
      "@": path.resolve(__dirname, "./src"),
    },
  },
}));

```

```ts

import type { Config } from "tailwindcss";

export default {
	darkMode: ["class"],
	content: [
		"./pages/**/*.{ts,tsx}",
		"./components/**/*.{ts,tsx}",
		"./app/**/*.{ts,tsx}",
		"./src/**/*.{ts,tsx}",
	],
	prefix: "",
	theme: {
		container: {
			center: true,
			padding: '2rem',
			screens: {
				'2xl': '1400px'
			}
		},
		extend: {
			fontFamily: {
				sans: ['Inter', 'system-ui', 'sans-serif'],
			},
			colors: {
				border: 'hsl(var(--border))',
				input: 'hsl(var(--input))',
				ring: 'hsl(var(--ring))',
				background: 'hsl(var(--background))',
				foreground: 'hsl(var(--foreground))',
				primary: {
					DEFAULT: 'hsl(var(--primary))',
					foreground: 'hsl(var(--primary-foreground))'
				},
				secondary: {
					DEFAULT: 'hsl(var(--secondary))',
					foreground: 'hsl(var(--secondary-foreground))'
				},
				destructive: {
					DEFAULT: 'hsl(var(--destructive))',
					foreground: 'hsl(var(--destructive-foreground))'
				},
				muted: {
					DEFAULT: 'hsl(var(--muted))',
					foreground: 'hsl(var(--muted-foreground))'
				},
				accent: {
					DEFAULT: 'hsl(var(--accent))',
					foreground: 'hsl(var(--accent-foreground))'
				},
				popover: {
					DEFAULT: 'hsl(var(--popover))',
					foreground: 'hsl(var(--popover-foreground))'
				},
				card: {
					DEFAULT: 'hsl(var(--card))',
					foreground: 'hsl(var(--card-foreground))'
				},
				sidebar: {
					DEFAULT: 'hsl(var(--sidebar-background))',
					foreground: 'hsl(var(--sidebar-foreground))',
					primary: 'hsl(var(--sidebar-primary))',
					'primary-foreground': 'hsl(var(--sidebar-primary-foreground))',
					accent: 'hsl(var(--sidebar-accent))',
					'accent-foreground': 'hsl(var(--sidebar-accent-foreground))',
					border: 'hsl(var(--sidebar-border))',
					ring: 'hsl(var(--sidebar-ring))'
				}
			},
			borderRadius: {
				lg: 'var(--radius)',
				md: 'calc(var(--radius) - 2px)',
				sm: 'calc(var(--radius) - 4px)'
			},
			keyframes: {
				'accordion-down': {
					from: {
						height: '0'
					},
					to: {
						height: 'var(--radix-accordion-content-height)'
					}
				},
				'accordion-up': {
					from: {
						height: 'var(--radix-accordion-content-height)'
					},
					to: {
						height: '0'
					}
				}
			},
			animation: {
				'accordion-down': 'accordion-down 0.2s ease-out',
				'accordion-up': 'accordion-up 0.2s ease-out'
			}
		}
	},
	plugins: [require("tailwindcss-animate")],
} satisfies Config;
```

### `src/App.tsx`

```tsx

import { Toaster } from "@/components/ui/sonner";
import { TooltipProvider } from "@/components/ui/tooltip";
import { QueryClient, QueryClientProvider } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route } from "react-router-dom";
import { AuthProvider } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import Index from "@/pages/Index";
import Restaurants from "@/pages/Restaurants";
import RestaurantDetails from "@/pages/RestaurantDetails";
import AddRestaurant from "@/pages/AddRestaurant";
import EditRestaurant from "@/pages/EditRestaurant";
import Auth from "@/pages/Auth";
import Dashboard from "@/pages/Dashboard";
import RestaurantDashboard from "@/pages/RestaurantDashboard";
import RestaurantOwnerDashboard from "@/pages/RestaurantOwnerDashboard";
import RestaurantManagementDashboard from "@/pages/RestaurantManagementDashboard";
import MenuManagementDashboard from "@/pages/MenuManagementDashboard";
import ReviewerDashboard from "@/pages/ReviewerDashboard";
import AdminDashboard from "@/pages/AdminDashboard";
import AdminSetup from "@/pages/AdminSetup";
import About from "@/pages/About";
import Contact from "@/pages/Contact";
import ProfileSettings from "@/pages/ProfileSettings";
import UserProfile from "@/pages/UserProfile";
import MyReviews from "@/pages/MyReviews";
import Favorites from "@/pages/Favorites";
import ClaimRestaurant from "@/pages/ClaimRestaurant";
import ClaimRestaurantSearch from "@/pages/ClaimRestaurantSearch";
import RestaurantAnalytics from "@/pages/RestaurantAnalytics";
import ReviewManagement from "@/pages/ReviewManagement";
import MenuManagement from "@/pages/MenuManagement";
import PromotionsManager from "@/pages/PromotionsManager";
import FoodieLevels from "@/pages/FoodieLevels";
import NotFound from "@/pages/NotFound";
import Pricing from "@/pages/Pricing";
import RecoveryRedirect from "@/components/RecoveryRedirect";

const queryClient = new QueryClient();

function App() {
  return (
    <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>
      <AuthProvider>
        <TooltipProvider>
          <Toaster />
          <BrowserRouter>
            <RecoveryRedirect />
            <Routes>
              <Route path="/" element={<Index />} />
              <Route path="/restaurants" element={<Restaurants />} />
              <Route path="/restaurant/:id" element={<RestaurantDetails />} />
              <Route path="/add-restaurant" element={<AddRestaurant />} />
              <Route path="/edit-restaurant/:id" element={<EditRestaurant />} />
              <Route path="/auth" element={<Auth />} />
              <Route path="/dashboard" element={<Dashboard />} />
              <Route path="/restaurant-dashboard" element={<RestaurantOwnerDashboard />} />
              <Route path="/restaurant/:id/dashboard" element={<RestaurantManagementDashboard />} />
              <Route path="/restaurant-management-dashboard" element={<RestaurantManagementDashboard />} />
              <Route path="/menu-management-dashboard" element={<MenuManagementDashboard />} />
              <Route path="/reviewer-dashboard" element={<ReviewerDashboard />} />
              <Route path="/admin-dashboard" element={<AdminDashboard />} />
              <Route path="/admin-setup" element={<AdminSetup />} />
              <Route path="/about" element={<About />} />
              <Route path="/contact" element={<Contact />} />
              <Route path="/pricing" element={<Pricing />} />
              <Route path="/profile-settings" element={<ProfileSettings />} />
              <Route path="/user/:id" element={<UserProfile />} />
              <Route path="/my-reviews" element={<MyReviews />} />
              <Route path="/favorites" element={<Favorites />} />
              <Route path="/claim-restaurant/:id" element={<ClaimRestaurant />} />
              <Route path="/claim-restaurant-search" element={<ClaimRestaurantSearch />} />
              <Route path="/restaurant-analytics" element={<RestaurantAnalytics />} />
              <Route path="/review-management" element={<ReviewManagement />} />
              <Route path="/menu-management" element={<MenuManagement />} />
              <Route path="/promotions-manager" element={<PromotionsManager />} />
              <Route path="/foodie-levels" element={<FoodieLevels />} />
              <Route path="*" element={<NotFound />} />
            </Routes>
          </BrowserRouter>
        </TooltipProvider>
      </AuthProvider>
    </QueryClientProvider>
  );
}

export default App;

```

```css
/* Eat Halaal Design System - Warm, welcoming colors inspired by South African cuisine */

@layer base {

}

}

/* Custom gradients and animations for food imagery */
@layer utilities {
  .gradient-halaal {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, hsl(var(--primary)) 0%, hsl(var(--secondary)) 100%);
  }
  
  .text-gradient {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, hsl(var(--primary)) 0%, hsl(var(--secondary)) 100%);

    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;

  }
}
```

```ts
export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
```

### `src/utils/formatters.ts`

```ts

// Utility functions for formatting display values
export const formatCuisineTypes = (cuisineTypes: string | string[] | null): string => {
  if (!cuisineTypes) return '';
  
  if (typeof cuisineTypes === 'string') {
    try {
      // Try to parse JSON string
      const parsed = JSON.parse(cuisineTypes);
      if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {
        return parsed.join(', ');
      }
      return cuisineTypes;
    } catch {
      // If not JSON, return as is
      return cuisineTypes;
    }
  }
  
  if (Array.isArray(cuisineTypes)) {
    return cuisineTypes.join(', ');
  }
  
  return '';
};

export const formatPriceRange = (priceRange: string | null): string => {
  if (!priceRange) return '';
  
  const priceRangeMap: { [key: string]: string } = {
    'budget': 'Budget',
    'mid_range': 'Mid Range',
    'upscale': 'Upscale',
    'fine_dining': 'Fine Dining'
  };
  
  return priceRangeMap[priceRange] || priceRange;
};

export const formatRestaurantType = (type: string | null): string => {
  if (!type) return '';
  
  const typeMap: { [key: string]: string } = {
    'casual_dining': 'Casual Dining',
    'fast_food': 'Fast Food',
    'fine_dining': 'Fine Dining',
    'takeaway': 'Takeaway',
    'cafe': 'Café',
    'bakery': 'Bakery',
    'food_truck': 'Food Truck'
  };
  
  return typeMap[type] || type;
};

export const getHalaalStatus = (restaurant: any): { isHalaal: boolean; badgeText: string; badgeClass: string } => {
  // Check if restaurant is community verified
  if (restaurant.certification_body === 'Community Verified' || 
      (restaurant.halaal_certificate_url === null && restaurant.is_halaal_certified)) {
    return {
      isHalaal: true,
      badgeText: 'Community Verified',
      badgeClass: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 border-amber-200'
    };
  }
  
  // Check if restaurant has formal halaal certification
  if (restaurant.is_halaal_certified && restaurant.halaal_certificate_url) {
    return {
      isHalaal: true,
      badgeText: 'Halaal Certified',
      badgeClass: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800 border-green-200'
    };
  }
  
  return {
    isHalaal: false,
    badgeText: '',
    badgeClass: ''
  };
};

```

### `src/utils/duplicateDetection.ts`

```ts

import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';

export interface DuplicateCheckResult {
  isDuplicate: boolean;
  existingRestaurant?: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    address: string;
    city: string;
    province: string;
  };
}

export const checkForDuplicateRestaurant = async (
  name: string,
  address: string,
  city: string,
  province: string
): Promise<DuplicateCheckResult> => {
  try {
    console.log('Checking for duplicates:', { name, address, city, province });
    
    // Normalize the inputs for comparison
    const normalizedName = name.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/[^\w\s]/g, '');
    const normalizedAddress = address.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/[^\w\s]/g, '');
    const normalizedCity = city.trim().toLowerCase();
    const normalizedProvince = province.trim().toLowerCase();

    console.log('Normalized inputs:', { normalizedName, normalizedAddress, normalizedCity, normalizedProvince });

    // First, get all restaurants in the same city and province
    const { data: restaurants, error } = await supabase
      .from('restaurants')
      .select('id, name, address, city, province')
      .eq('is_active', true)
      .ilike('city', normalizedCity)
      .ilike('province', normalizedProvince);

    if (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching restaurants for duplicate check:', error);
      return { isDuplicate: false };
    }

    console.log('Found restaurants in same city/province:', restaurants?.length || 0);

    if (!restaurants || restaurants.length === 0) {
      return { isDuplicate: false };
    }

    // Check each restaurant for potential duplicates
    for (const restaurant of restaurants) {
      const existingNormalizedName = restaurant.name.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/[^\w\s]/g, '');
      const existingNormalizedAddress = restaurant.address.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/[^\w\s]/g, '');

      console.log('Comparing with:', { 
        existing: { name: existingNormalizedName, address: existingNormalizedAddress },
        new: { name: normalizedName, address: normalizedAddress }
      });

      // Check for exact name and address match
      if (existingNormalizedName === normalizedName && existingNormalizedAddress === normalizedAddress) {
        console.log('Found exact match:', restaurant);
        return {
          isDuplicate: true,
          existingRestaurant: restaurant
        };
      }

      // Check for same address with similar name
      if (existingNormalizedAddress === normalizedAddress) {
        const nameDistance = levenshteinDistance(normalizedName, existingNormalizedName);
        const similarityThreshold = Math.max(2, Math.floor(Math.min(normalizedName.length, existingNormalizedName.length) * 0.3));
        
        console.log('Same address, name distance:', nameDistance, 'threshold:', similarityThreshold);
        
        if (nameDistance <= similarityThreshold || 
            existingNormalizedName.includes(normalizedName) || 
            normalizedName.includes(existingNormalizedName)) {
          console.log('Found address match with similar name:', restaurant);
          return {
            isDuplicate: true,
            existingRestaurant: restaurant
          };
        }
      }

      // Check for exact name match (different addresses might be branches)
      if (existingNormalizedName === normalizedName) {
        // Check if addresses are very similar (might be same location with different formatting)
        const addressDistance = levenshteinDistance(normalizedAddress, existingNormalizedAddress);
        const addressThreshold = Math.max(3, Math.floor(Math.min(normalizedAddress.length, existingNormalizedAddress.length) * 0.4));
        
        console.log('Same name, address distance:', addressDistance, 'threshold:', addressThreshold);
        
        if (addressDistance <= addressThreshold) {
          console.log('Found name match with similar address:', restaurant);
          return {
            isDuplicate: true,
            existingRestaurant: restaurant
          };
        }
      }
    }

    console.log('No duplicates found');
    return { isDuplicate: false };
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error in duplicate check:', error);
    return { isDuplicate: false };
  }
};

// Improved Levenshtein distance implementation
const levenshteinDistance = (str1: string, str2: string): number => {
  if (str1.length === 0) return str2.length;
  if (str2.length === 0) return str1.length;

  const matrix = Array(str2.length + 1).fill(null).map(() => Array(str1.length + 1).fill(null));
  
  for (let i = 0; i <= str1.length; i++) {
    matrix[0][i] = i;
  }
  
  for (let j = 0; j <= str2.length; j++) {
    matrix[j][0] = j;
  }
  
  for (let j = 1; j <= str2.length; j++) {
    for (let i = 1; i <= str1.length; i++) {
      if (str1[i - 1] === str2[j - 1]) {
        matrix[j][i] = matrix[j - 1][i - 1];
      } else {
        matrix[j][i] = Math.min(
          matrix[j - 1][i - 1] + 1, // substitution
          matrix[j][i - 1] + 1,     // insertion
          matrix[j - 1][i] + 1      // deletion
        );
      }
    }
  }
  
  return matrix[str2.length][str1.length];
};

```

## Services

### `src/services/geolocation.ts`

```ts

interface GeolocationPosition {
  coords: {
    latitude: number;
    longitude: number;
  };
}

class GeolocationService {
  private userLocation: { lat: number; lng: number } | null = null;
  private locationPromise: Promise<{ lat: number; lng: number }> | null = null;

  async getCurrentLocation(): Promise<{ lat: number; lng: number }> {
    if (this.userLocation) {
      return this.userLocation;
    }

    if (this.locationPromise) {
      return this.locationPromise;
    }

    this.locationPromise = new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      if (!navigator.geolocation) {
        reject(new Error('Geolocation is not supported by this browser.'));
        return;
      }

      navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
        (position: GeolocationPosition) => {
          const location = {
            lat: position.coords.latitude,
            lng: position.coords.longitude
          };
          this.userLocation = location;
          localStorage.setItem('userLocation', JSON.stringify(location));
          resolve(location);
        },
        (error) => {
          console.error('Error getting location:', error);
          reject(error);
        },
        {
          enableHighAccuracy: true,
          timeout: 10000,
          maximumAge: 300000 // 5 minutes
        }
      );
    });

    return this.locationPromise;
  }

  getBias(): google.maps.LatLng | null {
    try {
      const stored = localStorage.getItem('userLocation');
      if (stored && window.google?.maps) {
        const location = JSON.parse(stored);
        return new window.google.maps.LatLng(location.lat, location.lng);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error getting location bias:', error);
    }
    return null;
  }

  async getLocationForRadius(): Promise<{ lat: number; lng: number }> {
    try {
      const stored = localStorage.getItem('userLocation');
      if (stored) {
        return JSON.parse(stored);
      }
      return await this.getCurrentLocation();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error getting location for radius:', error);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  clearLocation(): void {
    this.userLocation = null;
    this.locationPromise = null;
    localStorage.removeItem('userLocation');
  }
}

export const geolocationService = new GeolocationService();

```

### `src/services/googlePlaces.ts`

```ts

import { geolocationService } from './geolocation';

const GOOGLE_API_KEY = 'AIzaSyA9RRwN4MJp5HBI1iCgmVrs-xSSiDbwwrs';

interface ParsedPlace {
  name: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  postalCode: string;
  phone: string;
  website: string;
  latitude?: number;
  longitude?: number;
  photoUrl?: string;
}

class GooglePlacesService {
  private isLoaded = false;
  private loadingPromise: Promise<void> | null = null;
  private retryCount = 0;
  private maxRetries = 3;

  async loadGoogleMaps(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.isLoaded) return;
    if (this.loadingPromise) return this.loadingPromise;

    this.loadingPromise = this.attemptLoad();
    return this.loadingPromise;
  }

  private async attemptLoad(): Promise<void> {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      if (window.google && window.google.maps && window.google.maps.places) {
        this.isLoaded = true;
        resolve();
        return;
      }

      const script = document.createElement('script');
      script.src = `https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/js?key=${GOOGLE_API_KEY}&libraries=places&callback=initGoogleMaps`;
      script.async = true;
      script.defer = true;

      // Global callback for Google Maps
      (window as any).initGoogleMaps = () => {
        this.isLoaded = true;
        resolve();
      };
      
      script.onload = () => {
        // Fallback if callback doesn't fire
        setTimeout(() => {
          if (window.google && window.google.maps) {
            this.isLoaded = true;
            resolve();
          }
        }, 1000);
      };
      
      script.onerror = () => {
        console.error(`Failed to load Google Maps API (attempt ${this.retryCount + 1})`);
        
        if (this.retryCount < this.maxRetries) {
          this.retryCount++;
          this.loadingPromise = null;
          
          // Retry after delay
          setTimeout(() => {
            this.attemptLoad().then(resolve).catch(reject);
          }, 2000 * this.retryCount);
        } else {
          reject(new Error('Failed to load Google Maps API after multiple attempts'));
        }
      };

      document.head.appendChild(script);
    });
  }

  async createAutocomplete(input: HTMLInputElement, onPlaceSelected?: (place: ParsedPlace) => void): Promise<google.maps.places.Autocomplete | null> {
    try {
      await this.loadGoogleMaps();
      
      if (!window.google?.maps?.places) {
        console.warn('Google Places not available, falling back to manual input');
        return null;
      }
      
      const autocomplete = new window.google.maps.places.Autocomplete(input, {
        types: ['establishment'],
        fields: ['place_id', 'name', 'formatted_address', 'address_components', 'formatted_phone_number', 'website', 'geometry', 'photos'],
        componentRestrictions: { country: 'za' } // Restrict to South Africa
      });

      // Bias to user location if available
      const bias = geolocationService.getBias();
      if (bias) {
        const bounds = new window.google.maps.LatLngBounds(
          new window.google.maps.LatLng(bias.lat() - 0.01, bias.lng() - 0.01),
          new window.google.maps.LatLng(bias.lat() + 0.01, bias.lng() + 0.01)
        );
        autocomplete.setBounds(bounds);
      }

      if (onPlaceSelected) {
        autocomplete.addListener('place_changed', () => {
          const place = autocomplete.getPlace();
          console.log('Place changed event triggered:', place);
          
          if (place && place.address_components) {
            const parsed = this.parsePlace(place);
            console.log('Parsed place data (direct):', parsed);
            onPlaceSelected(parsed);
          } else if (place && (place as any).place_id) {
            // Fallback: fetch full place details when address_components are missing
            try {
              const service = new window.google.maps.places.PlacesService(document.createElement('div'));
              service.getDetails(
                {
                  placeId: (place as any).place_id,
                  fields: ['name', 'formatted_address', 'address_components', 'formatted_phone_number', 'website', 'geometry', 'photos'],
                },
                (details, status) => {
                  if (status === window.google.maps.places.PlacesServiceStatus.OK && details) {
                    const parsed = this.parsePlace(details);
                    console.log('Parsed place data (via getDetails):', parsed);
                    onPlaceSelected(parsed);
                  } else {
                    console.warn('Failed to fetch place details:', status, details);
                  }
                }
              );
            } catch (err) {
              console.error('Error fetching place details:', err);
            }
          } else {
            console.log('Place data incomplete or missing address_components and place_id:', place);
          }
        });
      }

      return autocomplete;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to create autocomplete:', error);
      console.warn('Autocomplete unavailable, using manual input fallback');
      return null;
    }
  }

  private parsePlace(place: google.maps.places.PlaceResult): ParsedPlace {
    const components = place.address_components || [];
    
    let streetNumber = '';
    let route = '';
    let city = '';
    let province = '';
    let postalCode = '';

    components.forEach(component => {
      const types = component.types;
      
      if (types.includes('street_number')) {
        streetNumber = component.long_name;
      } else if (types.includes('route')) {
        route = component.long_name;
      } else if (types.includes('locality') || types.includes('sublocality')) {
        city = component.long_name;
      } else if (types.includes('administrative_area_level_1')) {
        province = component.long_name;
      } else if (types.includes('postal_code')) {
        postalCode = component.long_name;
      }
    });

    // Use formatted_address for complete address, fallback to components
    const address = place.formatted_address || [streetNumber, route].filter(Boolean).join(' ');

    // Get coordinates if available
    const latitude = place.geometry?.location?.lat();
    const longitude = place.geometry?.location?.lng();

    // Get first photo URL if available
    let photoUrl = '';
    if (place.photos && place.photos.length > 0) {
      const photo = place.photos[0];
      photoUrl = photo.getUrl({ maxWidth: 800 });
    }

    return {
      name: place.name || '',
      address: address,
      city,
      province,
      postalCode,
      phone: place.formatted_phone_number || '',
      website: place.website || '',
      latitude,
      longitude,
      photoUrl
    };
  }

  isGoogleMapsLoaded(): boolean {
    return this.isLoaded && Boolean(window.google?.maps?.places);
  }
}

export const googlePlacesService = new GooglePlacesService();

```

## Contexts

### `src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { createContext, useContext, useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { User, Session } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';

interface AuthContextType {
  user: User | null;
  session: Session | null;
  loading: boolean;
  signUp: (email: string, password: string, fullName?: string) => Promise<{ error: any }>;
  signIn: (email: string, password: string) => Promise<{ error: any }>;
  signInWithGoogle: () => Promise<{ error: any }>;
  signOut: () => Promise<void>;
}

const AuthContext = createContext<AuthContextType | undefined>(undefined);

export const useAuth = () => {
  const context = useContext(AuthContext);
  if (!context) {
    throw new Error('useAuth must be used within an AuthProvider');
  }
  return context;
};

export const AuthProvider: React.FC<{ children: React.ReactNode }> = ({ children }) => {
  const [user, setUser] = useState<User | null>(null);
  const [session, setSession] = useState<Session | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    // Set up auth state listener
    const { data: { subscription } } = supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange(
      (event, session) => {
        setSession(session);
        setUser(session?.user ?? null);
        setLoading(false);
      }
    );

    // Check for existing session
    supabase.auth.getSession().then(({ data: { session } }) => {
      setSession(session);
      setUser(session?.user ?? null);
      setLoading(false);
    });

    return () => subscription.unsubscribe();
  }, []);

  const signUp = async (email: string, password: string, fullName?: string) => {
    const redirectUrl = `${window.location.origin}/`;
    
    const { error } = await supabase.auth.signUp({
      email,
      password,
      options: {
        emailRedirectTo: redirectUrl,
        data: {
          full_name: fullName || ''
        }
      }
    });
    return { error };
  };

  const signIn = async (email: string, password: string) => {
    const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({
      email,
      password
    });
    return { error };
  };

  const signInWithGoogle = async () => {
    const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({
      provider: 'google',
      options: {
        redirectTo: `${window.location.origin}/`
      }
    });
    return { error };
  };

  const signOut = async () => {
    await supabase.auth.signOut();
  };

  const value = {
    user,
    session,
    loading,
    signUp,
    signIn,
    signInWithGoogle,
    signOut
  };

  return (
    <AuthContext.Provider value={value}>
      {children}
    </AuthContext.Provider>
  );
};

```

## Hooks

### `src/hooks/use-mobile.tsx`

```tsx
import * as React from "react"

const MOBILE_BREAKPOINT = 768

export function useIsMobile() {
  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = React.useState<boolean | undefined>(undefined)

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const mql = window.matchMedia(`(max-width: ${MOBILE_BREAKPOINT - 1}px)`)
    const onChange = () => {
      setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT)
    }
    mql.addEventListener("change", onChange)
    setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT)
    return () => mql.removeEventListener("change", onChange)
  }, [])

  return !!isMobile
}

```

### `src/hooks/use-toast.ts`

```ts
import * as React from "react"

import type {
  ToastActionElement,
  ToastProps,
} from "@/components/ui/toast"

const TOAST_LIMIT = 1
const TOAST_REMOVE_DELAY = 1000000

type ToasterToast = ToastProps & {
  id: string
  title?: React.ReactNode
  description?: React.ReactNode
  action?: ToastActionElement
}

const actionTypes = {
  ADD_TOAST: "ADD_TOAST",
  UPDATE_TOAST: "UPDATE_TOAST",
  DISMISS_TOAST: "DISMISS_TOAST",
  REMOVE_TOAST: "REMOVE_TOAST",
} as const

let count = 0

function genId() {
  count = (count + 1) % Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER
  return count.toString()
}

type ActionType = typeof actionTypes

type Action =
  | {
      type: ActionType["ADD_TOAST"]
      toast: ToasterToast
    }
  | {
      type: ActionType["UPDATE_TOAST"]
      toast: Partial<ToasterToast>
    }
  | {
      type: ActionType["DISMISS_TOAST"]
      toastId?: ToasterToast["id"]
    }
  | {
      type: ActionType["REMOVE_TOAST"]
      toastId?: ToasterToast["id"]
    }

interface State {
  toasts: ToasterToast[]
}

const toastTimeouts = new Map<string, ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>()

const addToRemoveQueue = (toastId: string) => {
  if (toastTimeouts.has(toastId)) {
    return
  }

  const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
    toastTimeouts.delete(toastId)
    dispatch({
      type: "REMOVE_TOAST",
      toastId: toastId,
    })
  }, TOAST_REMOVE_DELAY)

  toastTimeouts.set(toastId, timeout)
}

export const reducer = (state: State, action: Action): State => {
  switch (action.type) {
    case "ADD_TOAST":
      return {
        ...state,
        toasts: [action.toast, ...state.toasts].slice(0, TOAST_LIMIT),
      }

    case "UPDATE_TOAST":
      return {
        ...state,
        toasts: state.toasts.map((t) =>
          t.id === action.toast.id ? { ...t, ...action.toast } : t
        ),
      }

    case "DISMISS_TOAST": {
      const { toastId } = action

      // ! Side effects ! - This could be extracted into a dismissToast() action,
      // but I'll keep it here for simplicity
      if (toastId) {
        addToRemoveQueue(toastId)
      } else {
        state.toasts.forEach((toast) => {
          addToRemoveQueue(toast.id)
        })
      }

      return {
        ...state,
        toasts: state.toasts.map((t) =>
          t.id === toastId || toastId === undefined
            ? {
                ...t,
                open: false,
              }
            : t
        ),
      }
    }
    case "REMOVE_TOAST":
      if (action.toastId === undefined) {
        return {
          ...state,
          toasts: [],
        }
      }
      return {
        ...state,
        toasts: state.toasts.filter((t) => t.id !== action.toastId),
      }
  }
}

const listeners: Array<(state: State) => void> = []

let memoryState: State = { toasts: [] }

function dispatch(action: Action) {
  memoryState = reducer(memoryState, action)
  listeners.forEach((listener) => {
    listener(memoryState)
  })
}

type Toast = Omit<ToasterToast, "id">

function toast({ ...props }: Toast) {
  const id = genId()

  const update = (props: ToasterToast) =>
    dispatch({
      type: "UPDATE_TOAST",
      toast: { ...props, id },
    })
  const dismiss = () => dispatch({ type: "DISMISS_TOAST", toastId: id })

  dispatch({
    type: "ADD_TOAST",
    toast: {
      ...props,
      id,
      open: true,
      onOpenChange: (open) => {
        if (!open) dismiss()
      },
    },
  })

  return {
    id: id,
    dismiss,
    update,
  }
}

function useToast() {
  const [state, setState] = React.useState<State>(memoryState)

  React.useEffect(() => {
    listeners.push(setState)
    return () => {
      const index = listeners.indexOf(setState)
      if (index > -1) {
        listeners.splice(index, 1)
      }
    }
  }, [state])

  return {
    ...state,
    toast,
    dismiss: (toastId?: string) => dispatch({ type: "DISMISS_TOAST", toastId }),
  }
}

export { useToast, toast }

```

### `src/hooks/useAnalytics.ts`

```ts

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';

interface AnalyticsData {
  date: string;
  views: number;
  profile_visits: number;
  menu_views: number;
  contact_clicks: number;
  website_clicks: number;
  phone_clicks: number;
  direction_clicks: number;
}

export const useAnalytics = (restaurantId: string, days: number = 30) => {
  const [data, setData] = useState<AnalyticsData[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (restaurantId) {
      fetchAnalytics();
    }
  }, [restaurantId, days]);

  const fetchAnalytics = async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      const endDate = new Date();
      const startDate = new Date();
      startDate.setDate(endDate.getDate() - days);

      const { data: analyticsData, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_analytics')
        .select('*')
        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurantId)
        .gte('date', startDate.toISOString().split('T')[0])
        .lte('date', endDate.toISOString().split('T')[0])
        .order('date', { ascending: true });

      if (error) throw error;

      // Fill in missing dates with zero values
      const filledData: AnalyticsData[] = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < days; i++) {
        const currentDate = new Date();
        currentDate.setDate(endDate.getDate() - (days - 1 - i));
        const dateString = currentDate.toISOString().split('T')[0];
        
        const existingData = analyticsData?.find(d => d.date === dateString);
        filledData.push({
          date: dateString,
          views: existingData?.views || 0,
          profile_visits: existingData?.profile_visits || 0,
          menu_views: existingData?.menu_views || 0,
          contact_clicks: existingData?.contact_clicks || 0,
          website_clicks: existingData?.website_clicks || 0,
          phone_clicks: existingData?.phone_clicks || 0,
          direction_clicks: existingData?.direction_clicks || 0,
        });
      }

      setData(filledData);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'An error occurred');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const trackView = async (activityType: string = 'views') => {
    try {
      await supabase.rpc('track_restaurant_view', {
        restaurant_uuid: restaurantId,
        activity_type: activityType
      });
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error tracking view:', err);
    }
  };

  return {
    data,
    loading,
    error,
    trackView,
    refetch: fetchAnalytics
  };
};

```

### `src/hooks/useSubscription.ts`

```ts

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';

interface SubscriptionStatus {
  tier: 'basic' | 'sizzlin' | 'super_hot';
  isActive: boolean;
  endDate: string | null;
  features: {
    maxPhotos: number;
    hasMenuUpload: boolean;
    hasAdvancedAnalytics: boolean;
    hasCustomerMessaging: boolean;
    hasApiAccess: boolean;
    hasWhiteLabel: boolean;
    hasRegionalPromotions: boolean;
  };
}

export const useSubscription = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [subscription, setSubscription] = useState<SubscriptionStatus | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user?.id) {
      fetchSubscription();
    } else {
      // Set default subscription for non-authenticated users
      setSubscription({
        tier: 'basic',
        isActive: false,
        endDate: null,
        features: getFeaturesByTier('basic')
      });
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchSubscription = async () => {
    if (!user?.id) {
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('subscribers')
        .select('subscription_tier, subscribed, subscription_end')
        .eq('user_id', user.id)
        .maybeSingle();

      if (error && error.code !== 'PGRST116') {
        console.error('Subscription fetch error:', error);
        throw error;
      }

      const tier = data?.subscription_tier || 'basic';
      const isActive = data?.subscribed || false;
      const endDate = data?.subscription_end || null;

      // Define features based on tier
      const features = getFeaturesByTier(tier);

      setSubscription({
        tier: tier as 'basic' | 'sizzlin' | 'super_hot',
        isActive,
        endDate,
        features
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching subscription:', error);
      // Default to basic if error
      setSubscription({
        tier: 'basic',
        isActive: false,
        endDate: null,
        features: getFeaturesByTier('basic')
      });
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const getFeaturesByTier = (tier: string) => {
    switch (tier) {
      case 'sizzlin':
        return {
          maxPhotos: -1, // unlimited
          hasMenuUpload: true,
          hasAdvancedAnalytics: true,
          hasCustomerMessaging: true,
          hasApiAccess: false,
          hasWhiteLabel: false,
          hasRegionalPromotions: false
        };
      case 'super_hot':
        return {
          maxPhotos: -1, // unlimited
          hasMenuUpload: true,
          hasAdvancedAnalytics: true,
          hasCustomerMessaging: true,
          hasApiAccess: true,
          hasWhiteLabel: true,
          hasRegionalPromotions: true
        };
      default: // basic
        return {
          maxPhotos: 5,
          hasMenuUpload: false,
          hasAdvancedAnalytics: false,
          hasCustomerMessaging: false,
          hasApiAccess: false,
          hasWhiteLabel: false,
          hasRegionalPromotions: false
        };
    }
  };

  const hasFeature = (feature: keyof SubscriptionStatus['features']) => {
    return subscription?.features[feature] || false;
  };

  const canUploadPhotos = (currentCount: number) => {
    if (!subscription) return false;
    return subscription.features.maxPhotos === -1 || currentCount < subscription.features.maxPhotos;
  };

  return {
    subscription,
    loading,
    hasFeature,
    canUploadPhotos,
    refresh: fetchSubscription
  };
};

```
