### `supabase/functions/google-places-search/index.ts`

```ts

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.168.0/http/server.ts"

const corsHeaders = {
  'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',
  'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'authorization, x-client-info, apikey, content-type',
}

serve(async (req) => {
  // Handle CORS preflight requests
  if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {
    return new Response('ok', { headers: corsHeaders })
  }

  try {
    const { query } = await req.json()
    
    if (!query) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Query parameter is required' }),
        { 
          status: 400, 
          headers: { ...corsHeaders, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } 
        }
      )
    }

    const GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY = 'AIzaSyDQbbO-tIubo5k2EWNB96tZlM7V8Yj5Lao'

    // Search for places using Text Search API
    const searchResponse = await fetch(
      `https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/place/textsearch/json?query=${encodeURIComponent(query + ' restaurant South Africa')}&key=${GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY}`
    )

    if (!searchResponse.ok) {
      throw new Error('Failed to search places')
    }

    const searchData = await searchResponse.json()
    
    if (searchData.status !== 'OK' && searchData.status !== 'ZERO_RESULTS') {
      throw new Error(`Places API error: ${searchData.status}`)
    }

    const places = searchData.results || []
    const placeResults = []

    // Get detailed information for each place (limit to 5)
    for (const place of places.slice(0, 5)) {
      try {
        const detailsResponse = await fetch(
          `https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/place/details/json?place_id=${place.place_id}&fields=name,formatted_address,formatted_phone_number,website,rating,opening_hours,address_components,photos&key=${GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY}`
        )

        if (detailsResponse.ok) {
          const detailsData = await detailsResponse.json()
          const details = detailsData.result

          if (details) {
            // Parse address components
            const addressComponents = details.address_components || []
            let city = ''
            let province = ''
            let postal_code = ''

            addressComponents.forEach((component: any) => {
              if (component.types.includes('locality')) {
                city = component.long_name
              } else if (component.types.includes('administrative_area_level_1')) {
                province = component.long_name
              } else if (component.types.includes('postal_code')) {
                postal_code = component.long_name
              }
            })

            // If no city found, try sublocality
            if (!city) {
              addressComponents.forEach((component: any) => {
                if (component.types.includes('sublocality')) {
                  city = component.long_name
                }
              })
            }

            // Get first photo URL if available
            let photoUrl = ''
            if (details.photos && details.photos.length > 0) {
              const photoReference = details.photos[0].photo_reference
              photoUrl = `https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/place/photo?maxwidth=800&photo_reference=${photoReference}&key=${GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY}`
            }

            const placeResult = {
              name: details.name || place.name,
              address: details.formatted_address || place.formatted_address || '',
              city: city || 'Unknown',
              province: province || 'Unknown',
              postal_code: postal_code || '',
              phone: details.formatted_phone_number,
              website: details.website,
              rating: details.rating,
              opening_hours: details.opening_hours?.weekday_text,
              place_id: place.place_id,
              photo_url: photoUrl
            }

            placeResults.push(placeResult)
          }
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error fetching place details:', error)
        // Add basic info even if details fail
        placeResults.push({
          name: place.name,
          address: place.formatted_address || '',
          city: 'Unknown',
          province: 'Unknown',
          postal_code: '',
          rating: place.rating,
          place_id: place.place_id
        })
      }
    }

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ results: placeResults }),
      { 
        headers: { ...corsHeaders, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } 
      }
    )

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error in google-places-search function:', error)
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Internal server error' }),
      { 
        status: 500, 
        headers: { ...corsHeaders, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } 
      }
    )
  }
})

```

## Pages

### `src/pages/About.tsx`

```tsx
import React from 'react';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import Footer from '@/components/Footer';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { 
  Building2, 
  Handshake, 
  Smartphone, 
  Briefcase, 
  Users,
  Search,
  FileText,
  CheckCircle,
  Megaphone
} from 'lucide-react';

const About = () => {
  const missionItems = [
    {
      icon: Building2,
      title: "Promote verified Halaal dining",
      description: "Ensuring authenticity and trust in every meal"
    },
    {
      icon: Handshake,
      title: "Support local and family-run restaurants",
      description: "Helping small businesses thrive in the digital age"
    },
    {
      icon: Smartphone,
      title: "Make discovery easy for users from all backgrounds",
      description: "Simple, inclusive platform for everyone"
    },
    {
      icon: Briefcase,
      title: "Help small businesses grow digitally",
      description: "Tools and visibility to expand your reach"
    },
    {
      icon: Users,
      title: "Empower reviewers and community voices",
      description: "Building a trusted community of food lovers"
    }
  ];

  const howItWorksSteps = [
    {
      icon: Search,
      title: "Find restaurants by location or cuisine",
      description: "Discover amazing Halaal food near you"
    },
    {
      icon: FileText,
      title: "Leave reviews & upload photos/videos",
      description: "Share your experiences with the community"
    },
    {
      icon: CheckCircle,
      title: "Verified by Halaal authorities",
      description: "Trust in every recommendation"
    },
    {
      icon: Megaphone,
      title: "Promote your restaurant and grow online",
      description: "Restaurant owners can boost their visibility"
    }
  ];

  const testimonials = [
    {
      quote: "Eat Halaal helped me discover places I never knew existed.",
      author: "Fatima K., Cape Town"
    },
    {
      quote: "We doubled foot traffic after getting listed and verified.",
      author: "Ahmed's Kitchen, Johannesburg"
    },
    {
      quote: "Finally, a platform that understands our needs as a Muslim family.",
      author: "Yusuf M., Durban"
    }
  ];

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen">
      <Header />
      
      {/* Hero Section */}
      <section className="py-20 bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-white">
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 text-center">
          <h1 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">
            Why We Built Eat Halaal
          </h1>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-700 mb-8 max-w-3xl mx-auto">
            Helping South Africa's Halaal community find great food, with ease and dignity.
          </p>
          <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto h-64 bg-gray-200 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center mb-8">
            <img 
              src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1466442929976-97f336a657be?w=800&h=400&fit=crop" 
              alt="Community dining together"
              className="w-full h-full object-cover rounded-lg"
            />
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Founder's Story */}
      <section className="py-16 bg-white">
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-8 text-center">Our Story</h2>
          <Card className="border-0 shadow-lg">
            <CardContent className="p-8 md:p-12">
              <div className="prose prose-lg max-w-none">
                <p className="text-gray-700 leading-relaxed mb-6">
                  I built Eat Halaal out of love and frustration. It was difficult finding Halaal restaurants 
                  that accommodated my partner's dietary needs—especially when we traveled or wanted to try 
                  something new. Catering for events was even harder.
                </p>
                <p className="text-gray-700 leading-relaxed mb-6">
                  I realized there needed to be a better way—something inclusive, user-friendly, and verified. 
                  So, I created Eat Halaal.
                </p>
                <p className="text-gray-700 leading-relaxed">
                  This platform brings transparency, convenience, and visibility to the Halaal food space. 
                  We believe every Muslim should have confidence in their dining choices and easy access 
                  to quality Halaal cuisine.
                </p>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Mission */}
      <section className="py-16 bg-gray-50">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-12 text-center">What We Stand For</h2>
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
            {missionItems.map((item, index) => (
              <Card key={index} className="hover-lift">
                <CardContent className="p-6 text-center">
                  <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-green-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
                    <item.icon className="h-8 w-8 text-green-600" />
                  </div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">{item.title}</h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm">{item.description}</p>
                </CardContent>
              </Card>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* How It Works */}
      <section className="py-16 bg-white">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-12 text-center">How It Works</h2>
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
            {howItWorksSteps.map((step, index) => (
              <div key={index} className="text-center">
                <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-blue-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
                  <step.icon className="h-8 w-8 text-blue-600" />
                </div>
                <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">{step.title}</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm">{step.description}</p>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          <div className="text-center mt-8">
            <Button variant="outline" asChild>
              <Link to="/restaurants">See How It Works</Link>
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Built for South Africa */}
      <section className="py-16 bg-green-50">
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-8 text-center">Proudly South African</h2>
          <Card className="border-0 shadow-lg">
            <CardContent className="p-8 md:p-12 text-center">
              <p className="text-gray-700 leading-relaxed mb-6">
                Eat Halaal focuses on the South African market first, tailored for our unique needs:
              </p>
              <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6 text-left">
                <div>
                  <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">Regional Cuisines</h4>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">From Cape Malay to Indian, celebrating our diversity</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">All Cities & Towns</h4>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">From major cities to small towns across SA</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">Local Verification</h4>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Verified by SANHA, Halaal Foundation & other local authorities</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Join the Movement */}
      <section className="py-16 bg-white">
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 text-center">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-8">Be Part of the Eat Halaal Family</h2>
          <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 mb-8">
            Join our growing community of food lovers, restaurant owners, and reviewers
          </p>
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
            <Button asChild className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700">
              <Link to="/add-restaurant">Add a Restaurant</Link>
            </Button>
            <Button asChild variant="outline">
              <Link to="/auth">Become a Reviewer</Link>
            </Button>
            <Button asChild variant="outline">
              <a href="#" target="_blank">Follow Us on TikTok</a>
            </Button>
            <Button asChild className="bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700">
              <Link to="/claim-restaurant-search">List Your Business</Link>
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Testimonials */}
      <section className="py-16 bg-gray-50">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-12 text-center">What Our Community Says</h2>
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
            {testimonials.map((testimonial, index) => (
              <Card key={index} className="hover-lift">
                <CardContent className="p-6">
                  <blockquote className="text-gray-700 mb-4">
                    "{testimonial.quote}"
                  </blockquote>
                  <cite className="text-sm text-gray-500 font-medium">
                    — {testimonial.author}
                  </cite>
                </CardContent>
              </Card>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <Footer />
    </div>
  );
};

export default About;

```

### `src/pages/AddRestaurant.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Switch } from '@/components/ui/switch';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { MapPin, Phone, Calendar } from 'lucide-react';
import DuplicateRestaurantDialog from '@/components/DuplicateRestaurantDialog';
import FileUpload from '@/components/ui/file-upload';
import GooglePlacesSearch from '@/components/GooglePlacesSearch';
import CuisineMultiSelect from '@/components/CuisineMultiSelect';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription } from '@/components/ui/dialog';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  postal_code?: string;
  phone?: string;
  email?: string;
  website?: string;
  instagram?: string;
  facebook?: string;
  tiktok?: string;
  restaurant_type: string;
  cuisine_type?: string;
  price_range?: string;
  is_verified: boolean;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  claim_status?: string;
  owner_id?: string;
}

interface DuplicateCandidate {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  similarity_score: number;
}

const AddRestaurant = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [duplicateRestaurant, setDuplicateRestaurant] = useState<DuplicateCandidate | null>(null);
  const [showDuplicateDialog, setShowDuplicateDialog] = useState(false);
  const [bypassDuplicateCheck, setBypassDuplicateCheck] = useState(false);
  const [showCommunityVerifiedDialog, setShowCommunityVerifiedDialog] = useState(false);
  const [showManualEntry, setShowManualEntry] = useState(false);

  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    name: '',
    description: '',
    address: '',
    city: '',
    province: '',
    postal_code: '',
    phone: '',
    email: '',
    website: '',
    instagram: '',
    facebook: '',
    tiktok: '',
    restaurant_type: '' as 'casual_dining' | 'fast_food' | 'fine_dining' | 'takeaway' | 'cafe' | 'bakery' | 'food_truck' | '',
    cuisine_type: [] as string[],
    price_range: '',
    imageUrl: '',
    claimAsOwner: false,
    // Owner claim fields
    ownerFullName: '',
    ownerPhoneNumber: '',
    halaalCertificateFile: null as File | null,
    halaalCertificateUrl: '',
    certificationBody: 'SANHA',
    certificateExpiryDate: ''
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!user) {
      navigate('/auth');
    }
  }, [user, navigate]);

  const handlePlaceSelect = (place: any) => {
    console.log('Place selected:', place);
    setFormData(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      name: place.name || '',
      address: place.address || '',
      city: place.city || '',
      province: place.province || '',
      postal_code: place.postal_code || '',
      phone: place.phone || '',
      website: place.website || '',
      imageUrl: place.photo_url || ''
    }));
    toast.success('Restaurant details auto-populated from Google Places!');
  };

  const checkForDuplicates = async (name: string, address: string) => {
    if (!name.trim() || !address.trim()) return null;

    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('id, name, address, city, province')
        .ilike('name', `%${name}%`)
        .limit(1);

      if (error) throw error;

      if (data && data.length > 0) {
        return {
          id: data[0].id,
          name: data[0].name,
          address: data[0].address,
          city: data[0].city,
          province: data[0].province,
          similarity_score: 0.8
        };
      }

      return null;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error checking duplicates:', error);
      return null;
    }
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    
    console.log('Form submission started');
    console.log('User authenticated:', !!user);
    console.log('Form data:', formData);
    
    if (!user) {
      toast.error('Please sign in to add a restaurant');
      return;
    }

    // Validate required basic fields
    if (!formData.name.trim()) {
      toast.error('Please enter a restaurant name');
      return;
    }

    if (!formData.address.trim()) {
      toast.error('Please enter a restaurant address');
      return;
    }

    if (!formData.city.trim()) {
      toast.error('Please enter a city');
      return;
    }

    if (!formData.province) {
      toast.error('Please select a province');
      return;
    }

    if (!formData.restaurant_type) {
      toast.error('Please select a restaurant type');
      return;
    }

    // Validate owner claim fields if claiming ownership
    if (formData.claimAsOwner) {
      if (!formData.ownerFullName || !formData.ownerPhoneNumber || (!formData.halaalCertificateFile && formData.certificationBody !== 'Community Verified') || !formData.certificateExpiryDate) {
        toast.error('Please fill in all required fields for ownership claim');
        return;
      }
    }

    setLoading(true);

    try {
      if (!bypassDuplicateCheck) {
        const duplicateResult = await checkForDuplicates(formData.name, formData.address);
        if (duplicateResult) {
          setDuplicateRestaurant(duplicateResult);
          setShowDuplicateDialog(true);
          setLoading(false);
          return;
        }
      }

      let halaalCertificateUrl = '';
      
      // Upload halaal certificate if provided
      if (formData.halaalCertificateFile && formData.certificationBody !== 'Community Verified') {
        const fileExt = formData.halaalCertificateFile.name.split('.').pop();
        const fileName = `${Date.now()}.${fileExt}`;
        
        const { data: uploadData, error: uploadError } = await supabase.storage
          .from('restaurant-documents')
          .upload(`halaal-certificates/${fileName}`, formData.halaalCertificateFile);

        if (uploadError) {
          console.error('Error uploading file:', uploadError);
          toast.error('Failed to upload halaal certificate');
          setLoading(false);
          return;
        }

        const { data: { publicUrl } } = supabase.storage
          .from('restaurant-documents')
          .getPublicUrl(uploadData.path);

        halaalCertificateUrl = publicUrl;
      }

      const restaurantData = {
        name: formData.name,
        description: formData.description,
        address: formData.address,
        city: formData.city,
        province: formData.province,
        postal_code: formData.postal_code || null,
        phone: formData.phone || null,
        email: formData.email || null,
        website: formData.website || null,
        instagram: formData.instagram || null,
        facebook: formData.facebook || null,
        tiktok: formData.tiktok || null,
        restaurant_type: formData.restaurant_type,
        cuisine_type: formData.cuisine_type.length > 0 ? JSON.stringify(formData.cuisine_type) : null,
        price_range: formData.price_range || null,
        is_halaal_certified: formData.claimAsOwner && !!formData.halaalCertificateFile,
        halaal_certificate_url: halaalCertificateUrl || null,
        claim_status: formData.claimAsOwner ? 'pending' : 'unclaimed',
        owner_id: formData.claimAsOwner ? user.id : null,
        is_verified: false,
        verification_status: 'pending',
        subscription_tier: 'basic',
        image_url: formData.imageUrl || null
      };

      const { data: restaurant, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .insert(restaurantData)
        .select()
        .single();

      if (error) throw error;

      if (formData.claimAsOwner) {
        const claimData = {
          restaurant_id: restaurant.id,
          user_id: user.id,
          business_email: formData.email || user.email || '',
          business_phone: formData.ownerPhoneNumber,
          halaal_certificate_url: halaalCertificateUrl,
          certification_body: formData.certificationBody,
          halaal_certificate_expiry_date: formData.certificateExpiryDate,
          additional_notes: `Restaurant added by owner. Full name: ${formData.ownerFullName}`,
          status: 'pending'
        };

        const { error: claimError } = await supabase
          .from('restaurant_claims')
          .insert([claimData]);

        if (claimError) {
          console.error('Error creating claim:', claimError);
        }

        toast.success('Restaurant added successfully! Your ownership claim is under review.');
        navigate('/restaurant-dashboard');
      } else {
        toast.success('Restaurant added successfully!');
        navigate('/restaurants');
      }
    } catch (error: any) {
      console.error('Error adding restaurant:', error);
      toast.error(`Failed to add restaurant: ${error.message}`);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDuplicateContinue = () => {
    setBypassDuplicateCheck(true);
    setShowDuplicateDialog(false);
    handleSubmit(new Event('submit') as any);
  };

  const handleDuplicateClose = () => {
    setShowDuplicateDialog(false);
    setDuplicateRestaurant(null);
  };

  const handleFileUpload = (file: File | null, url: string) => {
    setFormData(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      halaalCertificateFile: file,
      halaalCertificateUrl: url
    }));
  };

  const handleCertificationBodyChange = (value: string) => {
    setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, certificationBody: value }));
    
    if (value === 'Community Verified') {
      setShowCommunityVerifiedDialog(true);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 via-white to-amber-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        <div className="mb-8">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Add New Restaurant</h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600">Help the community discover amazing halaal restaurants</p>
        </div>

        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-8">
          {/* Basic Information */}
          <Card>
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <MapPin className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600" />
                Basic Information
              </CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent className="space-y-6">
              {!showManualEntry ? (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  <Label>Search for Restaurant</Label>
                  <GooglePlacesSearch
                    onPlaceSelect={handlePlaceSelect}
                    onManualEntry={() => setShowManualEntry(true)}
                  />
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                  <div>
                    <Label htmlFor="name">Restaurant Name *</Label>
                    <Input
                      id="name"
                      type="text"
                      value={formData.name}
                      onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, name: e.target.value }))}
                      placeholder="Enter restaurant name..."
                      required
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <Button
                      type="button"
                      variant="link"
                      onClick={() => setShowManualEntry(false)}
                      className="mt-6"
                    >
                      ← Back to search
                    </Button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                
                <div>
                  <Label htmlFor="restaurant_type">Restaurant Type *</Label>
                  <Select
                    value={formData.restaurant_type}
                    onValueChange={(value: typeof formData.restaurant_type) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, restaurant_type: value }))}
                  >
                    <SelectTrigger>
                      <SelectValue placeholder="Select type" />
                    </SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                      <SelectItem value="casual_dining">Casual Dining</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="fast_food">Fast Food</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="fine_dining">Fine Dining</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="takeaway">Takeaway</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="cafe">Café</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="bakery">Bakery</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="food_truck">Food Truck</SelectItem>
                    </SelectContent>
                  </Select>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div>
                <Label htmlFor="description">Description</Label>
                <Textarea
                  id="description"
                  value={formData.description}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, description: e.target.value }))}
                  placeholder="Describe the restaurant, its atmosphere, and specialties..."
                  rows={3}
                />
              </div>

              {/* Restaurant Image Preview */}
              {formData.imageUrl && (
                <div>
                  <Label>Restaurant Image</Label>
                  <div className="mt-2 p-4 border-2 border-dashed border-green-200 rounded-lg bg-green-50">
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                      <img
                        src={formData.imageUrl}
                        alt={formData.name}
                        className="w-32 h-24 object-cover rounded-lg border"
                      />
                      <div className="flex-1">
                        <p className="text-sm font-medium text-green-800">
                          Preview image from Google Places
                        </p>
                        <p className="text-xs text-green-600 mt-1">
                          This image will be used as the restaurant's preview photo
                        </p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                <div>
                  <Label htmlFor="cuisine_type">Cuisine Types</Label>
                  <CuisineMultiSelect
                    value={formData.cuisine_type}
                    onChange={(value) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, cuisine_type: value }))}
                    placeholder="Select cuisine types..."
                  />
                </div>
                
                <div>
                  <Label htmlFor="price_range">Price Range</Label>
                  <Select
                    value={formData.price_range}
                    onValueChange={(value) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, price_range: value }))}
                  >
                    <SelectTrigger>
                      <SelectValue placeholder="Select price range" />
                    </SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                      <SelectItem value="budget">Budget (R)</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="mid_range">Mid-Range (RR)</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="upscale">Upscale (RRR)</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="fine_dining">Fine Dining (RRR+)</SelectItem>
                    </SelectContent>
                  </Select>
                </div>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>

          {/* Location & Contact */}
          <Card>
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <Phone className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600" />
                Location & Contact
                {formData.imageUrl && (
                  <span className="text-sm text-green-600 font-normal ml-2">
                    (Auto-populated from Google Places)
                  </span>
                )}
              </CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent className="space-y-6">
              <div>
                <Label htmlFor="address">Address *</Label>
                <Input
                  id="address"
                  value={formData.address}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, address: e.target.value }))}
                  placeholder="Street address"
                  required
                />
              </div>

              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                <div>
                  <Label htmlFor="city">City *</Label>
                  <Input
                    id="city"
                    value={formData.city}
                    onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, city: e.target.value }))}
                    placeholder="City"
                    required
                  />
                </div>
                
                <div>
                  <Label htmlFor="province">Province *</Label>
                  <Select
                    value={formData.province}
                    onValueChange={(value) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, province: value }))}
                  >
                    <SelectTrigger>
                      <SelectValue placeholder="Select province" />
                    </SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                      <SelectItem value="Western Cape">Western Cape</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="Gauteng">Gauteng</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="KwaZulu-Natal">KwaZulu-Natal</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="Eastern Cape">Eastern Cape</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="Free State">Free State</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="Limpopo">Limpopo</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="Mpumalanga">Mpumalanga</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="North West">North West</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="Northern Cape">Northern Cape</SelectItem>
                    </SelectContent>
                  </Select>
                </div>
                
                <div>
                  <Label htmlFor="postal_code">Postal Code</Label>
                  <Input
                    id="postal_code"
                    value={formData.postal_code}
                    onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, postal_code: e.target.value }))}
                    placeholder="Postal code"
                  />
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                <div>
                  <Label htmlFor="phone">Phone Number</Label>
                  <Input
                    id="phone"
                    value={formData.phone}
                    onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, phone: e.target.value }))}
                    placeholder="+27 11 123 4567"
                  />
                </div>
                
                <div>
                  <Label htmlFor="email">Email Address</Label>
                  <Input
                    id="email"
                    type="email"
                    value={formData.email}
                    onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, email: e.target.value }))}
                    placeholder="contact@restaurant.com"
                  />
                </div>
              </div>

              <div>
                <Label htmlFor="website">Website</Label>
                <Input
                  id="website"
                  value={formData.website}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, website: e.target.value }))}
                  placeholder="https://www.restaurant.com"
                />
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>

          {/* Social Media */}
          <Card>
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle>Social Media</CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent className="space-y-6">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                <div>
                  <Label htmlFor="instagram">Instagram</Label>
                  <Input
                    id="instagram"
                    value={formData.instagram}
                    onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, instagram: e.target.value }))}
                    placeholder="@restaurant_handle"
                  />
                </div>
                
                <div>
                  <Label htmlFor="facebook">Facebook</Label>
                  <Input
                    id="facebook"
                    value={formData.facebook}
                    onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, facebook: e.target.value }))}
                    placeholder="facebook.com/restaurant"
                  />
                </div>
                
                <div>
                  <Label htmlFor="tiktok">TikTok</Label>
                  <Input
                    id="tiktok"
                    value={formData.tiktok}
                    onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, tiktok: e.target.value }))}
                    placeholder="@restaurant_tiktok"
                  />
                </div>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>

          {/* Ownership Claim - Updated with Community Verified logic */}
          <Card>
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle>Ownership</CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent className="space-y-6">
              <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                <Switch
                  id="claimAsOwner"
                  checked={formData.claimAsOwner}
                  onCheckedChange={(checked) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, claimAsOwner: checked }))}
                />
                <Label htmlFor="claimAsOwner">I am the owner of this restaurant</Label>
              </div>
              
              {formData.claimAsOwner && (
                <div className="mt-6 space-y-6 p-4 border rounded-lg bg-amber-50">
                  <p className="text-sm text-amber-800 font-medium">
                    To fast-track your application, please provide the following information:
                  </p>
                  
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                    <div>
                      <Label htmlFor="ownerFullName">Full Name *</Label>
                      <Input
                        id="ownerFullName"
                        value={formData.ownerFullName}
                        onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, ownerFullName: e.target.value }))}
                        placeholder="Your full name"
                        required={formData.claimAsOwner}
                      />
                    </div>
                    
                    <div>
                      <Label htmlFor="ownerPhoneNumber">Phone Number *</Label>
                      <Input
                        id="ownerPhoneNumber"
                        value={formData.ownerPhoneNumber}
                        onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, ownerPhoneNumber: e.target.value }))}
                        placeholder="+27 11 123 4567"
                        required={formData.claimAsOwner}
                      />
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                    <div>
                      <Label htmlFor="certificationBody">Certification Body *</Label>
                      <Select
                        value={formData.certificationBody}
                        onValueChange={handleCertificationBodyChange}
                      >
                        <SelectTrigger>
                          <SelectValue placeholder="Select certification body" />
                        </SelectTrigger>
                        <SelectContent>
                          <SelectItem value="SANHA">SANHA</SelectItem>
                          <SelectItem value="NIHT">NIHT</SelectItem>
                          <SelectItem value="MJC">MJC</SelectItem>
                          <SelectItem value="Community Verified">Community Verified</SelectItem>
                          <SelectItem value="Other">Other</SelectItem>
                        </SelectContent>
                      </Select>
                    </div>
                    
                    {formData.certificationBody !== 'Community Verified' && (
                      <div>
                        <Label htmlFor="certificateExpiryDate">Certificate Expiry Date *</Label>
                        <Input
                          id="certificateExpiryDate"
                          type="date"
                          value={formData.certificateExpiryDate}
                          onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, certificateExpiryDate: e.target.value }))}
                          required={formData.claimAsOwner && formData.certificationBody !== 'Community Verified'}
                        />
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  {formData.certificationBody !== 'Community Verified' && (
                    <FileUpload
                      id="halaalCertificate"
                      label="Halaal Certificate *"
                      description="Upload a clear image of your halaal certificate"
                      accept="image/*"
                      onChange={handleFileUpload}
                      required={formData.claimAsOwner && formData.certificationBody !== 'Community Verified'}
                    />
                  )}
                </div>
              )}
              
              {!formData.claimAsOwner && (
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                  You can add this restaurant to our directory without claiming ownership. Restaurant owners can claim their restaurants later.
                </p>
              )}
            </CardContent>
          </Card>

          <div className="flex gap-4">
            <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={() => navigate('/restaurants')}>
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button type="submit" disabled={loading} className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700">
              {loading ? 'Adding...' : 'Add Restaurant'}
            </Button>
          </div>
        </form>

        {/* Community Verified Dialog */}
        <Dialog open={showCommunityVerifiedDialog} onOpenChange={setShowCommunityVerifiedDialog}>
          <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-md">
            <DialogHeader>
              <DialogTitle className="text-green-700">Community Verified Restaurant</DialogTitle>
              <DialogDescription className="text-gray-600 space-y-3">
                <p>
                  You've selected "Community Verified" certification. This means:
                </p>
                <ul className="list-disc list-inside space-y-1 text-sm">
                  <li>Your restaurant will be marked as community-verified</li>
                  <li>No halaal certificate upload is required</li>
                  <li>The community will help verify the halaal status</li>
                  <li>You can always update to formal certification later</li>
                </ul>
              </DialogDescription>
            </DialogHeader>
            <div className="flex justify-end">
              <Button onClick={() => setShowCommunityVerifiedDialog(false)}>
                Got it
              </Button>
            </div>
          </DialogContent>
        </Dialog>

        <DuplicateRestaurantDialog
          isOpen={showDuplicateDialog}
          onClose={handleDuplicateClose}
          onContinue={handleDuplicateContinue}
          existingRestaurant={duplicateRestaurant}
          newRestaurantName={formData.name}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default AddRestaurant;

```

### `src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
import { Users, Store, Copy, Settings, Shield, BadgeCheck, Clock, CheckCircle } from 'lucide-react';
import DuplicateManager from '@/components/DuplicateManager';
import AdminPanel from '@/components/AdminPanel';
import AdminClaimsManager from '@/components/AdminClaimsManager';
import RestaurantVerificationManager from '@/components/RestaurantVerificationManager';
import AdminRestaurantManager from '@/components/AdminRestaurantManager';

const AdminDashboard = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [pendingCount, setPendingCount] = useState(0);
  const [completedCount, setCompletedCount] = useState(0);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchClaimsCounts();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchClaimsCounts = async () => {
    try {
      // Get pending claims count
      const { count: pending } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_claims')
        .select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true })
        .eq('status', 'pending');

      // Get completed claims count (approved + rejected)
      const { count: completed } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_claims')
        .select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true })
        .in('status', ['approved', 'rejected']);

      setPendingCount(pending || 0);
      setCompletedCount(completed || 0);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching claims counts:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  if (!user) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)]">
          <div className="text-center">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Access Denied</h2>
            <p className="text-gray-600">Please sign in to access the admin dashboard.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        <div className="mb-8">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">Admin Dashboard</h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mt-2">Manage restaurant ownership claims, verification, users, and system settings</p>
        </div>

        <Tabs defaultValue="restaurants" className="space-y-6">
          <TabsList className="grid w-full grid-cols-6">
            <TabsTrigger value="restaurants" className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Store className="h-4 w-4" />
              Restaurants
            </TabsTrigger>
            <TabsTrigger value="applications" className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Shield className="h-4 w-4" />
              Applications
            </TabsTrigger>
            <TabsTrigger value="verification" className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <BadgeCheck className="h-4 w-4" />
              Verification
            </TabsTrigger>
            <TabsTrigger value="duplicates" className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Copy className="h-4 w-4" />
              Duplicates
            </TabsTrigger>
            <TabsTrigger value="users" className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Users className="h-4 w-4" />
              Users
            </TabsTrigger>
            <TabsTrigger value="settings" className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Settings className="h-4 w-4" />
              Settings
            </TabsTrigger>
          </TabsList>

          <TabsContent value="restaurants">
            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle>Restaurant Management</CardTitle>
                <p className="text-gray-600">Search, view, and edit all restaurants in the system</p>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <AdminRestaurantManager />
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </TabsContent>

          <TabsContent value="applications">
            <div className="space-y-6">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                <Card className="border-orange-200 bg-orange-50">
                  <CardHeader className="pb-3">
                    <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-orange-800">
                      <Clock className="h-5 w-5" />
                      System Status: {loading ? '...' : pendingCount > 0 ? 'Needs Review' : 'Healthy'}
                    </CardTitle>
                  </CardHeader>
                  <CardContent>
                    <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-orange-800 mb-2">
                      {loading ? '...' : pendingCount}
                    </div>
                    <p className="text-orange-700 text-sm">
                      Restaurant ownership claims waiting for your review and approval.
                    </p>
                  </CardContent>
                </Card>

                <Card className="border-green-200 bg-green-50">
                  <CardHeader className="pb-3">
                    <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-green-800">
                      <CheckCircle className="h-5 w-5" />
                      Pending Reviews
                    </CardTitle>
                  </CardHeader>
                  <CardContent>
                    <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-800 mb-2">
                      {loading ? '...' : completedCount}
                    </div>
                    <p className="text-green-700 text-sm">
                      Applications that have been approved or rejected with certificate expiry tracking.
                    </p>
                  </CardContent>
                </Card>
              </div>

              <Card>
                <CardHeader>
                  <CardTitle>Restaurant Ownership Claims Management</CardTitle>
                  <p className="text-gray-600">Review and manage all restaurant ownership applications</p>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardContent>
                  <AdminClaimsManager />
                </CardContent>
              </Card>
            </div>
          </TabsContent>

          <TabsContent value="verification">
            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle>Restaurant Verification</CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <RestaurantVerificationManager />
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </TabsContent>

          <TabsContent value="duplicates">
            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle>Duplicate Restaurant Management</CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <DuplicateManager />
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </TabsContent>

          <TabsContent value="users">
            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle>User Management</CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <AdminPanel />
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </TabsContent>

          <TabsContent value="settings">
            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle>System Settings</CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <p className="text-gray-600">System settings will be available here.</p>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </TabsContent>
        </Tabs>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default AdminDashboard;

```
