### `src/pages/Auth.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useNavigate, useSearchParams } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { Eye, EyeOff } from 'lucide-react';
import PasswordReset from '@/components/PasswordReset';
import PasswordUpdate from '@/components/PasswordUpdate';

const Auth = () => {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();
  const { user, signIn, signUp, signInWithGoogle, signOut } = useAuth();
  
  const [showSignIn, setShowSignIn] = useState(true);
  const [showPasswordReset, setShowPasswordReset] = useState(false);
  const [showPasswordUpdate, setShowPasswordUpdate] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    email: '',
    password: '',
    fullName: ''
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    const hashParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.hash.replace('#', '?'));
    const typeFromHash = hashParams.get('type');
    const typeFromSearch = searchParams.get('type');
    const isRecovery = showPasswordUpdate || typeFromHash === 'recovery' || typeFromSearch === 'recovery';

    if (user && !isRecovery) {
      navigate('/dashboard');
    }
  }, [user, navigate, searchParams, showPasswordUpdate]);

  // Handle password recovery flow
  useEffect(() => {
    const typeFromSearch = searchParams.get('type');
    const hashParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.hash.replace('#', '?'));
    const typeFromHash = hashParams.get('type');
    if (typeFromSearch === 'recovery' || typeFromHash === 'recovery') {
      setShowPasswordUpdate(true);
      toast.success('Please set your new password below');
    }
  }, [searchParams]);

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent, isSignUp: boolean) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setLoading(true);

    try {
      if (isSignUp) {
        const { error } = await signUp(formData.email, formData.password, formData.fullName);
        if (error) throw error;
        toast.success('Account created! Please check your email to verify your account.');
      } else {
        const { error } = await signIn(formData.email, formData.password);
        if (error) throw error;
        toast.success('Welcome back!');
        navigate('/dashboard');
      }
    } catch (error: any) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Authentication failed');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleGoogleSignIn = async () => {
    try {
      const { error } = await signInWithGoogle();
      if (error) throw error;
    } catch (error: any) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Google sign in failed');
    }
  };

  const handlePasswordUpdateSuccess = async () => {
    try { await signOut(); } catch {}
    setShowPasswordUpdate(false);
    setShowSignIn(true);
    toast.success('Password updated! Please sign in with your new password.');
    if (window.location.hash) {
      history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
    }
  };

  if (showPasswordUpdate) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] px-4">
          <PasswordUpdate onSuccess={handlePasswordUpdateSuccess} />
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (showPasswordReset) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] px-4">
          <PasswordReset onBack={() => setShowPasswordReset(false)} />
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] px-4">
        <Card className="w-full max-w-md">
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle className="text-center">Welcome to HalaalEats</CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <Tabs value={showSignIn ? "signin" : "signup"} onValueChange={(value) => setShowSignIn(value === "signin")}>
              <TabsList className="grid w-full grid-cols-2">
                <TabsTrigger value="signin">Sign In</TabsTrigger>
                <TabsTrigger value="signup">Sign Up</TabsTrigger>
              </TabsList>
              
              <TabsContent value="signin" className="space-y-4">
                <form onSubmit={(e) => handleSubmit(e, false)} className="space-y-4">
                  <div>
                    <Label htmlFor="signin-email">Email</Label>
                    <Input
                      id="signin-email"
                      type="email"
                      value={formData.email}
                      onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, email: e.target.value }))}
                      required
                    />
                  </div>
                  
                  <div>
                    <Label htmlFor="signin-password">Password</Label>
                    <div className="relative">
                      <Input
                        id="signin-password"
                        type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                        value={formData.password}
                        onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, password: e.target.value }))}
                        required
                      />
                      <Button
                        type="button"
                        variant="ghost"
                        size="sm"
                        className="absolute right-0 top-0 h-full px-3"
                        onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
                      >
                        {showPassword ? <EyeOff className="h-4 w-4" /> : <Eye className="h-4 w-4" />}
                      </Button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  
                  <Button type="submit" className="w-full" disabled={loading}>
                    {loading ? 'Signing in...' : 'Sign In'}
                  </Button>
                  
                  <Button 
                    type="button"
                    variant="ghost" 
                    className="w-full text-sm"
                    onClick={() => setShowPasswordReset(true)}
                  >
                    Forgot your password?
                  </Button>
                </form>
              </TabsContent>
              
              <TabsContent value="signup" className="space-y-4">
                <form onSubmit={(e) => handleSubmit(e, true)} className="space-y-4">
                  <div>
                    <Label htmlFor="signup-name">Full Name</Label>
                    <Input
                      id="signup-name"
                      type="text"
                      value={formData.fullName}
                      onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, fullName: e.target.value }))}
                      required
                    />
                  </div>
                  
                  <div>
                    <Label htmlFor="signup-email">Email</Label>
                    <Input
                      id="signup-email"
                      type="email"
                      value={formData.email}
                      onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, email: e.target.value }))}
                      required
                    />
                  </div>
                  
                  <div>
                    <Label htmlFor="signup-password">Password</Label>
                    <div className="relative">
                      <Input
                        id="signup-password"
                        type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                        value={formData.password}
                        onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, password: e.target.value }))}
                        required
                        minLength={6}
                      />
                      <Button
                        type="button"
                        variant="ghost"
                        size="sm"
                        className="absolute right-0 top-0 h-full px-3"
                        onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
                      >
                        {showPassword ? <EyeOff className="h-4 w-4" /> : <Eye className="h-4 w-4" />}
                      </Button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  
                  <Button type="submit" className="w-full" disabled={loading}>
                    {loading ? 'Creating account...' : 'Create Account'}
                  </Button>
                </form>
              </TabsContent>
            </Tabs>
            
            <div className="mt-6">
              <Separator />
              <div className="mt-6">
                <Button 
                  variant="outline" 
                  className="w-full"
                  onClick={handleGoogleSignIn}
                >
                  Continue with Google
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default Auth;

```

### `src/pages/ClaimRestaurant.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useParams, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Calendar } from '@/components/ui/calendar';
import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from '@/components/ui/popover';
import FileUpload from '@/components/ui/file-upload';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { Shield, CheckCircle, AlertCircle, Clock, CalendarIcon } from 'lucide-react';
import { format } from 'date-fns';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { formatCuisineTypes, formatRestaurantType } from '@/utils/formatters';

const ClaimRestaurant = () => {
  const { id } = useParams<{ id: string }>();
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState<any>(null);
  const [existingClaim, setExistingClaim] = useState<any>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [claiming, setClaiming] = useState(false);
  const [uploadingFiles, setUploadingFiles] = useState(false);
  
  const [claimData, setClaimData] = useState({
    business_email: '',
    business_phone: '',
    proof_of_ownership_url: '',
    halaal_certificate_url: '',
    halaal_certificate_expiry_date: null as Date | null,
    certification_body: 'SANHA',
    additional_notes: ''
  });

  const [files, setFiles] = useState({
    proofOfOwnership: null as File | null,
    halaalCertificate: null as File | null
  });

  const [previews, setPreviews] = useState({
    proofOfOwnership: '',
    halaalCertificate: ''
  });

  const certificationBodies = [
    'SANHA',
    'MJC',
    'NIHT',
    'ICSA',
    'NHIF',
    'Community Certified',
    'Other'
  ];

  useEffect(() => {
    if (id && user) {
      fetchRestaurantAndClaim();
    }
  }, [id, user]);

  const fetchRestaurantAndClaim = async () => {
    try {
      console.log('Fetching restaurant with id:', id);
      
      // Fetch restaurant
      const { data: restaurantData, error: restaurantError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*')
        .eq('id', id)
        .single();

      if (restaurantError) {
        console.error('Restaurant error:', restaurantError);
        throw restaurantError;
      }
      
      console.log('Restaurant data:', restaurantData);
      setRestaurant(restaurantData);

      // Check for existing claim
      const { data: claimData, error: claimError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_claims')
        .select('*')
        .eq('restaurant_id', id)
        .eq('user_id', user?.id)
        .maybeSingle();

      if (claimError && claimError.code !== 'PGRST116') {
        console.error('Claim error:', claimError);
        throw claimError;
      }

      console.log('Existing claim data:', claimData);
      setExistingClaim(claimData);

      if (claimData) {
        setClaimData({
          business_email: claimData.business_email || '',
          business_phone: claimData.business_phone || '',
          proof_of_ownership_url: claimData.proof_of_ownership_url || '',
          halaal_certificate_url: claimData.halaal_certificate_url || '',
          halaal_certificate_expiry_date: claimData.halaal_certificate_expiry_date ? new Date(claimData.halaal_certificate_expiry_date) : null,
          certification_body: claimData.certification_body || 'SANHA',
          additional_notes: claimData.additional_notes || ''
        });

        // Set previews for existing images
        setPreviews({
          proofOfOwnership: claimData.proof_of_ownership_url || '',
          halaalCertificate: claimData.halaal_certificate_url || ''
        });
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching restaurant and claim:', error);
      toast.error('Restaurant not found');
      navigate('/restaurants');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const uploadFileToStorage = async (file: File, bucket: string, path: string): Promise<string> => {
    console.log('Uploading file:', file.name, 'to bucket:', bucket, 'path:', path);
    
    const { data, error } = await supabase.storage
      .from(bucket)
      .upload(path, file, {
        cacheControl: '3600',
        upsert: false
      });

    if (error) {
      console.error('Upload error:', error);
      throw error;
    }

    console.log('Upload successful:', data);

    const { data: urlData } = supabase.storage
      .from(bucket)
      .getPublicUrl(data.path);

    console.log('Public URL:', urlData.publicUrl);
    return urlData.publicUrl;
  };

  const handleClaim = async () => {
    console.log('Starting claim submission...');
    
    if (!user) {
      toast.error('Please sign in to claim this restaurant');
      return;
    }

    if (!claimData.business_email) {
      toast.error('Please provide a business email address');
      return;
    }

    if (claimData.certification_body !== 'Community Certified' && !files.halaalCertificate && !claimData.halaal_certificate_url) {
      toast.error('Please upload a Halaal certificate');
      return;
    }

    if (claimData.certification_body !== 'Community Certified' && !claimData.halaal_certificate_expiry_date) {
      toast.error('Please provide the Halaal certificate expiration date');
      return;
    }

    if (!claimData.certification_body) {
      toast.error('Please select a certification body');
      return;
    }

    setClaiming(true);
    setUploadingFiles(true);

    try {
      let updatedClaimData = { ...claimData };

      // Upload proof of ownership if provided
      if (files.proofOfOwnership) {
        console.log('Uploading proof of ownership...');
        const proofPath = `${user.id}/${id}/proof-of-ownership-${Date.now()}.${files.proofOfOwnership.name.split('.').pop()}`;
        const proofUrl = await uploadFileToStorage(files.proofOfOwnership, 'restaurant-documents', proofPath);
        updatedClaimData.proof_of_ownership_url = proofUrl;
        console.log('Proof of ownership uploaded:', proofUrl);
      }

      // Upload halaal certificate if provided
      if (files.halaalCertificate) {
        console.log('Uploading halaal certificate...');
        const halaalPath = `${user.id}/${id}/halaal-certificate-${Date.now()}.${files.halaalCertificate.name.split('.').pop()}`;
        const halaalUrl = await uploadFileToStorage(files.halaalCertificate, 'restaurant-documents', halaalPath);
        updatedClaimData.halaal_certificate_url = halaalUrl;
        console.log('Halaal certificate uploaded:', halaalUrl);
      }

      setUploadingFiles(false);

      console.log('Submitting claim with data:', updatedClaimData);

      const submitData = {
        ...updatedClaimData,
        halaal_certificate_expiry_date: updatedClaimData.halaal_certificate_expiry_date?.toISOString().split('T')[0]
      };

      if (existingClaim) {
        // Update existing claim
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('restaurant_claims')
          .update({
            ...submitData,
            status: 'pending',
            updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
          })
          .eq('id', existingClaim.id);

        if (error) {
          console.error('Update claim error:', error);
          throw error;
        }
        toast.success('Claim updated and resubmitted for review!');
      } else {
        // Create new claim
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('restaurant_claims')
          .insert({
            restaurant_id: id,
            user_id: user.id,
            ...submitData
          });

        if (error) {
          console.error('Insert claim error:', error);
          throw error;
        }
        toast.success('Restaurant claim submitted for verification!');
      }

      // Update restaurant claim status
      const { error: updateError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .update({ claim_status: 'pending' })
        .eq('id', id);

      if (updateError) {
        console.error('Restaurant update error:', updateError);
      }

      navigate('/restaurant-dashboard');
    } catch (error: any) {
      console.error('Error submitting claim:', error);
      toast.error(`Failed to submit claim: ${error.message || 'Please try again.'}`);
    } finally {
      setClaiming(false);
      setUploadingFiles(false);
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)]">
          <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-green-600"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!restaurant) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)]">
          <div className="text-center">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Restaurant not found</h2>
            <Button onClick={() => navigate('/restaurants')}>
              Back to Restaurants
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Show claim status if claim exists
  if (existingClaim && existingClaim.status !== 'rejected') {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
          <Card>
            <CardContent className="p-8 text-center">
              {existingClaim.status === 'pending' && (
                <>
                  <Clock className="h-16 w-16 text-yellow-600 mx-auto mb-4" />
                  <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Claim Under Review</h2>
                  <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
                    Your claim for {restaurant.name} is currently being reviewed by our team. 
                    We'll notify you once a decision has been made.
                  </p>
                </>
              )}
              {existingClaim.status === 'approved' && (
                <>
                  <CheckCircle className="h-16 w-16 text-green-600 mx-auto mb-4" />
                  <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Claim Approved!</h2>
                  <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
                    Your claim for {restaurant.name} has been approved. You can now access the restaurant dashboard.
                  </p>
                  <Button 
                    onClick={() => navigate('/restaurant-dashboard')}
                    className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700"
                  >
                    Go to Restaurant Dashboard
                  </Button>
                </>
              )}
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        <div className="mb-8">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Claim Your Restaurant</h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600">
            Verify your ownership of {restaurant?.name} to unlock restaurant management features
          </p>
        </div>

        {existingClaim?.status === 'rejected' && (
          <Card className="mb-6 border-red-200 bg-red-50">
            <CardContent className="p-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <AlertCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-red-600" />
                <div>
                  <p className="font-medium text-red-900">Previous Claim Rejected</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-red-700">
                    {existingClaim.rejection_reason || 'Please review your information and resubmit.'}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        )}

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
          {/* Restaurant Info */}
          <Card>
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <Shield className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600" />
                Restaurant Information
              </CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {/* Restaurant Image */}
                <div className="w-full h-48 bg-gray-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
                  <img
                    src={`https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1555396273-367ea4eb4db5?w=400&h=200&fit=crop&crop=center`}
                    alt={restaurant?.name}
                    className="w-full h-full object-cover"
                  />
                </div>
                
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg">{restaurant?.name}</h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-600">{restaurant?.address}, {restaurant?.city}</p>
                </div>
                
                {restaurant?.description && (
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">About</p>
                    <p className="font-medium">{restaurant.description}</p>
                  </div>
                )}
                
                {restaurant?.phone && (
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Phone</p>
                    <p className="font-medium">{restaurant.phone}</p>
                  </div>
                )}
                
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Cuisine Type</p>
                  <p className="font-medium">{formatCuisineTypes(restaurant?.cuisine_type)}</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Restaurant Type</p>
                  <p className="font-medium">{formatRestaurantType(restaurant?.restaurant_type)}</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>

          {/* Claim Form */}
          <Card>
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle>
                {existingClaim?.status === 'rejected' ? 'Resubmit Claim' : 'Verification Requirements'}
              </CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent className="space-y-6">
              <div>
                <Label htmlFor="business_email">Business Contact Email *</Label>
                <Input
                  id="business_email"
                  type="email"
                  value={claimData.business_email}
                  onChange={(e) => setClaimData(prev => ({ ...prev, business_email: e.target.value }))}
                  placeholder="business@restaurant.com"
                  required
                />
              </div>

              <div>
                <Label htmlFor="business_phone">Business Phone Number</Label>
                <Input
                  id="business_phone"
                  type="tel"
                  value={claimData.business_phone}
                  onChange={(e) => setClaimData(prev => ({ ...prev, business_phone: e.target.value }))}
                  placeholder="+27 11 123 4567"
                />
              </div>

              <FileUpload
                id="proof_of_ownership"
                label="Proof of Ownership"
                description="Upload a clear photo showing your restaurant's exterior or interior"
                accept="image/*"
                value={previews.proofOfOwnership}
                onChange={(file, url) => {
                  setFiles(prev => ({ ...prev, proofOfOwnership: file }));
                  if (file) {
                    setPreviews(prev => ({ ...prev, proofOfOwnership: url }));
                  } else {
                    setPreviews(prev => ({ ...prev, proofOfOwnership: '' }));
                    setClaimData(prev => ({ ...prev, proof_of_ownership_url: '' }));
                  }
                }}
              />

              <FileUpload
                id="halaal_certificate"
                label="Halaal Certificate"
                description={claimData.certification_body === 'Community Certified' ? 'Optional: Valid Halaal certification from a recognized body' : 'Required: Valid Halaal certification from a recognized body'}
                accept="image/*"
                required={claimData.certification_body !== 'Community Certified'}
                value={previews.halaalCertificate}
                onChange={(file, url) => {
                  setFiles(prev => ({ ...prev, halaalCertificate: file }));
                  if (file) {
                    setPreviews(prev => ({ ...prev, halaalCertificate: url }));
                  } else {
                    setPreviews(prev => ({ ...prev, halaalCertificate: '' }));
                    setClaimData(prev => ({ ...prev, halaal_certificate_url: '' }));
                  }
                }}
              />

              <div>
                <Label htmlFor="certification_body">Certification Body *</Label>
                <Select
                  value={claimData.certification_body}
                  onValueChange={(value) => setClaimData(prev => ({ ...prev, certification_body: value }))}
                >
                  <SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectValue placeholder="Select certification body" />
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    {certificationBodies.map(body => (
                      <SelectItem key={body} value={body}>
                        {body}
                      </SelectItem>
                    ))}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              {claimData.certification_body !== 'Community Certified' && (
                <div>
                  <Label>Certificate Expiry Date *</Label>
                  <Popover>
                    <PopoverTrigger asChild>
                      <Button
                        variant="outline"
                        className={cn(
                          "w-full justify-start text-left font-normal",
                          !claimData.halaal_certificate_expiry_date && "text-muted-foreground"
                        )}
                      >
                        <CalendarIcon className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                        {claimData.halaal_certificate_expiry_date ? (
                          format(claimData.halaal_certificate_expiry_date, "PPP")
                        ) : (
                          <span>Pick expiration date</span>
                        )}
                      </Button>
                    </PopoverTrigger>
                    <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
                      <Calendar
                        mode="single"
                        selected={claimData.halaal_certificate_expiry_date || undefined}
                        onSelect={(date) => setClaimData(prev => ({ ...prev, halaal_certificate_expiry_date: date || null }))}
                        disabled={(date) => date < new Date()}
                        initialFocus
                        className={cn("p-3 pointer-events-auto")}
                      />
                    </PopoverContent>
                  </Popover>
                </div>
              )}

              <div>
                <Label htmlFor="additional_notes">Additional Notes</Label>
                <Textarea
                  id="additional_notes"
                  value={claimData.additional_notes}
                  onChange={(e) => setClaimData(prev => ({ ...prev, additional_notes: e.target.value }))}
                  placeholder="Any additional information to help verify your claim..."
                  rows={3}
                />
              </div>

              <Button 
                onClick={handleClaim}
                disabled={claiming || uploadingFiles || !claimData.business_email || (claimData.certification_body !== 'Community Certified' && (!files.halaalCertificate && !claimData.halaal_certificate_url)) || (claimData.certification_body !== 'Community Certified' && !claimData.halaal_certificate_expiry_date) || !claimData.certification_body}
                className="w-full bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700"
              >
                {uploadingFiles ? 'Uploading Documents...' : claiming ? 'Submitting...' : existingClaim?.status === 'rejected' ? 'Resubmit Claim' : 'Submit Claim for Verification'}
              </Button>

              <div className="bg-blue-50 p-4 rounded-lg">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <CheckCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-600 mt-0.5" />
                  <div className="text-sm">
                    <p className="font-medium text-blue-900 mb-1">What happens next?</p>
                    <ul className="text-blue-700 space-y-1">
                      <li>• Our team will review your submission within 2-3 business days</li>
                      <li>• You'll receive an email confirmation once verified</li>
                      <li>• Access to restaurant dashboard and management tools</li>
                      <li>• Ability to manage menus, view analytics, and more</li>
                    </ul>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default ClaimRestaurant;

```

### `src/pages/ClaimRestaurantSearch.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import RestaurantCard from '@/components/RestaurantCard';
import AdvancedSearch from '@/components/AdvancedSearch';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Search, Shield, ArrowLeft } from 'lucide-react';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  restaurant_type: 'casual_dining' | 'fast_food' | 'fine_dining' | 'takeaway' | 'cafe' | 'bakery' | 'food_truck';
  price_range: string;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  is_verified: boolean;
  claim_status: string;
  owner_id?: string;
  phone: string;
  email: string;
  website: string;
  certification_body?: string;
  halaal_certificate_url?: string;
}

interface SearchFilters {
  searchTerm: string;
  city: string;
  cuisineType: string;
  restaurantType: string;
  priceRange: string;
  isHalaalCertified: boolean;
  isVerified: boolean;
  minRating: number;
}

const ClaimRestaurantSearch = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [quickSearch, setQuickSearch] = useState('');
  const [filters, setFilters] = useState<SearchFilters>({
    searchTerm: '',
    city: '',
    cuisineType: '',
    restaurantType: '',
    priceRange: '',
    isHalaalCertified: false,
    isVerified: false,
    minRating: 0
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!user) {
      navigate('/auth');
      return;
    }
    // Load unclaimed restaurants by default
    fetchUnclaimedRestaurants();
  }, [user, navigate]);

  const fetchUnclaimedRestaurants = async (searchFilters?: SearchFilters) => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      let query = supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*')
        .eq('is_active', true);
      
      console.log('Fetching unclaimed restaurants...');

      const activeFilters = searchFilters || filters;

      console.log('Search filters for claim page:', activeFilters);

      // Apply filters
      if (activeFilters.searchTerm) {
        query = query.or(`name.ilike.%${activeFilters.searchTerm}%,description.ilike.%${activeFilters.searchTerm}%,cuisine_type.ilike.%${activeFilters.searchTerm}%`);
      }

      if (activeFilters.city) {
        query = query.eq('city', activeFilters.city);
      }

      if (activeFilters.cuisineType) {
        query = query.eq('cuisine_type', activeFilters.cuisineType);
      }

      if (activeFilters.restaurantType) {
        query = query.eq('restaurant_type', activeFilters.restaurantType as Restaurant['restaurant_type']);
      }

      if (activeFilters.priceRange) {
        query = query.eq('price_range', activeFilters.priceRange);
      }

      if (activeFilters.isHalaalCertified) {
        query = query.eq('is_halaal_certified', true);
      }

      if (activeFilters.isVerified) {
        query = query.eq('is_verified', true);
      }

      if (activeFilters.minRating > 0) {
        query = query.gte('average_rating', activeFilters.minRating);
      }

      const { data, error } = await query.order('average_rating', { ascending: false });

      if (error) throw error;
      
      console.log('Raw data from database:', data);
      
      // Filter to only show restaurants that can be claimed
      // This includes: unclaimed, rejected, or those without proper owner assignment
      const unclaimedRestaurants = (data || []).filter(restaurant => 
        restaurant.claim_status === 'unclaimed' || 
        restaurant.claim_status === 'rejected' ||
        (!restaurant.owner_id && !['verified', 'approved', 'pending'].includes(restaurant.claim_status))
      );
      
      console.log('Filtered unclaimed restaurants:', unclaimedRestaurants);
      console.log('Restaurants with rejected status:', unclaimedRestaurants.filter(r => r.claim_status === 'rejected'));
      
      setRestaurants(unclaimedRestaurants);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching restaurants:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSearch = (newFilters: SearchFilters) => {
    setFilters(newFilters);
    fetchUnclaimedRestaurants(newFilters);
  };

  const handleQuickSearch = () => {
    const quickFilters = { ...filters, searchTerm: quickSearch };
    setFilters(quickFilters);
    fetchUnclaimedRestaurants(quickFilters);
  };

  const handleKeyPress = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter') {
      handleQuickSearch();
    }
  };

  const handleClaimClick = (restaurantId: string) => {
    navigate(`/claim-restaurant/${restaurantId}`);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 via-white to-amber-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        {/* Header Section */}
        <div className="mb-8">
          <Button 
            variant="ghost" 
            onClick={() => navigate('/restaurants')}
            className="mb-4 text-green-700 hover:bg-green-50"
          >
            <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
            Back to All Restaurants
          </Button>
          
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
              <Shield className="h-8 w-8 text-green-600 mr-3" />
              <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gradient">Claim Your Restaurant</h1>
            </div>
            <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 mb-6">
              Search for your restaurant below and claim it to unlock management features
            </p>
            
            {/* Quick Search */}
            <div className="max-w-md mx-auto mb-6">
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                <Input
                  placeholder="Quick search by restaurant name..."
                  value={quickSearch}
                  onChange={(e) => setQuickSearch(e.target.value)}
                  onKeyPress={handleKeyPress}
                  className="flex-1 border-green-200 focus:border-green-400"
                />
                <Button onClick={handleQuickSearch} className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700">
                  <Search className="h-4 w-4" />
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-8">
          {/* Sidebar with Advanced Search */}
          <div className="lg:w-1/3">
            <AdvancedSearch 
              onSearch={handleSearch} 
              initialFilters={filters}
            />
            
            {/* Info Card */}
            <Card className="mt-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-green-50 border-blue-200">
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-blue-900">
                  <Shield className="h-5 w-5" />
                  Claiming Requirements
                </CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <div className="space-y-3 text-sm text-blue-800">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                    <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-blue-600 rounded-full mt-2 flex-shrink-0"></div>
                    <p>Valid business contact email</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                    <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-blue-600 rounded-full mt-2 flex-shrink-0"></div>
                    <p>Proof of restaurant ownership</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                    <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-blue-600 rounded-full mt-2 flex-shrink-0"></div>
                    <p>Valid Halaal certification</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                    <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-blue-600 rounded-full mt-2 flex-shrink-0"></div>
                    <p>Review process takes 2-3 business days</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </div>

          {/* Restaurant Results */}
          <div className="lg:w-2/3">
            <div className="mb-6">
              <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gradient mb-2">
                Available Restaurants to Claim
              </h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600">
                Found {restaurants.length} unclaimed restaurants
                {filters.searchTerm && ` matching "${filters.searchTerm}"`}
              </p>
            </div>

            {loading ? (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                {[...Array(6)].map((_, i) => (
                  <div key={i} className="animate-pulse">
                    <div className="bg-gray-200 rounded-lg h-48"></div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : restaurants.length === 0 ? (
              <Card className="border-green-100">
                <CardContent className="text-center py-12">
                  <Shield className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
                  <h3 className="text-lg font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">
                    No unclaimed restaurants found
                  </h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-500 mb-4">
                    Try adjusting your search criteria or check back later for new listings.
                  </p>
                  <Button 
                    onClick={() => {
                      setFilters({
                        searchTerm: '',
                        city: '',
                        cuisineType: '',
                        restaurantType: '',
                        priceRange: '',
                        isHalaalCertified: false,
                        isVerified: false,
                        minRating: 0
                      });
                      setQuickSearch('');
                      fetchUnclaimedRestaurants();
                    }}
                    variant="outline"
                    className="border-green-300 text-green-700 hover:bg-green-50"
                  >
                    Clear All Filters
                  </Button>
                </CardContent>
              </Card>
            ) : (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                {restaurants.map((restaurant) => (
                  <RestaurantCard 
                    key={restaurant.id} 
                    restaurant={restaurant} 
                    showClaimButton={true}
                    onClaimClick={handleClaimClick}
                  />
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default ClaimRestaurantSearch;

```

import React from 'react';

            Contact Us

                Our contact form and support system will be available soon!

                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Coming soon</p>
                </div>
                
                <div className="text-center">
                  <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-purple-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
                    <MapPin className="h-8 w-8 text-purple-600" />
                  </div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">Address</h3>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Coming soon</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </div>
      </section>

      <Footer />
    </div>
  );
};

export default Contact;
