### `src/pages/Dashboard.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import DashboardSidebar from '@/components/dashboard/DashboardSidebar';
import ActivityFeed from '@/components/dashboard/ActivityFeed';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Menu, Plus, Award, Dice6, MapPin, Trophy } from 'lucide-react';

interface Profile {
  first_name: string | null;
  surname: string | null;
  full_name: string | null;
  current_level: string;
  level_points: number;
  review_count: number;
}

const Dashboard = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [userRoles, setUserRoles] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [profile, setProfile] = useState<Profile | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [sidebarCollapsed, setSidebarCollapsed] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchUserRoles();
      fetchProfile();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchUserRoles = async () => {
    try {
      const { data } = await supabase
        .from('user_roles')
        .select('role')
        .eq('user_id', user?.id);

      const roles = data?.map(r => r.role) || [];
      setUserRoles(roles);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching user roles:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const fetchProfile = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('profiles')
        .select('first_name, surname, full_name, current_level, level_points, review_count')
        .eq('id', user?.id)
        .single();

      if (error && error.code !== 'PGRST116') {
        console.error('Error fetching profile:', error);
        return;
      }
      
      if (data) {
        setProfile(data);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching profile:', error);
    }
  };

  const levels = [
    { name: 'Foodie', pointsRequired: 0, color: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800' },
    { name: 'Food Explorer', pointsRequired: 50, color: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800' },
    { name: 'Food Critic', pointsRequired: 100, color: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' },
    { name: 'Elite Critic', pointsRequired: 200, color: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800' },
    { name: 'Master Foodie', pointsRequired: 500, color: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800' }
  ];

  const getCurrentLevelProgress = () => {
    if (!profile) return { progress: 0, nextLevel: null, pointsToNext: 0 };
    
    const currentIndex = levels.findIndex(level => level.name === profile.current_level);
    const nextLevel = currentIndex < levels.length - 1 ? levels[currentIndex + 1] : null;
    
    if (!nextLevel) return { progress: 100, nextLevel: null, pointsToNext: 0 };
    
    const currentLevelPoints = levels[currentIndex].pointsRequired;
    const nextLevelPoints = nextLevel.pointsRequired;
    const progress = ((profile.level_points - currentLevelPoints) / (nextLevelPoints - currentLevelPoints)) * 100;
    
    return {
      progress: Math.min(Math.max(progress, 0), 100),
      nextLevel,
      pointsToNext: nextLevelPoints - profile.level_points
    };
  };

  const isProfileIncomplete = !profile?.first_name || !profile?.surname;

  if (!user) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-96">
          <div className="text-center">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Please sign in to view your dashboard</h2>
            <Link to="/auth">
              <Button>Sign In</Button>
            </Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-96">
          <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-32 w-32 border-b-2 border-green-600"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const levelProgress = getCurrentLevelProgress();

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="flex min-h-screen">
        <DashboardSidebar 
          userType="reviewer" 
          collapsed={sidebarCollapsed}
        />
        
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden">
          <div className="lg:hidden flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white border-b">
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              onClick={() => setSidebarCollapsed(!sidebarCollapsed)}
            >
              <Menu className="h-5 w-5" />
            </Button>
            <h1 className="text-lg font-semibold">Dashboard</h1>
            <div></div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 lg:p-6 space-y-6">
            {/* Welcome Header */}
            <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-green-50 to-green-100 rounded-xl p-6 border border-green-200">
              {isProfileIncomplete ? (
                <>
                  <h1 className="text-xl lg:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                    Welcome back! 👋
                  </h1>
                  <p className="text-gray-600">
                    Please update your profile to get started!
                  </p>
                </>
              ) : (
                <>
                  <h1 className="text-xl lg:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                    Welcome back, {profile?.first_name} {profile?.surname}! 👋
                  </h1>
                  <p className="text-gray-600">
                    Ready to discover amazing halaal restaurants and share your experiences?
                  </p>
                </>
              )}
            </div>

            {/* Main Dashboard Grid */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
              {/* Expanded Foodie Level Progress */}
              <Card className="border-green-200 bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-green-100">
                <CardHeader>
                  <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-green-800">
                    <Trophy className="h-5 w-5" />
                    Foodie Level Progress
                  </CardTitle>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div>
                      <Badge className={levels.find(l => l.name === profile?.current_level)?.color || 'bg-gray-100'}>
                        {profile?.current_level || 'Foodie'}
                      </Badge>
                      <p className="text-sm text-green-700 mt-1">{profile?.level_points || 0} XP total</p>
                    </div>
                    {levelProgress.nextLevel && (
                      <div className="text-right">
                        <p className="text-sm font-medium text-green-800">Next: {levelProgress.nextLevel.name}</p>
                        <p className="text-xs text-green-600">{levelProgress.pointsToNext} XP to go</p>
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  
                  {levelProgress.nextLevel && (
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                      <Progress value={levelProgress.progress} className="h-3" />
                      <p className="text-sm text-center text-green-700">
                        {Math.ceil(levelProgress.pointsToNext / 10)} more reviews to level up!
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </CardContent>
              </Card>

              {/* Quick Add Restaurant */}
              <Card className="border-blue-200 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-blue-100">
                <CardHeader>
                  <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-blue-800">
                    <Plus className="h-5 w-5" />
                    Quick Add Restaurant
                  </CardTitle>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                  <p className="text-sm text-blue-700">
                    Know a great halaal spot that's not listed? Add it to help the community!
                  </p>
                  <Link to="/add-restaurant">
                    <Button className="w-full bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700">
                      <MapPin className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                      Add New Restaurant
                    </Button>
                  </Link>
                  <div className="text-xs text-center text-blue-600">
                    💡 Earn 25 XP for each restaurant you add!
                  </div>
                </CardContent>
              </Card>
            </div>

            {/* Discovery Tools */}
            <Card className="border-purple-200 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-50 to-purple-100">
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-purple-800">
                  <Award className="h-5 w-5" />
                  Discovery Tools
                </CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                  <Button 
                    variant="outline" 
                    className="h-20 flex-col gap-2 border-purple-300 hover:bg-purple-100"
                  >
                    <MapPin className="h-6 w-6 text-purple-600" />
                    <span className="font-medium">New Table for Foodie</span>
                    <span className="text-xs text-purple-600">Discover nearby gems</span>
                  </Button>
                  <Button 
                    variant="outline" 
                    className="h-20 flex-col gap-2 border-purple-300 hover:bg-purple-100"
                  >
                    <Dice6 className="h-6 w-6 text-purple-600" />
                    <span className="font-medium">Foodie Roulette</span>
                    <span className="text-xs text-purple-600">Random restaurant picker</span>
                  </Button>
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            {/* Activity Feed */}
            <ActivityFeed />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default Dashboard;

```

### `src/pages/EditRestaurant.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { useNavigate, useParams } from 'react-router-dom';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import { toast } from 'sonner';

type RestaurantType = 'casual_dining' | 'fast_food' | 'fine_dining' | 'takeaway' | 'cafe' | 'bakery' | 'food_truck';

const EditRestaurant = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const { id } = useParams();
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState({
    name: '',
    description: '',
    address: '',
    city: '',
    province: '',
    postal_code: '',
    phone: '',
    email: '',
    website: '',
    cuisine_type: '',
    price_range: '',
    restaurant_type: 'casual_dining' as RestaurantType
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user && id) {
      fetchRestaurant();
    }
  }, [user, id]);

  const fetchRestaurant = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*')
        .eq('id', id)
        .single();

      if (error) throw error;
      
      if (data) {
        setRestaurant({
          name: data.name || '',
          description: data.description || '',
          address: data.address || '',
          city: data.city || '',
          province: data.province || '',
          postal_code: data.postal_code || '',
          phone: data.phone || '',
          email: data.email || '',
          website: data.website || '',
          cuisine_type: data.cuisine_type || '',
          price_range: data.price_range || '',
          restaurant_type: data.restaurant_type as RestaurantType
        });
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching restaurant:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to load restaurant data');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSave = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setSaving(true);

    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .update({
          name: restaurant.name,
          description: restaurant.description || null,
          address: restaurant.address,
          city: restaurant.city,
          province: restaurant.province,
          postal_code: restaurant.postal_code || null,
          phone: restaurant.phone || null,
          email: restaurant.email || null,
          website: restaurant.website || null,
          cuisine_type: restaurant.cuisine_type || null,
          price_range: restaurant.price_range || null,
          restaurant_type: restaurant.restaurant_type
        })
        .eq('id', id);

      if (error) throw error;

      toast.success('Restaurant updated successfully!');
      navigate('/restaurant-dashboard');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error updating restaurant:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to update restaurant');
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-96">
          <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-32 w-32 border-b-2 border-green-600"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle>Edit Restaurant Profile</CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <form onSubmit={handleSave} className="space-y-6">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Restaurant Name</label>
                  <Input
                    value={restaurant.name}
                    onChange={(e) => setRestaurant({...restaurant, name: e.target.value})}
                    required
                  />
                </div>

                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Cuisine Type</label>
                  <Input
                    value={restaurant.cuisine_type || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => setRestaurant({...restaurant, cuisine_type: e.target.value})}
                    placeholder="e.g., Indian, Italian, Fast Food"
                  />
                </div>

                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Restaurant Type</label>
                  <Select value={restaurant.restaurant_type} onValueChange={(value: RestaurantType) => setRestaurant({...restaurant, restaurant_type: value})}>
                    <SelectTrigger>
                      <SelectValue />
                    </SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                      <SelectItem value="casual_dining">Casual Dining</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="fast_food">Fast Food</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="fine_dining">Fine Dining</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="takeaway">Takeaway</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="cafe">Cafe</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="bakery">Bakery</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="food_truck">Food Truck</SelectItem>
                    </SelectContent>
                  </Select>
                </div>

                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Price Range</label>
                  <Select value={restaurant.price_range || ''} onValueChange={(value) => setRestaurant({...restaurant, price_range: value})}>
                    <SelectTrigger>
                      <SelectValue placeholder="Select price range" />
                    </SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                      <SelectItem value="R0-R100">R0-R100</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="R100-R250">R100-R250</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="R250-R500">R250-R500</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="R500+">R500+</SelectItem>
                    </SelectContent>
                  </Select>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Description</label>
                <Textarea
                  value={restaurant.description || ''}
                  onChange={(e) => setRestaurant({...restaurant, description: e.target.value})}
                  rows={4}
                  placeholder="Tell customers about your restaurant..."
                />
              </div>

              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Address</label>
                  <Input
                    value={restaurant.address}
                    onChange={(e) => setRestaurant({...restaurant, address: e.target.value})}
                    required
                  />
                </div>

                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">City</label>
                  <Input
                    value={restaurant.city}
                    onChange={(e) => setRestaurant({...restaurant, city: e.target.value})}
                    required
                  />
                </div>

                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Province</label>
                  <Input
                    value={restaurant.province}
                    onChange={(e) => setRestaurant({...restaurant, province: e.target.value})}
                    required
                  />
                </div>

                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Postal Code</label>
                  <Input
                    value={restaurant.postal_code || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => setRestaurant({...restaurant, postal_code: e.target.value})}
                  />
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Phone</label>
                  <Input
                    value={restaurant.phone || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => setRestaurant({...restaurant, phone: e.target.value})}
                    type="tel"
                  />
                </div>

                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Email</label>
                  <Input
                    value={restaurant.email || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => setRestaurant({...restaurant, email: e.target.value})}
                    type="email"
                  />
                </div>

                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Website</label>
                  <Input
                    value={restaurant.website || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => setRestaurant({...restaurant, website: e.target.value})}
                    type="url"
                    placeholder="https://..."
                  />
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="flex gap-4">
                <Button type="submit" disabled={saving} className="gradient-halaal text-white">
                  {saving ? 'Saving...' : 'Save Changes'}
                </Button>
                <Button 
                  type="button" 
                  variant="outline" 
                  onClick={() => navigate('/restaurant-dashboard')}
                >
                  Cancel
                </Button>
              </div>
            </form>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default EditRestaurant;

```

### `src/pages/Favorites.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import DashboardSidebar from '@/components/dashboard/DashboardSidebar';
import FavoriteListCard from '@/components/FavoriteListCard';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Heart, Menu, Plus, Share, Edit, Check, Users } from 'lucide-react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';

interface FavoriteList {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  created_at: string;
  isCollaborative?: boolean;
  collaborators?: number;
}

interface FavoriteRestaurant {
  id: string;
  list_id: string;
  visited: boolean;
  restaurants: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    city: string;
    cuisine_type: string;
    average_rating: number;
    total_reviews: number;
    description: string;
    price_range: string;
  };
}

const Favorites = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [lists, setLists] = useState<FavoriteList[]>([]);
  const [selectedList, setSelectedList] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<FavoriteRestaurant[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [sidebarCollapsed, setSidebarCollapsed] = useState(false);
  const [newListName, setNewListName] = useState('');
  const [newListDescription, setNewListDescription] = useState('');
  const [isCreatingList, setIsCreatingList] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchFavoriteLists();
    }
  }, [user]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (selectedList) {
      fetchListRestaurants(selectedList);
    }
  }, [selectedList]);

  const fetchFavoriteLists = async () => {
    try {
      // Enhanced mock lists with collaboration features
      const mockLists = [
        { 
          id: '1', 
          name: 'Summer Eats', 
          description: 'Light and fresh options for hot days', 
          created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
          isCollaborative: false,
          collaborators: 0
        },
        { 
          id: '2', 
          name: 'Date Night', 
          description: 'Romantic dining spots for special occasions', 
          created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
          isCollaborative: true,
          collaborators: 2
        },
        { 
          id: '3', 
          name: 'Family Friendly', 
          description: 'Great places to bring the kids', 
          created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
          isCollaborative: false,
          collaborators: 0
        }
      ];
      setLists(mockLists);
      if (mockLists.length > 0) {
        setSelectedList(mockLists[0].id);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching favorite lists:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const fetchListRestaurants = async (listId: string) => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('user_favorites')
        .select(`
          id,
          restaurants (
            id, 
            name, 
            city, 
            cuisine_type, 
            average_rating, 
            total_reviews,
            description,
            price_range
          )
        `)
        .eq('user_id', user?.id)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });

      if (error) throw error;
      
      // Transform to match our structure
      const transformedData = (data || []).map(item => ({
        id: item.id,
        list_id: listId,
        visited: Math.random() > 0.5, // Random for demo
        restaurants: item.restaurants
      }));
      
      setRestaurants(transformedData);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching list restaurants:', error);
    }
  };

  const toggleVisited = (restaurantId: string) => {
    setRestaurants(prev => 
      prev.map(r => 
        r.id === restaurantId ? { ...r, visited: !r.visited } : r
      )
    );
  };

  const createNewList = async () => {
    if (!newListName.trim()) return;
    
    const newList = {
      id: String(Date.now()),
      name: newListName,
      description: newListDescription,
      created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      isCollaborative: false,
      collaborators: 0
    };
    
    setLists(prev => [...prev, newList]);
    setNewListName('');
    setNewListDescription('');
    setIsCreatingList(false);
    setSelectedList(newList.id);
  };

  const handleShare = () => {
    // Mock share functionality
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(`Check out my favorite restaurants list: ${currentList?.name}`);
    alert('List link copied to clipboard! 📋');
  };

  const handleEdit = () => {
    alert('Edit functionality coming soon! ✏️');
  };

  if (!user) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-96">
          <div className="text-center">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Please sign in to view your favorites</h2>
            <Link to="/auth">
              <Button>Sign In</Button>
            </Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const currentList = lists.find(l => l.id === selectedList);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="flex min-h-screen">
        <DashboardSidebar 
          userType="reviewer" 
          collapsed={sidebarCollapsed}
        />
        
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden">
          <div className="lg:hidden flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white border-b">
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              onClick={() => setSidebarCollapsed(!sidebarCollapsed)}
            >
              <Menu className="h-5 w-5" />
            </Button>
            <h1 className="text-lg font-semibold">My Favorites</h1>
            <div></div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 lg:p-6 space-y-6">
            {/* List Selector */}
            <Card className="animate-fade-in">
              <CardHeader>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <Heart className="h-5 w-5 text-red-600" />
                    My Favorite Lists ({lists.length})
                  </CardTitle>
                  <Dialog open={isCreatingList} onOpenChange={setIsCreatingList}>
                    <DialogTrigger asChild>
                      <Button size="sm" className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700">
                        <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                        New List
                      </Button>
                    </DialogTrigger>
                    <DialogContent>
                      <DialogHeader>
                        <DialogTitle>Create New Favorites List</DialogTitle>
                      </DialogHeader>
                      <div className="space-y-4">
                        <Input
                          placeholder="List name (e.g., Date Night, Quick Bites)"
                          value={newListName}
                          onChange={(e) => setNewListName(e.target.value)}
                        />
                        <Input
                          placeholder="Description (optional)"
                          value={newListDescription}
                          onChange={(e) => setNewListDescription(e.target.value)}
                        />
                        <div className="flex gap-2">
                          <Button onClick={createNewList} className="flex-1 bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700">
                            Create List
                          </Button>
                          <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsCreatingList(false)}>
                            Cancel
                          </Button>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </DialogContent>
                  </Dialog>
                </div>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                  {lists.map((list) => (
                    <Button
                      key={list.id}
                      variant={selectedList === list.id ? "default" : "outline"}
                      size="sm"
                      onClick={() => setSelectedList(list.id)}
                      className="flex items-center gap-2 animate-scale-in"
                    >
                      {list.name}
                      {list.isCollaborative && (
                        <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">
                          <Users className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                          {list.collaborators}
                        </Badge>
                      )}
                      {selectedList === list.id && <Check className="h-3 w-3" />}
                    </Button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            {/* Current List */}
            {currentList && (
              <Card className="animate-fade-in">
                <CardHeader>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div>
                      <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        {currentList.name}
                        {currentList.isCollaborative && (
                          <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                            <Users className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                            Collaborative
                          </Badge>
                        )}
                      </CardTitle>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">
                        {currentList.description}
                      </p>
                      <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">
                        {restaurants.length} restaurants • {restaurants.filter(r => r.visited).length} visited • {restaurants.filter(r => !r.visited).length} want to go
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex gap-2">
                      <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={handleShare}>
                        <Share className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                        Share
                      </Button>
                      <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={handleEdit}>
                        <Edit className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                        Edit
                      </Button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardContent>
                  {loading ? (
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                      {[...Array(4)].map((_, i) => (
                        <div key={i} className="h-32 bg-gray-200 rounded animate-pulse"></div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  ) : restaurants.length === 0 ? (
                    <div className="text-center py-12">
                      <Heart className="h-16 w-16 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
                      <h3 className="text-xl font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">No restaurants in this list yet</h3>
                      <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
                        Add restaurants to your "{currentList.name}" list to get started!
                      </p>
                      <Link to="/restaurants">
                        <Button className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700">
                          Browse Restaurants
                        </Button>
                      </Link>
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <FavoriteListCard
                      restaurants={restaurants}
                      onToggleVisited={toggleVisited}
                      onShare={handleShare}
                      onEdit={handleEdit}
                    />
                  )}
                </CardContent>
              </Card>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default Favorites;

```

### `src/pages/FoodieLevels.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import DashboardSidebar from '@/components/dashboard/DashboardSidebar';
import LevelProgressCard from '@/components/LevelProgressCard';
import RecentActivityCard from '@/components/RecentActivityCard';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Trophy, Award, Star, Target, Menu, Gift, Camera, Video } from 'lucide-react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';

interface Profile {
  full_name: string;
  avatar_url: string;
  current_level: string;
  level_points: number;
  review_count: number;
}

interface RecentActivity {
  id: string;
  action: string;
  points: number;
  timestamp: string;
  icon: any;
}

const FoodieLevels = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [profile, setProfile] = useState<Profile | null>(null);
  const [recentActivities, setRecentActivities] = useState<RecentActivity[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [sidebarCollapsed, setSidebarCollapsed] = useState(false);

  const levels = [
    { name: 'Foodie', icon: '🍽️', pointsRequired: 0, color: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800', benefits: ['Basic review features', 'Community access'] },
    { name: 'Food Explorer', icon: '🔍', pointsRequired: 50, color: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800', benefits: ['Photo uploads in reviews', 'Enhanced profile'] },
    { name: 'Food Critic', icon: '📝', pointsRequired: 100, color: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800', benefits: ['TikTok links in reviews', 'Priority support'] },
    { name: 'Elite Critic', icon: '⭐', pointsRequired: 200, color: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800', benefits: ['Featured review priority', 'Exclusive events'] },
    { name: 'Master Foodie', icon: '👑', pointsRequired: 500, color: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800', benefits: ['Early access to features', 'VIP status', 'Special rewards'] }
  ];

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchProfile();
      fetchRecentActivities();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchProfile = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('profiles')
        .select('*')
        .eq('id', user?.id)
        .single();

      if (error) throw error;
      setProfile(data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching profile:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const fetchRecentActivities = async () => {
    // Mock recent activities - in a real app this would come from a database
    const mockActivities: RecentActivity[] = [
      { id: '1', action: 'Left a review for Spice Route', points: 10, timestamp: '2 hours ago', icon: Star },
      { id: '2', action: 'Added 3 photos to review', points: 15, timestamp: '1 day ago', icon: Camera },
      { id: '3', action: 'Shared TikTok video', points: 15, timestamp: '2 days ago', icon: Video },
      { id: '4', action: 'Review got 5 likes', points: 15, timestamp: '3 days ago', icon: Trophy },
      { id: '5', action: 'Added new restaurant', points: 25, timestamp: '1 week ago', icon: Target }
    ];
    setRecentActivities(mockActivities);
  };

  const getCurrentLevelIndex = () => {
    if (!profile) return 0;
    return levels.findIndex(level => level.name === profile.current_level);
  };

  const getNextLevel = () => {
    const currentIndex = getCurrentLevelIndex();
    return currentIndex < levels.length - 1 ? levels[currentIndex + 1] : null;
  };

  const getProgressToNextLevel = () => {
    if (!profile) return 0;
    const currentIndex = getCurrentLevelIndex();
    const nextLevel = getNextLevel();
    
    if (!nextLevel) return 100;
    
    const currentLevelPoints = levels[currentIndex].pointsRequired;
    const nextLevelPoints = nextLevel.pointsRequired;
    const progress = ((profile.level_points - currentLevelPoints) / (nextLevelPoints - currentLevelPoints)) * 100;
    
    return Math.min(Math.max(progress, 0), 100);
  };

  if (!user) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-96">
          <div className="text-center">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Please sign in to view your foodie level</h2>
            <Link to="/auth">
              <Button>Sign In</Button>
            </Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const nextLevel = getNextLevel();
  const progress = getProgressToNextLevel();
  const pointsToNext = nextLevel ? nextLevel.pointsRequired - (profile?.level_points || 0) : 0;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="flex min-h-screen">
        <DashboardSidebar 
          userType="reviewer" 
          collapsed={sidebarCollapsed}
        />
        
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden">
          <div className="lg:hidden flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white border-b">
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              onClick={() => setSidebarCollapsed(!sidebarCollapsed)}
            >
              <Menu className="h-5 w-5" />
            </Button>
            <h1 className="text-lg font-semibold">Foodie Levels</h1>
            <div></div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 lg:p-6 space-y-6">
            {/* Gamification Dashboard Grid */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
              {/* Current Level Progress */}
              {loading ? (
                <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
                  <div className="h-48 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
                </div>
              ) : profile ? (
                <LevelProgressCard
                  currentLevel={profile.current_level}
                  levelPoints={profile.level_points}
                  nextLevel={nextLevel}
                  progress={progress}
                  pointsToNext={pointsToNext}
                />
              ) : null}

              {/* Recent Activities */}
              <RecentActivityCard activities={recentActivities} />
            </div>

            {/* All Levels */}
            <Card className="animate-fade-in">
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <Award className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-500" />
                  All Foodie Levels
                </CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                  {levels.map((level, index) => {
                    const isUnlocked = profile && profile.level_points >= level.pointsRequired;
                    const isCurrent = profile?.current_level === level.name;
                    
                    return (
                      <Card 
                        key={level.name}
                        className={`${
                          isCurrent ? 'border-green-500 bg-green-50 animate-pulse' : 
                          isUnlocked ? 'border-gray-300' : 'border-gray-200 opacity-75'
                        } hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 hover-scale`}
                      >
                        <CardContent className="p-4 text-center">
                          <div className="text-3xl mb-2 animate-bounce">
                            {isUnlocked ? level.icon : '🔒'}
                          </div>
                          <h3 className={`font-semibold ${isCurrent ? 'text-green-900' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>
                            {level.name}
                            {isCurrent && <Badge className="ml-2 bg-green-600 text-xs">Current</Badge>}
                          </h3>
                          <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-3">
                            {level.pointsRequired} XP required
                          </p>
                          <div className="space-y-1">
                            {level.benefits.map((benefit, idx) => (
                              <p key={idx} className="text-xs text-gray-600 flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
                                <Star className="h-2 w-2 text-yellow-500" />
                                {benefit}
                              </p>
                            ))}
                          </div>
                        </CardContent>
                      </Card>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            {/* How to Earn XP - Enhanced with animations */}
            <Card className="bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-50 to-pink-50 border-purple-200 animate-fade-in">
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-purple-800">
                  <Target className="h-5 w-5" />
                  How to Earn XP
                </CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                  {[
                    { icon: Star, title: 'Write a Review', points: '+10 XP', color: 'blue' },
                    { icon: Camera, title: 'Upload Photos', points: '+5 XP each', color: 'green' },
                    { icon: Video, title: 'Add TikTok Video', points: '+15 XP', color: 'purple' },
                    { icon: Trophy, title: 'Get Review Likes', points: '+3 XP each', color: 'yellow' }
                  ].map((item, index) => (
                    <div key={index} className={`flex items-center gap-3 p-4 bg-${item.color}-50 rounded-lg border border-${item.color}-200 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 hover-scale animate-fade-in`}>
                      <item.icon className={`h-6 w-6 text-${item.color}-600`} />
                      <div>
                        <p className="font-medium">{item.title}</p>
                        <p className={`text-sm text-${item.color}-600`}>{item.points}</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default FoodieLevels;

```

### `src/pages/Index.tsx`

import React from 'react';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import HeroSection from '@/components/HeroSection';
import QuickFilters from '@/components/QuickFilters';

};
