```tsx
                      {promotion.status === 'draft' && (
                        <Button 
                          size="sm" 
                          onClick={() => updatePromotionStatus(promotion.id, 'active')}
                        >
                          Launch
                        </Button>
                      )}
                      {promotion.status === 'active' && (
                        <Button 
                          size="sm" 
                          variant="outline"
                          onClick={() => updatePromotionStatus(promotion.id, 'paused')}
                        >
                          Pause
                        </Button>
                      )}
                      {promotion.status === 'paused' && (
                        <Button 
                          size="sm"
                          onClick={() => updatePromotionStatus(promotion.id, 'active')}
                        >
                          Resume
                        </Button>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </CardContent>
                </Card>
              );
            })
          ) : (
            <Card>
              <CardContent className="text-center py-12">
                <h3 className="text-lg font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">No promotions yet</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">Create your first promotion to start reaching more customers!</p>
                <Button onClick={() => setShowCreateForm(true)}>
                  Create Your First Promotion
                </Button>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default PromotionsManager;

```

### `src/pages/RestaurantAnalytics.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import DashboardSidebar from '@/components/dashboard/DashboardSidebar';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { useAnalytics } from '@/hooks/useAnalytics';
import { useSubscription } from '@/hooks/useSubscription';
import AnalyticsChart from '@/components/AnalyticsChart';
import QuickStatsCard from '@/components/dashboard/QuickStatsCard';
import { 
  BarChart3, 
  TrendingUp, 
  Eye, 
  MousePointer, 
  Phone, 
  MapPin, 
  Menu,
  Calendar,
  Download,
  Share
} from 'lucide-react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';

const RestaurantAnalytics = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState<any>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [sidebarCollapsed, setSidebarCollapsed] = useState(false);
  const [analyticsRange, setAnalyticsRange] = useState('30');
  
  const { hasFeature } = useSubscription();
  const { data: analyticsData, loading: analyticsLoading } = useAnalytics(
    restaurant?.id || '', 
    parseInt(analyticsRange)
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchRestaurantData();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchRestaurantData = async () => {
    if (!user?.id) return;

    try {
      // Check for claimed restaurant first
      const { data: claimData } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_claims')
        .select('*, restaurants(*)')
        .eq('user_id', user.id)
        .eq('status', 'approved')
        .maybeSingle();

      if (claimData) {
        setRestaurant(claimData.restaurants);
        return;
      }

      // Otherwise check owned restaurant
      const { data: restaurantData } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*')
        .eq('owner_id', user.id)
        .maybeSingle();

      if (restaurantData) {
        setRestaurant(restaurantData);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching restaurant data:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const getTotalViews = () => {
    if (!analyticsData || analyticsData.length === 0) return 0;
    return analyticsData.reduce((sum, day) => sum + day.views, 0);
  };

  const getTotalEngagement = () => {
    if (!analyticsData || analyticsData.length === 0) return 0;
    return analyticsData.reduce((sum, day) => 
      sum + day.profile_visits + day.menu_views + day.contact_clicks + 
      day.website_clicks + day.phone_clicks + day.direction_clicks, 0
    );
  };

  const getEngagementRate = () => {
    const views = getTotalViews();
    const engagement = getTotalEngagement();
    return views > 0 ? ((engagement / views) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0.0';
  };

  const getMostPopularAction = () => {
    if (!analyticsData || analyticsData.length === 0) return 'Profile Views';
    
    const totals = analyticsData.reduce((acc, day) => ({
      profile_visits: acc.profile_visits + day.profile_visits,
      menu_views: acc.menu_views + day.menu_views,
      contact_clicks: acc.contact_clicks + day.contact_clicks,
      phone_clicks: acc.phone_clicks + day.phone_clicks,
      direction_clicks: acc.direction_clicks + day.direction_clicks
    }), {
      profile_visits: 0,
      menu_views: 0,
      contact_clicks: 0,
      phone_clicks: 0,
      direction_clicks: 0
    });

    const max = Math.max(...Object.values(totals));
    const action = Object.entries(totals).find(([_, value]) => value === max);
    
    const actionLabels: Record<string, string> = {
      profile_visits: 'Profile Views',
      menu_views: 'Menu Views', 
      contact_clicks: 'Contact Clicks',
      phone_clicks: 'Phone Calls',
      direction_clicks: 'Directions'
    };

    return action ? actionLabels[action[0]] : 'Profile Views';
  };

  if (!user || loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-96">
          <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-32 w-32 border-b-2 border-green-600"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!restaurant) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-96">
          <div className="text-center">
            <BarChart3 className="h-16 w-16 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">No Restaurant Found</h2>
            <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">You need a verified restaurant to access analytics.</p>
            <Link to="/restaurant-dashboard">
              <Button>Go to Dashboard</Button>
            </Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Check if user has analytics access
  if (!hasFeature('hasAdvancedAnalytics')) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        
        <div className="flex">
          <DashboardSidebar userType="restaurant" collapsed={sidebarCollapsed} />
          
          <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden">
            <div className="lg:hidden flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white border-b">
              <Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                onClick={() => setSidebarCollapsed(!sidebarCollapsed)}
              >
                <Menu className="h-5 w-5" />
              </Button>
              <h1 className="text-lg font-semibold">Analytics</h1>
              <div></div>
            </div>

            <div className="p-6">
              <Card className="max-w-2xl mx-auto">
                <CardContent className="p-8 text-center">
                  <BarChart3 className="h-16 w-16 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
                  <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Advanced Analytics</h2>
                  <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
                    Upgrade to <Badge className="bg-orange-100 text-orange-800">Sizzlin'</Badge> or{' '}
                    <Badge className="bg-red-100 text-red-800">Super Hot</Badge> to access detailed analytics and insights.
                  </p>
                  <div className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 text-sm text-gray-600">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <Eye className="h-4 w-4" />
                        <span>Detailed view tracking</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <MousePointer className="h-4 w-4" />
                        <span>Engagement metrics</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <TrendingUp className="h-4 w-4" />
                        <span>Performance trends</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <Calendar className="h-4 w-4" />
                        <span>Historical data</span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <Link to="/restaurant-dashboard">
                      <Button className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700">
                        Upgrade Subscription
                      </Button>
                    </Link>
                  </div>
                </CardContent>
              </Card>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="flex">
        <DashboardSidebar userType="restaurant" collapsed={sidebarCollapsed} />
        
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden">
          {/* Mobile Header */}
          <div className="lg:hidden flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white border-b">
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              onClick={() => setSidebarCollapsed(!sidebarCollapsed)}
            >
              <Menu className="h-5 w-5" />
            </Button>
            <h1 className="text-lg font-semibold">Analytics</h1>
            <div></div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-6 space-y-8">
            {/* Header */}
            <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between gap-4">
              <div>
                <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">Analytics Dashboard</h1>
                <p className="text-gray-600 mt-1">Track your restaurant's performance and engagement</p>
              </div>
              
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <Select value={analyticsRange} onValueChange={setAnalyticsRange}>
                  <SelectTrigger className="w-48">
                    <SelectValue />
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    <SelectItem value="7">Last 7 days</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="30">Last 30 days</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="90">Last 90 days</SelectItem>
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
                
                <Button variant="outline" size="sm">
                  <Download className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  Export
                </Button>
                
                <Button variant="outline" size="sm">
                  <Share className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  Share
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Quick Stats */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
              <QuickStatsCard
                title="Total Views"
                value={getTotalViews()}
                change="+12%"
                changeType="positive"
                icon={Eye}
                iconColor="text-blue-600"
                loading={analyticsLoading}
              />
              
              <QuickStatsCard
                title="Total Engagement"
                value={getTotalEngagement()}
                change="+8%"
                changeType="positive"
                icon={MousePointer}
                iconColor="text-green-600"
                loading={analyticsLoading}
              />
              
              <QuickStatsCard
                title="Engagement Rate"
                value={`${getEngagementRate()}%`}
                change="+2.1%"
                changeType="positive"
                icon={TrendingUp}
                iconColor="text-purple-600"
                loading={analyticsLoading}
              />
              
              <QuickStatsCard
                title="Top Action"
                value={getMostPopularAction()}
                icon={MapPin}
                iconColor="text-orange-600"
                loading={analyticsLoading}
              />
            </div>

            {/* Charts Grid */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
              <AnalyticsChart
                data={analyticsData}
                type="line"
                title="Daily Views"
                dataKey="views"
                color="#3b82f6"
              />
              
              <AnalyticsChart
                data={analyticsData}
                type="bar"
                title="Profile Visits"
                dataKey="profile_visits"
                color="#10b981"
              />
              
              <AnalyticsChart
                data={analyticsData}
                type="line"
                title="Menu Views"
                dataKey="menu_views"
                color="#f59e0b"
              />
              
              <AnalyticsChart
                data={analyticsData}
                type="bar"
                title="Contact Actions"
                dataKey="contact_clicks"
                color="#ef4444"
              />
            </div>

            {/* Additional Metrics */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
              <AnalyticsChart
                data={analyticsData}
                type="bar"
                title="Phone Clicks"
                dataKey="phone_clicks"
                color="#8b5cf6"
              />
              
              <AnalyticsChart
                data={analyticsData}
                type="line"
                title="Direction Requests"
                dataKey="direction_clicks"
                color="#06b6d4"
              />
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default RestaurantAnalytics;

```

### `src/pages/RestaurantDashboard.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import OverviewTab from '@/components/dashboard/OverviewTab';
import MenuTab from '@/components/dashboard/MenuTab';
import ReviewsTab from '@/components/dashboard/ReviewsTab';
import AnalyticsTab from '@/components/dashboard/AnalyticsTab';
import StaffTab from '@/components/dashboard/StaffTab';
import ReviewPhotoManager from '@/components/ReviewPhotoManager';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  phone: string;
  email: string;
  website: string;
  restaurant_type: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  price_range: string;
  is_verified: boolean;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  opening_hours: any;
  claim_status?: string;
  owner_id?: string;
}

const RestaurantDashboard = () => {
  const { id } = useParams<{ id: string }>();
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview');

  useEffect(() => {
    if (id) {
      fetchRestaurantDetails();
    }
  }, [id, user]);

  const fetchRestaurantDetails = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*')
        .eq('id', id)
        .eq('owner_id', user?.id)
        .single();

      if (error) {
        console.error('Error fetching restaurant:', error);
      }

      setRestaurant(data as Restaurant);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-amber-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        {loading ? (
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[400px]">
            <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-green-600"></div>
          </div>
        ) : !restaurant ? (
          <div className="text-center py-12">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Restaurant not found</h2>
            <p className="text-gray-600">You don't have access to this restaurant or it doesn't exist.</p>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-8">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <div>
                <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">{restaurant.name} Dashboard</h1>
                <p className="text-gray-600">Manage your restaurant information and reviews</p>
              </div>
              <Button onClick={() => console.log('Edit Restaurant')}>Edit Restaurant</Button>
            </div>

            <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={setActiveTab} className="w-full">
              <TabsList className="grid w-full grid-cols-6">
                <TabsTrigger value="overview">Overview</TabsTrigger>
                <TabsTrigger value="menu">Menu</TabsTrigger>
                <TabsTrigger value="reviews">Reviews</TabsTrigger>
                <TabsTrigger value="media">Media</TabsTrigger>
                <TabsTrigger value="analytics">Analytics</TabsTrigger>
                <TabsTrigger value="staff">Staff</TabsTrigger>
              </TabsList>

              <TabsContent value="overview" className="space-y-6">
                <OverviewTab restaurant={restaurant} />
              </TabsContent>

              <TabsContent value="menu" className="space-y-6">
                <MenuTab restaurantId={restaurant.id} />
              </TabsContent>

              <TabsContent value="reviews" className="space-y-6">
                <ReviewsTab restaurantId={restaurant.id} />
              </TabsContent>

              <TabsContent value="media" className="space-y-6">
                <ReviewPhotoManager restaurantId={restaurant.id} />
              </TabsContent>

              <TabsContent value="analytics" className="space-y-6">
                <AnalyticsTab restaurantId={restaurant.id} />
              </TabsContent>

              <TabsContent value="staff" className="space-y-6">
                <StaffTab restaurantId={restaurant.id} />
              </TabsContent>
            </Tabs>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default RestaurantDashboard;

```

### `src/pages/RestaurantDetails.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useParams, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator';
import { 
  MapPin, 
  Phone, 
  Globe, 
  Star, 
  Clock,
  Shield,
  CheckCircle,
  Share2,
  Heart,
  MessageSquare,
  Menu,
  Navigation,
  PhoneCall
} from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import ReviewCard from '@/components/ReviewCard';
import StarRating from '@/components/StarRating';
import { formatCuisineTypes, formatPriceRange, formatRestaurantType, getHalaalStatus } from '@/utils/formatters';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  phone: string;
  email: string;
  website: string;
  restaurant_type: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  price_range: string;
  is_verified: boolean;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  claim_status: string;
  owner_id: string | null;
  opening_hours: any;
}

interface Review {
  id: string;
  rating: number;
  title: string;
  content: string;
  created_at: string;
  photos: string[];
  tiktok_url: string;
  profiles: {
    full_name: string;
    avatar_url: string;
  };
}

const RestaurantDetails = () => {
  const { id } = useParams<{ id: string }>();
  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);
  const [reviews, setReviews] = useState<Review[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [reviewsLoading, setReviewsLoading] = useState(true);
  const [newReview, setNewReview] = useState({ rating: 0, title: '', content: '' });
  const [showReviewForm, setShowReviewForm] = useState(false);
  const [hasMenuItems, setHasMenuItems] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (id) {
      fetchRestaurant();
      fetchReviews();
      checkMenuItems();
    }
  }, [id]);

  const fetchRestaurant = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*')
        .eq('id', id)
        .eq('is_active', true)
        .single();

      if (error) throw error;
      setRestaurant(data);
      
      // Track view
      await supabase.rpc('track_restaurant_view', { 
        restaurant_uuid: id,
        activity_type: 'views'
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching restaurant:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to load restaurant details');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const fetchReviews = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('reviews')
        .select(`
          *,
          profiles (
            full_name,
            avatar_url
          )
        `)
        .eq('restaurant_id', id)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });

      if (error) throw error;
      setReviews(data || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching reviews:', error);
    } finally {
      setReviewsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const checkMenuItems = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('menu_items')
        .select('id')
        .eq('restaurant_id', id)
        .eq('is_available', true)
        .limit(1);

      if (error) throw error;
      setHasMenuItems(data && data.length > 0);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error checking menu items:', error);
      setHasMenuItems(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSubmitReview = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    
    try {
      const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
      
      if (!user) {
        toast.error('Please sign in to leave a review');
        return;
      }

      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('reviews')
        .insert({
          restaurant_id: id,
          user_id: user.id,
          rating: newReview.rating,
          title: newReview.title,
          content: newReview.content
        });

      if (error) throw error;

      toast.success('Review submitted successfully!');
      setNewReview({ rating: 0, title: '', content: '' });
      setShowReviewForm(false);
      fetchReviews();
      fetchRestaurant(); // Refresh to update average rating
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error submitting review:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to submit review');
    }
  };

  const getPlaceholderImage = (restaurantId: string) => {
    const imageOptions = [
      'photo-1555396273-367ea4eb4db5',
      'photo-1517248135467-4c7edcad34c4',
      'photo-1414235077428-338989a2e8c0',
      'photo-1424847651672-bf20a4b0982b',
      'photo-1559339352-11d035aa65de',
      'photo-1565299624946-b28f40a0ca4b'
    ];
    
    const hash = restaurantId.split('').reduce((a, b) => {
      a = ((a << 5) - a) + b.charCodeAt(0);
      return a & a;
    }, 0);
    
    const imageIndex = Math.abs(hash) % imageOptions.length;
    return `https://images.unsplash.com/${imageOptions[imageIndex]}?w=800&h=400&fit=crop`;
  };

  const handleDirections = () => {
    if (restaurant?.address) {
      const address = encodeURIComponent(`${restaurant.address}, ${restaurant.city}, ${restaurant.province}`);
      window.open(`https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=${address}`, '_blank');
      
      // Track analytics
      supabase.rpc('track_restaurant_view', { 
        restaurant_uuid: id,
        activity_type: 'direction_clicks'
      });
    }
  };

  const handlePhoneCall = () => {
    if (restaurant?.phone) {
      window.location.href = `tel:${restaurant.phone}`;
      
      // Track analytics
      supabase.rpc('track_restaurant_view', { 
        restaurant_uuid: id,
        activity_type: 'phone_clicks'
      });
    }
  };

  const handleWebsiteClick = () => {
    if (restaurant?.website) {
      window.open(restaurant.website, '_blank');
      
      // Track analytics
      supabase.rpc('track_restaurant_view', { 
        restaurant_uuid: id,
        activity_type: 'website_clicks'
      });
    }
  };

  const handleMenuView = () => {
    // Track analytics
    supabase.rpc('track_restaurant_view', { 
      restaurant_uuid: id,
      activity_type: 'menu_views'
    });
    
    // Scroll to menu section or navigate to menu page
    const menuSection = document.getElementById('menu-section');
    if (menuSection) {
      menuSection.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
    } else {
      // If no menu section exists, show message
      toast.info('Menu coming soon! Restaurant owner can add menu items from their dashboard.');
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-64">
          <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-green-600"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!restaurant) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="text-center py-16">
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Restaurant not found</h1>
          <Link to="/restaurants">
            <Button>Browse Restaurants</Button>
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const halaalStatus = getHalaalStatus(restaurant);
  const hasBusinessHours = restaurant.claim_status === 'verified' && restaurant.owner_id && restaurant.opening_hours;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        {/* Restaurant Hero */}
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm overflow-hidden mb-8">
          <div className="relative h-64 md:h-80">
            <img
              src={getPlaceholderImage(restaurant.id)}
              alt={restaurant.name}
              className="w-full h-full object-cover"
            />
            <div className="absolute top-4 right-4 flex flex-col gap-2">
              {halaalStatus.isHalaal && (
                <Badge className={halaalStatus.badgeClass}>
                  <Shield className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                  {halaalStatus.badgeText}
                </Badge>
              )}
              {restaurant.is_verified && (
                <Badge className="bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">
                  <CheckCircle className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                  Verified
                </Badge>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <div className="p-6">
            <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-4">
              <div>
                <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">{restaurant.name}</h1>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center">
                    {[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => (
                      <Star
                        key={i}
                        className={`h-5 w-5 ${
                          i < Math.floor(restaurant.average_rating || 0)
                            ? 'text-yellow-400 fill-current'
                            : 'text-gray-300'
                        }`}
                      />
                    ))}
                    <span className="ml-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                      {restaurant.average_rating.toFixed(1)} ({restaurant.total_reviews} reviews)
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <Button variant="outline" size="sm">
                  <Heart className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                  Save
                </Button>
                <Button variant="outline" size="sm">
                  <Share2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                  Share
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-4">
              <Badge variant="outline">{formatRestaurantType(restaurant.restaurant_type)}</Badge>
              <Badge variant="outline">{formatCuisineTypes(restaurant.cuisine_type)}</Badge>
              {restaurant.price_range && (
                <Badge variant="outline">{formatPriceRange(restaurant.price_range)}</Badge>
              )}
            </div>
            
            {restaurant.description && (
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">{restaurant.description}</p>
            )}
            
            <div className="mb-6">
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3">
                {hasMenuItems && (
                  <Button 
                    onClick={handleMenuView}
                    className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200"
                  >
                    <Menu className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                    View Menu
                  </Button>
                )}
                
                <Button 
                  onClick={handleDirections}
                  variant="outline"
                  className="border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200"
                >
                  <Navigation className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  Get Directions
                </Button>
                
                {restaurant.phone && (
                  <Button 
                    onClick={handlePhoneCall}
                    variant="outline"
                    className="border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200"
                  >
                    <PhoneCall className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                    Call Now
                  </Button>
                )}
                
                {restaurant.website && (
                  <Button 
                    onClick={handleWebsiteClick}
                    variant="outline"
                    className="border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200"
                  >
                    <Globe className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                    Visit Website
                  </Button>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
              <div className="space-y-4">
                <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900">Contact Information</h3>
                <div className="space-y-2 text-sm">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <MapPin className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
                    <span>{restaurant.address}, {restaurant.city}, {restaurant.province}</span>
                  </div>
                  {restaurant.phone && (
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Phone className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
                      <span>{restaurant.phone}</span>
                    </div>
                  )}
                  {restaurant.website && (
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Globe className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
                      <span className="text-green-600 break-all">
                        {restaurant.website}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
              
              {hasBusinessHours && (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900">Business Hours</h3>
                  <div className="space-y-2 text-sm">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Clock className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
                      <span>Monday - Sunday: 11:00 AM - 10:00 PM</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Menu Section - Only show if restaurant is claimed and has menu items */}
        {restaurant.claim_status === 'verified' && restaurant.owner_id && hasMenuItems && (
          <div id="menu-section" className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm p-6 mb-8">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Menu</h2>
            <div className="text-center py-8">
              <Menu className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
              <p className="text-gray-500 mb-4">Menu items will be displayed here.</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">
                Full menu functionality coming soon!
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Reviews Section */}
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm p-6">
          <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">
              Reviews ({restaurant.total_reviews})
            </h2>
            <Button onClick={() => setShowReviewForm(!showReviewForm)}>
              <MessageSquare className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
              Write Review
            </Button>
          </div>

          {showReviewForm && (
            <Card className="mb-6">
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle>Write a Review</CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <form onSubmit={handleSubmitReview} className="space-y-4">
                  <div>
                    <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                      Rating
                    </label>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((star) => (
                        <button
                          key={star}
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => setNewReview(prev => ({ ...prev, rating: star }))}
                          className="focus:outline-none"
                        >
                          <Star
                            className={`h-6 w-6 ${
                              star <= newReview.rating
                                ? 'text-yellow-400 fill-current'
                                : 'text-gray-300'
                            }`}
                          />
                        </button>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <label htmlFor="title" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
                      Title
                    </label>
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      id="title"
                      value={newReview.title}
                      onChange={(e) => setNewReview(prev => ({ ...prev, title: e.target.value }))}
                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-green-500"
                      placeholder="Give your review a title"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <label htmlFor="content" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
                      Review
                    </label>
                    <textarea
                      id="content"
                      rows={4}
                      value={newReview.content}
                      onChange={(e) => setNewReview(prev => ({ ...prev, content: e.target.value }))}
                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-green-500"
                      placeholder="Share your experience..."
                      required
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex gap-2">
                    <Button type="submit" disabled={!newReview.rating || !newReview.content}>
                      Submit Review
                    </Button>
                    <Button
                      type="button"
                      variant="outline"
                      onClick={() => setShowReviewForm(false)}
                    >
                      Cancel
                    </Button>
                  </div>
                </form>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          )}

          {reviewsLoading ? (
            <div className="flex justify-center py-8">
              <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-green-600"></div>
            </div>
          ) : reviews.length > 0 ? (
            <div className="space-y-6">
              {reviews.map((review) => (
                <div key={review.id} className="border-b border-gray-200 pb-6 last:border-b-0">
                  <div className="flex items-start space-x-4">
                    <div className="flex-shrink-0">
                      <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-green-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                        <span className="text-green-600 font-medium">
                          {review.profiles?.full_name?.charAt(0) || 'U'}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex-1">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                        <h4 className="font-medium text-gray-900">
                          {review.profiles?.full_name || 'Anonymous User'}
                        </h4>
                        <div className="flex items-center">
                          {[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => (
                            <Star
                              key={i}
                              className={`h-4 w-4 ${
                                i < review.rating
                                  ? 'text-yellow-400 fill-current'
                                  : 'text-gray-300'
                              }`}
                            />
                          ))}
                        </div>
                        <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                          {new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                      {review.title && (
                        <h5 className="font-medium text-gray-800 mb-2">{review.title}</h5>
                      )}
                      {review.content && (
                        <p className="text-gray-700">{review.content}</p>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="text-center py-8">
              <p className="text-gray-500">No reviews yet. Be the first to review this restaurant!</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default RestaurantDetails;

```

### `src/pages/RestaurantManagementDashboard.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useParams, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { ArrowLeft } from 'lucide-react';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import RestaurantDashboardTabs from '@/components/dashboard/RestaurantDashboardTabs';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  phone: string;
  email: string;
  website: string;
  restaurant_type: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  price_range: string;
  is_verified: boolean;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  opening_hours: any;
  claim_status: string;
  owner_id: string;
  subscription_tier: string;
}

const RestaurantManagementDashboard = () => {
  const { id } = useParams<{ id: string }>();
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [hasAccess, setHasAccess] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (id && user) {
      checkAccessAndFetchRestaurant();
    }
  }, [id, user]);

  const checkAccessAndFetchRestaurant = async () => {
    try {
      // Check if user has access to this restaurant
      const { data: accessData, error: accessError } = await supabase
        .rpc('can_access_restaurant_dashboard', {
          _user_id: user?.id,
          _restaurant_id: id
        });

      if (accessError) {
        console.error('Access check error:', accessError);
        setHasAccess(false);
        setLoading(false);
        return;
      }

      setHasAccess(accessData);

      if (accessData) {
        // Fetch restaurant details
        const { data: restaurantData, error: restaurantError } = await supabase
          .from('restaurants')
          .select('*')
          .eq('id', id)
          .single();

        if (restaurantError) {
          console.error('Restaurant fetch error:', restaurantError);
        } else {
          setRestaurant(restaurantData);
        }
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error in checkAccessAndFetchRestaurant:', error);
      setHasAccess(false);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)]">
          <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-green-600"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!hasAccess || !restaurant) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)]">
          <div className="text-center">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Access Denied</h2>
            <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
              You don't have permission to manage this restaurant or it doesn't exist.
            </p>
            <Button onClick={() => navigate('/restaurant-dashboard')}>
              Back to Dashboard
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        <div className="mb-8">
          <Button
            variant="ghost"
            onClick={() => navigate('/restaurant-dashboard')}
            className="mb-4"
          >
            <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
            Back to Dashboard
          </Button>
          
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <div>
              <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">{restaurant.name}</h1>
              <p className="text-gray-600">{restaurant.address}, {restaurant.city}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="flex gap-2">
              {restaurant.is_verified && (
                <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">
                  Verified
                </span>
              )}
              {restaurant.is_halaal_certified && (
                <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-green-100 text-green-800">
                  Halaal Certified
                </span>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <RestaurantDashboardTabs restaurant={restaurant} />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default RestaurantManagementDashboard;

```

### `src/pages/RestaurantOwnerDashboard.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import DashboardSidebar from '@/components/dashboard/DashboardSidebar';
import RestaurantOverview from '@/components/dashboard/RestaurantOverview';
import { useSubscription } from '@/hooks/useSubscription';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Menu, Plus, Search, Building } from 'lucide-react';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  phone: string;
  email: string;
  website: string;
  restaurant_type: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  price_range: string;
  is_verified: boolean;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  opening_hours: any;
  claim_status: string;
  owner_id: string;
  subscription_tier: string;
}

interface RestaurantClaim {
  id: string;
  restaurant_id: string;
  status: string;
  created_at: string;
  restaurants?: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    address: string;
    city: string;
  };
}

const RestaurantOwnerDashboard = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [ownedRestaurants, setOwnedRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);
  const [pendingClaims, setPendingClaims] = useState<RestaurantClaim[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [sidebarCollapsed, setSidebarCollapsed] = useState(false);
  const { subscription } = useSubscription();

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchRestaurantsAndClaims();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchRestaurantsAndClaims = async () => {
    try {
      // Fetch owned restaurants (verified claims)
      const { data: restaurants, error: restaurantsError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*')
        .eq('owner_id', user?.id)
        .eq('claim_status', 'verified');

      if (restaurantsError) {
        console.error('Error fetching restaurants:', restaurantsError);
      } else {
        setOwnedRestaurants(restaurants || []);
      }

      // Fetch pending claims
      const { data: claims, error: claimsError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_claims')
        .select(`
          *,
          restaurants:restaurant_id (
            id,
            name,
            address,
            city
          )
        `)
        .eq('user_id', user?.id)
        .eq('status', 'pending');

      if (claimsError) {
        console.error('Error fetching claims:', claimsError);
      } else {
        setPendingClaims(claims || []);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error in fetchRestaurantsAndClaims:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  if (!user) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)]">
          <div className="text-center">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Please sign in to view your restaurant dashboard</h2>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-96">
          <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-32 w-32 border-b-2 border-green-600"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // If user has no restaurants and no pending claims, show getting started guide
  if (ownedRestaurants.length === 0 && pendingClaims.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12">
          <div className="text-center mb-8">
            <Building className="h-16 w-16 text-green-600 mx-auto mb-4" />
            <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Welcome to Restaurant Management</h1>
            <p className="text-gray-600 text-lg">
              To access your restaurant dashboard, you need to either add a new restaurant or claim an existing one.
            </p>
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
            <Card className="hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow">
              <CardHeader className="text-center">
                <Plus className="h-12 w-12 text-blue-600 mx-auto mb-4" />
                <CardTitle className="text-xl">Add New Restaurant</CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="text-center">
                <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
                  Add your restaurant to our platform and start managing your online presence.
                </p>
                <Button 
                  onClick={() => navigate('/add-restaurant')}
                  className="w-full bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700"
                >
                  Add Restaurant
                </Button>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <Card className="hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow">
              <CardHeader className="text-center">
                <Search className="h-12 w-12 text-green-600 mx-auto mb-4" />
                <CardTitle className="text-xl">Claim Existing Restaurant</CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="text-center">
                <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
                  Find and claim your restaurant if it's already listed on our platform.
                </p>
                <Button 
                  onClick={() => navigate('/claim-restaurant-search')}
                  className="w-full bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700"
                >
                  Search & Claim
                </Button>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </div>

          <div className="mt-12 bg-blue-50 rounded-lg p-6">
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-blue-900 mb-4">What happens after I claim a restaurant?</h3>
            <div className="space-y-2 text-blue-700">
              <p>• Submit required documentation (Halaal certificate, proof of ownership)</p>
              <p>• Our team reviews your claim within 2-3 business days</p>
              <p>• Once approved, you'll gain full access to the restaurant dashboard</p>
              <p>• Start with our Basic plan including menu management and analytics</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="flex">
        <DashboardSidebar 
          userType="restaurant" 
          collapsed={sidebarCollapsed}
        />
        
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden">
          <div className="lg:hidden flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white border-b">
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              onClick={() => setSidebarCollapsed(!sidebarCollapsed)}
            >
              <Menu className="h-5 w-5" />
            </Button>
            <h1 className="text-lg font-semibold">Restaurant Dashboard</h1>
            <div></div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-6">
            <RestaurantOverview 
              pendingClaims={pendingClaims}
              ownedRestaurants={ownedRestaurants}
              subscription={subscription}
            />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default RestaurantOwnerDashboard;

```

### `src/pages/Restaurants.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import RestaurantCard from '@/components/RestaurantCard';
import AdvancedSearch from '@/components/AdvancedSearch';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Shuffle } from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  restaurant_type: 'casual_dining' | 'fast_food' | 'fine_dining' | 'takeaway' | 'cafe' | 'bakery' | 'food_truck';
  price_range: string;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  is_verified: boolean;
  claim_status: string;
  owner_id?: string;
  phone: string;
  email: string;
  website: string;
  certification_body?: string;
  halaal_certificate_url?: string;
}

interface SearchFilters {
  searchTerm: string;
  city: string;
  cuisineType: string;
  restaurantType: string;
  priceRange: string;
  isHalaalCertified: boolean;
  isVerified: boolean;
  minRating: number;
  showClaimableOnly?: boolean;
}

const Restaurants = () => {
  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [filters, setFilters] = useState<SearchFilters>({
    searchTerm: '',
    city: '',
    cuisineType: '',
    restaurantType: '',
    priceRange: '',
    isHalaalCertified: false,
    isVerified: false,
    minRating: 0,
    showClaimableOnly: false
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchRestaurants();
  }, []);

  const fetchRestaurants = async (searchFilters?: SearchFilters) => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      let query = supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*')
        .eq('is_active', true);

      const activeFilters = searchFilters || filters;

      console.log('Active filters:', activeFilters);

      // Apply filters
      if (activeFilters.searchTerm) {
        query = query.or(`name.ilike.%${activeFilters.searchTerm}%,description.ilike.%${activeFilters.searchTerm}%,cuisine_type.ilike.%${activeFilters.searchTerm}%`);
      }

      if (activeFilters.city) {
        query = query.eq('city', activeFilters.city);
      }

      if (activeFilters.cuisineType) {
        query = query.eq('cuisine_type', activeFilters.cuisineType);
      }

      if (activeFilters.restaurantType) {
        query = query.eq('restaurant_type', activeFilters.restaurantType as Restaurant['restaurant_type']);
      }

      if (activeFilters.priceRange) {
        query = query.eq('price_range', activeFilters.priceRange);
      }

      if (activeFilters.isHalaalCertified) {
        query = query.eq('is_halaal_certified', true);
      }

      if (activeFilters.isVerified) {
        query = query.eq('is_verified', true);
      }

      if (activeFilters.minRating > 0) {
        query = query.gte('average_rating', activeFilters.minRating);
      }

      const { data, error } = await query.order('average_rating', { ascending: false });

      if (error) throw error;
      
      console.log('Fetched restaurants:', data);
      
      let filteredRestaurants = data || [];
      
      // Apply claimable filter on client side for better control
      if (activeFilters.showClaimableOnly) {
        console.log('Applying claimable filter client-side');
        filteredRestaurants = filteredRestaurants.filter(restaurant => 
          restaurant.claim_status === 'unclaimed' || 
          restaurant.claim_status === 'rejected' ||
          (!restaurant.owner_id && !['verified', 'approved', 'pending'].includes(restaurant.claim_status))
        );
        console.log('Filtered claimable restaurants:', filteredRestaurants);
      }
      
      console.log('Restaurants with rejected claim status:', filteredRestaurants.filter(r => r.claim_status === 'rejected'));
      
      setRestaurants(filteredRestaurants);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching restaurants:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSearch = (newFilters: SearchFilters) => {
    setFilters(newFilters);
    fetchRestaurants(newFilters);
  };

  const handleRandomRestaurant = () => {
    if (restaurants.length === 0) {
      toast.error('No restaurants available for random selection');
      return;
    }
    
    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * restaurants.length);
    const randomRestaurant = restaurants[randomIndex];
    
    toast.success(`How about trying ${randomRestaurant.name}?`, {
      description: `${randomRestaurant.address}, ${randomRestaurant.city}`,
      action: {
        label: 'View Details',
        onClick: () => window.open(`/restaurant/${randomRestaurant.id}`, '_blank')
      }
    });
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 via-white to-amber-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-8">
          {/* Sidebar */}
          <div className="lg:w-1/3 space-y-6">
            <AdvancedSearch onSearch={handleSearch} initialFilters={filters} />
            
            {/* Random Restaurant Button */}
            <Button 
              onClick={handleRandomRestaurant}
              className="w-full bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-primary/80 hover:from-primary/90 hover:to-primary/70 text-white shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 transform hover:scale-105 py-4"
              size="lg"
            >
              <Shuffle className="h-5 w-5 mr-2" />
              Surprise Me! Pick Random Restaurant
            </Button>
          </div>

          {/* Restaurant Grid */}
          <div className="lg:w-2/3">
            <div className="mb-6">
              <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gradient mb-2">
                {filters.showClaimableOnly ? 'Claimable Restaurants' : 'Discover Halaal Restaurants'}
              </h1>
              <p className="text-gray-600">
                Found {restaurants.length} restaurants
                {filters.searchTerm && ` for "${filters.searchTerm}"`}
              </p>
            </div>

            {loading ? (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                {[...Array(6)].map((_, i) => (
                  <div key={i} className="animate-pulse">
                    <div className="bg-gray-200 rounded-lg h-48"></div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : restaurants.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="text-center py-12">
                <p className="text-gray-500 text-lg">
                  {filters.showClaimableOnly 
                    ? 'No claimable restaurants found matching your criteria.'
                    : 'No restaurants found matching your criteria.'
                  }
                </p>
                <Button 
                  onClick={() => handleSearch({
                    searchTerm: '',
                    city: '',
                    cuisineType: '',
                    restaurantType: '',
                    priceRange: '',
                    isHalaalCertified: false,
                    isVerified: false,
                    minRating: 0,
                    showClaimableOnly: false
                  })}
                  className="mt-4 bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700"
                >
                  Clear Filters
                </Button>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                {restaurants.map((restaurant) => (
                  <RestaurantCard key={restaurant.id} restaurant={restaurant} />
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default Restaurants;

```

### `src/pages/ReviewManagement.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { Star, Flag, MessageSquare, User } from 'lucide-react';

interface Review {
  id: string;
  rating: number;
  title: string | null;
  content: string | null;
  created_at: string;
  is_featured: boolean | null;
  is_flagged: boolean | null;
  profiles: {
    full_name: string | null;
  } | null;
}

const ReviewManagement = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState<any>(null);
  const [reviews, setReviews] = useState<Review[]>([]);
  const [selectedReview, setSelectedReview] = useState<Review | null>(null);
  const [responseText, setResponseText] = useState('');
  const [isResponseDialogOpen, setIsResponseDialogOpen] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchRestaurantAndReviews();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchRestaurantAndReviews = async () => {
    try {
      // Get restaurant
      const { data: restaurantData } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*')
        .eq('owner_id', user?.id)
        .single();

      if (restaurantData) {
        setRestaurant(restaurantData);
        
        // Get reviews
        const { data: reviewsData } = await supabase
          .from('reviews')
          .select(`
            *,
            profiles:user_id (
              full_name
            )
          `)
          .eq('restaurant_id', restaurantData.id)
          .order('created_at', { ascending: false });

        setReviews(reviewsData || []);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching data:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleFeatureToggle = async (reviewId: string, currentFeatured: boolean | null) => {
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('reviews')
        .update({ is_featured: !currentFeatured })
        .eq('id', reviewId);

      if (error) throw error;
      
      toast.success(`Review ${!currentFeatured ? 'featured' : 'unfeatured'} successfully!`);
      fetchRestaurantAndReviews();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error updating review:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to update review');
    }
  };

  const handleFlagToggle = async (reviewId: string, currentFlagged: boolean | null) => {
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('reviews')
        .update({ is_flagged: !currentFlagged })
        .eq('id', reviewId);

      if (error) throw error;
      
      toast.success(`Review ${!currentFlagged ? 'flagged' : 'unflagged'} successfully!`);
      fetchRestaurantAndReviews();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error updating review:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to update review');
    }
  };

  const handleSendResponse = async () => {
    if (!selectedReview || !responseText.trim()) return;

    try {
      // In a real app, you'd save responses to a separate table
      // For now, we'll just show a success message
      toast.success('Response sent to reviewer!');
      setIsResponseDialogOpen(false);
      setResponseText('');
      setSelectedReview(null);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error sending response:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to send response');
    }
  };

  const renderStars = (rating: number) => {
    return Array.from({ length: 5 }, (_, i) => (
      <Star
        key={i}
        className={`h-4 w-4 ${i < rating ? 'text-yellow-400 fill-current' : 'text-gray-300'}`}
      />
    ));
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-96">
          <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-32 w-32 border-b-2 border-green-600"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-8">
          <div>
            <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">Review Management</h1>
            <p className="text-gray-600">{restaurant?.name}</p>
            <div className="mt-2 flex items-center gap-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                {renderStars(Math.round(restaurant?.average_rating || 0))}
                <span className="ml-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                  {restaurant?.average_rating?.toFixed(1) || '0.0'} ({restaurant?.total_reviews || 0} reviews)
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => navigate('/restaurant-dashboard')}>
            Back to Dashboard
          </Button>
        </div>

        <div className="space-y-6">
          {reviews.map((review) => (
            <Card key={review.id}>
              <CardContent className="p-6">
                <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      <User className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
                      <span className="font-medium">{review.profiles?.full_name || 'Anonymous'}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      {renderStars(review.rating)}
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                      {new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    {review.is_featured && <Badge className="bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800">Featured</Badge>}
                    {review.is_flagged && <Badge variant="destructive">Flagged</Badge>}
                  </div>
                </div>

                {review.title && (
                  <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg mb-2">{review.title}</h3>
                )}
                
                {review.content && (
                  <p className="text-gray-700 mb-4">{review.content}</p>
                )}

                <div className="flex gap-2">
                  <Button
                    size="sm"
                    variant={review.is_featured ? "default" : "outline"}
                    onClick={() => handleFeatureToggle(review.id, review.is_featured)}
                  >
                    <Star className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                    {review.is_featured ? 'Unfeature' : 'Feature'}
                  </Button>
                  
                  <Button
                    size="sm"
                    variant={review.is_flagged ? "default" : "outline"}
                    onClick={() => handleFlagToggle(review.id, review.is_flagged)}
                  >
                    <Flag className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                    {review.is_flagged ? 'Unflag' : 'Flag'}
                  </Button>
                  
                  <Dialog open={isResponseDialogOpen} onOpenChange={setIsResponseDialogOpen}>
                    <DialogTrigger asChild>
                      <Button
                        size="sm"
                        variant="outline"
                        onClick={() => setSelectedReview(review)}
                      >
                        <MessageSquare className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                        Respond
                      </Button>
                    </DialogTrigger>
                    <DialogContent>
                      <DialogHeader>
                        <DialogTitle>Respond to Review</DialogTitle>
                      </DialogHeader>
                      
                      <div className="space-y-4">
                        <div className="p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-2">
                            {renderStars(selectedReview?.rating || 0)}
                          </div>
                          <p className="text-sm">{selectedReview?.content}</p>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div>
                          <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Your Response</label>
                          <Textarea
                            value={responseText}
                            onChange={(e) => setResponseText(e.target.value)}
                            placeholder="Thank you for your feedback..."
                            rows={4}
                          />
                        </div>
                        
                        <div className="flex gap-2">
                          <Button onClick={handleSendResponse} className="gradient-halaal text-white">
                            Send Response
                          </Button>
                          <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsResponseDialogOpen(false)}>
                            Cancel
                          </Button>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </DialogContent>
                  </Dialog>
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          ))}
          
          {reviews.length === 0 && (
            <Card>
              <CardContent className="text-center py-12">
                <MessageSquare className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
                <p className="text-gray-500">No reviews yet</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-1">
                  Reviews will appear here once customers start reviewing your restaurant
                </p>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default ReviewManagement;

```

### `src/pages/ReviewerDashboard.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import ReviewerProfile from '@/components/ReviewerProfile';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Star, Heart, BookOpen, Clock } from 'lucide-react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';

interface Review {
  id: string;
  rating: number;
  title: string;
  content: string;
  created_at: string;
  restaurants: {
    name: string;
    id: string;
  };
}

interface FavoriteRestaurant {
  id: string;
  restaurant_id: string;
  created_at: string;
  restaurants: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    city: string;
    cuisine_type: string;
    average_rating: number;
  };
}

const ReviewerDashboard = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [reviews, setReviews] = useState<Review[]>([]);
  const [favorites, setFavorites] = useState<FavoriteRestaurant[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'reviews' | 'favorites'>('reviews');

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchUserData();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchUserData = async () => {
    try {
      // Fetch reviews
      const { data: reviewsData, error: reviewsError } = await supabase
        .from('reviews')
        .select(`
          *,
          restaurants (name, id)
        `)
        .eq('user_id', user?.id)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });

      if (reviewsError) throw reviewsError;

      // Fetch favorites
      const { data: favoritesData, error: favoritesError } = await supabase
        .from('user_favorites')
        .select(`
          *,
          restaurants (id, name, city, cuisine_type, average_rating)
        `)
        .eq('user_id', user?.id)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });

      if (favoritesError) throw favoritesError;

      setReviews(reviewsData || []);
      setFavorites(favoritesData || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching user data:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('en-ZA', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'short',
      day: 'numeric'
    });
  };

  if (!user) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)]">
          <div className="text-center">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Please Sign In</h2>
            <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">You need to be signed in to view your dashboard</p>
            <Link to="/auth">
              <Button>Sign In</Button>
            </Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
          {/* Profile Sidebar */}
          <div className="lg:col-span-1">
            <ReviewerProfile />
          </div>

          {/* Main Content */}
          <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-6">
            {/* Navigation Tabs */}
            <div className="flex gap-4">
              <Button
                variant={activeTab === 'reviews' ? 'default' : 'outline'}
                onClick={() => setActiveTab('reviews')}
                className="flex items-center gap-2"
              >
                <BookOpen className="h-4 w-4" />
                My Reviews ({reviews.length})
              </Button>
              <Button
                variant={activeTab === 'favorites' ? 'default' : 'outline'}
                onClick={() => setActiveTab('favorites')}
                className="flex items-center gap-2"
              >
                <Heart className="h-4 w-4" />
                Favorites ({favorites.length})
              </Button>
            </div>

            {/* Content */}
            {loading ? (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => (
                  <Card key={i}>
                    <CardContent className="p-6">
                      <div className="animate-pulse space-y-3">
                        <div className="h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-3/4"></div>
                        <div className="h-3 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/2"></div>
                        <div className="h-3 bg-gray-200 rounded w-full"></div>
                      </div>
                    </CardContent>
                  </Card>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : activeTab === 'reviews' ? (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {reviews.length === 0 ? (
                  <Card>
                    <CardContent className="p-8 text-center">
                      <BookOpen className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
                      <h3 className="text-lg font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">No reviews yet</h3>
                      <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                        Start reviewing restaurants to build your foodie profile!
                      </p>
                      <Link to="/restaurants">
                        <Button>Discover Restaurants</Button>
                      </Link>
                    </CardContent>
                  </Card>
                ) : (
                  reviews.map((review) => (
                    <Card key={review.id}>
                      <CardHeader>
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
                          <div>
                            <CardTitle className="text-lg">
                              <Link 
                                to={`/restaurants/${review.restaurants.id}`}
                                className="hover:text-green-600 transition-colors"
                              >
                                {review.restaurants.name}
                              </Link>
                            </CardTitle>
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
                              <div className="flex items-center">
                                {[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => (
                                  <Star
                                    key={i}
                                    className={`h-4 w-4 ${
                                      i < review.rating ? 'fill-yellow-400 text-yellow-400' : 'text-gray-300'
                                    }`}
                                  />
                                ))}
                              </div>
                              <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                                {formatDate(review.created_at)}
                              </span>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </CardHeader>
                      <CardContent>
```
