```tsx
                        {review.title && (
                          <h4 className="font-medium mb-2">{review.title}</h4>
                        )}
                        {review.content && (
                          <p className="text-gray-700">{review.content}</p>
                        )}
                      </CardContent>
                    </Card>
                  ))
                )}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {favorites.length === 0 ? (
                  <Card>
                    <CardContent className="p-8 text-center">
                      <Heart className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
                      <h3 className="text-lg font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">No favorites yet</h3>
                      <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                        Heart restaurants you love to keep track of them here!
                      </p>
                      <Link to="/restaurants">
                        <Button>Browse Restaurants</Button>
                      </Link>
                    </CardContent>
                  </Card>
                ) : (
                  favorites.map((favorite) => (
                    <Card key={favorite.id}>
                      <CardHeader>
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
                          <div>
                            <CardTitle className="text-lg">
                              <Link 
                                to={`/restaurants/${favorite.restaurants.id}`}
                                className="hover:text-green-600 transition-colors"
                              >
                                {favorite.restaurants.name}
                              </Link>
                            </CardTitle>
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
                              <Badge variant="outline">{favorite.restaurants.cuisine_type}</Badge>
                              <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">•</span>
                              <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">{favorite.restaurants.city}</span>
                              <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">•</span>
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <Star className="h-3 w-3 fill-yellow-400 text-yellow-400" />
                                <span className="text-sm">{favorite.restaurants.average_rating.toFixed(1)}</span>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                          <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                            Added {formatDate(favorite.created_at)}
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </CardHeader>
                    </Card>
                  ))
                )}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default ReviewerDashboard;

```

### `src/pages/UserProfile.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useParams, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from '@/components/ui/avatar';
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
import { Star, MapPin, Users, UserPlus, UserMinus, ArrowLeft, Heart } from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import Header from '@/components/Header';
import RestaurantCard from '@/components/RestaurantCard';

interface UserProfile {
  id: string;
  full_name: string;
  first_name: string;
  surname: string;
  avatar_url: string;
  current_level: string;
  level_points: number;
  review_count: number;
  bio: string;
  location: string;
}

interface Review {
  id: string;
  rating: number;
  title: string;
  content: string;
  created_at: string;
  restaurant: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    city: string;
    province: string;
    cuisine_type: string;
    average_rating: number;
  };
}

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  restaurant_type: string;
  price_range: string;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  is_verified: boolean;
  phone: string;
  email: string;
  website: string;
  certification_body?: string;
  halaal_certificate_url?: string;
}

const UserProfile = () => {
  const { id } = useParams<{ id: string }>();
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [profile, setProfile] = useState<UserProfile | null>(null);
  const [reviews, setReviews] = useState<Review[]>([]);
  const [favoriteRestaurants, setFavoriteRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);
  const [isFollowing, setIsFollowing] = useState(false);
  const [followerCount, setFollowerCount] = useState(0);
  const [followingCount, setFollowingCount] = useState(0);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('reviews');

  const isOwnProfile = user?.id === id;

  useEffect(() => {
    if (id) {
      fetchUserProfile();
      fetchUserReviews();
      fetchFavoriteRestaurants();
      if (user && !isOwnProfile) {
        checkFollowStatus();
      }
      fetchFollowCounts();
    }
  }, [id, user, isOwnProfile]);

  const fetchUserProfile = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('profiles')
        .select('*')
        .eq('id', id)
        .single();

      if (error) throw error;
      setProfile(data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching profile:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to load user profile');
    }
  };

  const fetchUserReviews = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('reviews')
        .select(`
          *,
          restaurant:restaurants!inner(
            id, name, city, province, cuisine_type, average_rating
          )
        `)
        .eq('user_id', id)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });

      if (error) throw error;
      setReviews(data || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching reviews:', error);
    }
  };

  const fetchFavoriteRestaurants = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('user_favorites')
        .select(`
          restaurant:restaurants(*)
        `)
        .eq('user_id', id);

      if (error) throw error;
      const restaurants = data?.map(item => item.restaurant).filter(Boolean) || [];
      setFavoriteRestaurants(restaurants);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching favorite restaurants:', error);
    }
  };

  const checkFollowStatus = async () => {
    if (!user || !id) return;

    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('user_follows')
        .select('id')
        .eq('follower_id', user.id)
        .eq('following_id', id)
        .single();

      if (error && error.code !== 'PGRST116') throw error;
      setIsFollowing(!!data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error checking follow status:', error);
    }
  };

  const fetchFollowCounts = async () => {
    if (!id) return;

    try {
      const [followersResult, followingResult] = await Promise.all([
        supabase.rpc('get_follower_count', { user_uuid: id }),
        supabase.rpc('get_following_count', { user_uuid: id })
      ]);

      if (followersResult.error) throw followersResult.error;
      if (followingResult.error) throw followingResult.error;

      setFollowerCount(followersResult.data || 0);
      setFollowingCount(followingResult.data || 0);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching follow counts:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleFollowToggle = async () => {
    if (!user || !id) {
      toast.error('Please sign in to follow users');
      return;
    }

    try {
      if (isFollowing) {
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('user_follows')
          .delete()
          .eq('follower_id', user.id)
          .eq('following_id', id);

        if (error) throw error;
        setIsFollowing(false);
        setFollowerCount(prev => prev - 1);
        toast.success('Unfollowed user');
      } else {
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('user_follows')
          .insert({
            follower_id: user.id,
            following_id: id
          });

        if (error) throw error;
        setIsFollowing(true);
        setFollowerCount(prev => prev + 1);
        toast.success('Following user');
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error toggling follow:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to update follow status');
    }
  };

  const getLevelBadgeColor = (level: string) => {
    const colors = {
      'Foodie': 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800',
      'Food Explorer': 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800',
      'Food Critic': 'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
      'Elite Critic': 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800',
      'Master Foodie': 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'
    };
    return colors[level as keyof typeof colors] || colors['Foodie'];
  };

  const getDisplayName = () => {
    if (profile?.first_name && profile?.surname) {
      return `${profile.first_name} ${profile.surname}`;
    }
    if (profile?.full_name) {
      return profile.full_name;
    }
    return 'Food Lover';
  };

  const getAvatarFallback = () => {
    if (profile?.first_name) {
      return profile.first_name.charAt(0);
    }
    if (profile?.full_name) {
      return profile.full_name.charAt(0);
    }
    return '👤';
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-amber-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)]">
          <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-green-600"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!profile) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-amber-50">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)]">
          <div className="text-center">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">User not found</h2>
            <Link to="/restaurants">
              <Button>Back to Restaurants</Button>
            </Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-amber-50">
      <Header />
      
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        <Link to="/restaurants" className="inline-flex items-center text-green-600 mb-6 hover:text-green-700">
          <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
          Back to Restaurants
        </Link>

        {/* Profile Header */}
        <Card className="mb-8">
          <CardContent className="p-6">
            <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center gap-6">
              <Avatar className="h-32 w-32 mx-auto md:mx-0">
                <AvatarImage src={profile.avatar_url || ''} alt={getDisplayName()} />
                <AvatarFallback className="text-2xl">
                  {getAvatarFallback()}
                </AvatarFallback>
              </Avatar>
              
              <div className="flex-1 text-center md:text-left">
                <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                  {getDisplayName()}
                </h1>
                
                <div className="flex flex-wrap justify-center md:justify-start gap-2 mb-4">
                  <Badge className={getLevelBadgeColor(profile.current_level || 'Foodie')}>
                    {profile.current_level || 'Foodie'} • {profile.level_points || 0} XP
                  </Badge>
                  {profile.location && (
                    <Badge variant="outline" className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      <MapPin className="h-3 w-3" />
                      {profile.location}
                    </Badge>
                  )}
                </div>

                {profile.bio && (
                  <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">{profile.bio}</p>
                )}

                <div className="flex flex-wrap justify-center md:justify-start gap-6 mb-4">
                  <div className="text-center">
                    <div className="font-bold text-lg">{profile.review_count || 0}</div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Reviews</div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-center">
                    <div className="font-bold text-lg">{followerCount}</div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Followers</div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-center">
                    <div className="font-bold text-lg">{followingCount}</div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Following</div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-center">
                    <div className="font-bold text-lg">{favoriteRestaurants.length}</div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Favorites</div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {!isOwnProfile && user && (
                  <Button
                    onClick={handleFollowToggle}
                    className={isFollowing ? 'bg-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-600' : 'bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700'}
                  >
                    {isFollowing ? (
                      <>
                        <UserMinus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                        Unfollow
                      </>
                    ) : (
                      <>
                        <UserPlus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                        Follow
                      </>
                    )}
                  </Button>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        {/* Content Tabs */}
        <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={setActiveTab} className="w-full">
          <TabsList className="grid w-full grid-cols-2">
            <TabsTrigger value="reviews">Reviews ({reviews.length})</TabsTrigger>
            <TabsTrigger value="favorites">Favorite Places ({favoriteRestaurants.length})</TabsTrigger>
          </TabsList>

          <TabsContent value="reviews" className="mt-6">
            <div className="space-y-6">
              {reviews.length > 0 ? (
                reviews.map((review) => (
                  <Card key={review.id}>
                    <CardContent className="p-6">
                      <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
                        <div className="flex-1">
                          <Link 
                            to={`/restaurants/${review.restaurant.id}`}
                            className="font-semibold text-lg text-green-600 hover:text-green-700"
                          >
                            {review.restaurant.name}
                          </Link>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1 text-sm text-gray-600">
                            <MapPin className="h-3 w-3" />
                            {review.restaurant.city}, {review.restaurant.province}
                            <span>•</span>
                            <span>{review.restaurant.cuisine_type}</span>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                          {[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => (
                            <Star
                              key={i}
                              className={`h-4 w-4 ${
                                i < review.rating ? 'fill-yellow-400 text-yellow-400' : 'text-gray-300'
                              }`}
                            />
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      
                      {review.title && (
                        <h4 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">{review.title}</h4>
                      )}
                      
                      {review.content && (
                        <p className="text-gray-700 mb-3">{review.content}</p>
                      )}
                      
                      <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                        {new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                      </div>
                    </CardContent>
                  </Card>
                ))
              ) : (
                <div className="text-center py-12">
                  <p className="text-gray-500">No reviews yet</p>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </TabsContent>

          <TabsContent value="favorites" className="mt-6">
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
              {favoriteRestaurants.length > 0 ? (
                favoriteRestaurants.map((restaurant) => (
                  <RestaurantCard key={restaurant.id} restaurant={restaurant} />
                ))
              ) : (
                <div className="col-span-2 text-center py-12">
                  <Heart className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
                  <p className="text-gray-500">No favorite restaurants yet</p>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </TabsContent>
        </Tabs>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default UserProfile;

```

## Components

### `src/components/AdminClaimsManager.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { Calendar, User, Phone, Mail, FileText, Shield, CheckCircle, X, ExternalLink, Search, Users, UserX, Eye, Clock, RotateCcw } from 'lucide-react';
import AdminOwnershipManager from './AdminOwnershipManager';

interface RestaurantClaim {
  id: string;
  restaurant_id: string;
  user_id: string;
  business_email: string;
  business_phone: string;
  status: string;
  created_at: string;
  halaal_certificate_url: string;
  proof_of_ownership_url?: string;
  halaal_certificate_expiry_date?: string;
  additional_notes?: string;
  rejection_reason?: string;
  restaurant?: {
    name: string;
    address: string;
    city: string;
    province: string;
  };
  profile?: {
    full_name: string;
    email?: string;
  } | null;
}

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  owner_id?: string;
  claim_status: string;
  is_verified: boolean;
}

const AdminClaimsManager = () => {
  const [claims, setClaims] = useState<RestaurantClaim[]>([]);
  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [processingId, setProcessingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [rejectionReason, setRejectionReason] = useState('');
  const [selectedClaimId, setSelectedClaimId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [filteredClaims, setFilteredClaims] = useState<RestaurantClaim[]>([]);
  const [filteredRestaurants, setFilteredRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);
  const [selectedRestaurant, setSelectedRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'claims' | 'ownership'>('claims');
  const [expandedClaimId, setExpandedClaimId] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchClaims();
    fetchUnclaimedRestaurants();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (searchTerm.trim() === '') {
      setFilteredClaims(claims);
      setFilteredRestaurants(restaurants);
    } else {
      const filtered = claims.filter(claim =>
        claim.restaurant?.name?.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
        claim.profile?.full_name?.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
        claim.business_email.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())
      );
      setFilteredClaims(filtered);

      const filteredRests = restaurants.filter(restaurant =>
        restaurant.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
        restaurant.city.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())
      );
      setFilteredRestaurants(filteredRests);
    }
  }, [searchTerm, claims, restaurants]);

  const fetchClaims = async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      
      const { data: claimsData, error: claimsError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_claims')
        .select('*')
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });

      if (claimsError) {
        console.error('Error fetching claims:', claimsError);
        toast.error('Failed to fetch claims');
        return;
      }

      const claimsWithDetails = await Promise.all(
        (claimsData || []).map(async (claim) => {
          try {
            const { data: restaurantData } = await supabase
              .from('restaurants')
              .select('name, address, city, province')
              .eq('id', claim.restaurant_id)
              .single();

            const { data: profileData } = await supabase
              .from('profiles')
              .select('full_name')
              .eq('id', claim.user_id)
              .single();

            return {
              ...claim,
              restaurant: restaurantData,
              profile: profileData
            };
          } catch (error) {
            console.error(`Error fetching details for claim ${claim.id}:`, error);
            return claim;
          }
        })
      );

      setClaims(claimsWithDetails);
      setFilteredClaims(claimsWithDetails);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error in fetchClaims:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to load claims');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const fetchUnclaimedRestaurants = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('id, name, address, city, province, owner_id, claim_status, is_verified')
        .order('name');

      if (error) {
        console.error('Error fetching unclaimed restaurants:', error);
        return;
      }

      console.log('All restaurants fetched:', data);
      
      // Filter on the client side for better control
      const unclaimedRestaurants = (data || []).filter(restaurant => 
        restaurant.claim_status === 'unclaimed' || 
        restaurant.claim_status === 'rejected' ||
        (!restaurant.owner_id && !['verified', 'approved', 'pending'].includes(restaurant.claim_status))
      );
      
      console.log('Filtered unclaimed restaurants:', unclaimedRestaurants);
      setRestaurants(unclaimedRestaurants);
      setFilteredRestaurants(unclaimedRestaurants);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error in fetchUnclaimedRestaurants:', error);
    }
  };

  const approveClaim = async (claimId: string) => {
    setProcessingId(claimId);
    try {
      const claim = claims.find(c => c.id === claimId);
      if (!claim) {
        toast.error('Claim not found');
        return;
      }

      console.log('Approving claim:', claimId, 'for restaurant:', claim.restaurant_id);

      // Update claim status first
      const { error: claimError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_claims')
        .update({ 
          status: 'approved',
          reviewed_at: new Date().toISOString(),
          reviewed_by: (await supabase.auth.getUser()).data.user?.id
        })
        .eq('id', claimId);

      if (claimError) {
        console.error('Error updating claim:', claimError);
        toast.error('Failed to approve claim');
        return;
      }

      // Prepare restaurant update data
      const updateData: any = {
        is_verified: true,
        is_halaal_certified: true,
        claim_status: 'verified',
        owner_id: claim.user_id
      };

      if (claim.halaal_certificate_expiry_date) {
        updateData.halaal_certificate_expiry_date = claim.halaal_certificate_expiry_date;
      }

      console.log('Updating restaurant with data:', updateData);

      // Update restaurant table
      const { data: restaurantUpdateData, error: restaurantError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .update(updateData)
        .eq('id', claim.restaurant_id)
        .select('*');

      if (restaurantError) {
        console.error('Error updating restaurant:', restaurantError);
        toast.error('Failed to update restaurant status');
        return;
      }

      console.log('Restaurant updated successfully:', restaurantUpdateData);

      // Add user role
      const { error: roleError } = await supabase
        .from('user_roles')
        .upsert({
          user_id: claim.user_id,
          role: 'restaurant_owner',
          restaurant_id: claim.restaurant_id
        });

      if (roleError) {
        console.error('Error adding user role:', roleError);
      }

      toast.success('Claim approved successfully - Restaurant is now verified and halaal certified');
      fetchClaims();
      fetchUnclaimedRestaurants();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error approving claim:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to approve claim');
    } finally {
      setProcessingId(null);
    }
  };

  const rejectClaim = async (claimId: string) => {
    if (!rejectionReason.trim()) {
      toast.error('Please provide a rejection reason');
      return;
    }

    setProcessingId(claimId);
    try {
      const claim = claims.find(c => c.id === claimId);
      
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_claims')
        .update({ 
          status: 'rejected',
          rejection_reason: rejectionReason,
          reviewed_at: new Date().toISOString(),
          reviewed_by: (await supabase.auth.getUser()).data.user?.id
        })
        .eq('id', claimId);

      if (error) {
        console.error('Error rejecting claim:', error);
        toast.error('Failed to reject claim');
        return;
      }

      // IMPORTANT: Reset restaurant to unclaimed status so it can be claimed again
      if (claim?.restaurant_id) {
        const { error: restaurantError } = await supabase
          .from('restaurants')
          .update({
            claim_status: 'unclaimed',
            owner_id: null,
            is_verified: false,
            is_halaal_certified: false
          })
          .eq('id', claim.restaurant_id);

        if (restaurantError) {
          console.error('Error updating restaurant status:', restaurantError);
        }

        // Remove any existing user roles for this restaurant
        const { error: roleError } = await supabase
          .from('user_roles')
          .delete()
          .eq('restaurant_id', claim.restaurant_id)
          .eq('role', 'restaurant_owner');

        if (roleError) {
          console.error('Error removing user roles:', roleError);
        }
      }

      toast.success('Claim rejected - Restaurant is now available for claiming again');
      setRejectionReason('');
      setSelectedClaimId(null);
      fetchClaims();
      fetchUnclaimedRestaurants();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error rejecting claim:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to reject claim');
    } finally {
      setProcessingId(null);
    }
  };

  const revokeApprovedClaim = async (claimId: string) => {
    if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to revoke this approved claim? This will remove ownership and make the restaurant available for claiming again.')) {
      return;
    }

    setProcessingId(claimId);
    try {
      const claim = claims.find(c => c.id === claimId);
      
      // Update claim status to revoked
      const { error: claimError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_claims')
        .update({ 
          status: 'revoked',
          reviewed_at: new Date().toISOString(),
          reviewed_by: (await supabase.auth.getUser()).data.user?.id
        })
        .eq('id', claimId);

      if (claimError) {
        console.error('Error revoking claim:', claimError);
        toast.error('Failed to revoke claim');
        return;
      }

      // Reset restaurant to unclaimed status so it can be claimed again
      if (claim?.restaurant_id) {
        const { error: restaurantError } = await supabase
          .from('restaurants')
          .update({
            claim_status: 'unclaimed',
            owner_id: null,
            is_verified: false,
            is_halaal_certified: false
          })
          .eq('id', claim.restaurant_id);

        if (restaurantError) {
          console.error('Error updating restaurant status:', restaurantError);
          toast.error('Failed to update restaurant status');
          return;
        }

        // Remove user roles
        const { error: roleError } = await supabase
          .from('user_roles')
          .delete()
          .eq('restaurant_id', claim.restaurant_id)
          .eq('role', 'restaurant_owner');

        if (roleError) {
          console.error('Error removing user roles:', roleError);
        }
      }

      toast.success('Claim revoked successfully');
      fetchClaims();
      fetchUnclaimedRestaurants();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error revoking claim:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to revoke claim');
    } finally {
      setProcessingId(null);
    }
  };

  const resetToUnclaimed = async (claimId: string) => {
    if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to reset this restaurant to unclaimed status? This will make it available for claiming again.')) {
      return;
    }

    setProcessingId(claimId);
    try {
      const claim = claims.find(c => c.id === claimId);
      
      if (!claim?.restaurant_id) {
        toast.error('Restaurant not found');
        return;
      }

      console.log('Resetting restaurant to unclaimed:', claim.restaurant_id);

      // Reset restaurant to unclaimed status
      const { data: updateData, error: restaurantError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .update({
          claim_status: 'unclaimed',
          owner_id: null,
          is_verified: false,
          is_halaal_certified: false,
          halaal_certificate_expiry_date: null
        })
        .eq('id', claim.restaurant_id)
        .select('*');

      if (restaurantError) {
        console.error('Error updating restaurant status:', restaurantError);
        toast.error('Failed to reset restaurant status');
        return;
      }

      console.log('Restaurant updated to:', updateData);

      // Remove any existing user roles for this restaurant
      const { error: roleError } = await supabase
        .from('user_roles')
        .delete()
        .eq('restaurant_id', claim.restaurant_id)
        .eq('role', 'restaurant_owner');

      if (roleError) {
        console.error('Error removing user roles:', roleError);
      }

      console.log('Restaurant reset successfully');
      toast.success('Restaurant reset to unclaimed status successfully');
      
      // Force refresh both lists to ensure UI is updated
      await Promise.all([fetchClaims(), fetchUnclaimedRestaurants()]);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error resetting restaurant:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to reset restaurant');
    } finally {
      setProcessingId(null);
    }
  };

  const handleManageOwnership = (restaurant: Restaurant) => {
    setSelectedRestaurant(restaurant);
    setActiveTab('ownership');
  };

  const handleBackToClaims = () => {
    setActiveTab('claims');
    setSelectedRestaurant(null);
    fetchClaims();
    fetchUnclaimedRestaurants();
  };

  const getStatusBadge = (status: string) => {
    switch (status) {
      case 'pending':
        return <Badge variant="outline" className="border-yellow-300 text-yellow-700">Pending</Badge>;
      case 'approved':
        return <Badge className="bg-green-100 text-green-800">Approved</Badge>;
      case 'rejected':
        return <Badge variant="destructive">Rejected</Badge>;
      case 'revoked':
        return <Badge className="bg-gray-100 text-gray-800">Revoked</Badge>;
      default:
        return <Badge variant="secondary">{status}</Badge>;
    }
  };

  const toggleClaimExpansion = (claimId: string) => {
    setExpandedClaimId(expandedClaimId === claimId ? null : claimId);
  };

  if (activeTab === 'ownership' && selectedRestaurant) {
    return (
      <div className="space-y-4">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={handleBackToClaims}>
            ← Back to Claims Management
          </Button>
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold">
            Managing Ownership for {selectedRestaurant.name}
          </h2>
        </div>
        <AdminOwnershipManager restaurant={selectedRestaurant} onUpdate={fetchUnclaimedRestaurants} />
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
        {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="h-32 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
        <div className="relative flex-1">
          <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 h-4 w-4" />
          <Input
            placeholder="Search by restaurant name, owner name, or email..."
            value={searchTerm}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
            className="pl-10"
          />
        </div>
        <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">
          {filteredClaims.length} claims found
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
        {/* Claims Section */}
        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle>Restaurant Ownership Claims</CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            {filteredClaims.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="text-center py-8">
                <Shield className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
                <p className="text-gray-500">No claims to review</p>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {filteredClaims.map((claim) => (
                  <div key={claim.id} className="border rounded-lg p-4 space-y-3">
                    <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                      <div className="space-y-2 flex-1">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                          <h4 className="font-medium">
                            {claim.restaurant?.name || 'Unknown Restaurant'}
                          </h4>
                          {getStatusBadge(claim.status)}
                        </div>
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                          {claim.restaurant?.address}, {claim.restaurant?.city}
                        </p>
                        
                        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 text-sm">
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                            <User className="h-3 w-3 text-gray-500" />
                            <span>{claim.profile?.full_name || 'Unknown User'}</span>
                          </div>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                            <Mail className="h-3 w-3 text-gray-500" />
                            <span>{claim.business_email}</span>
                          </div>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                            <Phone className="h-3 w-3 text-gray-500" />
                            <span>{claim.business_phone}</span>
                          </div>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                            <Calendar className="h-3 w-3 text-gray-500" />
                            <span>Applied: {new Date(claim.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}</span>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      
                      <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 ml-4">
                        <Button
                          onClick={() => toggleClaimExpansion(claim.id)}
                          size="sm"
                          variant="outline"
                          className="flex items-center gap-1"
                        >
                          <Eye className="h-3 w-3" />
                          {expandedClaimId === claim.id ? 'Hide' : 'View'} Details
                        </Button>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Expanded Details */}
                    {expandedClaimId === claim.id && (
                      <div className="border-t pt-3 space-y-3">
                        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-3">
                          {claim.halaal_certificate_url && (
                            <div>
                              <label className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Halaal Certificate:</label>
                              <div className="mt-1">
                                <Button
                                  onClick={() => window.open(claim.halaal_certificate_url, '_blank')}
                                  size="sm"
                                  variant="outline"
                                  className="flex items-center gap-1"
                                >
                                  <ExternalLink className="h-3 w-3" />
                                  View Certificate
                                </Button>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          )}
                          
                          {claim.proof_of_ownership_url && (
                            <div>
                              <label className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Proof of Ownership:</label>
                              <div className="mt-1">
                                <Button
                                  onClick={() => window.open(claim.proof_of_ownership_url, '_blank')}
                                  size="sm"
                                  variant="outline"
                                  className="flex items-center gap-1"
                                >
                                  <ExternalLink className="h-3 w-3" />
                                  View Document
                                </Button>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          )}
                          
                          {claim.halaal_certificate_expiry_date && (
                            <div>
                              <label className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Certificate Expiry:</label>
                              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">
                                {new Date(claim.halaal_certificate_expiry_date).toLocaleDateString()}
                              </p>
                            </div>
                          )}
                          
                          {claim.additional_notes && (
                            <div>
                              <label className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Additional Notes:</label>
                              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">{claim.additional_notes}</p>
                            </div>
                          )}
                        </div>

                        {claim.status === 'rejected' && claim.rejection_reason && (
                          <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded p-3">
                            <span className="font-medium text-red-800 text-sm">Rejection Reason:</span>
                            <p className="text-red-700 text-sm mt-1">{claim.rejection_reason}</p>
                          </div>
                        )}

                        {claim.status === 'pending' && (
                          <div className="flex gap-2 pt-3 border-t">
                            <Button
                              onClick={() => approveClaim(claim.id)}
                              disabled={processingId === claim.id}
                              size="sm"
                              className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700"
                            >
                              <CheckCircle className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                              {processingId === claim.id ? 'Approving...' : 'Approve'}
                            </Button>
                            
                            <div className="flex gap-2 flex-1">
                              {selectedClaimId === claim.id ? (
                                <>
                                  <Textarea
                                    placeholder="Enter rejection reason..."
                                    value={rejectionReason}
                                    onChange={(e) => setRejectionReason(e.target.value)}
                                    className="flex-1"
                                    rows={2}
                                  />
                                  <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                    <Button
                                      onClick={() => rejectClaim(claim.id)}
                                      disabled={processingId === claim.id || !rejectionReason.trim()}
                                      variant="destructive"
                                      size="sm"
                                    >
                                      {processingId === claim.id ? 'Rejecting...' : 'Reject'}
                                    </Button>
                                    <Button
                                      onClick={() => {
                                        setSelectedClaimId(null);
                                        setRejectionReason('');
                                      }}
                                      variant="outline"
                                      size="sm"
                                    >
                                      Cancel
                                    </Button>
                                  </div>
                                </>
                              ) : (
                                <Button
                                  onClick={() => setSelectedClaimId(claim.id)}
                                  variant="outline"
                                  size="sm"
                                  className="border-red-300 text-red-700 hover:bg-red-50"
                                >
                                  <X className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                                  Reject
                                </Button>
                              )}
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        )}

                        {claim.status === 'approved' && (
                          <div className="flex gap-2 pt-3 border-t">
                            <Button
                              onClick={() => revokeApprovedClaim(claim.id)}
                              disabled={processingId === claim.id}
                              variant="destructive"
                              size="sm"
                              className="flex items-center gap-1"
                            >
                              <UserX className="h-3 w-3" />
                              {processingId === claim.id ? 'Revoking...' : 'Revoke Ownership'}
                            </Button>
                          </div>
                        )}

                        {(claim.status === 'rejected' || claim.status === 'revoked') && (
                          <div className="flex gap-2 pt-3 border-t">
                            <Button
                              onClick={() => resetToUnclaimed(claim.id)}
                              disabled={processingId === claim.id}
                              variant="outline"
                              size="sm"
                              className="flex items-center gap-1 border-blue-300 text-blue-700 hover:bg-blue-50"
                            >
                              <RotateCcw className="h-3 w-3" />
                              {processingId === claim.id ? 'Resetting...' : 'Reset to Unclaimed'}
                            </Button>
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        {/* Unclaimed Restaurants Section */}
        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle>Restaurants Available for Claiming</CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            {filteredRestaurants.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="text-center py-8">
                <p className="text-gray-500">No unclaimed restaurants found</p>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {filteredRestaurants.map((restaurant) => (
                  <div key={restaurant.id} className="border rounded-lg p-4 space-y-2">
                    <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                      <div>
                        <h4 className="font-medium">{restaurant.name}</h4>
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                          {restaurant.address}, {restaurant.city}, {restaurant.province}
                        </p>
                        <div className="mt-1">
                          <Badge variant={restaurant.claim_status === 'unclaimed' ? 'secondary' : 'outline'}>
                            {restaurant.claim_status}
                          </Badge>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <Button
                        onClick={() => handleManageOwnership(restaurant)}
                        size="sm"
                        variant="outline"
                        className="flex items-center gap-1"
                      >
                        <Users className="h-3 w-3" />
                        Manage Ownership
                      </Button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default AdminClaimsManager;

```

### `src/components/AdminMenuManager.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { Plus, Edit, Trash2, Save } from 'lucide-react';

type SpiceLevel = 'mild' | 'medium' | 'hot' | 'extra_hot';

interface MenuItem {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string | null;
  price: number | null;
  category: string | null;
  spice_level: SpiceLevel | null;
  allergens: string[] | null;
  is_available: boolean | null;
  image_url: string | null;
}

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
}

interface AdminMenuManagerProps {
  restaurant: Restaurant;
}

const AdminMenuManager = ({ restaurant }: AdminMenuManagerProps) => {
  const [menuItems, setMenuItems] = useState<MenuItem[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [isDialogOpen, setIsDialogOpen] = useState(false);
  const [editingItem, setEditingItem] = useState<MenuItem | null>(null);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    name: '',
    description: '',
    price: '',
    category: '',
    spice_level: '' as SpiceLevel | '',
    allergens: '',
    is_available: true
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchMenuItems();
  }, [restaurant.id]);

  const fetchMenuItems = async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('menu_items')
        .select('*')
        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)
        .order('category', { ascending: true })
        .order('name', { ascending: true });

      if (error) {
        console.error('Error fetching menu items:', error);
        toast.error('Failed to fetch menu items');
        return;
      }

      setMenuItems(data || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error in fetchMenuItems:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to load menu items');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSaveItem = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    
    const itemData = {
      name: formData.name,
      description: formData.description || null,
      price: formData.price ? parseFloat(formData.price) : null,
      category: formData.category || null,
      spice_level: formData.spice_level || null,
      allergens: formData.allergens ? formData.allergens.split(',').map(a => a.trim()) : null,
      is_available: formData.is_available,
      restaurant_id: restaurant.id
    };

    try {
      if (editingItem) {
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('menu_items')
          .update(itemData)
          .eq('id', editingItem.id);

        if (error) throw error;
        toast.success('Menu item updated successfully!');
      } else {
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('menu_items')
          .insert([itemData]);

        if (error) throw error;
        toast.success('Menu item added successfully!');
      }

      setIsDialogOpen(false);
      setEditingItem(null);
      setFormData({
        name: '',
        description: '',
        price: '',
        category: '',
        spice_level: '',
        allergens: '',
        is_available: true
      });
      fetchMenuItems();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error saving menu item:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to save menu item');
    }
  };

  const handleEditItem = (item: MenuItem) => {
    setEditingItem(item);
    setFormData({
      name: item.name,
      description: item.description || '',
      price: item.price?.toString() || '',
      category: item.category || '',
      spice_level: item.spice_level || '',
      allergens: item.allergens?.join(', ') || '',
      is_available: item.is_available ?? true
    });
    setIsDialogOpen(true);
  };

  const handleDeleteItem = async (id: string) => {
    if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this menu item?')) return;

    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('menu_items')
        .delete()
        .eq('id', id);

      if (error) throw error;
      toast.success('Menu item deleted successfully!');
      fetchMenuItems();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error deleting menu item:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to delete menu item');
    }
  };

  const groupedItems = menuItems.reduce((acc, item) => {
    const category = item.category || 'Other';
    if (!acc[category]) acc[category] = [];
    acc[category].push(item);
    return acc;
  }, {} as Record<string, MenuItem[]>);

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
        {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="h-32 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
        <div>
          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold">Menu Items</h3>
          <p className="text-gray-600">Manage menu items for {restaurant.name}</p>
        </div>
        
        <Dialog open={isDialogOpen} onOpenChange={setIsDialogOpen}>
          <DialogTrigger asChild>
            <Button className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white">
              <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
              Add Menu Item
            </Button>
          </DialogTrigger>
          <DialogContent className="max-w-2xl">
            <DialogHeader>
              <DialogTitle>
                {editingItem ? 'Edit Menu Item' : 'Add New Menu Item'}
              </DialogTitle>
            </DialogHeader>
            
            <form onSubmit={handleSaveItem} className="space-y-4">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Name</label>
                  <Input
                    value={formData.name}
                    onChange={(e) => setFormData({...formData, name: e.target.value})}
                    required
                  />
                </div>
                
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Price (R)</label>
                  <Input
                    type="number"
                    step="0.01"
                    value={formData.price}
                    onChange={(e) => setFormData({...formData, price: e.target.value})}
                  />
                </div>
                
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Category</label>
                  <Input
                    value={formData.category}
                    onChange={(e) => setFormData({...formData, category: e.target.value})}
                    placeholder="e.g., Mains, Appetizers, Desserts"
                  />
                </div>
                
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Spice Level</label>
                  <Select value={formData.spice_level} onValueChange={(value: SpiceLevel) => setFormData({...formData, spice_level: value})}>
                    <SelectTrigger>
                      <SelectValue placeholder="Select spice level" />
                    </SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                      <SelectItem value="mild">Mild</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="medium">Medium</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="hot">Hot</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="extra_hot">Extra Hot</SelectItem>
                    </SelectContent>
                  </Select>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Description</label>
                <Textarea
                  value={formData.description}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({...formData, description: e.target.value})}
                  rows={3}
                />
              </div>
              
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Allergens (comma separated)</label>
                <Input
                  value={formData.allergens}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({...formData, allergens: e.target.value})}
                  placeholder="e.g., Nuts, Dairy, Gluten"
                />
              </div>
              
              <div className="flex gap-4">
                <Button type="submit" className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white">
                  <Save className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  {editingItem ? 'Update' : 'Add'} Item
                </Button>
                <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsDialogOpen(false)}>
                  Cancel
                </Button>
              </div>
            </form>
          </DialogContent>
        </Dialog>
      </div>

      <div className="space-y-6">
        {Object.entries(groupedItems).map(([category, items]) => (
          <Card key={category}>
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle className="text-lg">{category}</CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
              <div className="space-y-3">
                {items.map((item) => (
                  <div key={item.id} className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg">
                    <div className="flex-1">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                        <h4 className="font-medium">{item.name}</h4>
                        {item.price && <span className="text-green-600 font-medium">R{item.price}</span>}
                        {!item.is_available && <Badge variant="secondary">Unavailable</Badge>}
                        {item.spice_level && <Badge variant="outline">{item.spice_level}</Badge>}
                      </div>
                      {item.description && <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm">{item.description}</p>}
                      {item.allergens && item.allergens.length > 0 && (
                        <p className="text-xs text-orange-600 mt-1">
                          Allergens: {item.allergens.join(', ')}
                        </p>
                      )}
                    </div>
                    
                    <div className="flex gap-2">
                      <Button
                        size="sm"
                        variant="outline"
                        onClick={() => handleEditItem(item)}
                      >
                        <Edit className="h-3 w-3" />
                      </Button>
                      <Button
                        size="sm"
                        variant="outline"
                        onClick={() => handleDeleteItem(item.id)}
                      >
                        <Trash2 className="h-3 w-3" />
                      </Button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        ))}
        
        {menuItems.length === 0 && (
          <Card>
            <CardContent className="text-center py-12">
              <p className="text-gray-500 mb-4">No menu items yet</p>
              <Button onClick={() => setIsDialogOpen(true)} className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white">
                <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                Add First Menu Item
              </Button>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default AdminMenuManager;

```

### `src/components/AdminOwnershipManager.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { User, UserX, UserPlus, AlertTriangle, CheckCircle, Mail, Phone } from 'lucide-react';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  owner_id?: string;
  claim_status: string;
  is_verified: boolean;
}

interface RestaurantClaim {
  id: string;
  user_id: string;
  status: string;
  created_at: string;
  business_email: string;
  business_phone: string;
  profiles?: {
    full_name: string;
  } | null;
}

interface AdminOwnershipManagerProps {
  restaurant: Restaurant;
  onUpdate: () => void;
}

const AdminOwnershipManager = ({ restaurant, onUpdate }: AdminOwnershipManagerProps) => {
  const [claims, setClaims] = useState<RestaurantClaim[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [processingId, setProcessingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [claimOnBehalfData, setClaimOnBehalfData] = useState({
    businessEmail: '',
    businessPhone: '',
    fullName: '',
    notes: ''
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchClaims();
  }, [restaurant.id]);

  const fetchClaims = async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      
      const { data: claimsData, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_claims')
        .select(`
          *,
          profiles(full_name)
        `)
        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });

      if (error) {
        console.error('Error fetching claims:', error);
        toast.error('Failed to fetch claims');
        return;
      }

      // Type assertion to handle the Supabase result properly
      const typedClaims = (claimsData || []).map(claim => ({
        ...claim,
        profiles: Array.isArray(claim.profiles) && claim.profiles.length > 0 
          ? claim.profiles[0] 
          : claim.profiles || null
      })) as RestaurantClaim[];

      setClaims(typedClaims);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error in fetchClaims:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to load claims');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const approveClaim = async (claimId: string, userId: string) => {
    if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to approve this claim? This will give the user ownership of the restaurant.')) {
      return;
    }

    setProcessingId(claimId);
    try {
      // Update the claim status to approved
      const { error: claimError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_claims')
        .update({ 
          status: 'approved',
          reviewed_at: new Date().toISOString()
        })
        .eq('id', claimId);

      if (claimError) {
        console.error('Error approving claim:', claimError);
        toast.error('Failed to approve claim');
        return;
      }

      // Update restaurant status with verification
      const { error: restaurantError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .update({
          claim_status: 'verified',
          owner_id: userId,
          is_verified: true,
          is_halaal_certified: true // Set to true when approving claim
        })
        .eq('id', restaurant.id);

      if (restaurantError) {
        console.error('Error updating restaurant:', restaurantError);
        toast.error('Failed to update restaurant status');
        return;
      }

      // Add user role
      const { error: roleError } = await supabase
        .from('user_roles')
        .insert({
          user_id: userId,
          role: 'restaurant_owner',
          restaurant_id: restaurant.id
        });

      if (roleError) {
        console.error('Error adding user role:', roleError);
      }

      toast.success('Claim approved successfully');
      fetchClaims();
      onUpdate();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error approving claim:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to approve claim');
    } finally {
      setProcessingId(null);
    }
  };

  const rejectClaim = async (claimId: string) => {
    const reason = prompt('Please provide a reason for rejection (optional):');
    
    setProcessingId(claimId);
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_claims')
        .update({ 
          status: 'rejected',
          rejection_reason: reason || null,
          reviewed_at: new Date().toISOString()
        })
        .eq('id', claimId);

      if (error) {
        console.error('Error rejecting claim:', error);
        toast.error('Failed to reject claim');
        return;
      }

      toast.success('Claim rejected');
      fetchClaims();
      onUpdate();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error rejecting claim:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to reject claim');
    } finally {
      setProcessingId(null);
    }
  };

  const revokeApprovedClaim = async () => {
    if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to revoke the current ownership? This will allow new claims to be submitted.')) {
      return;
    }

    setProcessingId('revoke');
    try {
      // Update all approved claims to revoked
      const { error: claimError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_claims')
        .update({ 
          status: 'revoked',
          reviewed_at: new Date().toISOString()
        })
        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)
        .eq('status', 'approved');

      if (claimError) {
        console.error('Error revoking claims:', claimError);
        toast.error('Failed to revoke ownership');
        return;
      }

      // Update restaurant status
      const { error: restaurantError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .update({
          claim_status: 'unclaimed',
          owner_id: null,
          is_verified: false,
          is_halaal_certified: false
        })
        .eq('id', restaurant.id);

      if (restaurantError) {
        console.error('Error updating restaurant:', restaurantError);
        toast.error('Failed to update restaurant status');
        return;
      }

      // Remove user roles
      const { error: roleError } = await supabase
        .from('user_roles')
        .delete()
        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)
        .eq('role', 'restaurant_owner');

      if (roleError) {
        console.error('Error removing user roles:', roleError);
      }

      toast.success('Ownership revoked successfully');
      fetchClaims();
      onUpdate();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error revoking ownership:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to revoke ownership');
    } finally {
      setProcessingId(null);
    }
  };

  const claimOnBehalf = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    
    if (!claimOnBehalfData.businessEmail || !claimOnBehalfData.businessPhone || !claimOnBehalfData.fullName) {
      toast.error('Please fill in all required fields');
      return;
    }

    setProcessingId('claim');
    try {
      // Create a claim record for admin management
      const { error: claimError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_claims')
        .insert([{
          restaurant_id: restaurant.id,
          user_id: (await supabase.auth.getUser()).data.user?.id, // Admin user as placeholder
          business_email: claimOnBehalfData.businessEmail,
          business_phone: claimOnBehalfData.businessPhone,
          status: 'admin_claimed',
          halaal_certificate_url: 'admin-claimed', // Placeholder
          additional_notes: `Admin claimed on behalf of: ${claimOnBehalfData.fullName}. Notes: ${claimOnBehalfData.notes}`
        }]);

      if (claimError) {
        console.error('Error creating claim:', claimError);
        toast.error('Failed to create claim record');
        return;
      }

      // Update restaurant status
      const { error: restaurantError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .update({
          claim_status: 'pending_verification',
          email: claimOnBehalfData.businessEmail,
          phone: claimOnBehalfData.businessPhone
        })
        .eq('id', restaurant.id);

      if (restaurantError) {
        console.error('Error updating restaurant:', restaurantError);
        toast.error('Failed to update restaurant');
        return;
      }

      toast.success('Restaurant claimed on behalf of owner. They will need to upload verification documents.');
      setClaimOnBehalfData({
        businessEmail: '',
        businessPhone: '',
        fullName: '',
        notes: ''
      });
      fetchClaims();
      onUpdate();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error claiming on behalf:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to claim restaurant');
    } finally {
      setProcessingId(null);
    }
  };

  const getStatusBadge = (status: string) => {
    switch (status) {
      case 'approved':
        return <Badge className="bg-green-100 text-green-800">Approved</Badge>;
      case 'revoked':
        return <Badge variant="destructive">Revoked</Badge>;
      case 'admin_claimed':
        return <Badge className="bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">Admin Claimed</Badge>;
      case 'pending':
        return <Badge variant="outline" className="border-yellow-300 text-yellow-700">Pending</Badge>;
      case 'rejected':
        return <Badge variant="destructive">Rejected</Badge>;
      default:
        return <Badge variant="secondary">{status}</Badge>;
    }
  };

  const currentApprovedClaim = claims.find(claim => claim.status === 'approved');
  const isCurrentlyOwned = restaurant.claim_status === 'verified' && restaurant.owner_id;

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
        {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="h-24 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <User className="h-5 w-5" />
            Current Ownership Status
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <div>
                <p className="font-medium">
                  Status: <span className="ml-2">{restaurant.claim_status}</span>
                </p>
                {restaurant.owner_id && (
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Owner ID: {restaurant.owner_id}</p>
                )}
              </div>
              
              {(isCurrentlyOwned || currentApprovedClaim) && (
                <Button
                  onClick={revokeApprovedClaim}
                  disabled={processingId === 'revoke'}
                  variant="destructive"
                  className="flex items-center gap-2"
                >
                  <UserX className="h-4 w-4" />
                  {processingId === 'revoke' ? 'Revoking...' : 'Revoke Ownership'}
                </Button>
              )}
            </div>

            {!isCurrentlyOwned && !currentApprovedClaim && (
              <div className="bg-yellow-50 border border-yellow-200 rounded-lg p-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <AlertTriangle className="h-4 w-4 text-yellow-600" />
                  <p className="text-yellow-800 font-medium">Restaurant is available for claiming</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <UserPlus className="h-5 w-5" />
            Claim on Behalf of Owner
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <form onSubmit={claimOnBehalf} className="space-y-4">
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Owner Full Name</label>
                <Input
                  value={claimOnBehalfData.fullName}
                  onChange={(e) => setClaimOnBehalfData({...claimOnBehalfData, fullName: e.target.value})}
                  placeholder="Enter owner's full name"
                  required
                />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Business Email</label>
                <Input
                  type="email"
                  value={claimOnBehalfData.businessEmail}
                  onChange={(e) => setClaimOnBehalfData({...claimOnBehalfData, businessEmail: e.target.value})}
                  placeholder="owner@restaurant.com"
                  required
                />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Business Phone</label>
                <Input
                  value={claimOnBehalfData.businessPhone}
                  onChange={(e) => setClaimOnBehalfData({...claimOnBehalfData, businessPhone: e.target.value})}
                  placeholder="+27123456789"
                  required
                />
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Additional Notes</label>
              <Textarea
                value={claimOnBehalfData.notes}
                onChange={(e) => setClaimOnBehalfData({...claimOnBehalfData, notes: e.target.value})}
                placeholder="Any additional notes about this claim..."
                rows={3}
              />
            </div>
            
            <Button
              type="submit"
              disabled={processingId === 'claim'}
              className="bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white"
            >
              {processingId === 'claim' ? 'Claiming...' : 'Claim on Behalf'}
            </Button>
          </form>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Claim History</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          {claims.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="text-center py-8">
              <p className="text-gray-500">No claims submitted for this restaurant</p>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              {claims.map((claim) => (
                <div key={claim.id} className="border rounded-lg p-4 space-y-2">
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                    <div className="space-y-1">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <span className="font-medium">
                          {claim.profiles?.full_name || 'Unknown User'}
                        </span>
                        {getStatusBadge(claim.status)}
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-sm text-gray-600">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                          <Mail className="h-3 w-3" />
                          <span>{claim.business_email}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                          <Phone className="h-3 w-3" />
                          <span>{claim.business_phone}</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
                      <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                        {new Date(claim.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                      </div>
                      {claim.status === 'pending' && (
                        <div className="flex gap-2">
                          <Button
                            size="sm"
                            onClick={() => approveClaim(claim.id, claim.user_id)}
                            disabled={processingId === claim.id}
                            className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700"
                          >
                            {processingId === claim.id ? 'Processing...' : 'Approve'}
                          </Button>
                          <Button
                            size="sm"
                            variant="destructive"
                            onClick={() => rejectClaim(claim.id)}
                            disabled={processingId === claim.id}
                          >
                            Reject
                          </Button>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
};

export default AdminOwnershipManager;

```

### `src/components/AdminPanel.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { Users, Building2, MessageSquare, Settings } from 'lucide-react';

interface User {
  id: string;
  email: string;
  created_at: string;
  profiles: {
    full_name: string | null;
    user_type: string | null;
  } | null;
  user_roles: Array<{
    role: string;
    restaurant_id: string | null;
  }>;
}

const AdminPanel = () => {
  const [users, setUsers] = useState<User[]>([]);
  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<any[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [selectedUser, setSelectedUser] = useState<string>('');
  const [newRole, setNewRole] = useState<'admin' | 'restaurant_owner' | 'reviewer' | 'user'>('user');
  const [searchEmail, setSearchEmail] = useState('');

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchData();
  }, []);

  const fetchData = async () => {
    try {
      // Fetch users with profiles and roles
      const { data: usersData } = await supabase
        .from('profiles')
        .select(`
          id,
          full_name,
          user_type,
          user_roles (
            role,
            restaurant_id
          )
        `);

      // Fetch restaurants
      const { data: restaurantsData } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*')
        .order('name');

      setRestaurants(restaurantsData || []);
      
      // Transform the data properly
      const transformedUsers: User[] = usersData?.map(user => ({
        id: user.id,
        email: 'user@example.com', // Would come from auth.users
        created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
        profiles: {
          full_name: user.full_name,
          user_type: user.user_type
        },
        user_roles: Array.isArray(user.user_roles) ? user.user_roles.map(role => ({
          role: role.role,
          restaurant_id: role.restaurant_id
        })) : []
      })) || [];
      
      setUsers(transformedUsers);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching admin data:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleAssignRole = async () => {
    if (!selectedUser || !newRole) return;

    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('user_roles')
        .insert({
          user_id: selectedUser,
          role: newRole
        });

      if (error) throw error;
      
      toast.success('Role assigned successfully!');
      fetchData();
      setSelectedUser('');
      setNewRole('user');
    } catch (error) {
```
