```tsx
      console.error('Error assigning role:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to assign role');
    }
  };

  const handleGrantAccess = async (email: string) => {
    try {
      // Find user by email and grant admin access
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('user_roles')
        .insert({
          user_id: selectedUser,
          role: 'admin' as const
        });

      if (error) throw error;
      
      toast.success(`Admin access granted to ${email}`);
      fetchData();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error granting access:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to grant access');
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-96">
        <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-32 w-32 border-b-2 border-green-600"></div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-8">
      <div>
        <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Admin Panel</h2>
        <p className="text-gray-600">Manage users, restaurants, and system settings</p>
      </div>

      {/* Quick Stats */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center">
              <Users className="h-8 w-8 text-blue-600" />
              <div className="ml-4">
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">Total Users</p>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{users.length}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center">
              <Building2 className="h-8 w-8 text-green-600" />
              <div className="ml-4">
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">Restaurants</p>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{restaurants.length}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center">
              <MessageSquare className="h-8 w-8 text-purple-600" />
              <div className="ml-4">
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">Pending Reviews</p>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">12</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center">
              <Settings className="h-8 w-8 text-orange-600" />
              <div className="ml-4">
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">System Status</p>
                <p className="text-lg font-bold text-green-600">Healthy</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>

      {/* Grant Access Section */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Grant User Access</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="flex gap-4 items-end">
            <div className="flex-1">
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Email Address</label>
              <Input
                type="email"
                value={searchEmail}
                onChange={(e) => setSearchEmail(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Enter user email"
              />
            </div>
            <Button 
              onClick={() => handleGrantAccess(searchEmail)}
              className="gradient-halaal text-white"
            >
              Grant Admin Access
            </Button>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Role Management */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Role Management</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="flex gap-4 items-end mb-6">
            <div className="flex-1">
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Select User</label>
              <Select value={selectedUser} onValueChange={setSelectedUser}>
                <SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectValue placeholder="Choose a user" />
                </SelectTrigger>
                <SelectContent>
                  {users.map((user) => (
                    <SelectItem key={user.id} value={user.id}>
                      {user.profiles?.full_name || user.email}
                    </SelectItem>
                  ))}
                </SelectContent>
              </Select>
            </div>
            
            <div className="flex-1">
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Assign Role</label>
              <Select value={newRole} onValueChange={(value: 'admin' | 'restaurant_owner' | 'reviewer' | 'user') => setNewRole(value)}>
                <SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectValue placeholder="Choose a role" />
                </SelectTrigger>
                <SelectContent>
                  <SelectItem value="admin">Admin</SelectItem>
                  <SelectItem value="restaurant_owner">Restaurant Owner</SelectItem>
                  <SelectItem value="reviewer">Reviewer</SelectItem>
                  <SelectItem value="user">User</SelectItem>
                </SelectContent>
              </Select>
            </div>
            
            <Button onClick={handleAssignRole} className="gradient-halaal text-white">
              Assign Role
            </Button>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Users List */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>User Management</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="space-y-4">
            {users.map((user) => (
              <div key={user.id} className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg">
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold">{user.profiles?.full_name || 'No name'}</h3>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{user.email}</p>
                  <div className="flex gap-2 mt-2">
                    {user.user_roles.map((role, index) => (
                      <Badge key={index} variant="outline">
                        {role.role}
                      </Badge>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                  Joined: {new Date(user.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Restaurant Management */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Restaurant Management</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="space-y-4">
            {restaurants.map((restaurant) => (
              <div key={restaurant.id} className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg">
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold">{restaurant.name}</h3>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{restaurant.city}, {restaurant.province}</p>
                  <div className="flex gap-2 mt-2">
                    <Badge variant={restaurant.is_active ? "default" : "secondary"}>
                      {restaurant.is_active ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}
                    </Badge>
                    <Badge variant={restaurant.is_verified ? "default" : "outline"}>
                      {restaurant.is_verified ? 'Verified' : 'Unverified'}
                    </Badge>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                  Rating: {restaurant.average_rating?.toFixed(1) || '0.0'} ({restaurant.total_reviews || 0} reviews)
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
};

export default AdminPanel;

```

### `src/components/AdminRestaurantManager.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { Search, Edit, Eye, MapPin, Phone, Mail, ExternalLink, Menu } from 'lucide-react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import AdminMenuManager from './AdminMenuManager';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  cuisine_type?: string;
  phone?: string;
  email?: string;
  website?: string;
  is_verified: boolean;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  claim_status: string;
  restaurant_type: string;
  price_range?: string;
  total_reviews: number;
  average_rating: number;
  owner_id?: string;
}

const AdminRestaurantManager = () => {
  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [filteredRestaurants, setFilteredRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);
  const [selectedRestaurant, setSelectedRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'list' | 'menu'>('list');
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchRestaurants();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (searchTerm.trim() === '') {
      setFilteredRestaurants(restaurants);
    } else {
      const filtered = restaurants.filter(restaurant =>
        restaurant.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
        restaurant.city.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
        restaurant.cuisine_type?.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())
      );
      setFilteredRestaurants(filtered);
    }
  }, [searchTerm, restaurants]);

  const fetchRestaurants = async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*')
        .order('name');

      if (error) {
        console.error('Error fetching restaurants:', error);
        toast.error('Failed to fetch restaurants');
        return;
      }

      setRestaurants(data || []);
      setFilteredRestaurants(data || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error in fetchRestaurants:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to load restaurants');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleEditRestaurant = (restaurantId: string) => {
    navigate(`/restaurant/edit/${restaurantId}`);
  };

  const handleViewRestaurant = (restaurantId: string) => {
    navigate(`/restaurants/${restaurantId}`);
  };

  const handleManageMenu = (restaurant: Restaurant) => {
    setSelectedRestaurant(restaurant);
    setActiveTab('menu');
  };

  const handleBackToList = () => {
    setActiveTab('list');
    setSelectedRestaurant(null);
    fetchRestaurants(); // Refresh the list
  };

  const getStatusBadge = (restaurant: Restaurant) => {
    const badges = [];
    
    if (restaurant.is_verified) {
      badges.push(
        <Badge key="verified" className="bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">
          Verified
        </Badge>
      );
    }
    
    if (restaurant.is_halaal_certified) {
      badges.push(
        <Badge key="halaal" className="bg-green-100 text-green-800">
          Halaal Certified
        </Badge>
      );
    }
    
    if (restaurant.claim_status === 'verified') {
      badges.push(
        <Badge key="claimed" className="bg-purple-100 text-purple-800">
          Claimed
        </Badge>
      );
    }
    
    return badges;
  };

  if (activeTab === 'menu' && selectedRestaurant) {
    return (
      <div className="space-y-4">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={handleBackToList}>
            ← Back to Restaurants
          </Button>
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold">
            Managing Menu for {selectedRestaurant.name}
          </h2>
        </div>
        <AdminMenuManager restaurant={selectedRestaurant} />
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
        {[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="h-32 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
        <div className="relative flex-1">
          <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 h-4 w-4" />
          <Input
            placeholder="Search restaurants by name, city, or cuisine..."
            value={searchTerm}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
            className="pl-10"
          />
        </div>
        <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">
          {filteredRestaurants.length} restaurants found
        </div>
      </div>

      {filteredRestaurants.length === 0 ? (
        <div className="text-center py-8">
          <p className="text-gray-500">
            {searchTerm ? 'No restaurants found matching your search.' : 'No restaurants found.'}
          </p>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4">
          {filteredRestaurants.map((restaurant) => (
            <Card key={restaurant.id} className="hover:shadow-md transition-shadow">
              <CardContent className="p-6">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                  <div className="flex-1 space-y-3">
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                      <div className="flex-1">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                          <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg">{restaurant.name}</h3>
                          <div className="flex gap-1">
                            {getStatusBadge(restaurant)}
                          </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 mb-2">
                          <MapPin className="h-4 w-4" />
                          <span className="text-sm">
                            {restaurant.address}, {restaurant.city}, {restaurant.province}
                          </span>
                        </div>

                        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 text-sm">
                          <div>
                            <span className="font-medium">Cuisine:</span> {restaurant.cuisine_type || 'Not specified'}
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <span className="font-medium">Type:</span> {restaurant.restaurant_type}
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <span className="font-medium">Price Range:</span> {restaurant.price_range || 'Not specified'}
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <span className="font-medium">Reviews:</span> {restaurant.total_reviews} ({restaurant.average_rating.toFixed(1)}★)
                          </div>
                          {restaurant.phone && (
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                              <Phone className="h-3 w-3" />
                              <span>{restaurant.phone}</span>
                            </div>
                          )}
                          {restaurant.email && (
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                              <Mail className="h-3 w-3" />
                              <span>{restaurant.email}</span>
                            </div>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 ml-4">
                    <Button
                      onClick={() => handleEditRestaurant(restaurant.id)}
                      size="sm"
                      className="flex items-center gap-1"
                    >
                      <Edit className="h-3 w-3" />
                      Edit
                    </Button>
                    <Button
                      onClick={() => handleViewRestaurant(restaurant.id)}
                      size="sm"
                      variant="outline"
                      className="flex items-center gap-1"
                    >
                      <Eye className="h-3 w-3" />
                      View
                    </Button>
                    <Button
                      onClick={() => handleManageMenu(restaurant)}
                      size="sm"
                      variant="outline"
                      className="flex items-center gap-1"
                    >
                      <Menu className="h-3 w-3" />
                      Menu
                    </Button>
                    {restaurant.website && (
                      <Button
                        onClick={() => window.open(restaurant.website, '_blank')}
                        size="sm"
                        variant="outline"
                        className="flex items-center gap-1"
                      >
                        <ExternalLink className="h-3 w-3" />
                        Website
                      </Button>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default AdminRestaurantManager;

```

### `src/components/AdminSetup.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { Shield, CheckCircle, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react';

const AdminSetup = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [isAdmin, setIsAdmin] = useState<boolean | null>(null);

  const checkAdminStatus = async () => {
    if (!user?.id) return;

    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('user_roles')
        .select('role')
        .eq('user_id', user.id)
        .eq('role', 'admin')
        .maybeSingle();

      if (error) {
        console.error('Error checking admin status:', error);
        return;
      }

      setIsAdmin(!!data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error checking admin status:', error);
    }
  };

  const makeAdmin = async () => {
    if (!user?.id) {
      toast.error('No user logged in');
      return;
    }

    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('user_roles')
        .insert({
          user_id: user.id,
          role: 'admin'
        });

      if (error) {
        console.error('Error making admin:', error);
        toast.error('Failed to assign admin role: ' + error.message);
        return;
      }

      toast.success('Admin role assigned successfully!');
      setIsAdmin(true);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error making admin:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to assign admin role');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (user?.id) {
      checkAdminStatus();
    }
  }, [user]);

  if (!user) {
    return (
      <Card className="max-w-md mx-auto">
        <CardContent className="p-6 text-center">
          <AlertCircle className="h-12 w-12 text-red-500 mx-auto mb-4" />
          <p>Please log in to set up admin access</p>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Card className="max-w-md mx-auto">
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Shield className="h-5 w-5" />
          Admin Setup
        </CardTitle>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent className="space-y-4">
        <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">
          <p><strong>Current User:</strong> {user.email}</p>
          <p><strong>User ID:</strong> {user.id}</p>
        </div>

        {isAdmin === null ? (
          <div className="text-center">
            <p>Checking admin status...</p>
          </div>
        ) : isAdmin ? (
          <div className="text-center">
            <CheckCircle className="h-12 w-12 text-green-500 mx-auto mb-2" />
            <p className="text-green-700 font-medium">You already have admin access!</p>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-2">
              You can now access the Claims tab in the Admin Dashboard.
            </p>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <p className="text-center text-gray-600">
              Click the button below to assign yourself admin privileges:
            </p>
            <Button
              onClick={makeAdmin}
              disabled={loading}
              className="w-full bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700"
            >
              {loading ? 'Setting up...' : 'Make Me Admin'}
            </Button>
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 text-center">
          After becoming an admin, refresh the page and navigate to the Admin Dashboard to view claims.
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default AdminSetup;

```

### `src/components/AdvancedFilters.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Checkbox } from '@/components/ui/checkbox';
import { Slider } from '@/components/ui/slider';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Filter, X } from 'lucide-react';

interface AdvancedFiltersProps {
  onFiltersChange: (filters: any) => void;
  currentFilters: any;
}

const AdvancedFilters = ({ onFiltersChange, currentFilters }: AdvancedFiltersProps) => {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
  const [filters, setFilters] = useState({
    priceRange: currentFilters.priceRange || [1, 4],
    isHalaalCertified: currentFilters.isHalaalCertified || false,
    isVerified: currentFilters.isVerified || false,
    hasDelivery: currentFilters.hasDelivery || false,
    openNow: currentFilters.openNow || false,
    minRating: currentFilters.minRating || 0,
    maxDistance: currentFilters.maxDistance || 50,
    amenities: currentFilters.amenities || [],
    ...currentFilters
  });

  const priceLabels = ['$', '$$', '$$$', '$$$$'];
  const amenityOptions = [
    'WiFi', 'Parking', 'Wheelchair Accessible', 'Kid Friendly', 
    'Outdoor Seating', 'Takeaway', 'Drive Through', 'Catering'
  ];

  const handleFilterChange = (key: string, value: any) => {
    const newFilters = { ...filters, [key]: value };
    setFilters(newFilters);
    onFiltersChange(newFilters);
  };

  const clearFilters = () => {
    const clearedFilters = {
      priceRange: [1, 4],
      isHalaalCertified: false,
      isVerified: false,
      hasDelivery: false,
      openNow: false,
      minRating: 0,
      maxDistance: 50,
      amenities: []
    };
    setFilters(clearedFilters);
    onFiltersChange(clearedFilters);
  };

  const getActiveFiltersCount = () => {
    let count = 0;
    if (filters.isHalaalCertified) count++;
    if (filters.isVerified) count++;
    if (filters.hasDelivery) count++;
    if (filters.openNow) count++;
    if (filters.minRating > 0) count++;
    if (filters.priceRange[0] > 1 || filters.priceRange[1] < 4) count++;
    if (filters.amenities.length > 0) count++;
    return count;
  };

  return (
    <div className="relative">
      <Button
        variant="outline"
        onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
        className="relative"
      >
        <Filter className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
        Advanced Filters
        {getActiveFiltersCount() > 0 && (
          <Badge variant="destructive" className="ml-2 h-5 w-5 rounded-full p-0 text-xs">
            {getActiveFiltersCount()}
          </Badge>
        )}
      </Button>

      {isOpen && (
        <Card className="absolute top-full left-0 z-50 w-80 mt-2 shadow-lg">
          <CardHeader className="pb-3">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <CardTitle className="text-lg">Advanced Filters</CardTitle>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={clearFilters}>
                  Clear All
                </Button>
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)}>
                  <X className="h-4 w-4" />
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-6">
            {/* Price Range */}
            <div>
              <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Price Range</Label>
              <div className="mt-2">
                <Slider
                  value={filters.priceRange}
                  onValueChange={(value) => handleFilterChange('priceRange', value)}
                  max={4}
                  min={1}
                  step={1}
                  className="w-full"
                />
                <div className="flex justify-between mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
                  {priceLabels.map((label, index) => (
                    <span key={index}>{label}</span>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Rating Filter */}
            <div>
              <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Minimum Rating</Label>
              <Select
                value={filters.minRating.toString()}
                onValueChange={(value) => handleFilterChange('minRating', parseInt(value))}
              >
                <SelectTrigger className="mt-2">
                  <SelectValue />
                </SelectTrigger>
                <SelectContent>
                  <SelectItem value="0">Any Rating</SelectItem>
                  <SelectItem value="3">3+ Stars</SelectItem>
                  <SelectItem value="4">4+ Stars</SelectItem>
                  <SelectItem value="4.5">4.5+ Stars</SelectItem>
                </SelectContent>
              </Select>
            </div>

            {/* Quick Filters */}
            <div>
              <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Quick Filters</Label>
              <div className="mt-2 space-y-3">
                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                  <Checkbox
                    id="halaal"
                    checked={filters.isHalaalCertified}
                    onCheckedChange={(checked) => handleFilterChange('isHalaalCertified', checked)}
                  />
                  <Label htmlFor="halaal" className="text-sm">Halaal Certified</Label>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                  <Checkbox
                    id="verified"
                    checked={filters.isVerified}
                    onCheckedChange={(checked) => handleFilterChange('isVerified', checked)}
                  />
                  <Label htmlFor="verified" className="text-sm">Verified</Label>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                  <Checkbox
                    id="delivery"
                    checked={filters.hasDelivery}
                    onCheckedChange={(checked) => handleFilterChange('hasDelivery', checked)}
                  />
                  <Label htmlFor="delivery" className="text-sm">Offers Delivery</Label>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                  <Checkbox
                    id="openNow"
                    checked={filters.openNow}
                    onCheckedChange={(checked) => handleFilterChange('openNow', checked)}
                  />
                  <Label htmlFor="openNow" className="text-sm">Open Now</Label>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Amenities */}
            <div>
              <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Amenities</Label>
              <div className="mt-2 space-y-2">
                {amenityOptions.map((amenity) => (
                  <div key={amenity} className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                    <Checkbox
                      id={amenity}
                      checked={filters.amenities.includes(amenity)}
                      onCheckedChange={(checked) => {
                        const newAmenities = checked
                          ? [...filters.amenities, amenity]
                          : filters.amenities.filter((a: string) => a !== amenity);
                        handleFilterChange('amenities', newAmenities);
                      }}
                    />
                    <Label htmlFor={amenity} className="text-sm">{amenity}</Label>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default AdvancedFilters;

```

### `src/components/AdvancedSearch.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Checkbox } from '@/components/ui/checkbox';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Search, X, Filter } from 'lucide-react';
import { Collapsible, CollapsibleContent, CollapsibleTrigger } from '@/components/ui/collapsible';

interface SearchFilters {
  searchTerm: string;
  city: string;
  cuisineType: string;
  restaurantType: string;
  priceRange: string;
  isHalaalCertified: boolean;
  isVerified: boolean;
  minRating: number;
  showClaimableOnly?: boolean;
}

interface AdvancedSearchProps {
  onSearch: (filters: SearchFilters) => void;
  initialFilters?: Partial<SearchFilters>;
}

const AdvancedSearch = ({ onSearch, initialFilters = {} }: AdvancedSearchProps) => {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
  const [filters, setFilters] = useState<SearchFilters>({
    searchTerm: '',
    city: '',
    cuisineType: '',
    restaurantType: '',
    priceRange: '',
    isHalaalCertified: false,
    isVerified: false,
    minRating: 0,
    showClaimableOnly: false,
    ...initialFilters
  });

  const cuisineTypes = [
    'Indian', 'Pakistani', 'Middle Eastern', 'Turkish', 'Malaysian', 
    'African', 'Mediterranean', 'Fast Food', 'Italian', 'Chinese'
  ];

  const restaurantTypes = [
    'casual_dining', 'fast_food', 'fine_dining', 'takeaway', 
    'cafe', 'bakery', 'food_truck'
  ];

  const priceRanges = ['R', 'RR', 'RRR', 'RRRR'];

  const cities = [
    'Cape Town', 'Johannesburg', 'Durban', 'Pretoria', 'Port Elizabeth',
    'Bloemfontein', 'East London', 'Pietermaritzburg', 'Kimberley', 'Polokwane'
  ];

  const handleFilterChange = (key: keyof SearchFilters, value: any) => {
    setFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: value }));
  };

  const handleSearch = () => {
    onSearch(filters);
  };

  const clearFilters = () => {
    const clearedFilters: SearchFilters = {
      searchTerm: '',
      city: '',
      cuisineType: '',
      restaurantType: '',
      priceRange: '',
      isHalaalCertified: false,
      isVerified: false,
      minRating: 0,
      showClaimableOnly: false
    };
    setFilters(clearedFilters);
    onSearch(clearedFilters);
  };

  const getActiveFiltersCount = () => {
    let count = 0;
    if (filters.searchTerm) count++;
    if (filters.city) count++;
    if (filters.cuisineType) count++;
    if (filters.restaurantType) count++;
    if (filters.priceRange) count++;
    if (filters.isHalaalCertified) count++;
    if (filters.isVerified) count++;
    if (filters.minRating > 0) count++;
    if (filters.showClaimableOnly) count++;
    return count;
  };

  const formatRestaurantType = (type: string) => {
    return type.split('_').map(word => 
      word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1)
    ).join(' ');
  };

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader>
        <Collapsible open={isOpen} onOpenChange={setIsOpen}>
          <CollapsibleTrigger asChild>
            <Button variant="ghost" className="w-full justify-between p-0">
              <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <Filter className="h-5 w-5" />
                Advanced Search
                {getActiveFiltersCount() > 0 && (
                  <Badge variant="secondary">
                    {getActiveFiltersCount()} active
                  </Badge>
                )}
              </CardTitle>
            </Button>
          </CollapsibleTrigger>
          
          <CollapsibleContent>
            <CardContent className="pt-4 space-y-4">
              {/* Search Term */}
              <div>
                <Label htmlFor="search">Search Restaurants</Label>
                <Input
                  id="search"
                  placeholder="Restaurant name, cuisine, or dish..."
                  value={filters.searchTerm}
                  onChange={(e) => handleFilterChange('searchTerm', e.target.value)}
                />
              </div>

              {/* Location */}
              <div>
                <Label htmlFor="city">City</Label>
                <Select value={filters.city} onValueChange={(value) => handleFilterChange('city', value === 'all_cities' ? '' : value)}>
                  <SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectValue placeholder="Select city" />
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    <SelectItem value="all_cities">All Cities</SelectItem>
                    {cities.map(city => (
                      <SelectItem key={city} value={city}>{city}</SelectItem>
                    ))}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              {/* Cuisine Type */}
              <div>
                <Label htmlFor="cuisine">Cuisine Type</Label>
                <Select value={filters.cuisineType} onValueChange={(value) => handleFilterChange('cuisineType', value === 'all_cuisines' ? '' : value)}>
                  <SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectValue placeholder="Select cuisine" />
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    <SelectItem value="all_cuisines">All Cuisines</SelectItem>
                    {cuisineTypes.map(cuisine => (
                      <SelectItem key={cuisine} value={cuisine}>{cuisine}</SelectItem>
                    ))}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              {/* Restaurant Type */}
              <div>
                <Label htmlFor="type">Restaurant Type</Label>
                <Select value={filters.restaurantType} onValueChange={(value) => handleFilterChange('restaurantType', value === 'all_types' ? '' : value)}>
                  <SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectValue placeholder="Select type" />
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    <SelectItem value="all_types">All Types</SelectItem>
                    {restaurantTypes.map(type => (
                      <SelectItem key={type} value={type}>
                        {formatRestaurantType(type)}
                      </SelectItem>
                    ))}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              {/* Price Range */}
              <div>
                <Label htmlFor="price">Price Range</Label>
                <Select value={filters.priceRange} onValueChange={(value) => handleFilterChange('priceRange', value === 'any_price' ? '' : value)}>
                  <SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectValue placeholder="Select price range" />
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    <SelectItem value="any_price">Any Price</SelectItem>
                    {priceRanges.map(price => (
                      <SelectItem key={price} value={price}>
                        {price} - {price === 'R' ? 'Budget (R0-R50)' : price === 'RR' ? 'Mid-range (R50-R150)' : price === 'RRR' ? 'Upscale (R150-R300)' : 'Fine Dining (R300+)'}
                      </SelectItem>
                    ))}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              {/* Rating */}
              <div>
                <Label htmlFor="rating">Minimum Rating</Label>
                <Select value={filters.minRating.toString()} onValueChange={(value) => handleFilterChange('minRating', value === 'any_rating' ? 0 : parseInt(value))}>
                  <SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectValue placeholder="Any rating" />
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    <SelectItem value="any_rating">Any Rating</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="3">3+ Stars</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="4">4+ Stars</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="5">5 Stars</SelectItem>
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              {/* Checkboxes */}
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                  <Checkbox
                    id="halaal"
                    checked={filters.isHalaalCertified}
                    onCheckedChange={(checked) => handleFilterChange('isHalaalCertified', checked)}
                  />
                  <Label htmlFor="halaal">Halaal Certified Only</Label>
                </div>
                
                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                  <Checkbox
                    id="verified"
                    checked={filters.isVerified}
                    onCheckedChange={(checked) => handleFilterChange('isVerified', checked)}
                  />
                  <Label htmlFor="verified">Verified Restaurants Only</Label>
                </div>

                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                  <Checkbox
                    id="claimable"
                    checked={filters.showClaimableOnly}
                    onCheckedChange={(checked) => handleFilterChange('showClaimableOnly', checked)}
                  />
                  <Label htmlFor="claimable">Show Claimable Restaurants Only</Label>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Action Buttons */}
              <div className="flex gap-2 pt-4">
                <Button onClick={handleSearch} className="flex-1">
                  <Search className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  Search
                </Button>
                <Button onClick={clearFilters} variant="outline">
                  <X className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  Clear
                </Button>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </CollapsibleContent>
        </Collapsible>
      </CardHeader>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default AdvancedSearch;

```

### `src/components/AnalyticsChart.tsx`

```tsx

import React from 'react';
import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer, LineChart, Line } from 'recharts';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';

interface AnalyticsData {
  date: string;
  views: number;
  profile_visits: number;
  menu_views: number;
  contact_clicks: number;
  website_clicks: number;
  phone_clicks: number;
  direction_clicks: number;
}

interface AnalyticsChartProps {
  data: AnalyticsData[];
  type: 'bar' | 'line';
  title: string;
  dataKey: string;
  color?: string;
}

const AnalyticsChart = ({ data, type, title, dataKey, color = '#22c55e' }: AnalyticsChartProps) => {
  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle>{title}</CardTitle>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>
          {type === 'bar' ? (
            <BarChart data={data}>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" />
              <XAxis dataKey="date" />
              <YAxis />
              <Tooltip />
              <Bar dataKey={dataKey} fill={color} />
            </BarChart>
          ) : (
            <LineChart data={data}>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" />
              <XAxis dataKey="date" />
              <YAxis />
              <Tooltip />
              <Legend />
              <Line type="monotone" dataKey={dataKey} stroke={color} strokeWidth={2} />
            </LineChart>
          )}
        </ResponsiveContainer>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default AnalyticsChart;

```

```tsx
  );
};
```

### `src/components/CuisineMultiSelect.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Check, ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from '@/components/ui/popover';
import { Checkbox } from '@/components/ui/checkbox';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';

interface CuisineMultiSelectProps {
  value: string[];
  onChange: (value: string[]) => void;
  placeholder?: string;
}

const cuisineOptions = [
  'Indian',
  'Portuguese',
  'Cape Malay',
  'Turkish',
  'Korean',
  'Italian',
  'Mediterranean',
  'Middle Eastern',
  'Pakistani',
  'Moroccan',
  'Lebanese',
  'Thai',
  'Chinese',
  'Mexican',
  'American',
  'African',
  'Fusion',
  'Seafood',
  'Steakhouse',
  'Pizza',
  'Burgers',
  'Sushi',
  'Fast Food',
  'Bakery',
  'Desserts'
];

const CuisineMultiSelect = ({ value, onChange, placeholder = "Select cuisine types..." }: CuisineMultiSelectProps) => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);

  const handleToggle = (cuisine: string) => {
    const newValue = value.includes(cuisine)
      ? value.filter(item => item !== cuisine)
      : [...value, cuisine];
    onChange(newValue);
  };

  const displayValue = value.length > 0 
    ? value.length === 1 
      ? value[0] 
      : `${value.length} cuisines selected`
    : placeholder;

  return (
    <Popover open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
      <PopoverTrigger asChild>
        <Button
          variant="outline"
          role="combobox"
          aria-expanded={open}
          className="w-full justify-between h-10"
        >
          <span className="truncate">{displayValue}</span>
          <ChevronDown className="ml-2 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 opacity-50" />
        </Button>
      </PopoverTrigger>
      <PopoverContent className="w-full p-0" align="start">
        <div className="max-h-60 overflow-auto p-2">
          {cuisineOptions.map((cuisine) => (
            <div key={cuisine} className="flex items-center space-x-2 p-2 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded">
              <Checkbox
                id={cuisine}
                checked={value.includes(cuisine)}
                onCheckedChange={() => handleToggle(cuisine)}
              />
              <Label
                htmlFor={cuisine}
                className="text-sm font-normal cursor-pointer flex-1"
              >
                {cuisine}
              </Label>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        {value.length > 0 && (
          <div className="border-t p-2">
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              onClick={() => onChange([])}
              className="w-full text-gray-600"
            >
              Clear all
            </Button>
          </div>
        )}
      </PopoverContent>
    </Popover>
  );
};

export default CuisineMultiSelect;

```

### `src/components/DuplicateManager.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Alert, AlertDescription } from '@/components/ui/alert';
import { Trash2, Merge, AlertTriangle, Star, MapPin } from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
} from '@/components/ui/dialog';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  restaurant_type: 'casual_dining' | 'fast_food' | 'fine_dining' | 'takeaway' | 'cafe' | 'bakery' | 'food_truck';
  price_range: string;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  is_verified: boolean;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  created_at: string;
}

interface DuplicateGroup {
  restaurants: Restaurant[];
  similarity: 'exact' | 'similar';
}

const DuplicateManager = () => {
  const [duplicateGroups, setDuplicateGroups] = useState<DuplicateGroup[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [selectedForDeletion, setSelectedForDeletion] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [showDeleteDialog, setShowDeleteDialog] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    findDuplicates();
  }, []);

  const levenshteinDistance = (str1: string, str2: string): number => {
    if (str1.length === 0) return str2.length;
    if (str2.length === 0) return str1.length;

    const matrix = Array(str2.length + 1).fill(null).map(() => Array(str1.length + 1).fill(null));
    
    for (let i = 0; i <= str1.length; i++) {
      matrix[0][i] = i;
    }
    
    for (let j = 0; j <= str2.length; j++) {
      matrix[j][0] = j;
    }
    
    for (let j = 1; j <= str2.length; j++) {
      for (let i = 1; i <= str1.length; i++) {
        if (str1[i - 1] === str2[j - 1]) {
          matrix[j][i] = matrix[j - 1][i - 1];
        } else {
          matrix[j][i] = Math.min(
            matrix[j - 1][i - 1] + 1,
            matrix[j][i - 1] + 1,
            matrix[j - 1][i] + 1
          );
        }
      }
    }
    
    return matrix[str2.length][str1.length];
  };

  const findDuplicates = async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      console.log('Finding duplicates...');
      
      const { data: restaurants, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*')
        .eq('is_active', true)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: true });

      if (error) throw error;

      console.log('Loaded restaurants for duplicate check:', restaurants?.length || 0);

      const groups: DuplicateGroup[] = [];
      const processed = new Set<string>();

      restaurants?.forEach((restaurant, index) => {
        if (processed.has(restaurant.id)) return;

        const duplicates = restaurants.slice(index + 1).filter(other => {
          if (processed.has(other.id)) return false;

          const nameNorm = restaurant.name.toLowerCase().trim().replace(/[^\w\s]/g, '');
          const otherNameNorm = other.name.toLowerCase().trim().replace(/[^\w\s]/g, '');
          const addressNorm = restaurant.address.toLowerCase().trim().replace(/[^\w\s]/g, '');
          const otherAddressNorm = other.address.toLowerCase().trim().replace(/[^\w\s]/g, '');
          
          const cityMatch = restaurant.city.toLowerCase().trim() === other.city.toLowerCase().trim();
          const provinceMatch = restaurant.province.toLowerCase().trim() === other.province.toLowerCase().trim();

          // Exact matches
          const exactNameMatch = nameNorm === otherNameNorm;
          const exactAddressMatch = addressNorm === otherAddressNorm;

          // Similar matches
          const nameDistance = levenshteinDistance(nameNorm, otherNameNorm);
          const addressDistance = levenshteinDistance(addressNorm, otherAddressNorm);
          const nameThreshold = Math.max(2, Math.floor(Math.min(nameNorm.length, otherNameNorm.length) * 0.3));
          const addressThreshold = Math.max(3, Math.floor(Math.min(addressNorm.length, otherAddressNorm.length) * 0.4));

          const similarName = nameDistance <= nameThreshold || nameNorm.includes(otherNameNorm) || otherNameNorm.includes(nameNorm);
          const similarAddress = addressDistance <= addressThreshold;

          console.log('Comparing:', {
            restaurant1: { name: nameNorm, address: addressNorm },
            restaurant2: { name: otherNameNorm, address: otherAddressNorm },
            nameDistance,
            addressDistance,
            nameThreshold,
            addressThreshold,
            matches: {
              exactName: exactNameMatch,
              exactAddress: exactAddressMatch,
              similarName,
              similarAddress,
              city: cityMatch,
              province: provinceMatch
            }
          });

          return cityMatch && provinceMatch && (
            (exactNameMatch && exactAddressMatch) ||
            (exactAddressMatch && similarName) ||
            (exactNameMatch && similarAddress)
          );
        });

        if (duplicates.length > 0) {
          const group: DuplicateGroup = {
            restaurants: [restaurant, ...duplicates],
            similarity: 'exact'
          };
          groups.push(group);
          
          console.log('Found duplicate group:', group);
          
          // Mark all as processed
          processed.add(restaurant.id);
          duplicates.forEach(dup => processed.add(dup.id));
        }
      });

      console.log('Total duplicate groups found:', groups.length);
      setDuplicateGroups(groups);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error finding duplicates:', error);
      toast.error('Error finding duplicate restaurants');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDelete = async (restaurantId: string) => {
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .update({ is_active: false })
        .eq('id', restaurantId);

      if (error) throw error;

      toast.success('Restaurant removed successfully');
      findDuplicates(); // Refresh the list
      setShowDeleteDialog(false);
      setSelectedForDeletion(null);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error deleting restaurant:', error);
      toast.error('Error removing restaurant');
    }
  };

  const formatRestaurantType = (type: string) => {
    const typeMap: Record<string, string> = {
      'casual_dining': 'Casual Dining',
      'fast_food': 'Fast Food',
      'fine_dining': 'Fine Dining',
      'takeaway': 'Takeaway',
      'cafe': 'Cafe',
      'bakery': 'Bakery',
      'food_truck': 'Food Truck'
    };
    return typeMap[type] || type;
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center p-8">
        <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-green-600"></div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Duplicate Restaurant Manager</h2>
        <Button onClick={findDuplicates} variant="outline">
          Refresh Scan
        </Button>
      </div>

      {duplicateGroups.length === 0 ? (
        <Alert>
          <AlertTriangle className="h-4 w-4" />
          <AlertDescription>
            No duplicate restaurants found. Great job keeping the database clean!
          </AlertDescription>
        </Alert>
      ) : (
        <Alert>
          <AlertTriangle className="h-4 w-4" />
          <AlertDescription>
            Found {duplicateGroups.length} duplicate group(s) that need attention.
          </AlertDescription>
        </Alert>
      )}

      <div className="space-y-6">
        {duplicateGroups.map((group, groupIndex) => (
          <Card key={groupIndex} className="border-red-200">
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-red-700">
                <AlertTriangle className="h-5 w-5" />
                Duplicate Group #{groupIndex + 1}
                <Badge variant="destructive">{group.similarity} match</Badge>
              </CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                {group.restaurants.map((restaurant) => (
                  <Card key={restaurant.id} className="border">
                    <CardContent className="p-4">
                      <div className="space-y-3">
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
                          <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg">{restaurant.name}</h3>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                            {restaurant.is_verified && (
                              <Badge className="bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">Verified</Badge>
                            )}
                            {restaurant.is_halaal_certified && (
                              <Badge className="bg-green-100 text-green-800">Halaal</Badge>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        </div>

                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                          <Star className="h-4 w-4 fill-yellow-400 text-yellow-400" />
                          <span className="font-medium">{restaurant.average_rating.toFixed(1)}</span>
                          <span className="text-gray-500">({restaurant.total_reviews} reviews)</span>
                        </div>

                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                          <MapPin className="h-4 w-4" />
                          <span>{restaurant.address}, {restaurant.city}, {restaurant.province}</span>
                        </div>

                        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                          <Badge variant="outline">{restaurant.cuisine_type}</Badge>
                          <Badge variant="outline">{formatRestaurantType(restaurant.restaurant_type)}</Badge>
                          {restaurant.price_range && (
                            <Badge variant="outline">{restaurant.price_range}</Badge>
                          )}
                        </div>

                        <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                          Created: {new Date(restaurant.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                        </div>

                        <div className="flex gap-2 pt-2">
                          <Button
                            variant="destructive"
                            size="sm"
                            onClick={() => {
                              setSelectedForDeletion(restaurant.id);
                              setShowDeleteDialog(true);
                            }}
                          >
                            <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                            Remove
                          </Button>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </CardContent>
                  </Card>
                ))}
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        ))}
      </div>

      <Dialog open={showDeleteDialog} onOpenChange={setShowDeleteDialog}>
        <DialogContent>
          <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle>Confirm Restaurant Removal</DialogTitle>
            <DialogDescription>
              Are you sure you want to remove this restaurant? This action will mark it as inactive 
              and hide it from public view. This action can be reversed by an admin.
            </DialogDescription>
          </DialogHeader>
          <DialogFooter>
            <Button
              variant="outline"
              onClick={() => {
                setShowDeleteDialog(false);
                setSelectedForDeletion(null);
              }}
            >
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button
              variant="destructive"
              onClick={() => selectedForDeletion && handleDelete(selectedForDeletion)}
            >
              Remove Restaurant
            </Button>
          </DialogFooter>
        </DialogContent>
      </Dialog>
    </div>
  );
};

export default DuplicateManager;

```

### `src/components/DuplicateRestaurantDialog.tsx`

```tsx

import React from 'react';
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
} from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { MapPin, AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react';

interface DuplicateRestaurantDialogProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  onContinue: () => void;
  existingRestaurant: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    address: string;
    city: string;
    province: string;
  } | null;
  newRestaurantName: string;
}

const DuplicateRestaurantDialog: React.FC<DuplicateRestaurantDialogProps> = ({
  isOpen,
  onClose,
  onContinue,
  existingRestaurant,
  newRestaurantName
}) => {
  if (!existingRestaurant) return null;

  return (
    <Dialog open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}>
      <DialogContent className="max-w-2xl">
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-amber-600">
            <AlertTriangle className="h-5 w-5" />
            Possible Duplicate Restaurant Found
          </DialogTitle>
          <DialogDescription className="text-gray-600">
            We found a restaurant that might be the same as the one you're trying to add. 
            Please review the details below.
          </DialogDescription>
        </DialogHeader>

        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-2">Restaurant you're adding:</h4>
            <Card className="border-green-200 bg-green-50">
              <CardContent className="p-3">
                <p className="font-medium text-green-800">{newRestaurantName}</p>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </div>

          <div>
            <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-2">Existing restaurant in our database:</h4>
            <Card className="border-amber-200 bg-amber-50">
              <CardContent className="p-3">
                <h5 className="font-medium text-amber-800">{existingRestaurant.name}</h5>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-amber-700 mt-1">
                  <MapPin className="h-3 w-3" />
                  <span>{existingRestaurant.address}, {existingRestaurant.city}, {existingRestaurant.province}</span>
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h5 className="font-medium text-blue-800 mb-2">What you can do:</h5>
            <ul className="text-sm text-blue-700 space-y-1">
              <li>• If this is the same restaurant, please don't continue - it's already listed!</li>
              <li>• If this is a different restaurant (different branch, similar name, etc.), you can continue</li>
              <li>• If you're unsure, you can check the existing listing first</li>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="flex gap-3 pt-4">
          <Button
            variant="outline"
            onClick={() => window.open(`/restaurants/${existingRestaurant.id}`, '_blank')}
            className="flex-1"
          >
            View Existing Restaurant
          </Button>
          <Button
            variant="outline"
            onClick={onClose}
            className="flex-1"
          >
            Cancel
          </Button>
          <Button
            onClick={onContinue}
            className="flex-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-green-500 to-amber-500 hover:from-green-600 hover:to-amber-600 text-white border-0"
          >
            Continue Anyway
          </Button>
        </div>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
};

export default DuplicateRestaurantDialog;

```

### `src/components/FavoriteListCard.tsx`

```tsx

import React from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Star, MapPin, Share, Edit, Check, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';

interface FavoriteRestaurant {
  id: string;
  list_id: string;
  visited: boolean;
  restaurants: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    city: string;
    cuisine_type: string;
    average_rating: number;
    total_reviews: number;
    description: string;
    price_range: string;
  };
}

interface FavoriteListCardProps {
  restaurants: FavoriteRestaurant[];
  onToggleVisited: (restaurantId: string) => void;
  onShare: () => void;
  onEdit: () => void;
}

const FavoriteListCard = ({ restaurants, onToggleVisited, onShare, onEdit }: FavoriteListCardProps) => {
  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
      {restaurants.map((favorite) => (
        <Card key={favorite.id} className={`hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200 animate-fade-in ${favorite.visited ? 'bg-green-50 border-green-200' : 'bg-white'}`}>
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
              <div className="flex-1">
                <Link 
                  to={`/restaurants/${favorite.restaurants.id}`}
                  className="font-semibold text-gray-900 hover:text-green-600 line-clamp-1"
                >
                  {favorite.restaurants.name}
                </Link>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                    {favorite.restaurants.cuisine_type}
                  </Badge>
                  {favorite.restaurants.price_range && (
                    <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                      {favorite.restaurants.price_range}
                    </Badge>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
              <Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                onClick={() => onToggleVisited(favorite.id)}
                className={`${favorite.visited ? 'text-green-600 hover:text-green-700' : 'text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600'} transition-colors`}
                title={favorite.visited ? 'Mark as Want to Go' : 'Mark as Visited'}
              >
                {favorite.visited ? <Check className="h-4 w-4" /> : <X className="h-4 w-4" />}
              </Button>
            </div>
            
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <Star className="h-4 w-4 text-yellow-400 fill-current" />
                <span className="text-sm font-medium">
                  {favorite.restaurants.average_rating.toFixed(1)}
                </span>
              </div>
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                ({favorite.restaurants.total_reviews} reviews)
              </span>
            </div>
            
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-3">
              <MapPin className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">{favorite.restaurants.city}</span>
            </div>
            
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <Badge variant={favorite.visited ? "default" : "secondary"} className="animate-pulse">
                {favorite.visited ? "✅ Visited" : "📍 Want to Go"}
              </Badge>
              <Link to={`/restaurants/${favorite.restaurants.id}`}>
                <Button size="sm" className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700">
                  View Details
                </Button>
              </Link>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
};

export default FavoriteListCard;

```

### `src/components/FeaturedReviewers.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Star, Quote } from 'lucide-react';

interface FeaturedReviewer {
  id: string;
  full_name: string;
  avatar_url?: string;
  review_count: number;
  average_rating: number;
  latest_review: string;
  restaurant_name: string;
}

const FeaturedReviewers = () => {
  const [reviewers, setReviewers] = useState<FeaturedReviewer[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchFeaturedReviewers();
  }, []);

  const fetchFeaturedReviewers = async () => {
    try {
      // Fetch actual reviewers with their reviews
      const { data: reviewsData, error } = await supabase
        .from('reviews')
        .select(`
          user_id,
          rating,
          content,
          profiles!inner(full_name, avatar_url),
          restaurants!inner(name)
        `)
        .not('content', 'is', null)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
        .limit(20);

      if (error) throw error;

      if (reviewsData && reviewsData.length > 0) {
        // Group reviews by user and calculate stats
        const userStats = reviewsData.reduce((acc, review) => {
          const userId = review.user_id;
          if (!acc[userId]) {
            acc[userId] = {
              id: userId,
              full_name: review.profiles.full_name,
              avatar_url: review.profiles.avatar_url,
              reviews: [],
              total_rating: 0,
              review_count: 0
            };
          }
          acc[userId].reviews.push({
            rating: review.rating,
            content: review.content,
            restaurant_name: review.restaurants.name
          });
          acc[userId].total_rating += review.rating;
          acc[userId].review_count += 1;
          return acc;
        }, {} as any);

        // Convert to array and calculate averages
        const featuredReviewers = Object.values(userStats)
          .map((user: any) => ({
            id: user.id,
            full_name: user.full_name,
            avatar_url: user.avatar_url,
            review_count: user.review_count,
            average_rating: user.total_rating / user.review_count,
            latest_review: user.reviews[0].content,
            restaurant_name: user.reviews[0].restaurant_name
          }))
          .filter((reviewer: any) => reviewer.review_count >= 2) // Only show users with multiple reviews
          .sort((a: any, b: any) => b.review_count - a.review_count)
          .slice(0, 3);

        setReviewers(featuredReviewers);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching featured reviewers:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  // Don't render the section if there are no reviewers
  if (loading) {
    return null; // Don't show loading state, just hide the section
  }

  if (reviewers.length === 0) {
    return null; // Hide the entire section when no reviews exist
  }

  return (
    <section className="py-16 bg-gray-50">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Featured Reviewers</h2>
          <p className="text-lg text-gray-600">Our community's most trusted voices</p>
        </div>
        
        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {reviewers.map((reviewer) => (
            <Card key={reviewer.id} className="hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow">
              <CardContent className="p-6">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-4">
                  <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-green-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                    {reviewer.avatar_url ? (
                      <img 
                        src={reviewer.avatar_url} 
                        alt={reviewer.full_name}
                        className="w-12 h-12 rounded-full object-cover"
                      />
                    ) : (
                      <span className="font-semibold text-green-700">
                        {reviewer.full_name.charAt(0)}
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{reviewer.full_name}</h3>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                        <Star className="h-4 w-4 text-yellow-500 fill-current" />
                        <span className="text-sm font-medium">{reviewer.average_rating.toFixed(1)}</span>
                      </div>
                      <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                        {reviewer.review_count} reviews
                      </Badge>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                
                <div className="relative">
                  <Quote className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-400 mb-2" />
                  <p className="text-gray-700 italic line-clamp-3 mb-2">
                    {reviewer.latest_review}
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                    About {reviewer.restaurant_name}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
};

export default FeaturedReviewers;

```

### `src/components/FeaturedSection.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import RestaurantCard from './RestaurantCard';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  restaurant_type: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  price_range: string;
  is_verified: boolean;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  phone: string;
  email: string;
  website: string;
  certification_body?: string;
  halaal_certificate_url?: string;
  image_url?: string;
}

const FeaturedSection = () => {
  const [featuredRestaurants, setFeaturedRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);
  const [recentRestaurants, setRecentRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchRestaurants();
  }, []);

  const fetchRestaurants = async () => {
    try {
      // Fetch featured restaurants (those with active promotions or manually featured)
      const { data: featuredData, error: featuredError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*')
        .eq('is_active', true)
        .eq('is_verified', true)
        .gte('average_rating', 4.5)
        .order('total_reviews', { ascending: false })
        .limit(4);

      if (featuredError) {
        console.error('Error fetching featured restaurants:', featuredError);
      } else {
        setFeaturedRestaurants(featuredData || []);
      }

      // Fetch recently added restaurants
      const { data: recentData, error: recentError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*')
        .eq('is_active', true)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
        .limit(8);

      if (recentError) {
        console.error('Error fetching recent restaurants:', recentError);
      } else {
        setRecentRestaurants(recentData || []);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching restaurants:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <section className="py-16 px-4 bg-background">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
          <div className="text-center mb-12">
            <h2 className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-foreground mb-4">
              Featured Halaal Restaurants
            </h2>
            <p className="text-lg text-muted-foreground max-w-2xl mx-auto">
              Discover top-rated, verified Halaal restaurants loved by our community
            </p>
          </div>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 mb-16">
            {[...Array(4)].map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="animate-pulse">
                <div className="bg-gray-200 h-48 rounded-t-lg"></div>
                <div className="bg-white p-6 rounded-b-lg">
                  <div className="h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-3/4 mb-2"></div>
                  <div className="h-3 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/2"></div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          
          <div className="text-center mb-12">
            <h2 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-foreground mb-4">
              Recently Added Restaurants
            </h2>
          </div>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
            {[...Array(8)].map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="animate-pulse">
                <div className="bg-gray-200 h-48 rounded-t-lg"></div>
                <div className="bg-white p-6 rounded-b-lg">
                  <div className="h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-3/4 mb-2"></div>
                  <div className="h-3 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/2"></div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    );
  }

  return (
    <section className="py-16 px-4 bg-background">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        {/* Featured Restaurants Section */}
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <h2 className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-foreground mb-4">
            Featured Halaal Restaurants
          </h2>
          <p className="text-lg text-muted-foreground max-w-2xl mx-auto">
            Discover top-rated, verified Halaal restaurants loved by our community
          </p>
        </div>

        {featuredRestaurants.length > 0 ? (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 mb-16">
            {featuredRestaurants.map((restaurant) => (
              <RestaurantCard key={restaurant.id} restaurant={restaurant} />
            ))}
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="text-center py-12 mb-16">
            <h3 className="text-lg font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">No featured restaurants yet</h3>
            <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">Be the first to add a restaurant and get featured!</p>
            <Link to="/add-restaurant">
              <Button className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white">
                Add Restaurant
              </Button>
            </Link>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Recently Added Restaurants Section */}
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <h2 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-foreground mb-4">
            Recently Added Restaurants
          </h2>
          <p className="text-lg text-muted-foreground max-w-2xl mx-auto">
            Fresh additions to our Halaal restaurant directory
          </p>
        </div>

        {recentRestaurants.length > 0 ? (
          <>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 mb-12">
              {recentRestaurants.map((restaurant) => (
                <RestaurantCard key={restaurant.id} restaurant={restaurant} />
              ))}
            </div>
            
            <div className="text-center">
              <Link to="/restaurants">
                <Button size="lg" className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white">
                  View All Restaurants
                </Button>
              </Link>
            </div>
          </>
        ) : (
          <div className="text-center py-12">
            <h3 className="text-lg font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">No restaurants yet</h3>
            <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">Be the first to add a restaurant!</p>
            <Link to="/add-restaurant">
              <Button className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white">
                Add Restaurant
              </Button>
            </Link>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </section>
  );
};

export default FeaturedSection;

```

```tsx
};
```
