### `src/components/GooglePlacesSearch.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { MapPin, Phone, Globe, Clock } from 'lucide-react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';

interface PlaceResult {
  name: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  postal_code: string;
  phone?: string;
  website?: string;
  rating?: number;
  opening_hours?: string[];
  place_id?: string;
  photo_url?: string;
}

interface GooglePlacesSearchProps {
  onPlaceSelect: (place: PlaceResult) => void;
  onManualEntry?: () => void;
}

const GooglePlacesSearch: React.FC<GooglePlacesSearchProps> = ({ 
  onPlaceSelect, 
  onManualEntry 
}) => {
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [results, setResults] = useState<PlaceResult[]>([]);
  const [isSearching, setIsSearching] = useState(false);
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);

  const searchPlaces = async (query: string) => {
    if (!query.trim()) {
      setResults([]);
      setShowResults(false);
      return;
    }

    setIsSearching(true);
    
    try {
      console.log('Searching for:', query);
      
      const { data, error } = await supabase.functions.invoke('google-places-search', {
        body: { query }
      });

      if (error) {
        console.error('Supabase function error:', error);
        throw error;
      }

      console.log('Search results:', data);
      
      const placeResults = data?.results || [];
      setResults(placeResults);
      setShowResults(true);
      
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error searching places:', error);
      // Fallback to mock data if API fails
      const mockResults: PlaceResult[] = [
        {
          name: "Search results unavailable",
          address: "Google Places API error - please try manual entry",
          city: "Cape Town",
          province: "Western Cape",
          postal_code: "8001"
        }
      ];
      setResults(mockResults);
      setShowResults(true);
    } finally {
      setIsSearching(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSearch = () => {
    searchPlaces(searchTerm);
  };

  const handleKeyPress = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter') {
      handleSearch();
    }
  };

  const handlePlaceSelect = (place: PlaceResult) => {
    onPlaceSelect(place);
    setShowResults(false);
    setSearchTerm(place.name);
  };

  const handleManualEntry = () => {
    console.log('Manual entry clicked');
    if (onManualEntry) {
      onManualEntry();
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      <div className="flex gap-2">
        <Input
          placeholder="Search for your restaurant on Google..."
          value={searchTerm}
          onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
          onKeyPress={handleKeyPress}
          className="flex-1"
        />
        <Button 
          onClick={handleSearch}
          disabled={isSearching}
          variant="outline"
        >
          {isSearching ? 'Searching...' : 'Search'}
        </Button>
      </div>

      <div className="text-center">
        <Button 
          variant="link" 
          onClick={handleManualEntry}
          className="text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-green-600"
        >
          Can't find your restaurant? Add manually
        </Button>
      </div>

      {showResults && (
        <div className="space-y-2 max-h-96 overflow-y-auto">
          {results.length === 0 ? (
            <Card>
              <CardContent className="p-4 text-center text-gray-500">
                No restaurants found. Try a different search term or add manually.
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          ) : (
            results.map((place, index) => (
              <Card key={index} className="cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
                <CardContent className="p-4" onClick={() => handlePlaceSelect(place)}>
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                    {/* Restaurant Image */}
                    {place.photo_url && (
                      <div className="flex-shrink-0">
                        <img
                          src={place.photo_url}
                          alt={place.name}
                          className="w-20 h-16 object-cover rounded border"
                        />
                      </div>
                    )}
                    
                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                      <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                        <div className="flex-1">
                          <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg">{place.name}</h3>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 mt-1">
                            <MapPin className="h-4 w-4" />
                            <span className="text-sm">{place.address}</span>
                          </div>
                          
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mt-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
                            {place.phone && (
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <Phone className="h-3 w-3" />
                                <span>{place.phone}</span>
                              </div>
                            )}
                            {place.website && (
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <Globe className="h-3 w-3" />
                                <span>Website</span>
                              </div>
                            )}
                            {place.rating && (
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span>⭐ {place.rating}</span>
                              </div>
                            )}
                          </div>

                          {place.opening_hours && place.opening_hours.length > 0 && (
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
                              <Clock className="h-3 w-3" />
                              <span>{place.opening_hours[0]}</span>
                            </div>
                          )}
                        </div>
                        
                        <Button variant="outline" size="sm">
                          Select
                        </Button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </CardContent>
              </Card>
            ))
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default GooglePlacesSearch;

```

### `src/components/HalaalVerification.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Upload, CheckCircle, XCircle, Clock } from 'lucide-react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { toast } from 'sonner';

interface HalaalVerificationProps {
  restaurantId: string;
  currentStatus?: string;
  currentCertificateUrl?: string;
  onStatusUpdate?: () => void;
}

const HalaalVerification = ({ 
  restaurantId, 
  currentStatus = 'pending',
  currentCertificateUrl,
  onStatusUpdate 
}: HalaalVerificationProps) => {
  const [uploading, setUploading] = useState(false);
  const [certificateFile, setCertificateFile] = useState<File | null>(null);

  const getStatusIcon = (status: string) => {
    switch (status) {
      case 'verified':
        return <CheckCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-green-500" />;
      case 'rejected':
        return <XCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-red-500" />;
      default:
        return <Clock className="h-5 w-5 text-yellow-500" />;
    }
  };

  const getStatusText = (status: string) => {
    switch (status) {
      case 'verified':
        return 'Halaal Certified';
      case 'rejected':
        return 'Verification Rejected';
      default:
        return 'Pending Verification';
    }
  };

  const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {
    switch (status) {
      case 'verified':
        return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';
      case 'rejected':
        return 'bg-red-100 text-red-800';
      default:
        return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800';
    }
  };

  const handleFileUpload = async () => {
    if (!certificateFile) {
      toast.error('Please select a certificate file');
      return;
    }

    setUploading(true);
    try {
      // Upload file to storage (would need storage bucket configured)
      const fileExt = certificateFile.name.split('.').pop();
      const fileName = `${restaurantId}-certificate-${Date.now()}.${fileExt}`;
      
      // For now, we'll just update the restaurant with a placeholder URL
      // In a real implementation, you'd upload to Supabase Storage first
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .update({
          halaal_certificate_image_url: fileName,
          verification_status: 'pending'
        })
        .eq('id', restaurantId);

      if (error) throw error;

      toast.success('Halaal certificate uploaded for verification');
      onStatusUpdate?.();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error uploading certificate:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to upload certificate');
    } finally {
      setUploading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <span>Halaal Verification</span>
          <Badge className={getStatusColor(currentStatus)}>
            {getStatusIcon(currentStatus)}
            <span className="ml-1">{getStatusText(currentStatus)}</span>
          </Badge>
        </CardTitle>
      </CardHeader>
      
      <CardContent className="space-y-4">
        {currentStatus === 'verified' ? (
          <div className="text-green-700 bg-green-50 p-4 rounded-lg">
            <p>✅ Your restaurant is verified as Halaal certified!</p>
            {currentCertificateUrl && (
              <a 
                href={currentCertificateUrl} 
                target="_blank" 
                rel="noopener noreferrer"
                className="text-blue-600 hover:underline text-sm mt-2 block"
              >
                View Certificate
              </a>
            )}
          </div>
        ) : currentStatus === 'rejected' ? (
          <div className="text-red-700 bg-red-50 p-4 rounded-lg">
            <p>❌ Verification was rejected. Please upload a valid Halaal certificate.</p>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="text-yellow-700 bg-yellow-50 p-4 rounded-lg">
            <p>⏳ Your certificate is under review. This typically takes 1-2 business days.</p>
          </div>
        )}

        {currentStatus !== 'verified' && (
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div>
              <Label htmlFor="certificate">Upload Halaal Certificate</Label>
              <Input
                id="certificate"
                type="file"
                accept="image/*,.pdf"
                onChange={(e) => setCertificateFile(e.target.files?.[0] || null)}
                className="mt-1"
              />
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">
                Accepted formats: JPG, PNG, PDF (max 5MB)
              </p>
            </div>

            <Button 
              onClick={handleFileUpload}
              disabled={uploading || !certificateFile}
              className="w-full"
            >
              {uploading ? (
                <>
                  <Upload className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />
                  Uploading...
                </>
              ) : (
                <>
                  <Upload className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  Upload Certificate
                </>
              )}
            </Button>
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 space-y-2">
          <h4 className="font-medium">Requirements:</h4>
          <ul className="list-disc list-inside space-y-1">
            <li>Valid Halaal certification from recognized body</li>
            <li>Certificate must be current and not expired</li>
            <li>Clear, readable image or PDF</li>
            <li>Restaurant name must match certificate</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default HalaalVerification;

```

### `src/components/Header.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { 
  DropdownMenu, 
  DropdownMenuContent, 
  DropdownMenuItem, 
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
  DropdownMenuSeparator 
} from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu';
import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from '@/components/ui/avatar';
import { User, LogOut, Settings, Shield, Menu, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { useIsMobile } from '@/hooks/use-mobile';

interface UserProfile {
  full_name: string;
  avatar_url: string;
}

const Header = () => {
  const { user, signOut } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const isMobile = useIsMobile();
  const [isAdmin, setIsAdmin] = useState(false);
  const [userProfile, setUserProfile] = useState<UserProfile | null>(null);
  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      checkAdminStatus();
      fetchUserProfile();
    }
  }, [user]);

  // Close mobile menu when screen size changes
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isMobile && mobileMenuOpen) {
      setMobileMenuOpen(false);
    }
  }, [isMobile, mobileMenuOpen]);

  const checkAdminStatus = async () => {
    try {
      const { data } = await supabase
        .from('user_roles')
        .select('role')
        .eq('user_id', user?.id)
        .eq('role', 'admin')
        .maybeSingle();
      
      setIsAdmin(!!data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error checking admin status:', error);
    }
  };

  const fetchUserProfile = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('profiles')
        .select('full_name, avatar_url')
        .eq('id', user?.id)
        .single();

      if (error) throw error;
      setUserProfile(data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching user profile:', error);
    }
  };

  const handleSignOut = async () => {
    try {
      await signOut();
      navigate('/');
      toast.success('Signed out successfully');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error signing out:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to sign out');
    }
  };

  const getUserDisplayName = () => {
    if (userProfile?.full_name) {
      return userProfile.full_name;
    }
    return user?.email || 'User';
  };

  const getUserInitials = () => {
    if (userProfile?.full_name) {
      return userProfile.full_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase();
    }
    return user?.email?.charAt(0).toUpperCase() || 'U';
  };

  const toggleMobileMenu = () => {
    setMobileMenuOpen(!mobileMenuOpen);
  };

  const closeMobileMenu = () => {
    setMobileMenuOpen(false);
  };

  const navigationItems = [
    { to: "/restaurants", label: "Discover Restaurants" },
    { to: "/add-restaurant", label: "Add Restaurant" },
    { to: "/claim-restaurant-search", label: "Claim Restaurant" },
    { to: "/pricing", label: "Pricing" },
    { to: "/about", label: "About" },
    { to: "/contact", label: "Contact" }
  ];

  return (
    <>
      <header className="bg-white shadow-sm border-b relative z-50">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <div className="flex justify-between items-center h-16">
            {/* Mobile Layout */}
            {isMobile ? (
              <>
                {/* Burger Menu */}
                <Button
                  variant="ghost"
                  size="sm"
                  onClick={toggleMobileMenu}
                  className="p-2"
                >
                  {mobileMenuOpen ? <X className="h-6 w-6" /> : <Menu className="h-6 w-6" />}
                </Button>

                {/* Centered Logo */}
                <Link to="/" className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-600 absolute left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2">
                  Eat Halaal
                </Link>

                {/* Right Side - Login/User */}
                <div className="flex items-center">
                  {user ? (
                    <DropdownMenu>
                      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
                        <Button variant="ghost" className="relative h-10 w-10 rounded-full">
                          <Avatar className="h-8 w-8">
                            <AvatarImage src={userProfile?.avatar_url} alt={getUserDisplayName()} />
                            <AvatarFallback className="bg-green-100 text-green-700 text-xs">
                              {getUserInitials()}
                            </AvatarFallback>
                          </Avatar>
                        </Button>
                      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
                      <DropdownMenuContent className="w-56" align="end" forceMount>
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-start gap-2 p-2">
                          <div className="flex flex-col space-y-1 leading-none">
                            <p className="font-medium text-sm">{getUserDisplayName()}</p>
                            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{user.email}</p>
                            {isAdmin && (
                              <p className="text-xs text-green-600 font-medium">Administrator</p>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        </div>
                        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
                        <DropdownMenuItem asChild>
                          <Link to="/dashboard" className="cursor-pointer">
                            <User className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                            <span>Dashboard</span>
                          </Link>
                        </DropdownMenuItem>
                        <DropdownMenuItem asChild>
                          <Link to="/profile-settings" className="cursor-pointer">
                            <Settings className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                            <span>Profile Settings</span>
                          </Link>
                        </DropdownMenuItem>
                        {isAdmin && (
                          <DropdownMenuItem asChild>
                            <Link to="/admin-dashboard" className="cursor-pointer">
                              <Shield className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                              <span>Admin Dashboard</span>
                            </Link>
                          </DropdownMenuItem>
                        )}
                        <DropdownMenuItem asChild>
                          <Link to="/restaurant-dashboard" className="cursor-pointer">
                            <Settings className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                            <span>Restaurant Dashboard</span>
                          </Link>
                        </DropdownMenuItem>
                        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
                        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={handleSignOut} className="cursor-pointer">
                          <LogOut className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                          <span>Sign out</span>
                        </DropdownMenuItem>
                      </DropdownMenuContent>
                    </DropdownMenu>
                  ) : (
                    <Link to="/auth">
                      <Button size="sm">Login</Button>
                    </Link>
                  )}
                </div>
              </>
            ) : (
              <>
                {/* Desktop Layout */}
                <div className="flex items-center">
                  <Link to="/" className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-600">
                    Eat Halaal
                  </Link>
                </div>

                <nav className="hidden md:flex space-x-8">
                  {navigationItems.map((item) => (
                    <Link 
                      key={item.to}
                      to={item.to}
                      className="text-gray-700 hover:text-green-600 transition-colors"
                    >
                      {item.label}
                    </Link>
                  ))}
                </nav>

                <div className="flex items-center space-x-4">
                  {user ? (
                    <DropdownMenu>
                      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
                        <Button variant="ghost" className="relative h-10 w-10 rounded-full">
                          <Avatar className="h-10 w-10">
                            <AvatarImage src={userProfile?.avatar_url} alt={getUserDisplayName()} />
                            <AvatarFallback className="bg-green-100 text-green-700">
                              {getUserInitials()}
                            </AvatarFallback>
                          </Avatar>
                        </Button>
                      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
                      <DropdownMenuContent className="w-56" align="end" forceMount>
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-start gap-2 p-2">
                          <div className="flex flex-col space-y-1 leading-none">
                            <p className="font-medium">{getUserDisplayName()}</p>
                            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{user.email}</p>
                            {isAdmin && (
                              <p className="text-xs text-green-600 font-medium">Administrator</p>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        </div>
                        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
                        <DropdownMenuItem asChild>
                          <Link to="/dashboard" className="cursor-pointer">
                            <User className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                            <span>Dashboard</span>
                          </Link>
                        </DropdownMenuItem>
                        <DropdownMenuItem asChild>
                          <Link to="/profile-settings" className="cursor-pointer">
                            <Settings className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                            <span>Profile Settings</span>
                          </Link>
                        </DropdownMenuItem>
                        {isAdmin && (
                          <DropdownMenuItem asChild>
                            <Link to="/admin-dashboard" className="cursor-pointer">
                              <Shield className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                              <span>Admin Dashboard</span>
                            </Link>
                          </DropdownMenuItem>
                        )}
                        <DropdownMenuItem asChild>
                          <Link to="/restaurant-dashboard" className="cursor-pointer">
                            <Settings className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                            <span>Restaurant Dashboard</span>
                          </Link>
                        </DropdownMenuItem>
                        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
                        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={handleSignOut} className="cursor-pointer">
                          <LogOut className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                          <span>Sign out</span>
                        </DropdownMenuItem>
                      </DropdownMenuContent>
                    </DropdownMenu>
                  ) : (
                    <Link to="/auth">
                      <Button>Sign In</Button>
                    </Link>
                  )}
                </div>
              </>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      {/* Mobile Menu Overlay */}
      {isMobile && mobileMenuOpen && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-40 bg-black bg-opacity-50" onClick={closeMobileMenu}>
          <div className="fixed inset-y-0 left-0 w-full bg-white shadow-xl transform transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out">
            <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
              {/* Mobile Menu Header */}
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b">
                <Link to="/" className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-600" onClick={closeMobileMenu}>
                  Eat Halaal
                </Link>
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={closeMobileMenu}>
                  <X className="h-6 w-6" />
                </Button>
              </div>

              {/* Mobile Menu Items */}
              <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col justify-center items-center space-y-8 p-8">
                {navigationItems.map((item) => (
                  <Link
                    key={item.to}
                    to={item.to}
                    className="text-2xl font-medium text-gray-900 hover:text-green-600 transition-colors text-center"
                    onClick={closeMobileMenu}
                  >
                    {item.label}
                  </Link>
                ))}
                
                {user && (
                  <>
                    <Link
                      to="/dashboard"
                      className="text-2xl font-medium text-gray-900 hover:text-green-600 transition-colors text-center"
                      onClick={closeMobileMenu}
                    >
                      Dashboard
                    </Link>
                    <Link
                      to="/restaurant-dashboard"
                      className="text-2xl font-medium text-gray-900 hover:text-green-600 transition-colors text-center"
                      onClick={closeMobileMenu}
                    >
                      Restaurant Dashboard
                    </Link>
                  </>
                )}
              </div>

              {/* Mobile Menu Footer */}
              {user && (
                <div className="p-4 border-t">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-4 mb-4">
                    <Avatar className="h-12 w-12">
                      <AvatarImage src={userProfile?.avatar_url} alt={getUserDisplayName()} />
                      <AvatarFallback className="bg-green-100 text-green-700">
                        {getUserInitials()}
                      </AvatarFallback>
                    </Avatar>
                    <div>
                      <p className="font-medium">{getUserDisplayName()}</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">{user.email}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <Button 
                    onClick={() => {
                      handleSignOut();
                      closeMobileMenu();
                    }} 
                    variant="outline" 
                    className="w-full"
                  >
                    <LogOut className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                    Sign out
                  </Button>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </>
  );
};

export default Header;

```

### `src/components/HeroSection.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Search, MapPin, Star, Shield, Shuffle } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import RouletteGame from './RouletteGame';
import NearMeButton from './NearMeButton';
import RestaurantCard from './RestaurantCard';

const HeroSection = () => {
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [showRoulette, setShowRoulette] = useState(false);
  const [nearbyRestaurants, setNearbyRestaurants] = useState([]);
  const [showNearbyResults, setShowNearbyResults] = useState(false);
  const [stats, setStats] = useState({
    totalRestaurants: 0,
    halalCertified: 0,
    totalReviews: 0
  });
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchStats();
    // Auto-run Near Me on load if location was previously granted
    checkAutoNearMe();
  }, []);

  const checkAutoNearMe = async () => {
    // Check if user has previously granted location access
    const existingLocation = localStorage.getItem('userLocation');
    if (existingLocation) {
      // Auto-trigger Near Me search on dashboard load
      setTimeout(() => {
        const button = document.querySelector('[data-near-me-auto]') as HTMLButtonElement;
        if (button) {
          button.click();
        }
      }, 1000);
    }
  };


  const fetchStats = async () => {
    try {
      // Get total restaurants
      const { count: totalRestaurants } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true })
        .eq('is_active', true);

      // Get halal certified restaurants
      const { count: halalCertified } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true })
        .eq('is_active', true)
        .eq('is_halaal_certified', true);

      // Get total reviews
      const { count: totalReviews } = await supabase
        .from('reviews')
        .select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true });

      setStats({
        totalRestaurants: totalRestaurants || 0,
        halalCertified: halalCertified || 0,
        totalReviews: totalReviews || 0
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching stats:', error);
    }
  };

  const handleNearbyRestaurantsFound = (restaurants: any[]) => {
    setNearbyRestaurants(restaurants);
    setShowNearbyResults(true);
    setShowRoulette(false);
  };

  const handleSearch = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    
    if (searchTerm.trim()) {
      navigate(`/restaurants?search=${encodeURIComponent(searchTerm.trim())}`);
    } else {
      navigate('/restaurants');
    }
  };

  const handleInputChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    setSearchTerm(e.target.value);
  };

  return (
    <section className="relative min-h-[80vh] flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 via-white to-amber-50">
      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-green-600/5 to-amber-600/5"></div>
      
      <div className="relative z-10 max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 text-center">
        <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-green-100 text-green-800 px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-medium">
            <Shield className="h-4 w-4" />
            Verified Halaal Restaurants
          </div>
        </div>

        <h1 className="text-5xl md:text-6xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6 leading-tight">
          Discover Authentic
          <span className="text-gradient block">Halaal Restaurants</span>
        </h1>
        
        <p className="text-xl text-gray-600 mb-12 max-w-2xl mx-auto leading-relaxed">
          From local gems to franchise favorites, find verified Halaal dining experiences across South Africa with confidence and community reviews.
        </p>
        
        {!showRoulette && !showNearbyResults ? (
          <>
            <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="max-w-2xl mx-auto mb-8">
              <div className="relative flex items-center bg-white rounded-full shadow-lg border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
                <div className="flex items-center px-6 py-4 flex-1">
                  <Search className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400 mr-3" />
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    placeholder="Search restaurants, cuisine, or location..."
                    value={searchTerm}
                    onChange={handleInputChange}
                    className="flex-1 outline-none text-gray-700 placeholder-gray-400"
                  />
                </div>
                <Button 
                  type="submit"
                  className="gradient-halaal text-white m-2 px-8 py-3 rounded-full hover:shadow-lg transition-all"
                >
                  Search
                </Button>
              </div>
            </form>

            {/* Action Buttons - Updated with better hover states */}
            <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 justify-center items-center mb-8">
              <Button 
                variant="outline" 
                size="lg" 
                className="border-2 border-green-300 text-green-700 hover:bg-green-50 hover:text-green-800 hover:border-green-400 transition-all"
                onClick={() => navigate('/restaurants')}
              >
                <MapPin className="mr-2 h-5 w-5" />
                Browse All Restaurants
              </Button>
              <NearMeButton 
                onRestaurantsFound={handleNearbyRestaurantsFound}
                className="border-2 border-blue-300 text-blue-700 hover:bg-blue-50 hover:text-blue-800 hover:border-blue-400 transition-all"
                data-near-me-auto
              />
              <Button 
                variant="outline" 
                size="lg" 
                className="border-2 border-orange-300 text-orange-700 hover:bg-orange-50 hover:text-orange-800 hover:border-orange-400 transition-all"
                onClick={() => setShowRoulette(true)}
              >
                <Shuffle className="mr-2 h-5 w-5" />
                New Table for Foodie
              </Button>
              <Button 
                variant="outline" 
                size="lg" 
                className="border-2 border-amber-300 text-amber-700 hover:bg-amber-50 hover:text-amber-800 hover:border-amber-400 transition-all"
                onClick={() => navigate('/add-restaurant')}
              >
                Add Your Restaurant
              </Button>
            </div>
          </>
        ) : showRoulette ? (
          <div className="mb-8">
            <RouletteGame />
            <Button 
              variant="outline" 
              onClick={() => setShowRoulette(false)}
              className="mt-4"
            >
              Back to Search
            </Button>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="mb-8">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Restaurants Near You</h2>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 mb-6">
              {nearbyRestaurants.map((restaurant: any) => (
                <RestaurantCard key={restaurant.id} restaurant={restaurant} />
              ))}
            </div>
            <Button 
              variant="outline" 
              onClick={() => setShowNearbyResults(false)}
              className="mt-4"
            >
              Back to Search
            </Button>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Stats */}
        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-8 justify-center items-center">
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{stats.totalRestaurants.toLocaleString()}+</div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Restaurants</div>
          </div>
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{stats.halalCertified.toLocaleString()}+</div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Halaal Certified</div>
          </div>
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{stats.totalReviews.toLocaleString()}+</div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Reviews</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
};

export default HeroSection;

```

### `src/components/LevelProgressCard.tsx`

```tsx

import React from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Trophy, Zap } from 'lucide-react';

interface LevelProgressCardProps {
  currentLevel: string;
  levelPoints: number;
  nextLevel?: {
    name: string;
    pointsRequired: number;
  };
  progress: number;
  pointsToNext: number;
}

const LevelProgressCard = ({ 
  currentLevel, 
  levelPoints, 
  nextLevel, 
  progress, 
  pointsToNext 
}: LevelProgressCardProps) => {
  const levelEmojis: { [key: string]: string } = {
    'Foodie': '🍽️',
    'Food Explorer': '🔍',
    'Food Critic': '📝',
    'Elite Critic': '⭐',
    'Master Foodie': '👑'
  };

  const levelColors: { [key: string]: string } = {
    'Foodie': 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800',
    'Food Explorer': 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800',
    'Food Critic': 'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
    'Elite Critic': 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800',
    'Master Foodie': 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'
  };

  return (
    <Card className="bg-gradient-to-br from-yellow-50 to-orange-50 border-yellow-200 animate-scale-in">
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-yellow-800">
          <Trophy className="h-5 w-5" />
          Your Foodie Level
        </CardTitle>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent className="space-y-4">
        <div className="text-center">
          <div className="text-4xl mb-2 animate-bounce">
            {levelEmojis[currentLevel] || '🍽️'}
          </div>
          <Badge className={`text-lg px-4 py-2 ${levelColors[currentLevel] || 'bg-gray-100'}`}>
            {currentLevel}
          </Badge>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 mt-2">
            <Zap className="h-4 w-4 text-yellow-600" />
            <p className="text-sm text-yellow-700 font-medium">{levelPoints} XP total</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        {nextLevel && (
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm">
              <span className="text-yellow-700">Next: {nextLevel.name}</span>
              <span className="text-yellow-600 font-medium">{pointsToNext} XP to go</span>
            </div>
            
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Progress value={progress} className="h-3 bg-yellow-100" />
              <p className="text-sm text-center text-yellow-700">
                {Math.ceil(pointsToNext / 10)} more reviews to level up! 🚀
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default LevelProgressCard;

```

### `src/components/MenuAnalytics.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress';
import { TrendingUp, Eye, Flame, Clock } from 'lucide-react';

interface MenuAnalyticsProps {
  restaurantId: string;
}

interface MenuItemStats {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  category: string;
  price: number;
  view_count: number;
  spice_level: string;
  is_available: boolean;
}

const MenuAnalytics = ({ restaurantId }: MenuAnalyticsProps) => {
  const [menuItems, setMenuItems] = useState<MenuItemStats[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [totalViews, setTotalViews] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchMenuAnalytics();
  }, [restaurantId]);

  const fetchMenuAnalytics = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('menu_items')
        .select('*')
        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurantId)
        .order('view_count', { ascending: false });

      if (error) throw error;

      setMenuItems(data || []);
      const total = (data || []).reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.view_count || 0), 0);
      setTotalViews(total);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching menu analytics:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const getSpiceLevelColor = (level: string) => {
    switch (level) {
      case 'mild': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';
      case 'medium': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800';
      case 'hot': return 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800';
      case 'very_hot': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-800';
      default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800';
    }
  };

  const getSpiceLevelIcon = (level: string) => {
    switch (level) {
      case 'mild': return '🌿';
      case 'medium': return '🌶️';
      case 'hot': return '🔥';
      case 'very_hot': return '🌋';
      default: return '';
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Menu Analytics</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
            {[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="h-16 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  const topPerformers = menuItems.slice(0, 3);
  const maxViews = Math.max(...menuItems.map(item => item.view_count || 0), 1);

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Overview Stats */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Eye className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-600" />
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Total Views</p>
                <p className="text-xl font-bold">{totalViews.toLocaleString()}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <TrendingUp className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600" />
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Total Items</p>
                <p className="text-xl font-bold">{menuItems.length}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Flame className="h-4 w-4 text-orange-600" />
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Available</p>
                <p className="text-xl font-bold">
                  {menuItems.filter(item => item.is_available).length}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Clock className="h-4 w-4 text-purple-600" />
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Avg Views</p>
                <p className="text-xl font-bold">
                  {menuItems.length > 0 ? Math.round(totalViews / menuItems.length) : 0}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>

      {/* Top Performers */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <TrendingUp className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600" />
            Top Performing Items
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          {topPerformers.length > 0 ? (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              {topPerformers.map((item, index) => (
                <div key={item.id} className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 bg-green-100 text-green-800 rounded-full font-bold">
                      {index + 1}
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="font-medium">{item.name}</h4>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
                        <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">{item.category}</Badge>
                        {item.spice_level && (
                          <Badge className={`text-xs ${getSpiceLevelColor(item.spice_level)}`}>
                            {getSpiceLevelIcon(item.spice_level)} {item.spice_level}
                          </Badge>
                        )}
                        <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">R{item.price}</span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-right">
                    <div className="text-lg font-bold text-green-600">{item.view_count}</div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">views</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <p className="text-gray-500 text-center py-8">No menu items yet. Add some items to see analytics!</p>
          )}
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* All Items with Performance */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Menu Item Performance</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="space-y-4">
            {menuItems.map((item) => (
              <div key={item.id} className="border rounded-lg p-4">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
                  <div>
                    <h4 className="font-medium">{item.name}</h4>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
                      <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">{item.category}</Badge>
                      {item.spice_level && (
                        <Badge className={`text-xs ${getSpiceLevelColor(item.spice_level)}`}>
                          {getSpiceLevelIcon(item.spice_level)} {item.spice_level}
                        </Badge>
                      )}
                      <Badge variant={item.is_available ? "default" : "secondary"} className="text-xs">
                        {item.is_available ? 'Available' : 'Unavailable'}
                      </Badge>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-right">
                    <div className="text-lg font-bold">{item.view_count || 0}</div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">views</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                    <span>Performance</span>
                    <span>{Math.round(((item.view_count || 0) / maxViews) * 100)}%</span>
                  </div>
                  <Progress 
                    value={((item.view_count || 0) / maxViews) * 100} 
                    className="h-2"
                  />
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
};

export default MenuAnalytics;

```

### `src/components/MenuVisibilitySettings.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Switch } from '@/components/ui/switch';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Settings, Save } from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner';

interface MenuVisibilitySettingsProps {
  restaurantId: string;
}

interface VisibilitySettings {
  [key: string]: boolean;
  appetizers: boolean;
  mains: boolean;
  desserts: boolean;
  beverages: boolean;
  specials: boolean;
  sides: boolean;
}

const MenuVisibilitySettings = ({ restaurantId }: MenuVisibilitySettingsProps) => {
  const [settings, setSettings] = useState<VisibilitySettings>({
    appetizers: true,
    mains: true,
    desserts: true,
    beverages: true,
    specials: true,
    sides: true
  });
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (restaurantId) {
      fetchSettings();
    }
  }, [restaurantId]);

  const fetchSettings = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('menu_sections_visibility')
        .eq('id', restaurantId)
        .single();

      if (error) throw error;

      if (data?.menu_sections_visibility && typeof data.menu_sections_visibility === 'object') {
        const visibilityData = data.menu_sections_visibility as Record<string, boolean>;
        setSettings(prevSettings => ({
          ...prevSettings,
          ...visibilityData
        }));
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching menu visibility settings:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const saveSettings = async () => {
    setSaving(true);
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .update({ menu_sections_visibility: settings as any })
        .eq('id', restaurantId);

      if (error) throw error;

      toast.success('Menu visibility settings updated successfully!');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error saving menu visibility settings:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to update settings. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  const handleToggle = (section: keyof VisibilitySettings) => {
    setSettings(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      [section]: !prev[section]
    }));
  };

  const sections = [
    { key: 'appetizers' as const, label: 'Appetizers & Starters' },
    { key: 'mains' as const, label: 'Main Courses' },
    { key: 'desserts' as const, label: 'Desserts' },
    { key: 'beverages' as const, label: 'Beverages' },
    { key: 'specials' as const, label: 'Daily Specials' },
    { key: 'sides' as const, label: 'Sides & Extras' }
  ];

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Settings className="h-5 w-5" />
            Menu Section Visibility
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
            {[...Array(6)].map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <div className="h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/3"></div>
                <div className="h-6 w-12 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Settings className="h-5 w-5" />
          Menu Section Visibility
        </CardTitle>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
          Control which menu sections are visible to customers
        </p>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {sections.map((section) => (
            <div key={section.key} className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <Label htmlFor={section.key} className="cursor-pointer">
                {section.label}
              </Label>
              <Switch
                id={section.key}
                checked={settings[section.key]}
                onCheckedChange={() => handleToggle(section.key)}
              />
            </div>
          ))}
          
          <div className="pt-4 border-t">
            <Button onClick={saveSettings} disabled={saving} className="w-full">
              <Save className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
              {saving ? 'Saving...' : 'Save Settings'}
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default MenuVisibilitySettings;

```

### `src/components/MissionSection.tsx`

import React from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Heart } from 'lucide-react';

const MissionSection = () => {
  return (
    <section className="py-16 bg-white">
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <Card className="border-0 shadow-lg">
          <CardContent className="p-8 md:p-12 text-center">
            <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
              <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-green-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                <Heart className="h-8 w-8 text-green-600" />
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Why Eat Halaal?</h2>
            
            <p className="text-lg text-gray-700 leading-relaxed mb-8">
              Eat Halaal was built out of the struggle to find authentic, verified Halaal food for my partner in South Africa. 
              This platform brings transparency, convenience, and visibility to the Halaal food space. We believe every Muslim 
              should have confidence in their dining choices and easy access to quality Halaal cuisine.
            </p>

              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gray-200 rounded-full"></div>
              <div className="text-left">
                <p className="font-medium text-gray-900">Built with love</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Founder & Team</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
};

export default MissionSection;

### `src/components/MostViewedDishes.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Eye, TrendingUp } from 'lucide-react';

interface MenuItem {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  price: number;
  category: string;
  view_count: number;
  image_url: string;
}

interface MostViewedDishesProps {
  restaurantId: string;
}

const MostViewedDishes = ({ restaurantId }: MostViewedDishesProps) => {
  const [dishes, setDishes] = useState<MenuItem[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (restaurantId) {
      fetchMostViewedDishes();
    }
  }, [restaurantId]);

  const fetchMostViewedDishes = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('menu_items')
        .select('*')
        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurantId)
        .eq('is_available', true)
        .order('view_count', { ascending: false })
        .limit(5);

      if (error) throw error;
      setDishes(data || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching most viewed dishes:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <TrendingUp className="h-5 w-5" />
            Most Viewed Dishes
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
            {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-4">
                <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
                <div className="flex-1 space-y-2">
                  <div className="h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-3/4"></div>
                  <div className="h-3 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/2"></div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <TrendingUp className="h-5 w-5" />
          Most Viewed Dishes
        </CardTitle>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        {dishes.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="text-center py-8 text-gray-500">
            <TrendingUp className="h-12 w-12 mx-auto mb-4 text-gray-300" />
            <p>No menu items available</p>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-4">
            {dishes.map((dish, index) => (
              <div key={dish.id} className="flex items-center gap-4 p-3 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg">
                <div className="flex-shrink-0">
                  <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                    {dish.image_url ? (
                      <img 
                        src={dish.image_url} 
                        alt={dish.name}
                        className="w-full h-full object-cover rounded-lg"
                      />
                    ) : (
                      <span className="text-2xl">🍽️</span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="font-medium text-gray-900">{dish.name}</h4>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 line-clamp-2">{dish.description}</p>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2">
                        <Badge variant="outline">{dish.category}</Badge>
                        <span className="text-sm font-medium text-green-600">
                          R{dish.price?.toFixed(2)}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-gray-500">
                      <Eye className="h-4 w-4" />
                      {dish.view_count}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="flex-shrink-0">
                  <Badge variant={index < 3 ? 'default' : 'secondary'}>
                    #{index + 1}
                  </Badge>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default MostViewedDishes;

```

### `src/components/MultiSelectDropdown.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Check, ChevronDown, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from '@/components/ui/popover';
import { Command, CommandEmpty, CommandGroup, CommandInput, CommandItem, CommandList } from '@/components/ui/command';

interface Option {
  value: string;
  label: string;
}

interface MultiSelectDropdownProps {
  options?: Option[];
  selectedValues?: string[];
  onSelectionChange: (values: string[]) => void;
  placeholder?: string;
  searchPlaceholder?: string;
}

const MultiSelectDropdown: React.FC<MultiSelectDropdownProps> = ({
  options = [],
  selectedValues = [],
  onSelectionChange,
  placeholder = 'Select options...',
  searchPlaceholder = 'Search options...'
}) => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);

  // Early return if no options provided
  if (!options || !Array.isArray(options) || options.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="space-y-2">
        <Button
          variant="outline"
          disabled
          className="w-full justify-between h-auto min-h-10 p-2"
        >
          <span className="text-muted-foreground">No options available</span>
          <ChevronDown className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0 opacity-50" />
        </Button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Ensure we have valid arrays after checking options exist
  const safeSelectedValues = Array.isArray(selectedValues) ? selectedValues : [];

  const handleSelect = (currentValue: string) => {
    console.log('Selecting:', currentValue);
    const newSelection = safeSelectedValues.includes(currentValue)
      ? safeSelectedValues.filter(v => v !== currentValue)
      : [...safeSelectedValues, currentValue];
    
    onSelectionChange(newSelection);
  };

  const handleRemove = (value: string, event: React.MouseEvent) => {
    event.preventDefault();
    event.stopPropagation();
    console.log('Removing:', value);
    onSelectionChange(safeSelectedValues.filter(v => v !== value));
  };

  const selectedOptions = options.filter(option => 
    option && option.value && safeSelectedValues.includes(option.value)
  );

  return (
    <div className="space-y-2">
      <Popover open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
        <PopoverTrigger asChild>
          <Button
            variant="outline"
            role="combobox"
            aria-expanded={open}
            className="w-full justify-between h-auto min-h-10 p-2 hover:bg-gray-50"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1 flex-1">
              {selectedOptions.length === 0 ? (
                <span className="text-muted-foreground">{placeholder}</span>
              ) : (
                selectedOptions.map((option) => (
                  <Badge
                    key={option.value}
                    variant="secondary"
                    className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-green-100 text-green-800 hover:bg-green-200"
                  >
                    <span>{option.label}</span>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      className="ml-1 hover:text-red-600"
                      onClick={(e) => handleRemove(option.value, e)}
                    >
                      <X className="h-3 w-3" />
                    </button>
                  </Badge>
                ))
              )}
            </div>
            <ChevronDown className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0 opacity-50" />
          </Button>
        </PopoverTrigger>
        <PopoverContent className="p-0 bg-white border shadow-lg z-[1000]" align="start" side="bottom" style={{ width: 'var(--radix-popover-trigger-width)' }}>
          <Command>
            <CommandInput 
              placeholder={searchPlaceholder} 
              className="h-9 border-0 focus:ring-0"
            />
            <CommandList className="max-h-64 overflow-y-auto">
              <CommandEmpty>No options found.</CommandEmpty>
              <CommandGroup>
                {options.map((option) => (
                  <CommandItem
                    key={option.value}
                    value={option.value}
                    onSelect={(value) => {
                      handleSelect(value);
                    }}
                    className="cursor-pointer hover:bg-accent flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2"
                  >
                    <Check
                      className={`h-4 w-4 ${
                        safeSelectedValues.includes(option.value) ? 'opacity-100 text-green-600' : 'opacity-0'
                      }`}
                    />
                    <span className="flex-1">{option.label}</span>
                  </CommandItem>
                ))}
              </CommandGroup>
            </CommandList>
          </Command>
        </PopoverContent>
      </Popover>
    </div>
  );
};

export default MultiSelectDropdown;

```

### `src/components/NearMeButton.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { MapPin, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { geolocationService } from '@/services/geolocation';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { toast } from 'sonner';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
}

interface NearMeButtonProps {
  onRestaurantsFound: (restaurants: Restaurant[]) => void;
  className?: string;
}

const NearMeButton = ({ onRestaurantsFound, className }: NearMeButtonProps) => {
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const findNearbyRestaurants = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    
    try {
      // Get user location using the correct method
      const location = await geolocationService.getCurrentLocation();
      
      if (!location) {
        toast.error('Location access is required to find nearby restaurants');
        setLoading(false);
        return;
      }

      console.log('User location:', location);

      // Query restaurants within 10km radius
      // Using Haversine formula approximation for 10km (roughly 0.09 degrees at most latitudes)
      const radius = 0.09;
      
      const { data: restaurants, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*')
        .eq('is_active', true)
        .gte('latitude', location.lat - radius)
        .lte('latitude', location.lat + radius)
        .gte('longitude', location.lng - radius)
        .lte('longitude', location.lng + radius)
        .limit(20);

      if (error) {
        console.error('Error fetching nearby restaurants:', error);
        toast.error('Failed to find nearby restaurants');
        setLoading(false);
        return;
      }

      console.log('Found nearby restaurants:', restaurants);
      onRestaurantsFound(restaurants || []);
      
      if (!restaurants || restaurants.length === 0) {
        toast.info('No restaurants found within 10km of your location');
      } else {
        toast.success(`Found ${restaurants.length} restaurants near you`);
      }
      
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error in findNearbyRestaurants:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to find nearby restaurants');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <Button
      onClick={findNearbyRestaurants}
      disabled={loading}
      variant="outline"
      className={`border-2 hover:bg-green-50 transition-colors ${className}`}
    >
      {loading ? (
        <Loader2 className="mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
      ) : (
        <MapPin className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
      )}
      {loading ? 'Finding...' : 'Near Me'}
    </Button>
  );
};

export default NearMeButton;

```

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Mail } from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner';

const NewsletterSignup = () => {
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!email) {
      toast.error('Please enter your email address');
      return;
    }

    setLoading(true);
    
    // Mock newsletter signup - replace with actual implementation
    setTimeout(() => {
      toast.success('Thanks for subscribing! You\'ll hear from us soon.');
      setEmail('');
      setLoading(false);
    }, 1000);
  };

  return (
    <section className="py-16 bg-green-50">
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <Card className="border-0 shadow-lg">
          <CardContent className="p-8 md:p-12 text-center">
            <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
              <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-green-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                <Mail className="h-8 w-8 text-green-600" />
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Stay in the loop on Halaal hotspots</h2>
            <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 mb-8">
              Get the latest restaurant additions, community reviews, and exclusive deals delivered to your inbox.
            </p>
            
            <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="max-w-md mx-auto">
              <div className="flex gap-4">
                <Input
                  type="email"
                  placeholder="Enter your email address"
                  value={email}
                  onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
                  className="flex-1"
                />
                <Button 
                  type="submit" 
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 px-8"
                >
                  {loading ? 'Subscribing...' : 'Subscribe'}
                </Button>
              </div>
            </form>
            
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-4">
              No spam, unsubscribe anytime. We respect your privacy.
            </p>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
};

export default NewsletterSignup;
