### `src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Bell, Check, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';

interface Notification {
  id: string;
  type: string;
  title: string;
  message: string;
  data: any;
  is_read: boolean;
  created_at: string;
}

const NotificationCenter = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<Notification[]>([]);
  const [unreadCount, setUnreadCount] = useState(0);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchNotifications();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchNotifications = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('notifications')
        .select('*')
        .eq('user_id', user?.id)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
        .limit(20);

      if (error) throw error;

      setNotifications(data || []);
      setUnreadCount(data?.filter(n => !n.is_read).length || 0);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching notifications:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const markAsRead = async (notificationId: string) => {
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('notifications')
        .update({ is_read: true })
        .eq('id', notificationId);

      if (error) throw error;

      setNotifications(prev => 
        prev.map(n => n.id === notificationId ? { ...n, is_read: true } : n)
      );
      setUnreadCount(prev => Math.max(0, prev - 1));
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error marking notification as read:', error);
    }
  };

  const markAllAsRead = async () => {
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('notifications')
        .update({ is_read: true })
        .eq('user_id', user?.id)
        .eq('is_read', false);

      if (error) throw error;

      setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => ({ ...n, is_read: true })));
      setUnreadCount(0);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error marking all notifications as read:', error);
    }
  };

  const getNotificationIcon = (type: string) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'review_like':
        return '❤️';
      case 'new_restaurant':
        return '🏪';
      case 'review_reply':
        return '💬';
      case 'promotion':
        return '🎉';
      default:
        return '📢';
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Bell className="h-5 w-5" />
            Notifications
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
            {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="h-16 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Bell className="h-5 w-5" />
            Notifications
            {unreadCount > 0 && (
              <Badge variant="destructive" className="ml-2">
                {unreadCount}
              </Badge>
            )}
          </CardTitle>
          {unreadCount > 0 && (
            <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={markAllAsRead}>
              <Check className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
              Mark all read
            </Button>
          )}
        </div>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        {notifications.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="text-center py-8 text-gray-500">
            <Bell className="h-12 w-12 mx-auto mb-4 text-gray-300" />
            <p>No notifications yet</p>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {notifications.map((notification) => (
              <div
                key={notification.id}
                className={`p-3 rounded-lg border transition-colors ${
                  notification.is_read 
                    ? 'bg-gray-50 border-gray-200' 
                    : 'bg-blue-50 border-blue-200'
                }`}
              >
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3 flex-1">
                    <span className="text-lg">
                      {getNotificationIcon(notification.type)}
                    </span>
                    <div className="flex-1">
                      <h4 className="font-medium text-gray-900">
                        {notification.title}
                      </h4>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">
                        {notification.message}
                      </p>
                      <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-2">
                        {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(notification.created_at), { addSuffix: true })}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  {!notification.is_read && (
                    <Button
                      variant="ghost"
                      size="sm"
                      onClick={() => markAsRead(notification.id)}
                    >
                      <Check className="h-4 w-4" />
                    </Button>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default NotificationCenter;

```

### `src/components/PasswordReset.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { Mail, ArrowLeft } from 'lucide-react';

interface PasswordResetProps {
  onBack: () => void;
}

const PasswordReset = ({ onBack }: PasswordResetProps) => {
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [sent, setSent] = useState(false);

  const handlePasswordReset = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    
    if (!email) {
      toast.error('Please enter your email address');
      return;
    }

    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase.auth.resetPasswordForEmail(email, {
        redirectTo: `${window.location.origin}/auth?type=recovery`,
      });

      if (error) {
        throw error;
      }

      setSent(true);
      toast.success('Password reset email sent! Check your inbox.');
    } catch (error: any) {
      console.error('Password reset error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to send password reset email');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  if (sent) {
    return (
      <Card className="w-full max-w-md mx-auto">
        <CardContent className="p-8 text-center">
          <Mail className="h-16 w-16 text-green-600 mx-auto mb-4" />
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Check Your Email</h2>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
            We've sent a password reset link to <strong>{email}</strong>. 
            Click the link in the email to reset your password.
          </p>
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <Button onClick={onBack} variant="outline" className="w-full">
              <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
              Back to Sign In
            </Button>
            <Button 
              onClick={() => {
                setSent(false);
                setEmail('');
              }}
              variant="ghost"
              className="w-full"
            >
              Try Different Email
            </Button>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Card className="w-full max-w-md mx-auto">
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle className="text-center">Reset Your Password</CardTitle>
        <p className="text-center text-gray-600">
          Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
        </p>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        <form onSubmit={handlePasswordReset} className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="reset-email">Email Address</Label>
            <Input
              id="reset-email"
              type="email"
              value={email}
              onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
              placeholder="Enter your email"
              required
            />
          </div>
          
          <Button 
            type="submit" 
            className="w-full" 
            disabled={loading}
          >
            {loading ? 'Sending...' : 'Send Reset Link'}
          </Button>
          
          <Button 
            type="button"
            variant="ghost" 
            className="w-full"
            onClick={onBack}
          >
            <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
            Back to Sign In
          </Button>
        </form>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default PasswordReset;

```

### `src/components/PasswordUpdate.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { Eye, EyeOff, Lock } from 'lucide-react';

interface PasswordUpdateProps {
  onSuccess: () => void;
}

const PasswordUpdate = ({ onSuccess }: PasswordUpdateProps) => {
  const [newPassword, setNewPassword] = useState('');
  const [confirmPassword, setConfirmPassword] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [showConfirmPassword, setShowConfirmPassword] = useState(false);

  const handlePasswordUpdate = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    
    if (!newPassword || !confirmPassword) {
      toast.error('Please fill in all fields');
      return;
    }

    if (newPassword.length < 6) {
      toast.error('Password must be at least 6 characters long');
      return;
    }

    if (newPassword !== confirmPassword) {
      toast.error('Passwords do not match');
      return;
    }

    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase.auth.updateUser({
        password: newPassword
      });

      if (error) {
        throw error;
      }

      toast.success('Password updated successfully! You can now sign in with your new password.');
      onSuccess();
    } catch (error: any) {
      console.error('Password update error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to update password');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <Card className="w-full max-w-md mx-auto">
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle className="text-center flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
          <Lock className="h-5 w-5" />
          Set New Password
        </CardTitle>
        <p className="text-center text-gray-600">
          Enter your new password below
        </p>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        <form onSubmit={handlePasswordUpdate} className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="new-password">New Password</Label>
            <div className="relative">
              <Input
                id="new-password"
                type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                value={newPassword}
                onChange={(e) => setNewPassword(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Enter your new password"
                required
                minLength={6}
              />
              <Button
                type="button"
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                className="absolute right-0 top-0 h-full px-3"
                onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
              >
                {showPassword ? <EyeOff className="h-4 w-4" /> : <Eye className="h-4 w-4" />}
              </Button>
            </div>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Must be at least 6 characters</p>
          </div>
          
          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="confirm-password">Confirm Password</Label>
            <div className="relative">
              <Input
                id="confirm-password"
                type={showConfirmPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                value={confirmPassword}
                onChange={(e) => setConfirmPassword(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Confirm your new password"
                required
                minLength={6}
              />
              <Button
                type="button"
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                className="absolute right-0 top-0 h-full px-3"
                onClick={() => setShowConfirmPassword(!showConfirmPassword)}
              >
                {showConfirmPassword ? <EyeOff className="h-4 w-4" /> : <Eye className="h-4 w-4" />}
              </Button>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <Button 
            type="submit" 
            className="w-full" 
            disabled={loading || !newPassword || !confirmPassword || newPassword !== confirmPassword}
          >
            {loading ? 'Updating Password...' : 'Update Password'}
          </Button>
        </form>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default PasswordUpdate;

```

### `src/components/PostManager.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Switch } from '@/components/ui/switch';
import { Plus, Calendar, Type } from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner';

interface Post {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  content: string;
  image_url: string;
  post_type: string;
  is_featured: boolean;
  created_at: string;
}

const PostManager = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [posts, setPosts] = useState<Post[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [showCreateForm, setShowCreateForm] = useState(false);
  const [newPost, setNewPost] = useState({
    title: '',
    content: '',
    image_url: '',
    post_type: 'general',
    is_featured: false
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchPosts();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchPosts = async () => {
    try {
      const { data: restaurantData } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('id')
        .eq('owner_id', user?.id)
        .single();

      if (restaurantData) {
        const { data: postsData } = await supabase
          .from('posts')
          .select('*')
          .eq('restaurant_id', restaurantData.id)
          .order('created_at', { ascending: false });

        if (postsData) {
          setPosts(postsData);
        }
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching posts:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const createPost = async () => {
    if (!newPost.content.trim()) {
      toast.error('Please enter post content');
      return;
    }

    try {
      const { data: restaurantData } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('id')
        .eq('owner_id', user?.id)
        .single();

      if (restaurantData) {
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('posts')
          .insert({
            restaurant_id: restaurantData.id,
            title: newPost.title.trim() || null,
            content: newPost.content.trim(),
            image_url: newPost.image_url.trim() || null,
            post_type: newPost.post_type,
            is_featured: newPost.is_featured
          });

        if (error) throw error;

        toast.success('Post created successfully!');
        setShowCreateForm(false);
        setNewPost({
          title: '',
          content: '',
          image_url: '',
          post_type: 'general',
          is_featured: false
        });
        fetchPosts();
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error creating post:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to create post');
    }
  };

  const deletePost = async (postId: string) => {
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('posts')
        .delete()
        .eq('id', postId);

      if (error) throw error;

      toast.success('Post deleted successfully!');
      fetchPosts();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error deleting post:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to delete post');
    }
  };

  const getPostTypeLabel = (type: string) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'promotion': return 'Promotion';
      case 'menu_update': return 'Menu Update';
      case 'event': return 'Event';
      default: return 'General';
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
        <div className="h-8 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/4"></div>
        <div className="h-32 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
        <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold">Manage Posts</h3>
        <Button onClick={() => setShowCreateForm(true)}>
          <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
          Create Post
        </Button>
      </div>

      {showCreateForm && (
        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle>Create New Post</CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-4">
            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                Title (Optional)
              </label>
              <Input
                value={newPost.title}
                onChange={(e) => setNewPost({ ...newPost, title: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="Enter post title"
              />
            </div>

            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                Content *
              </label>
              <Textarea
                value={newPost.content}
                onChange={(e) => setNewPost({ ...newPost, content: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="What's happening at your restaurant?"
                rows={4}
              />
            </div>

            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                Image URL (Optional)
              </label>
              <Input
                value={newPost.image_url}
                onChange={(e) => setNewPost({ ...newPost, image_url: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="Enter image URL"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                  Post Type
                </label>
                <Select
                  value={newPost.post_type}
                  onValueChange={(value) => setNewPost({ ...newPost, post_type: value })}
                >
                  <SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectValue />
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    <SelectItem value="general">General</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="promotion">Promotion</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="menu_update">Menu Update</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="event">Event</SelectItem>
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                <Switch
                  checked={newPost.is_featured}
                  onCheckedChange={(checked) => setNewPost({ ...newPost, is_featured: checked })}
                />
                <label className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
                  Featured Post
                </label>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex gap-2">
              <Button onClick={createPost}>Create Post</Button>
              <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setShowCreateForm(false)}>
                Cancel
              </Button>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      )}

      <div className="space-y-4">
        {posts.length > 0 ? (
          posts.map((post) => (
            <Card key={post.id}>
              <CardContent className="p-4">
                <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <Type className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
                    <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">{getPostTypeLabel(post.post_type)}</span>
                    {post.is_featured && (
                      <span className="text-xs bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 px-2 py-1 rounded">
                        Featured
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
                    <Calendar className="h-4 w-4" />
                    <span>{new Date(post.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}</span>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {post.title && (
                  <h4 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">{post.title}</h4>
                )}
                <p className="text-gray-700 mb-3">{post.content}</p>

                {post.image_url && (
                  <img 
                    src={post.image_url} 
                    alt={post.title || 'Post image'} 
                    className="w-full h-32 object-cover rounded mb-3"
                  />
                )}

                <div className="flex justify-end">
                  <Button 
                    variant="outline" 
                    size="sm" 
                    onClick={() => deletePost(post.id)}
                  >
                    Delete
                  </Button>
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          ))
        ) : (
          <Card>
            <CardContent className="text-center py-8">
              <p className="text-gray-600">No posts yet. Create your first post to engage with customers!</p>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default PostManager;

```

```tsx
};
```

### `src/components/PromotedSection.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Carousel, CarouselContent, CarouselItem, CarouselNext, CarouselPrevious } from '@/components/ui/carousel';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Star, MapPin, Crown, Shield } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatCuisineTypes, getHalaalStatus } from '@/utils/formatters';

interface PromotedRestaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  description: string;
  claim_status: string;
  is_halaal_certified?: boolean;
}

const PromotedSection = () => {
  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<PromotedRestaurant[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchPromotedRestaurants();
  }, []);

  const fetchPromotedRestaurants = async () => {
    try {
      // Fetch restaurants with active promotions
      const { data: promotionsData, error: promotionsError } = await supabase
        .from('promotions')
        .select('restaurant_id')
        .eq('status', 'active')
        .gte('end_date', new Date().toISOString());

      if (promotionsError) throw promotionsError;

      if (promotionsData && promotionsData.length > 0) {
        const restaurantIds = promotionsData.map(p => p.restaurant_id);
        
        const { data, error } = await supabase
          .from('restaurants')
          .select('id, name, city, province, cuisine_type, average_rating, total_reviews, description, claim_status, is_halaal_certified')
          .eq('is_active', true)
          .in('id', restaurantIds)
          .limit(6);

        if (error) throw error;
        setRestaurants(data || []);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching promoted restaurants:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const getPlaceholderImage = (restaurantId: string) => {
    // Food and restaurant related placeholder images
    const imageOptions = [
      'photo-1555396273-367ea4eb4db5', // restaurant interior
      'photo-1517248135467-4c7edcad34c4', // restaurant dining
      'photo-1414235077428-338989a2e8c0', // restaurant food
      'photo-1424847651672-bf20a4b0982b', // food plating
      'photo-1559339352-11d035aa65de', // restaurant kitchen
      'photo-1565299624946-b28f40a0ca4b', // food dishes
      'photo-1504674900247-0877df9cc836', // food photography
      'photo-1606787366850-de6330128bfc' // halal food
    ];
    
    const hash = restaurantId.split('').reduce((a, b) => {
      a = ((a << 5) - a) + b.charCodeAt(0);
      return a & a;
    }, 0);
    
    const imageIndex = Math.abs(hash) % imageOptions.length;
    return `https://images.unsplash.com/${imageOptions[imageIndex]}?w=400&h=300&fit=crop`;
  };

  if (loading || restaurants.length === 0) {
    return null;
  }

  return (
    <section className="py-16 bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-50 to-orange-50">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 mb-4">
            <Crown className="h-6 w-6 text-amber-600" />
            <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gradient">Promoted Restaurants</h2>
            <Crown className="h-6 w-6 text-amber-600" />
          </div>
          <p className="text-lg text-gray-600">Featured restaurants investing in our platform</p>
        </div>
        
        <Carousel className="w-full">
          <CarouselContent className="-ml-4">
            {restaurants.map((restaurant) => {
              const halaalStatus = getHalaalStatus(restaurant);
              return (
                <CarouselItem key={restaurant.id} className="pl-4 md:basis-1/2 lg:basis-1/3">
                  <Link to={`/restaurants/${restaurant.id}`}>
                    <Card className="hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow h-full border-amber-200">
                      <div className="relative">
                        <img 
                          src={getPlaceholderImage(restaurant.id)}
                          alt={restaurant.name}
                          className="aspect-video w-full object-cover rounded-t-lg"
                        />
                        <div className="absolute top-3 right-3 flex flex-col gap-1">
                          <Badge className="bg-amber-500 text-white">
                            <Crown className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                            Promoted
                          </Badge>
                          {halaalStatus.isHalaal && (
                            <Badge className={halaalStatus.badgeClass}>
                              <Shield className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                              {halaalStatus.badgeText}
                            </Badge>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <CardContent className="p-6">
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-3">
                          <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg text-gray-900 line-clamp-1">
                            {restaurant.name}
                          </h3>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                            <Star className="h-4 w-4 text-yellow-500 fill-current" />
                            <span className="text-sm font-medium">{restaurant.average_rating.toFixed(1)}</span>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-3">
                          <MapPin className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
                          <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">{restaurant.city}, {restaurant.province}</span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <Badge variant="secondary" className="mb-3 bg-green-100 text-green-800">
                          {formatCuisineTypes(restaurant.cuisine_type)}
                        </Badge>
                        
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 line-clamp-2">
                          {restaurant.description}
                        </p>
                        
                        <div className="mt-3 text-xs text-gray-500">
                          {restaurant.total_reviews} reviews
                        </div>
                      </CardContent>
                    </Card>
                  </Link>
                </CarouselItem>
              );
            })}
          </CarouselContent>
          <CarouselPrevious />
          <CarouselNext />
        </Carousel>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
};

export default PromotedSection;

```

### `src/components/QuickFilters.tsx`

```tsx

import React from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Utensils, Coffee, ShoppingBag, Star, Clock, MapPin } from 'lucide-react';

const QuickFilters = () => {
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const filters = [
    { label: 'Fast Food', icon: Utensils, filter: 'fast_food' },
    { label: 'Sit-In', icon: Coffee, filter: 'casual_dining' },
    { label: 'Takeaway', icon: ShoppingBag, filter: 'takeaway' },
    { label: 'Top Rated', icon: Star, filter: 'top_rated' },
    { label: 'Newest', icon: Clock, filter: 'newest' },
    { label: 'Near Me', icon: MapPin, filter: 'near_me' },
  ];

  const handleFilterClick = (filter: string) => {
    if (filter === 'top_rated') {
      navigate('/restaurants?sort=rating');
    } else if (filter === 'newest') {
      navigate('/restaurants?sort=newest');
    } else if (filter === 'near_me') {
      navigate('/restaurants?location=nearby');
    } else {
      navigate(`/restaurants?type=${filter}`);
    }
  };

  return (
    <section className="py-8 bg-white">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <div className="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-4">
          {filters.map((filter) => (
            <Button
              key={filter.label}
              variant="outline"
              onClick={() => handleFilterClick(filter.filter)}
              className="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 rounded-full border-2 border-green-300 text-green-700 hover:bg-green-50 hover:text-green-800 hover:border-green-400 transition-all"
            >
              <filter.icon className="h-4 w-4" />
              {filter.label}
            </Button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
};

export default QuickFilters;

```

```tsx
import React from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Clock, Zap } from 'lucide-react';

interface RecentActivity {
  id: string;
  action: string;
  points: number;
  timestamp: string;
  icon: any;
}

interface RecentActivityCardProps {
  activities: RecentActivity[];
}

const RecentActivityCard = ({ activities }: RecentActivityCardProps) => {
  return (
    <Card className="bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-emerald-50 border-green-200 animate-fade-in">
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-green-800">
          <Clock className="h-5 w-5" />
          Recent Activity
        </CardTitle>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        <div className="space-y-3 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto">
          {activities.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="text-center py-4 text-green-600">
              <p className="text-sm">No recent activity</p>
              <p className="text-xs mt-1">Start reviewing to earn XP! 🍴</p>
            </div>
          ) : (
            activities.map((activity) => {
              const IconComponent = activity.icon;
              return (
                <div key={activity.id} className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 bg-white rounded-lg border border-green-100 hover:shadow-sm transition-shadow animate-slide-in-right">
                  <div className="flex-shrink-0">
                    <IconComponent className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600" />
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                    <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900 line-clamp-1">
                      {activity.action}
                    </p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{activity.timestamp}</p>
                  </div>
                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs text-green-600 border-green-200 flex items-center gap-1">
                    <Zap className="h-3 w-3" />
                    +{activity.points}
                  </Badge>
                </div>
              );
            })
          )}
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default RecentActivityCard;

```

### `src/components/RecentReviews.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Star, Heart, MessageSquare, Image as ImageIcon } from 'lucide-react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { formatCuisineTypes } from '@/utils/formatters';

interface Review {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  content: string;
  rating: number;
  photos: string[];
  created_at: string;
  user: {
    id: string;
    full_name: string;
    avatar_url?: string;
  };
  restaurant: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    city: string;
    cuisine_type?: string;
  };
  likes_count: number;
}

const RecentReviews = () => {
  const [reviews, setReviews] = useState<Review[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchRecentReviews();
  }, []);

  const fetchRecentReviews = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('reviews')
        .select(`
          id,
          title,
          content,
          rating,
          photos,
          created_at,
          user:profiles!reviews_user_id_fkey(id, full_name, avatar_url),
          restaurant:restaurants(id, name, city, cuisine_type)
        `)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
        .limit(3);

      if (error) throw error;

      // Get like counts for each review
      const reviewsWithLikes = await Promise.all(
        (data || []).map(async (review) => {
          const { data: likesData } = await supabase
            .from('review_likes')
            .select('user_id')
            .eq('review_id', review.id);

          return {
            ...review,
            likes_count: likesData?.length || 0
          };
        })
      );

      setReviews(reviewsWithLikes);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching recent reviews:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <section className="py-16 bg-white">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-center mb-12 text-gradient">Recent Reviews</h2>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
            {[...Array(6)].map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="h-48 bg-gray-200 rounded-lg animate-pulse"></div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    );
  }

  if (reviews.length === 0) {
    return null;
  }

  return (
    <section className="py-16 bg-white">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gradient mb-4">Recent Reviews</h2>
          <p className="text-gray-600">See what our community is saying about their latest dining experiences</p>
        </div>
        
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {reviews.map((review) => (
            <Card key={review.id} className="hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200">
              <CardContent className="p-6">
                {/* User and Restaurant Info */}
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-green-400 to-amber-400 flex items-center justify-center text-white font-semibold">
                      {review.user.full_name?.[0] || 'U'}
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="font-medium text-sm">{review.user.full_name}</p>
                      <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                        {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(review.created_at), { addSuffix: true })}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex">
                    {[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => (
                      <Star
                        key={i}
                        className={`h-4 w-4 ${
                          i < review.rating ? 'text-yellow-400 fill-current' : 'text-gray-300'
                        }`}
                      />
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Restaurant Link */}
                <Link 
                  to={`/restaurant/${review.restaurant.id}`}
                  className="block mb-3"
                >
                  <h3 className="font-semibold text-green-600 hover:text-green-700 line-clamp-1">
                    {review.restaurant.name}
                  </h3>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">{review.restaurant.city}</p>
                </Link>

                {/* Review Title */}
                {review.title && (
                  <h4 className="font-medium mb-2 line-clamp-1 text-gradient">
                    {review.title}
                  </h4>
                )}

                {/* Review Content */}
                {review.content && (
                  <p className="text-gray-700 text-sm mb-3 line-clamp-3">
                    {review.content}
                  </p>
                )}

                {/* Review Photos Preview */}
                {review.photos && review.photos.length > 0 && (
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 mb-3">
                    {review.photos.slice(0, 3).map((photo, index) => (
                      <img
                        key={index}
                        src={photo}
                        alt={`Review photo ${index + 1}`}
                        className="w-full h-20 object-cover rounded-md"
                        onError={(e) => {
                          e.currentTarget.style.display = 'none';
                        }}
                      />
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}

                {/* Review Stats */}
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                    {review.photos?.length > 0 && (
                      <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-gray-500">
                        <ImageIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
                        {review.photos.length}
                      </span>
                    )}
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-gray-500">
                      <Heart className="h-4 w-4" />
                      {review.likes_count}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  {review.restaurant.cuisine_type && (
                    <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                      {formatCuisineTypes(review.restaurant.cuisine_type)}
                    </Badge>
                  )}
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          ))}
        </div>

        <div className="text-center mt-8">
          <Link to="/restaurants">
            <Badge className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 cursor-pointer px-6 py-2">
              View All Reviews
            </Badge>
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
};

export default RecentReviews;
```

### `src/components/RecoveryRedirect.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useEffect } from 'react';
import { useLocation, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';

/**
 * Globally redirects any incoming Supabase recovery links to the Auth page.
 * Handles both search (?type=recovery) and hash (#...&type=recovery) params.
 */
const RecoveryRedirect: React.FC = () => {
  const location = useLocation();
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  useEffect(() => {
    // Parse both search params and hash params for `type=recovery`
    const searchParams = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
    const hashParams = new URLSearchParams((location.hash || '').replace('#', '?'));

    const typeFromSearch = searchParams.get('type');
    const typeFromHash = hashParams.get('type');
    const isRecovery = typeFromSearch === 'recovery' || typeFromHash === 'recovery';

    // If we detect a recovery link and we're not on /auth, redirect there and preserve the hash
    if (isRecovery && location.pathname !== '/auth') {
      // Preserve Supabase hash tokens to keep the session intact
      const hash = location.hash || '';
      navigate(`/auth?type=recovery${hash}`, { replace: true });
    }
  }, [location, navigate]);

  return null;
};

export default RecoveryRedirect;

```

### `src/components/RestaurantBadges.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Shield, Star, CheckCircle, MapPin } from 'lucide-react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { formatCuisineTypes, getHalaalStatus } from '@/utils/formatters';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  is_verified: boolean;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  description: string;
}

const RestaurantBadges = () => {
  const [featuredRestaurants, setFeaturedRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchFeaturedRestaurants();
  }, []);

  const fetchFeaturedRestaurants = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('id, name, city, province, cuisine_type, is_halaal_certified, is_verified, average_rating, total_reviews, description')
        .eq('is_active', true)
        .order('average_rating', { ascending: false })
        .limit(6);

      if (error) throw error;
      setFeaturedRestaurants(data || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching featured restaurants:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const getPlaceholderImage = (restaurantId: string) => {
    // Food and restaurant related placeholder images
    const imageOptions = [
      'photo-1555396273-367ea4eb4db5', // restaurant interior
      'photo-1517248135467-4c7edcad34c4', // restaurant dining
      'photo-1414235077428-338989a2e8c0', // restaurant food
      'photo-1424847651672-bf20a4b0982b', // food plating
      'photo-1559339352-11d035aa65de', // restaurant kitchen
      'photo-1565299624946-b28f40a0ca4b', // food dishes
      'photo-1504674900247-0877df9cc836', // food photography
      'photo-1606787366850-de6330128bfc' // halal food
    ];
    
    const hash = restaurantId.split('').reduce((a, b) => {
      a = ((a << 5) - a) + b.charCodeAt(0);
      return a & a;
    }, 0);
    
    const imageIndex = Math.abs(hash) % imageOptions.length;
    return `https://images.unsplash.com/${imageOptions[imageIndex]}?w=400&h=300&fit=crop`;
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <section className="py-16 bg-gray-50">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <div className="text-center mb-12">
            <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Featured Restaurants</h2>
            <div className="animate-pulse">Loading restaurants...</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    );
  }

  return (
    <section className="py-16 bg-gray-50">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Featured Restaurants</h2>
          <p className="text-gray-600 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
            Discover top-rated halaal restaurants in your area with verified certifications and authentic reviews.
          </p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {featuredRestaurants.map((restaurant) => {
            const halaalStatus = getHalaalStatus(restaurant);
            return (
              <Link key={restaurant.id} to={`/restaurant/${restaurant.id}`}>
                <Card className="hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow h-full border-green-100">
                  <div className="relative">
                    <img 
                      src={getPlaceholderImage(restaurant.id)}
                      alt={restaurant.name}
                      className="aspect-video w-full object-cover rounded-t-lg"
                    />
                    <div className="absolute top-3 right-3 flex flex-col gap-1">
                      {halaalStatus.isHalaal && (
                        <Badge className={halaalStatus.badgeClass}>
                          <Shield className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                          {halaalStatus.badgeText}
                        </Badge>
                      )}
                      {restaurant.is_verified && (
                        <Badge className="bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">
                          <CheckCircle className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                          Verified
                        </Badge>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <CardContent className="p-6">
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-3">
                      <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg text-gray-900 line-clamp-1">
                        {restaurant.name}
                      </h3>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                        <Star className="h-4 w-4 text-yellow-500 fill-current" />
                        <span className="text-sm font-medium">{restaurant.average_rating.toFixed(1)}</span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-3">
                      <MapPin className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">{restaurant.city}, {restaurant.province}</span>
                    </div>
                    
                    <Badge variant="secondary" className="mb-3 bg-green-100 text-green-800">
                      {formatCuisineTypes(restaurant.cuisine_type)}
                    </Badge>
                    
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 line-clamp-2">
                      {restaurant.description}
                    </p>
                    
                    <div className="mt-3 text-xs text-gray-500">
                      {restaurant.total_reviews} reviews
                    </div>
                  </CardContent>
                </Card>
              </Link>
            );
          })}
        </div>

        <div className="text-center mt-8">
          <Link 
            to="/restaurants" 
            className="inline-flex items-center px-6 py-3 bg-green-600 text-white font-medium rounded-lg hover:bg-green-700 transition-colors"
          >
            View All Restaurants
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
};

export default RestaurantBadges;

```

```tsx
  );
};

export default RestaurantCTABlock;
```

### `src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx`

```tsx

import React from 'react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Star, MapPin, Shield, CheckCircle } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatCuisineTypes, getHalaalStatus } from '@/utils/formatters';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  phone: string;
  email: string;
  website: string;
  restaurant_type: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  price_range: string;
  is_verified: boolean;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  certification_body?: string;
  halaal_certificate_url?: string;
  image_url?: string;
}

interface RestaurantCardProps {
  restaurant: Restaurant;
  onFavoriteClick?: (restaurantId: string) => void;
  isFavorite?: boolean;
  showClaimButton?: boolean;
  onClaimClick?: (restaurantId: string) => void;
}

const RestaurantCard = ({ restaurant, onFavoriteClick, isFavorite, showClaimButton, onClaimClick }: RestaurantCardProps) => {
  const getPlaceholderImage = (restaurantId: string) => {
    // Food and restaurant related placeholder images
    const imageOptions = [
      'photo-1555396273-367ea4eb4db5', // restaurant interior
      'photo-1517248135467-4c7edcad34c4', // restaurant dining
      'photo-1414235077428-338989a2e8c0', // restaurant food
      'photo-1424847651672-bf20a4b0982b', // food plating
      'photo-1559339352-11d035aa65de', // restaurant kitchen
      'photo-1565299624946-b28f40a0ca4b', // food dishes
      'photo-1504674900247-0877df9cc836', // food photography
      'photo-1606787366850-de6330128bfc' // halal food
    ];
    
    const hash = restaurantId.split('').reduce((a, b) => {
      a = ((a << 5) - a) + b.charCodeAt(0);
      return a & a;
    }, 0);
    
    const imageIndex = Math.abs(hash) % imageOptions.length;
    return `https://images.unsplash.com/${imageOptions[imageIndex]}?w=400&h=300&fit=crop`;
  };

  const halaalStatus = getHalaalStatus(restaurant);

  const handleClaimClick = (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    if (onClaimClick) {
      onClaimClick(restaurant.id);
    }
  };

  const cardContent = (
    <Card className="hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow h-full border-green-100">
        <div className="relative">
          <img 
            src={restaurant.image_url || getPlaceholderImage(restaurant.id)}
            alt={restaurant.name}
            className="aspect-video w-full object-cover rounded-t-lg"
          />
          <div className="absolute top-3 right-3 flex flex-col gap-1">
            {halaalStatus.isHalaal && (
              <Badge className={halaalStatus.badgeClass}>
                <Shield className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                {halaalStatus.badgeText}
              </Badge>
            )}
            {restaurant.is_verified && (
              <Badge className="bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">
                <CheckCircle className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                Verified
              </Badge>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
        <CardContent className="p-6">
          <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-3">
            <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg text-gray-900 line-clamp-1">
              {restaurant.name}
            </h3>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
              <Star className="h-4 w-4 text-yellow-500 fill-current" />
              <span className="text-sm font-medium">{restaurant.average_rating.toFixed(1)}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-3">
            <MapPin className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">{restaurant.city}, {restaurant.province}</span>
          </div>
          
          <Badge variant="secondary" className="mb-3 bg-green-100 text-green-800">
            {formatCuisineTypes(restaurant.cuisine_type)}
          </Badge>
          
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 line-clamp-2">
            {restaurant.description}
          </p>
          
          <div className="mt-3 flex items-center justify-between">
            <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">
              {restaurant.total_reviews} reviews
            </div>
            {showClaimButton && (
              <Button 
                onClick={handleClaimClick}
                size="sm"
                className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white"
              >
                Claim
              </Button>
            )}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
  );

  return showClaimButton ? (
    <div>{cardContent}</div>
  ) : (
    <Link to={`/restaurant/${restaurant.id}`}>{cardContent}</Link>
  );
};

export default RestaurantCard;

```

### `src/components/RestaurantClaimBanner.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Shield, CheckCircle } from 'lucide-react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';

interface RestaurantClaimBannerProps {
  restaurantId: string;
  restaurantName: string;
  isOwnerVerified?: boolean;
}

const RestaurantClaimBanner = ({ 
  restaurantId, 
  restaurantName, 
  isOwnerVerified = false 
}: RestaurantClaimBannerProps) => {
  const [hasApprovedClaim, setHasApprovedClaim] = useState(false);
  const [certificationInfo, setCertificationInfo] = useState<{
    body: string;
    expiryDate: string;
  } | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const checkApprovedClaim = async () => {
      try {
        const { data: claims, error } = await supabase
          .from('restaurant_claims')
          .select('status, halaal_certificate_expiry_date')
          .eq('restaurant_id', restaurantId)
          .eq('status', 'approved')
          .single();

        if (!error && claims) {
          setHasApprovedClaim(true);
          
          // Get restaurant info for certification body
          const { data: restaurant } = await supabase
            .from('restaurants')
            .select('halaal_certificate_expiry_date')
            .eq('id', restaurantId)
            .single();

          if (restaurant && restaurant.halaal_certificate_expiry_date) {
            setCertificationInfo({
              body: 'SANHA', // Default to SANHA, could be made dynamic
              expiryDate: restaurant.halaal_certificate_expiry_date
            });
          }
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error checking claim status:', error);
      }
    };

    checkApprovedClaim();
  }, [restaurantId]);

  if (hasApprovedClaim && certificationInfo) {
    return (
      <Card className="bg-green-50 border-green-200">
        <CardContent className="p-4">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <CheckCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600" />
            <div>
              <p className="font-medium text-green-900">Halaal Certification</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-green-700">
                Verified by {certificationInfo.body}
              </p>
              <p className="text-sm text-green-700">
                Certificate valid until: {new Date(certificationInfo.expiryDate).toLocaleDateString()}
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  if (isOwnerVerified) {
    return (
      <Card className="bg-green-50 border-green-200">
        <CardContent className="p-4">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <CheckCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600" />
            <div>
              <p className="font-medium text-green-900">Verified Restaurant</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-green-700">This restaurant has been verified by the owner</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Card className="bg-blue-50 border-blue-200">
      <CardContent className="p-4">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <Shield className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-600" />
            <div>
              <p className="font-medium text-blue-900">Are you the owner of {restaurantName}?</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-blue-700">Claim your restaurant to manage your listing and unlock premium features</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <Link to={`/claim-restaurant/${restaurantId}`}>
            <Button variant="outline" className="border-blue-300 text-blue-700 hover:bg-blue-100">
              Claim Restaurant
            </Button>
          </Link>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default RestaurantClaimBanner;

```

### `src/components/RestaurantClaimForm.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import FileUpload from '@/components/ui/file-upload';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { Shield, Upload, Calendar, Phone, Mail, FileText } from 'lucide-react';

const RestaurantClaimForm = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    businessEmail: '',
    businessPhone: '',
    halalCertificateUrl: '',
    proofOfOwnershipUrl: '',
    halalCertificateExpiryDate: '',
    additionalNotes: '',
    certificationBody: 'SANHA'
  });

  const handleInputChange = (field: string, value: string) => {
    setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [field]: value }));
  };

  const handleFileUpload = (field: string, file: File | null, url: string) => {
    setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [field]: url }));
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    
    if (!user) {
      toast.error('Please log in to submit a claim');
      return;
    }

    if (!formData.businessEmail || !formData.businessPhone || !formData.halalCertificateUrl) {
      toast.error('Please fill in all required fields');
      return;
    }

    setLoading(true);
    
    try {
      // Get restaurant ID from URL params
      const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
      const restaurantId = urlParams.get('restaurantId');
      
      if (!restaurantId) {
        toast.error('Restaurant ID is required');
        return;
      }

      console.log('Submitting claim for restaurant:', restaurantId);

      // First, update the restaurant status to "pending"
      const { error: restaurantUpdateError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .update({ claim_status: 'pending' })
        .eq('id', restaurantId);

      if (restaurantUpdateError) {
        console.error('Error updating restaurant status:', restaurantUpdateError);
        toast.error('Failed to update restaurant status');
        return;
      }

      console.log('Restaurant status updated to pending');

      // Then submit the claim
      const claimData = {
        restaurant_id: restaurantId,
        user_id: user.id,
        business_email: formData.businessEmail,
        business_phone: formData.businessPhone,
        halaal_certificate_url: formData.halalCertificateUrl,
        proof_of_ownership_url: formData.proofOfOwnershipUrl || null,
        halaal_certificate_expiry_date: formData.halalCertificateExpiryDate || null,
        additional_notes: formData.additionalNotes || null,
        certification_body: formData.certificationBody,
        status: 'pending'
      };

      console.log('Submitting claim data:', claimData);

      const { error: claimError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_claims')
        .insert([claimData]);

      if (claimError) {
        console.error('Claim submission error:', claimError);
        
        // If claim submission fails, revert restaurant status back to unclaimed
        await supabase
          .from('restaurants')
          .update({ claim_status: 'unclaimed' })
          .eq('id', restaurantId);
        
        toast.error(`Failed to submit claim: ${claimError.message}`);
        return;
      }

      console.log('Claim submitted successfully');
      toast.success('Restaurant claim submitted successfully! You will be notified once reviewed.');
      navigate('/restaurant-dashboard');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Unexpected error:', error);
      toast.error('An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto space-y-8">
      <div className="text-center">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
          <Shield className="h-8 w-8 text-green-600 mr-3" />
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gradient">Claim Your Restaurant</h1>
        </div>
        <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 mb-8">
          Verify your ownership and get access to restaurant management features
        </p>
      </div>

      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Restaurant Ownership Claim</CardTitle>
          <p className="text-gray-600">
            Please provide the required information to verify your restaurant ownership.
            All fields marked with * are required.
          </p>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-6">
            {/* Business Contact Information */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label htmlFor="businessEmail" className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <Mail className="h-4 w-4" />
                  Business Email *
                </Label>
                <Input
                  id="businessEmail"
                  type="email"
                  placeholder="restaurant@example.com"
                  value={formData.businessEmail}
                  onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('businessEmail', e.target.value)}
                  required
                />
              </div>
              
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label htmlFor="businessPhone" className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <Phone className="h-4 w-4" />
                  Business Phone *
                </Label>
                <Input
                  id="businessPhone"
                  type="tel"
                  placeholder="+27 11 123 4567"
                  value={formData.businessPhone}
                  onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('businessPhone', e.target.value)}
                  required
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Certification Body */}
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="certificationBody">Halaal Certification Body *</Label>
              <Select 
                value={formData.certificationBody} 
                onValueChange={(value) => handleInputChange('certificationBody', value)}
              >
                <SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectValue placeholder="Select certification body" />
                </SelectTrigger>
                <SelectContent>
                  <SelectItem value="SANHA">SANHA (South African National Halaal Authority)</SelectItem>
                  <SelectItem value="MJC">MJC (Muslim Judicial Council)</SelectItem>
                  <SelectItem value="NIHT">NIHT (National Independent Halaal Trust)</SelectItem>
                  <SelectItem value="ICSA">ICSA (Islamic Council of South Africa)</SelectItem>
                  <SelectItem value="NHIF">NHIF (National Halaal Industry Forum)</SelectItem>
                  <SelectItem value="Other">Other</SelectItem>
                </SelectContent>
              </Select>
            </div>

            {/* Halaal Certificate Upload */}
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <FileUpload
                id="halalCertificate"
                label="Halaal Certificate *"
                description="Upload your current halaal certificate (Image or PDF, max 5MB)"
                accept="image/*,.pdf"
                value={formData.halalCertificateUrl}
                onChange={(file, url) => handleFileUpload('halalCertificateUrl', file, url)}
                required
              />
            </div>

            {/* Certificate Expiry Date */}
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="expiryDate" className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <Calendar className="h-4 w-4" />
                Certificate Expiry Date
              </Label>
              <Input
                id="expiryDate"
                type="date"
                value={formData.halalCertificateExpiryDate}
                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('halalCertificateExpiryDate', e.target.value)}
              />
            </div>

            {/* Proof of Ownership */}
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <FileUpload
                id="proofOfOwnership"
                label="Proof of Ownership (Optional)"
                description="Business license, lease agreement, or other ownership documents"
                accept="image/*,.pdf"
                value={formData.proofOfOwnershipUrl}
                onChange={(file, url) => handleFileUpload('proofOfOwnershipUrl', file, url)}
              />
            </div>

            {/* Additional Notes */}
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="notes">Additional Notes</Label>
              <Textarea
                id="notes"
                placeholder="Any additional information that might help verify your ownership..."
                value={formData.additionalNotes}
                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('additionalNotes', e.target.value)}
                rows={4}
              />
            </div>

            {/* Submit Button */}
            <div className="flex gap-4 pt-6">
              <Button
                type="button"
                variant="outline"
                onClick={() => navigate('/restaurants')}
                className="flex-1"
              >
                Cancel
              </Button>
              <Button
                type="submit"
                disabled={loading || !formData.businessEmail || !formData.businessPhone || !formData.halalCertificateUrl}
                className="flex-1 bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700"
              >
                {loading ? 'Submitting...' : 'Submit Claim'}
              </Button>
            </div>
          </form>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Information Card */}
      <Card className="bg-blue-50 border-blue-200">
        <CardContent className="p-6">
          <h3 className="font-semibold text-blue-900 mb-4">What happens next?</h3>
          <div className="space-y-2 text-blue-700">
            <p>• Our team will review your submission within 2-3 business days</p>
            <p>• We'll verify your halaal certification and ownership documents</p>
            <p>• You'll receive an email notification once your claim is processed</p>
            <p>• Upon approval, you'll gain access to restaurant management features</p>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
};

export default RestaurantClaimForm;

```

### `src/components/RestaurantVerificationManager.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from '@/components/ui/table';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { Shield, CheckCircle, XCircle, Clock, MapPin, Phone, Mail } from 'lucide-react';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  phone: string | null;
  email: string | null;
  cuisine_type: string | null;
  is_verified: boolean;
  verification_status: string;
  verification_notes: string | null;
  halaal_certificate_image_url: string | null;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  created_at: string;
  owner_id: string | null;
}

const RestaurantVerificationManager = () => {
  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [selectedRestaurant, setSelectedRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);
  const [verificationNotes, setVerificationNotes] = useState('');
  const [verificationStatus, setVerificationStatus] = useState<'pending' | 'verified' | 'rejected'>('pending');

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchRestaurants();
  }, []);

  const fetchRestaurants = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('*')
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });

      if (error) throw error;
      setRestaurants(data || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching restaurants:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to fetch restaurants');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleVerificationUpdate = async (restaurantId: string) => {
    if (!selectedRestaurant) return;

    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .update({
          verification_status: verificationStatus,
          verification_notes: verificationNotes,
          is_verified: verificationStatus === 'verified'
        })
        .eq('id', restaurantId);

      if (error) throw error;

      toast.success('Verification status updated successfully');
      setSelectedRestaurant(null);
      setVerificationNotes('');
      setVerificationStatus('pending');
      fetchRestaurants();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error updating verification:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to update verification status');
    }
  };

  const getStatusBadge = (status: string, isVerified: boolean) => {
    if (isVerified && status === 'verified') {
      return <Badge className="bg-green-100 text-green-800"><CheckCircle className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />Verified</Badge>;
    } else if (status === 'rejected') {
      return <Badge variant="destructive"><XCircle className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />Rejected</Badge>;
    } else {
      return <Badge variant="secondary"><Clock className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />Pending</Badge>;
    }
  };

  const getPendingCount = () => {
    return restaurants.filter(r => r.verification_status === 'pending').length;
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-96">
        <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-32 w-32 border-b-2 border-green-600"></div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Stats */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
              <Clock className="h-5 w-5 text-orange-600" />
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">Pending</p>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold">{getPendingCount()}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
              <CheckCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600" />
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">Verified</p>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold">
                  {restaurants.filter(r => r.is_verified).length}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
              <XCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-red-600" />
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">Rejected</p>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold">
                  {restaurants.filter(r => r.verification_status === 'rejected').length}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
              <Shield className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-600" />
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">Total</p>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold">{restaurants.length}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>

      {/* Restaurants Table */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Restaurant Verification Queue</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <Table>
            <TableHeader>
              <TableRow>
                <TableHead>Restaurant</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Location</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Contact</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Halaal Certified</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Status</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Actions</TableHead>
              </TableRow>
            </TableHeader>
            <TableBody>
              {restaurants.map((restaurant) => (
                <TableRow key={restaurant.id}>
                  <TableCell>
                    <div>
                      <p className="font-medium">{restaurant.name}</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">{restaurant.cuisine_type}</p>
                    </div>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      <MapPin className="h-3 w-3 text-gray-400" />
                      <span className="text-sm">{restaurant.city}, {restaurant.province}</span>
                    </div>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <div className="space-y-1">
                      {restaurant.phone && (
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                          <Phone className="h-3 w-3 text-gray-400" />
                          <span className="text-sm">{restaurant.phone}</span>
                        </div>
                      )}
                      {restaurant.email && (
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                          <Mail className="h-3 w-3 text-gray-400" />
                          <span className="text-sm">{restaurant.email}</span>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    {restaurant.is_halaal_certified ? (
                      <Badge className="bg-green-100 text-green-800">Yes</Badge>
                    ) : (
                      <Badge variant="outline">No</Badge>
                    )}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    {getStatusBadge(restaurant.verification_status, restaurant.is_verified)}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <Button
                      variant="outline"
                      size="sm"
                      onClick={() => {
                        setSelectedRestaurant(restaurant);
                        setVerificationStatus(restaurant.verification_status as any);
                        setVerificationNotes(restaurant.verification_notes || '');
                      }}
                    >
                      Review
                    </Button>
                  </TableCell>
                </TableRow>
              ))}
            </TableBody>
          </Table>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Verification Modal */}
      {selectedRestaurant && (
        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle>Review Restaurant: {selectedRestaurant.name}</CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-4">
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div>
                <h4 className="font-medium mb-2">Restaurant Details</h4>
                <div className="space-y-2 text-sm">
                  <p><strong>Name:</strong> {selectedRestaurant.name}</p>
                  <p><strong>Address:</strong> {selectedRestaurant.address}</p>
                  <p><strong>City:</strong> {selectedRestaurant.city}, {selectedRestaurant.province}</p>
```
