```tsx
                  <p><strong>Cuisine:</strong> {selectedRestaurant.cuisine_type || 'Not specified'}</p>
                  <p><strong>Phone:</strong> {selectedRestaurant.phone || 'Not provided'}</p>
                  <p><strong>Email:</strong> {selectedRestaurant.email || 'Not provided'}</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              <div>
                <h4 className="font-medium mb-2">Halaal Certification</h4>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <p className="text-sm">
                    <strong>Certified:</strong> {selectedRestaurant.is_halaal_certified ? 'Yes' : 'No'}
                  </p>
                  {selectedRestaurant.halaal_certificate_image_url && (
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm font-medium mb-2">Certificate:</p>
                      <img 
                        src={selectedRestaurant.halaal_certificate_image_url} 
                        alt="Halaal Certificate" 
                        className="w-full max-w-sm rounded border"
                      />
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Verification Status</label>
                <Select value={verificationStatus} onValueChange={(value: 'pending' | 'verified' | 'rejected') => setVerificationStatus(value)}>
                  <SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectValue />
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    <SelectItem value="pending">Pending Review</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="verified">Verified</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="rejected">Rejected</SelectItem>
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Verification Notes</label>
                <Textarea
                  value={verificationNotes}
                  onChange={(e) => setVerificationNotes(e.target.value)}
                  placeholder="Add notes about the verification decision..."
                  rows={3}
                />
              </div>

              <div className="flex gap-2 justify-end">
                <Button
                  variant="outline"
                  onClick={() => {
                    setSelectedRestaurant(null);
                    setVerificationNotes('');
                    setVerificationStatus('pending');
                  }}
                >
                  Cancel
                </Button>
                <Button
                  onClick={() => handleVerificationUpdate(selectedRestaurant.id)}
                  className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700"
                >
                  Update Status
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default RestaurantVerificationManager;

```

### `src/components/ReviewCard.tsx`

```tsx

import React from 'react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Star, Image, Video, ExternalLink } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatCuisineTypes, formatPriceRange, getHalaalStatus } from '@/utils/formatters';

interface Review {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  content: string;
  rating: number;
  photos: string[];
  tiktok_url: string;
  created_at: string;
  restaurants: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    cuisine_type?: string;
    price_range?: string;
    is_halaal_certified?: boolean;
    certification_body?: string;
    halaal_certificate_url?: string;
  };
  likes_count: number;
}

interface ReviewCardProps {
  review: Review;
  restaurantImage?: string;
}

const ReviewCard = ({ review, restaurantImage }: ReviewCardProps) => {
  const getPlaceholderImage = (restaurantId: string) => {
    const imageOptions = [
      'photo-1555396273-367ea4eb4db5',
      'photo-1517248135467-4c7edcad34c4',
      'photo-1414235077428-338989a2e8c0',
      'photo-1424847651672-bf20a4b0982b',
      'photo-1559339352-11d035aa65de',
      'photo-1565299624946-b28f40a0ca4b'
    ];
    
    const hash = restaurantId.split('').reduce((a, b) => {
      a = ((a << 5) - a) + b.charCodeAt(0);
      return a & a;
    }, 0);
    
    const imageIndex = Math.abs(hash) % imageOptions.length;
    return `https://images.unsplash.com/${imageOptions[imageIndex]}?w=300&h=200&fit=crop`;
  };

  const halaalStatus = getHalaalStatus(review.restaurants);

  return (
    <Card className="hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200 animate-fade-in">
      <CardContent className="p-0">
        <div className="flex gap-4 p-4">
          {/* Restaurant Cover Image */}
          <div className="flex-shrink-0 relative">
            <img
              src={restaurantImage || getPlaceholderImage(review.restaurants.id)}
              alt={review.restaurants.name}
              className="w-24 h-16 md:w-32 md:h-20 object-cover rounded-lg"
            />
            {/* Halaal Badge on Image */}
            {halaalStatus.isHalaal && (
              <div className="absolute -top-1 -right-1">
                <Badge className={`${halaalStatus.badgeClass} border text-xs px-1 py-0`}>
                  {halaalStatus.badgeText === 'Community Verified' ? 'CV' : 'H'}
                </Badge>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Review Content */}
          <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-2">
              <div className="flex-1">
                <Link 
                  to={`/restaurant/${review.restaurants.id}`}
                  className="font-semibold text-gradient hover:opacity-80 line-clamp-1 text-sm md:text-base"
                >
                  {review.restaurants.name}
                </Link>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
                  <div className="flex">
                    {[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => (
                      <Star
                        key={i}
                        className={`h-3 w-3 md:h-4 md:w-4 ${
                          i < review.rating ? 'text-yellow-400 fill-current' : 'text-gray-300'
                        }`}
                      />
                    ))}
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-xs md:text-sm text-gray-500">
                    {new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {review.title && (
              <h4 className="font-medium mb-1 line-clamp-1 text-sm md:text-base text-gradient">
                {review.title}
              </h4>
            )}

            {review.content && (
              <p className="text-gray-700 text-xs md:text-sm mb-2 line-clamp-2">
                {review.content}
              </p>
            )}

            {/* Review Photos Preview */}
            {review.photos && review.photos.length > 0 && (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-1 mb-2">
                {review.photos.slice(0, 2).map((photo, index) => (
                  <img
                    key={index}
                    src={photo}
                    alt={`Review photo ${index + 1}`}
                    className="w-full h-16 object-cover rounded-md"
                    onError={(e) => {
                      e.currentTarget.style.display = 'none';
                    }}
                  />
                ))}
              </div>
            )}

            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
                {review.photos?.length > 0 && (
                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                    <Image className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                    {review.photos.length}
                  </Badge>
                )}
                {review.tiktok_url && (
                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                    <Video className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                    TikTok
                  </Badge>
                )}
                {review.restaurants.cuisine_type && (
                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                    {formatCuisineTypes(review.restaurants.cuisine_type)}
                  </Badge>
                )}
                {review.restaurants.price_range && (
                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                    {formatPriceRange(review.restaurants.price_range)}
                  </Badge>
                )}
                <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-gradient font-medium">
                  ❤️ {review.likes_count || 0}
                </span>
              </div>
              <Link to={`/restaurant/${review.restaurants.id}`}>
                <Badge className="text-xs bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 cursor-pointer">
                  <ExternalLink className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                  View
                </Badge>
              </Link>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default ReviewCard;

```

### `src/components/ReviewLikeButton.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Heart } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { toast } from 'sonner';

interface ReviewLikeButtonProps {
  reviewId: string;
  className?: string;
}

const ReviewLikeButton = ({ reviewId, className = '' }: ReviewLikeButtonProps) => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [isLiked, setIsLiked] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchLikeStatus();
  }, [reviewId, user]);

  const fetchLikeStatus = async () => {
    if (!user || !reviewId) return;

    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('user_liked_review', {
        review_uuid: reviewId,
        user_uuid: user.id
      });

      if (error) throw error;
      setIsLiked(data || false);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching like status:', error);
    }
  };

  const handleToggleLike = async () => {
    if (!user) {
      toast.error('Please sign in to like reviews');
      return;
    }

    if (loading) return;
    setLoading(true);

    try {
      if (isLiked) {
        // Unlike
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('review_likes')
          .delete()
          .eq('user_id', user.id)
          .eq('review_id', reviewId);

        if (error) throw error;
        setIsLiked(false);
      } else {
        // Like
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('review_likes')
          .insert({
            user_id: user.id,
            review_id: reviewId
          });

        if (error) throw error;
        setIsLiked(true);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error toggling like:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to update like status');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <Button
      variant="ghost"
      size="sm"
      onClick={handleToggleLike}
      disabled={loading}
      className={`p-2 ${className}`}
    >
      <Heart 
        className={`h-4 w-4 ${isLiked ? 'fill-red-500 text-red-500' : 'text-gray-500'}`} 
      />
    </Button>
  );
};

export default ReviewLikeButton;

```

### `src/components/ReviewPhotoManager.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { Eye, Plus, Edit2, Star, User } from 'lucide-react';

interface ReviewPhoto {
  id: string;
  photo_url: string;
  review: {
    id: string;
    title: string;
    rating: number;
    content: string;
    created_at: string;
    profiles: {
      full_name: string;
    };
  };
  inGallery?: boolean;
}

interface ReviewPhotoManagerProps {
  restaurantId: string;
}

const ReviewPhotoManager: React.FC<ReviewPhotoManagerProps> = ({ restaurantId }) => {
  const [reviewPhotos, setReviewPhotos] = useState<ReviewPhoto[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [selectedPhoto, setSelectedPhoto] = useState<ReviewPhoto | null>(null);
  const [showDialog, setShowDialog] = useState(false);
  const [galleryData, setGalleryData] = useState({
    title: '',
    description: '',
    is_featured: false
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchReviewPhotos();
  }, [restaurantId]);

  const fetchReviewPhotos = async () => {
    try {
      // Fetch reviews with photos for this restaurant
      const { data: reviews, error: reviewError } = await supabase
        .from('reviews')
        .select(`
          id,
          title,
          rating,
          content,
          created_at,
          photos,
          profiles (
            full_name
          )
        `)
        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurantId)
        .not('photos', 'is', null)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });

      if (reviewError) {
        console.error('Error fetching reviews with photos:', reviewError);
        return;
      }

      // Get existing gallery items from reviews
      const { data: galleryItems, error: galleryError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_media')
        .select('source_id, image_url')
        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurantId)
        .eq('source_type', 'review_photo');

      if (galleryError) {
        console.error('Error fetching gallery items:', galleryError);
      }

      const galleryUrls = new Set(galleryItems?.map(item => item.image_url) || []);

      // Flatten review photos and mark which ones are in gallery
      const allPhotos: ReviewPhoto[] = [];
      
      reviews?.forEach(review => {
        if (review.photos && Array.isArray(review.photos)) {
          review.photos.forEach(photoUrl => {
            allPhotos.push({
              id: `${review.id}-${photoUrl}`,
              photo_url: photoUrl,
              review: review,
              inGallery: galleryUrls.has(photoUrl)
            });
          });
        }
      });

      setReviewPhotos(allPhotos);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching review photos:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleAddToGallery = (photo: ReviewPhoto) => {
    setSelectedPhoto(photo);
    setGalleryData({
      title: photo.review.title || 'Review Photo',
      description: '',
      is_featured: false
    });
    setShowDialog(true);
  };

  const submitToGallery = async () => {
    if (!selectedPhoto) return;

    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_media')
        .insert({
          restaurant_id: restaurantId,
          image_url: selectedPhoto.photo_url,
          title: galleryData.title,
          description: galleryData.description,
          source_type: 'review_photo',
          source_id: selectedPhoto.review.id,
          is_featured: galleryData.is_featured
        });

      if (error) {
        toast.error('Failed to add photo to gallery');
        console.error('Error adding to gallery:', error);
        return;
      }

      toast.success('Photo added to gallery successfully!');
      setShowDialog(false);
      setSelectedPhoto(null);
      fetchReviewPhotos(); // Refresh to update the inGallery status
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error adding photo to gallery:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to add photo to gallery');
    }
  };

  const removeFromGallery = async (photo: ReviewPhoto) => {
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_media')
        .delete()
        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurantId)
        .eq('image_url', photo.photo_url)
        .eq('source_type', 'review_photo');

      if (error) {
        toast.error('Failed to remove photo from gallery');
        console.error('Error removing from gallery:', error);
        return;
      }

      toast.success('Photo removed from gallery');
      fetchReviewPhotos(); // Refresh to update the inGallery status
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error removing photo from gallery:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to remove photo from gallery');
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Review Photos</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-8">
            <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-green-600"></div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  return (
    <>
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Review Photos</CardTitle>
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
            Manage photos from customer reviews. You can add approved photos to your media gallery.
          </p>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          {reviewPhotos.length > 0 ? (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
              {reviewPhotos.map((photo) => (
                <div key={photo.id} className="border rounded-lg p-4 space-y-3">
                  <img
                    src={photo.photo_url}
                    alt="Review photo"
                    className="w-full h-48 object-cover rounded-lg"
                  />
                  
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <div className="flex items-center">
                        {[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => (
                          <Star
                            key={i}
                            className={`h-3 w-3 ${
                              i < photo.review.rating ? 'fill-yellow-400 text-yellow-400' : 'text-gray-300'
                            }`}
                          />
                        ))}
                      </div>
                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                        {photo.review.rating}/5
                      </span>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                      <User className="h-3 w-3" />
                      <span>{photo.review.profiles?.full_name || 'Anonymous'}</span>
                    </div>
                    
                    {photo.review.title && (
                      <h4 className="font-medium text-sm line-clamp-2">{photo.review.title}</h4>
                    )}
                    
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 line-clamp-3">{photo.review.content}</p>
                    
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      {photo.inGallery ? (
                        <>
                          <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-green-700 bg-green-100">
                            <Eye className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                            In Gallery
                          </Badge>
                          <Button
                            variant="outline"
                            size="sm"
                            onClick={() => removeFromGallery(photo)}
                          >
                            Remove
                          </Button>
                        </>
                      ) : (
                        <Button
                          variant="outline"
                          size="sm"
                          onClick={() => handleAddToGallery(photo)}
                        >
                          <Plus className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                          Add to Gallery
                        </Button>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="text-center py-8">
              <p className="text-gray-500">No review photos available</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-2">
                Photos from customer reviews will appear here
              </p>
            </div>
          )}
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      <Dialog open={showDialog} onOpenChange={setShowDialog}>
        <DialogContent className="max-w-md">
          <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle>Add Photo to Gallery</DialogTitle>
          </DialogHeader>
          
          {selectedPhoto && (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <img
                src={selectedPhoto.photo_url}
                alt="Selected photo"
                className="w-full h-48 object-cover rounded-lg"
              />
              
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <div>
                  <Label htmlFor="title">Title</Label>
                  <Input
                    id="title"
                    value={galleryData.title}
                    onChange={(e) => setGalleryData(prev => ({ ...prev, title: e.target.value }))}
                    placeholder="Enter a title for this photo"
                  />
                </div>
                
                <div>
                  <Label htmlFor="description">Description (Optional)</Label>
                  <Textarea
                    id="description"
                    value={galleryData.description}
                    onChange={(e) => setGalleryData(prev => ({ ...prev, description: e.target.value }))}
                    placeholder="Add a description..."
                    rows={3}
                  />
                </div>
                
                <div>
                  <Label htmlFor="featured">Featured Photo</Label>
                  <Select 
                    value={galleryData.is_featured.toString()} 
                    onValueChange={(value) => setGalleryData(prev => ({ ...prev, is_featured: value === 'true' }))}
                  >
                    <SelectTrigger>
                      <SelectValue />
                    </SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                      <SelectItem value="false">Regular Photo</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="true">Featured Photo</SelectItem>
                    </SelectContent>
                  </Select>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                <Button onClick={submitToGallery} className="flex-1">
                  Add to Gallery
                </Button>
                <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setShowDialog(false)}>
                  Cancel
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </DialogContent>
      </Dialog>
    </>
  );
};

export default ReviewPhotoManager;

```

### `src/components/ReviewerProfile.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress';
import { Star, Trophy, Award, Target } from 'lucide-react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';

interface ProfileData {
  full_name: string;
  avatar_url: string;
  bio: string;
  review_count: number;
  level_points: number;
  current_level: string;
  location: string;
}

const ReviewerProfile = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [profile, setProfile] = useState<ProfileData | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchProfile();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchProfile = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('profiles')
        .select('*')
        .eq('id', user?.id)
        .single();

      if (error) throw error;
      setProfile(data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching profile:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const getLevelInfo = (level: string) => {
    const levels = {
      'Foodie': { icon: '🍽️', color: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800', pointsRequired: 0, nextLevel: 'Food Explorer' },
      'Food Explorer': { icon: '🔍', color: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800', pointsRequired: 50, nextLevel: 'Food Critic' },
      'Food Critic': { icon: '📝', color: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800', pointsRequired: 100, nextLevel: 'Elite Critic' },
      'Elite Critic': { icon: '⭐', color: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800', pointsRequired: 200, nextLevel: 'Master Foodie' },
      'Master Foodie': { icon: '👑', color: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800', pointsRequired: 500, nextLevel: null }
    };
    return levels[level as keyof typeof levels] || levels['Foodie'];
  };

  const getPointsToNextLevel = (currentPoints: number, currentLevel: string) => {
    const levelInfo = getLevelInfo(currentLevel);
    if (!levelInfo.nextLevel) return 0;
    
    const nextLevelInfo = getLevelInfo(levelInfo.nextLevel);
    return nextLevelInfo.pointsRequired - currentPoints;
  };

  const getProgressToNextLevel = (currentPoints: number, currentLevel: string) => {
    const levelInfo = getLevelInfo(currentLevel);
    if (!levelInfo.nextLevel) return 100;
    
    const nextLevelInfo = getLevelInfo(levelInfo.nextLevel);
    const progress = (currentPoints - levelInfo.pointsRequired) / (nextLevelInfo.pointsRequired - levelInfo.pointsRequired) * 100;
    return Math.min(Math.max(progress, 0), 100);
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <Card>
        <CardContent className="p-6">
          <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
            <div className="h-20 w-20 bg-gray-200 rounded-full mx-auto"></div>
            <div className="h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-32 mx-auto"></div>
            <div className="h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-24 mx-auto"></div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  if (!profile) return null;

  const levelInfo = getLevelInfo(profile.current_level);
  const pointsToNext = getPointsToNextLevel(profile.level_points, profile.current_level);
  const progressPercent = getProgressToNextLevel(profile.level_points, profile.current_level);

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Profile Overview */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader className="text-center">
          <div className="w-20 h-20 bg-gray-200 rounded-full mx-auto mb-4 flex items-center justify-center text-2xl">
            {profile.avatar_url ? (
              <img src={profile.avatar_url} alt={profile.full_name} className="w-full h-full rounded-full object-cover" />
            ) : (
              profile.full_name?.charAt(0) || '👤'
            )}
          </div>
          <CardTitle>{profile.full_name || 'Food Lover'}</CardTitle>
          <Badge className={levelInfo.color}>
            {levelInfo.icon} {profile.current_level}
          </Badge>
          {profile.location && (
            <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm">{profile.location}</p>
          )}
        </CardHeader>
      </Card>

      {/* Level Progress */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Trophy className="h-5 w-5 text-yellow-500" />
            Level Progress
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="space-y-4">
          <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
            <span className="text-sm font-medium">{profile.current_level}</span>
            {levelInfo.nextLevel && (
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">{levelInfo.nextLevel}</span>
            )}
          </div>
          
          <Progress value={progressPercent} className="h-2" />
          
          <div className="flex justify-between text-sm text-gray-600">
            <span>{profile.level_points} points</span>
            {levelInfo.nextLevel && (
              <span>{pointsToNext} points to next level</span>
            )}
          </div>

          {levelInfo.nextLevel && (
            <div className="bg-blue-50 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm">
              <p className="font-medium text-blue-900">Next Level: {levelInfo.nextLevel}</p>
              <p className="text-blue-700">
                Write {Math.ceil(pointsToNext / 10)} more reviews to level up!
              </p>
            </div>
          )}
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Statistics */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Award className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-500" />
            Your Impact
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 text-center">
            <div>
              <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-600">{profile.review_count}</div>
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Reviews</div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-600">{profile.level_points}</div>
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Points</div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-purple-600">
                {Math.floor(profile.review_count / 5) || 0}
              </div>
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Helped Restaurants</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Level Benefits */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Target className="h-5 w-5 text-green-500" />
            Level Benefits
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="space-y-3">
          <div className="text-sm space-y-2">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">Foodie</Badge>
              <span>Basic review features</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">Food Explorer</Badge>
              <span>Photo uploads in reviews</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">Food Critic</Badge>
              <span>TikTok links in reviews</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">Elite Critic</Badge>
              <span>Featured review priority</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">Master Foodie</Badge>
              <span>Early access to new features</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
};

export default ReviewerProfile;

```

### `src/components/RouletteGame.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Shuffle, MapPin, Star } from 'lucide-react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
}

const RouletteGame = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [isSpinning, setIsSpinning] = useState(false);
  const [selectedRestaurant, setSelectedRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);

  const spinRoulette = async () => {
    setIsSpinning(true);
    
    try {
      // Fetch random restaurant
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('id, name, address, city, cuisine_type, average_rating, total_reviews')
        .eq('is_active', true)
        .limit(50);

      if (error) throw error;

      if (data && data.length > 0) {
        // Simulate spinning animation
        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 2000));
        
        const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * data.length);
        const restaurant = data[randomIndex];
        setSelectedRestaurant(restaurant);

        // Save to roulette history if user is logged in
        if (user) {
          await supabase
            .from('roulette_history')
            .insert({
              user_id: user.id,
              restaurant_id: restaurant.id
            });
        }

        toast.success('Found your next food adventure!');
      } else {
        toast.error('No restaurants found. Try again later!');
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error spinning roulette:', error);
      toast.error('Something went wrong. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setIsSpinning(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="max-w-md mx-auto">
      <Card>
        <CardHeader className="text-center">
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
            <Shuffle className="h-6 w-6 text-orange-500" />
            Messy Foodie Roulette
          </CardTitle>
          <p className="text-gray-600">
            Can't decide where to eat? Let us pick for you!
          </p>
        </CardHeader>
        
        <CardContent className="space-y-6">
          <div className="text-center">
            <Button
              onClick={spinRoulette}
              disabled={isSpinning}
              size="lg"
              className="w-full"
            >
              {isSpinning ? (
                <>
                  <Shuffle className="h-5 w-5 mr-2 animate-spin" />
                  Spinning...
                </>
              ) : (
                <>
                  <Shuffle className="h-5 w-5 mr-2" />
                  Spin the Wheel!
                </>
              )}
            </Button>
          </div>

          {selectedRestaurant && (
            <Card className="border-orange-200 bg-orange-50">
              <CardContent className="p-4">
                <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg mb-2">{selectedRestaurant.name}</h3>
                <div className="space-y-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                    <MapPin className="h-4 w-4" />
                    {selectedRestaurant.address}, {selectedRestaurant.city}
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      <Star className="h-4 w-4 fill-yellow-400 text-yellow-400" />
                      <span>{selectedRestaurant.average_rating.toFixed(1)}</span>
                    </div>
                    <span>•</span>
                    <span>{selectedRestaurant.cuisine_type}</span>
                    <span>•</span>
                    <span>{selectedRestaurant.total_reviews} reviews</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <Link to={`/restaurants/${selectedRestaurant.id}`}>
                  <Button className="w-full mt-4">
                    View Restaurant
                  </Button>
                </Link>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          )}
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
};

export default RouletteGame;

```

### `src/components/SavedSearches.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Switch } from '@/components/ui/switch';
import { BookmarkPlus, Search, Bell, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';

interface SavedSearch {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  search_criteria: any;
  is_alert_enabled: boolean;
  created_at: string;
}

interface SavedSearchesProps {
  currentSearchCriteria?: any;
}

const SavedSearches = ({ currentSearchCriteria }: SavedSearchesProps) => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [savedSearches, setSavedSearches] = useState<SavedSearch[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [searchName, setSearchName] = useState('');
  const [alertEnabled, setAlertEnabled] = useState(false);
  const [isDialogOpen, setIsDialogOpen] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchSavedSearches();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchSavedSearches = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('saved_searches')
        .select('*')
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });

      if (error) throw error;
      setSavedSearches(data || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching saved searches:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const saveCurrentSearch = async () => {
    if (!user || !searchName.trim() || !currentSearchCriteria) return;

    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('saved_searches')
        .insert({
          user_id: user.id,
          name: searchName.trim(),
          search_criteria: currentSearchCriteria,
          is_alert_enabled: alertEnabled
        });

      if (error) throw error;

      setSearchName('');
      setAlertEnabled(false);
      setIsDialogOpen(false);
      fetchSavedSearches();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error saving search:', error);
    }
  };

  const applySearch = (search: SavedSearch) => {
    const criteria = search.search_criteria;
    const params = new URLSearchParams();
    
    if (criteria.searchTerm) params.set('search', criteria.searchTerm);
    if (criteria.city && criteria.city !== 'all') params.set('city', criteria.city);
    if (criteria.cuisine && criteria.cuisine !== 'all') params.set('cuisine', criteria.cuisine);
    if (criteria.type && criteria.type !== 'all') params.set('type', criteria.type);
    
    navigate(`/restaurants?${params.toString()}`);
  };

  const deleteSavedSearch = async (id: string) => {
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('saved_searches')
        .delete()
        .eq('id', id);

      if (error) throw error;
      fetchSavedSearches();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error deleting saved search:', error);
    }
  };

  if (!user) return null;

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <BookmarkPlus className="h-5 w-5" />
            Saved Searches
          </CardTitle>
          {currentSearchCriteria && (
            <Dialog open={isDialogOpen} onOpenChange={setIsDialogOpen}>
              <DialogTrigger asChild>
                <Button size="sm">Save Current Search</Button>
              </DialogTrigger>
              <DialogContent>
                <DialogHeader>
                  <DialogTitle>Save Search</DialogTitle>
                </DialogHeader>
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  <div>
                    <Label htmlFor="search-name">Search Name</Label>
                    <Input
                      id="search-name"
                      value={searchName}
                      onChange={(e) => setSearchName(e.target.value)}
                      placeholder="e.g., Pizza places in Cape Town"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                    <Switch
                      id="alert-enabled"
                      checked={alertEnabled}
                      onCheckedChange={setAlertEnabled}
                    />
                    <Label htmlFor="alert-enabled">
                      Get alerts for new restaurants matching this search
                    </Label>
                  </div>
                  <Button onClick={saveCurrentSearch} className="w-full">
                    Save Search
                  </Button>
                </div>
              </DialogContent>
            </Dialog>
          )}
        </div>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        {loading ? (
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="h-12 bg-gray-200 rounded animate-pulse"></div>
            ))}
          </div>
        ) : savedSearches.length === 0 ? (
          <p className="text-gray-500 text-center py-4">
            No saved searches yet. Save your current search to quickly access it later.
          </p>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {savedSearches.map((search) => (
              <div key={search.id} className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border rounded-lg">
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                    <h4 className="font-medium">{search.name}</h4>
                    {search.is_alert_enabled && (
                      <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">
                        <Bell className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                        Alerts
                      </Badge>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                    Saved {new Date(search.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                  </p>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <Button
                    size="sm"
                    variant="outline"
                    onClick={() => applySearch(search)}
                  >
                    <Search className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                    Apply
                  </Button>
                  <Button
                    size="sm"
                    variant="ghost"
                    onClick={() => deleteSavedSearch(search.id)}
                  >
                    <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4" />
                  </Button>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default SavedSearches;

```

### `src/components/SocialFeed.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Heart, MessageSquare, Share2, MapPin } from 'lucide-react';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';

interface Post {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  content: string;
  image_url: string;
  post_type: string;
  is_featured: boolean;
  created_at: string;
  restaurant: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    city: string;
    is_verified: boolean;
  };
}

const SocialFeed = () => {
  const [posts, setPosts] = useState<Post[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchPosts();
  }, []);

  const fetchPosts = async () => {
    try {
      const { data: postsData } = await supabase
        .from('posts')
        .select(`
          id,
          title,
          content,
          image_url,
          post_type,
          is_featured,
          created_at,
          restaurant:restaurants(
            id,
            name,
            city,
            is_verified
          )
        `)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
        .limit(20);

      if (postsData) {
        setPosts(postsData);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching posts:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const getPostTypeColor = (type: string) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'promotion': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800';
      case 'menu_update': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';
      case 'event': return 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800';
      default: return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';
    }
  };

  const getPostTypeLabel = (type: string) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'promotion': return 'Promotion';
      case 'menu_update': return 'Menu Update';
      case 'event': return 'Event';
      default: return 'General';
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="space-y-6">
        {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (
          <Card key={i} className="animate-pulse">
            <CardContent className="p-6">
              <div className="h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-3/4 mb-4"></div>
              <div className="h-20 bg-gray-200 rounded mb-4"></div>
              <div className="h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/2"></div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Restaurant Updates</h2>
      
      {posts.length > 0 ? (
        posts.map((post) => (
          <Card key={post.id} className={post.is_featured ? 'ring-2 ring-green-500' : ''}>
            <CardHeader className="pb-3">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-green-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                    <span className="text-green-600 font-semibold">
                      {post.restaurant.name.charAt(0)}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{post.restaurant.name}</h3>
                      {post.restaurant.is_verified && (
                        <div className="w-4 h-4 bg-green-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                          <span className="text-white text-xs">✓</span>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
                      <MapPin className="h-3 w-3" />
                      <span>{post.restaurant.city}</span>
                      <span>•</span>
                      <span>{new Date(post.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <Badge className={getPostTypeColor(post.post_type)}>
                  {getPostTypeLabel(post.post_type)}
                </Badge>
              </div>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
              {post.title && (
                <h4 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">{post.title}</h4>
              )}
              <p className="text-gray-700 mb-4">{post.content}</p>
              
              {post.image_url && (
                <div className="mb-4">
                  <img 
                    src={post.image_url} 
                    alt={post.title || 'Post image'} 
                    className="w-full h-64 object-cover rounded-lg"
                  />
                </div>
              )}

              <div className="flex items-center gap-6 pt-3 border-t border-gray-200">
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="text-gray-600 hover:text-red-600">
                  <Heart className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                  Like
                </Button>
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="text-gray-600 hover:text-blue-600">
                  <MessageSquare className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                  Comment
                </Button>
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="text-gray-600 hover:text-green-600">
                  <Share2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                  Share
                </Button>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        ))
      ) : (
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="text-center py-12">
            <h3 className="text-lg font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">No posts yet</h3>
            <p className="text-gray-600">Check back later for restaurant updates and news!</p>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default SocialFeed;

```

### `src/components/StaffCard.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Star, DollarSign, User } from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner';

interface StaffMember {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  role: string;
  bio: string;
  photo_url: string;
  tip_enabled: boolean;
}

interface StaffCardProps {
  staff: StaffMember;
  onReviewSubmitted?: () => void;
}

const StaffCard = ({ staff, onReviewSubmitted }: StaffCardProps) => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [showReviewForm, setShowReviewForm] = useState(false);
  const [showTipForm, setShowTipForm] = useState(false);
  const [rating, setRating] = useState(0);
  const [comment, setComment] = useState('');
  const [tipAmount, setTipAmount] = useState('');
  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);

  const submitReview = async () => {
    if (!user) {
      toast.error('Please sign in to leave a review');
      return;
    }

    if (rating === 0) {
      toast.error('Please select a rating');
      return;
    }

    setSubmitting(true);
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('staff_reviews')
        .insert({
          staff_id: staff.id,
          user_id: user.id,
          rating,
          comment: comment.trim() || null
        });

      if (error) throw error;

      toast.success('Review submitted successfully!');
      setShowReviewForm(false);
      setRating(0);
      setComment('');
      if (onReviewSubmitted) onReviewSubmitted();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error submitting review:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to submit review');
    } finally {
      setSubmitting(false);
    }
  };

  const submitTip = async () => {
    if (!user) {
      toast.error('Please sign in to leave a tip');
      return;
    }

    const amount = parseFloat(tipAmount);
    if (!amount || amount <= 0) {
      toast.error('Please enter a valid tip amount');
      return;
    }

    setSubmitting(true);
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('tips')
        .insert({
          staff_id: staff.id,
          user_id: user.id,
          amount,
          status: 'pending'
        });

      if (error) throw error;

      toast.success('Tip submitted successfully! Payment processing will be handled separately.');
      setShowTipForm(false);
      setTipAmount('');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error submitting tip:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to submit tip');
    } finally {
      setSubmitting(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader className="text-center">
        <div className="w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-4">
          {staff.photo_url ? (
            <img 
              src={staff.photo_url} 
              alt={staff.name}
              className="w-full h-full rounded-full object-cover"
            />
          ) : (
            <div className="w-full h-full bg-gray-200 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
              <User className="h-8 w-8 text-gray-400" />
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
        <CardTitle className="text-lg">{staff.name}</CardTitle>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{staff.role}</p>
        {staff.bio && (
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2">{staff.bio}</p>
        )}
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent className="space-y-3">
        {!showReviewForm && !showTipForm && (
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            <Button 
              variant="outline" 
              size="sm" 
              className="flex-1"
              onClick={() => setShowReviewForm(true)}
            >
              <Star className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
              Review
            </Button>
            {staff.tip_enabled && (
              <Button 
                variant="outline" 
                size="sm" 
                className="flex-1"
                onClick={() => setShowTipForm(true)}
              >
                <DollarSign className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                Tip
              </Button>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {showReviewForm && (
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                Rating
              </label>
              <div className="flex gap-1">
                {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((star) => (
                  <button
                    key={star}
                    onClick={() => setRating(star)}
                    className={`p-1 ${
                      star <= rating ? 'text-yellow-400' : 'text-gray-300'
                    }`}
                  >
                    <Star className="h-5 w-5 fill-current" />
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                Comment (Optional)
              </label>
              <Textarea
                value={comment}
                onChange={(e) => setComment(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Share your experience with this staff member..."
                rows={3}
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex gap-2">
              <Button 
                size="sm" 
                onClick={submitReview}
                disabled={submitting || rating === 0}
              >
                {submitting ? 'Submitting...' : 'Submit Review'}
              </Button>
              <Button 
                variant="outline" 
                size="sm" 
                onClick={() => {
                  setShowReviewForm(false);
                  setRating(0);
                  setComment('');
                }}
              >
                Cancel
              </Button>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {showTipForm && (
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                Tip Amount (R)
              </label>
              <Input
                type="number"
                step="0.01"
                value={tipAmount}
                onChange={(e) => setTipAmount(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Enter tip amount"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex gap-2">
              <Button 
                size="sm" 
                onClick={submitTip}
                disabled={submitting || !tipAmount}
              >
                {submitting ? 'Processing...' : 'Send Tip'}
              </Button>
              <Button 
                variant="outline" 
                size="sm" 
                onClick={() => {
                  setShowTipForm(false);
                  setTipAmount('');
                }}
              >
                Cancel
              </Button>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default StaffCard;

```

### `src/components/StaffManagement.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Switch } from '@/components/ui/switch';
import { Plus, User, Edit, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner';

interface StaffMember {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  role: string;
  bio: string;
  photo_url: string;
  tip_enabled: boolean;
}

interface StaffManagementProps {
  restaurantId: string;
}

const StaffManagement = ({ restaurantId }: StaffManagementProps) => {
  const [staff, setStaff] = useState<StaffMember[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [editing, setEditing] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    name: '',
    role: '',
    bio: '',
    photo_url: '',
    tip_enabled: false
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchStaff();
  }, [restaurantId]);

  const fetchStaff = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_staff')
        .select('*')
        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurantId)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: true });

      if (error) throw error;
      setStaff(data || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching staff:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to load staff members');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSubmit = async () => {
    if (!formData.name || !formData.role) {
      toast.error('Name and role are required');
      return;
    }

    try {
      if (editing) {
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('restaurant_staff')
          .update(formData)
          .eq('id', editing);

        if (error) throw error;
        toast.success('Staff member updated successfully');
      } else {
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('restaurant_staff')
          .insert({
            ...formData,
            restaurant_id: restaurantId
          });

        if (error) throw error;
        toast.success('Staff member added successfully');
      }

      resetForm();
      fetchStaff();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error saving staff member:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to save staff member');
    }
  };

  const handleEdit = (member: StaffMember) => {
    setFormData({
      name: member.name,
      role: member.role,
      bio: member.bio || '',
      photo_url: member.photo_url || '',
      tip_enabled: member.tip_enabled
    });
    setEditing(member.id);
  };

  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
    if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to remove this staff member?')) return;

    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_staff')
        .delete()
        .eq('id', id);

      if (error) throw error;
      toast.success('Staff member removed');
      fetchStaff();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error deleting staff member:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to remove staff member');
    }
  };

  const resetForm = () => {
    setFormData({
      name: '',
      role: '',
      bio: '',
      photo_url: '',
      tip_enabled: false
    });
    setEditing(null);
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Staff Management</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
            {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="h-16 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Add/Edit Staff Form */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Plus className="h-5 w-5" />
            {editing ? 'Edit Staff Member' : 'Add Staff Member'}
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="space-y-4">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <div>
              <Label htmlFor="name">Name *</Label>
              <Input
                id="name"
                value={formData.name}
                onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, name: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="Staff member name"
              />
            </div>
            <div>
              <Label htmlFor="role">Role *</Label>
              <Input
                id="role"
                value={formData.role}
                onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, role: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="e.g., Chef, Waiter, Manager"
              />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="photo_url">Photo URL</Label>
            <Input
              id="photo_url"
              value={formData.photo_url}
              onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, photo_url: e.target.value })}
              placeholder="https://example.com/photo.jpg"
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="bio">Bio</Label>
            <Textarea
              id="bio"
              value={formData.bio}
              onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, bio: e.target.value })}
              placeholder="Brief description about this staff member"
              rows={3}
            />
          </div>

          <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
            <Switch
              id="tip_enabled"
              checked={formData.tip_enabled}
              onCheckedChange={(checked) => setFormData({ ...formData, tip_enabled: checked })}
            />
            <Label htmlFor="tip_enabled">Enable tips for this staff member</Label>
          </div>

          <div className="flex gap-2">
            <Button onClick={handleSubmit}>
              {editing ? 'Update' : 'Add'} Staff Member
            </Button>
            {editing && (
              <Button variant="outline" onClick={resetForm}>
                Cancel
              </Button>
            )}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Staff List */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Current Staff ({staff.length})</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          {staff.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="text-gray-500 text-center py-8">
              No staff members added yet. Add your first team member above!
            </p>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              {staff.map((member) => (
                <div key={member.id} className="flex items-center gap-4 p-4 border rounded-lg">
                  <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-full overflow-hidden bg-gray-200 flex items-center justify-center">
                    {member.photo_url ? (
                      <img 
                        src={member.photo_url} 
                        alt={member.name}
                        className="w-full h-full object-cover"
                      />
                    ) : (
                      <User className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-400" />
                    )}
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="flex-1">
                    <h4 className="font-medium">{member.name}</h4>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{member.role}</p>
                    {member.bio && (
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">{member.bio}</p>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    {member.tip_enabled && (
                      <span className="text-xs bg-green-100 text-green-800 px-2 py-1 rounded">
                        Tips Enabled
                      </span>
                    )}
                    <Button
                      variant="outline"
                      size="sm"
                      onClick={() => handleEdit(member)}
                    >
                      <Edit className="h-4 w-4" />
                    </Button>
                    <Button
                      variant="outline"
                      size="sm"
                      onClick={() => handleDelete(member.id)}
                    >
                      <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4" />
                    </Button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
};

export default StaffManagement;

```

### `src/components/StaffTipping.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Heart, Star } from 'lucide-react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { toast } from 'sonner';

interface StaffMember {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  role: string;
  photo_url?: string;
  tip_enabled: boolean;
}

interface StaffTippingProps {
  staffMembers: StaffMember[];
  restaurantName: string;
}

const StaffTipping = ({ staffMembers, restaurantName }: StaffTippingProps) => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [selectedStaff, setSelectedStaff] = useState<string>('');
  const [tipAmount, setTipAmount] = useState<string>('');
  const [processing, setProcessing] = useState(false);

  const tipAmountOptions = [
    { value: '10', label: 'R10' },
    { value: '20', label: 'R20' },
    { value: '50', label: 'R50' },
    { value: '100', label: 'R100' },
    { value: 'custom', label: 'Custom' }
  ];

  const handleTip = async () => {
    if (!user) {
      toast.error('Please sign in to tip staff');
      return;
    }

    if (!selectedStaff || !tipAmount) {
      toast.error('Please select staff member and tip amount');
      return;
    }

    const amount = parseFloat(tipAmount);
    if (isNaN(amount) || amount <= 0) {
      toast.error('Please enter a valid tip amount');
      return;
    }

    setProcessing(true);
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('tips')
        .insert({
          user_id: user.id,
          staff_id: selectedStaff,
          amount: amount,
          status: 'pending'
        });

      if (error) throw error;

      toast.success('Tip sent successfully! Payment processing...');
      setSelectedStaff('');
      setTipAmount('');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error processing tip:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to process tip');
    } finally {
      setProcessing(false);
    }
  };

  const enabledStaff = staffMembers.filter(staff => staff.tip_enabled);

  if (enabledStaff.length === 0) {
    return null;
  }

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Heart className="h-5 w-5 text-red-500" />
          Tip Our Amazing Staff
        </CardTitle>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
          Show appreciation for exceptional service at {restaurantName}
        </p>
      </CardHeader>
      
      <CardContent className="space-y-4">
        {/* Staff Selection */}
        <div>
          <Label htmlFor="staff">Select Staff Member</Label>
          <Select value={selectedStaff} onValueChange={setSelectedStaff}>
            <SelectTrigger>
              <SelectValue placeholder="Choose who to tip" />
            </SelectTrigger>
            <SelectContent>
              {enabledStaff.map(staff => (
                <SelectItem key={staff.id} value={staff.id}>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    {staff.photo_url ? (
                      <img 
                        src={staff.photo_url} 
                        alt={staff.name}
                        className="w-6 h-6 rounded-full object-cover"
                      />
                    ) : (
                      <div className="w-6 h-6 bg-gray-200 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs">
                        {staff.name.charAt(0)}
                      </div>
                    )}
                    <span>{staff.name} - {staff.role}</span>
                  </div>
                </SelectItem>
              ))}
            </SelectContent>
          </Select>
        </div>

        {/* Tip Amount Selection */}
        <div>
          <Label htmlFor="amount">Tip Amount</Label>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 mt-2">
            {tipAmountOptions.slice(0, -1).map(option => (
              <Button
                key={option.value}
                variant={tipAmount === option.value ? "default" : "outline"}
                onClick={() => setTipAmount(option.value)}
                className="text-sm"
              >
                {option.label}
              </Button>
            ))}
          </div>
          
          <div className="mt-2">
            <Input
              type="number"
              placeholder="Custom amount (R)"
              value={tipAmount === 'custom' || !tipAmountOptions.some(opt => opt.value === tipAmount) ? tipAmount : ''}
              onChange={(e) => setTipAmount(e.target.value)}
              min="1"
              step="1"
            />
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Payment Method Info */}
        <div className="bg-blue-50 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm">
          <p className="font-medium text-blue-900">How it works:</p>
          <ul className="text-blue-800 mt-1 space-y-1">
            <li>• Tips are processed securely via PayFast</li>
            <li>• 100% of your tip goes to the staff member</li>
            <li>• You'll receive a payment confirmation</li>
          </ul>
        </div>

        {/* Submit Button */}
        <Button 
          onClick={handleTip}
          disabled={processing || !selectedStaff || !tipAmount || !user}
          className="w-full"
        >
          {processing ? (
            'Processing...'
          ) : (
            <>
              <Heart className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
              Send Tip of R{tipAmount || '0'}
            </>
          )}
        </Button>

        {!user && (
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 text-center">
            Please sign in to tip staff members
          </p>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default StaffTipping;

```

### `src/components/StarRating.tsx`

```tsx

import React from 'react';
import { Star } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

interface StarRatingProps {
  rating: number;
  maxRating?: number;
  size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg';
  showNumber?: boolean;
  className?: string;
}

const StarRating = ({ 
  rating, 
  maxRating = 5, 
  size = 'md', 
  showNumber = true,
  className 
}: StarRatingProps) => {
  const sizeClasses = {
    sm: 'h-3 w-3',
    md: 'h-4 w-4',
    lg: 'h-5 w-5'
  };

  const textSizes = {
    sm: 'text-xs',
    md: 'text-sm',
    lg: 'text-base'
  };

  return (
    <div className={cn("flex items-center gap-1", className)}>
      <div className="flex">
        {[...Array(maxRating)].map((_, i) => (
          <Star
            key={i}
            className={cn(
              sizeClasses[size],
              i < Math.floor(rating) 
                ? 'text-yellow-400 fill-current' 
                : i < rating 
                ? 'text-yellow-400 fill-current opacity-50'
                : 'text-gray-300'
            )}
          />
        ))}
      </div>
      {showNumber && (
        <span className={cn("font-medium text-gray-700", textSizes[size])}>
          {rating.toFixed(1)}
        </span>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default StarRating;

```

### `src/components/SubscriptionManager.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Calendar, Crown, Star, Zap } from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import SubscriptionTierCard from './SubscriptionTierCard';

interface SubscriptionData {
  id: string;
  subscription_tier: string;
  subscription_end: string | null;
  subscribed: boolean;
}

const SubscriptionManager = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [subscription, setSubscription] = useState<SubscriptionData | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchSubscription();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchSubscription = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('subscribers')
        .select('*')
        .eq('user_id', user?.id)
        .maybeSingle();

      if (error && error.code !== 'PGRST116') {
        throw error;
      }

      if (data) {
        setSubscription(data);
      } else {
        // Create basic subscription record if none exists
        const { data: newSub, error: insertError } = await supabase
          .from('subscribers')
          .insert({
            user_id: user?.id,
            email: user?.email || '',
            subscription_tier: 'basic',
            subscribed: false
          })
          .select()
          .single();

        if (insertError) throw insertError;
        setSubscription(newSub);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching subscription:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to load subscription data');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleUpgrade = (tier: string) => {
    toast.info('Payment integration will be available soon!');
    console.log(`Upgrading to ${tier} tier`);
  };

  const tiers = [
    {
      id: 'basic',
      title: 'Basic',
      price: 'Free',
      description: 'Perfect for getting started',
      features: [
        'Basic restaurant profile',
        'Up to 5 photos',
        'Community reviews',
        'Basic listing in directory'
      ]
    },
    {
      id: 'sizzlin',
      title: "Sizzlin'",
      price: 'R250',
      description: 'Great for growing restaurants',
      features: [
        'Everything in Basic',
        'Unlimited menu uploads',
        'Advanced analytics dashboard',
        'Customer messaging',
        'Priority customer support',
        'Enhanced restaurant profile'
      ],
      isPopular: true
    },
    {
      id: 'super_hot',
      title: 'Super Hot',
      price: 'R500',
      description: 'For established restaurant chains',
      features: [
        'Everything in Sizzlin\'',
        'API access for integrations',
        'White-label branding options',
        'Regional promotion campaigns',
        'Dedicated account manager',
        'Custom analytics reports'
      ]
    }
  ];

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <Card>
        <CardContent className="p-6">
          <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
            <div className="h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/4"></div>
            <div className="h-8 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/2"></div>
            <div className="h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-3/4"></div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  const currentTier = subscription?.subscription_tier || 'basic';
  const isSubscribed = subscription?.subscribed || false;
  const subscriptionEnd = subscription?.subscription_end;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Current Subscription Status */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Crown className="h-5 w-5 text-yellow-500" />
            Current Subscription
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <Badge variant={currentTier === 'basic' ? 'secondary' : 'default'}>
                  {currentTier === 'basic' ? 'Basic' : currentTier === 'sizzlin' ? "Sizzlin'" : 'Super Hot'}
                </Badge>
                {currentTier !== 'basic' && (
                  <Badge variant={isSubscribed ? 'default' : 'destructive'}>
                    {isSubscribed ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}
                  </Badge>
                )}
              </div>
              {subscriptionEnd && (
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 flex items-center gap-1">
                  <Calendar className="h-4 w-4" />
                  {isSubscribed ? 'Renews' : 'Expired'} on {new Date(subscriptionEnd).toLocaleDateString()}
                </p>
              )}
            </div>
            {currentTier !== 'basic' && (
              <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => toast.info('Customer portal coming soon!')}>
                Manage Subscription
              </Button>
            )}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Subscription Tiers */}
      <div>
        <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Choose Your Plan</h3>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {tiers.map((tier) => (
            <SubscriptionTierCard
              key={tier.id}
              title={tier.title}
              price={tier.price}
              description={tier.description}
              features={tier.features}
              isCurrentTier={currentTier === tier.id}
              isPopular={tier.isPopular}
              onSelect={() => handleUpgrade(tier.id)}
              disabled={tier.id !== 'basic' && tier.price !== 'Free'}
            />
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Feature Comparison */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Why Upgrade?</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 text-center">
            <div className="p-4">
              <Star className="h-8 w-8 text-yellow-500 mx-auto mb-2" />
              <h4 className="font-semibold">Advanced Analytics</h4>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Track customer engagement and optimize your restaurant's performance</p>
            </div>
            <div className="p-4">
```
