```tsx
              <Zap className="h-8 w-8 text-blue-500 mx-auto mb-2" />
              <h4 className="font-semibold">Priority Support</h4>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Get faster response times and dedicated customer success</p>
            </div>
            <div className="p-4">
              <Crown className="h-8 w-8 text-purple-500 mx-auto mb-2" />
              <h4 className="font-semibold">Premium Features</h4>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Access exclusive tools to grow your restaurant business</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
};

export default SubscriptionManager;

```

### `src/components/SubscriptionTierCard.tsx`

```tsx

import React from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Check, Crown, Flame, Zap } from 'lucide-react';

interface SubscriptionTierCardProps {
  title: string;
  price: string;
  description: string;
  features: string[];
  isCurrentTier?: boolean;
  isPopular?: boolean;
  onSelect: () => void;
  disabled?: boolean;
}

const SubscriptionTierCard = ({
  title,
  price,
  description,
  features,
  isCurrentTier = false,
  isPopular = false,
  onSelect,
  disabled = false
}: SubscriptionTierCardProps) => {
  const getIcon = () => {
    const titleLower = title.toLowerCase();
    switch (titleLower) {
      case 'basic':
        return <Crown className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-500" />;
      case "sizzlin'":
      case 'sizzlin':
      case 'sizzling':
        return <Flame className="h-6 w-6 text-orange-500" />;
      case 'super hot':
      case 'super_hot':
        return <Zap className="h-6 w-6 text-red-500" />;
      default:
        return <Crown className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-500" />;
    }
  };

  const getBorderColor = () => {
    if (isCurrentTier) return 'border-green-500';
    if (isPopular) return 'border-orange-500';
    return 'border-gray-200';
  };

  const getBackgroundColor = () => {
    if (isCurrentTier) return 'bg-green-50';
    if (isPopular) return 'bg-orange-50';
    return 'bg-white';
  };

  const formatPrice = (price: string) => {
    if (price === 'Free' || price === 'R0') return 'Free';
    if (price.startsWith('R')) return price;
    return `R${price}`;
  };

  return (
    <Card className={`relative ${getBorderColor()} ${getBackgroundColor()} transition-all hover:shadow-lg`}>
      {isPopular && (
        <div className="absolute -top-3 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2">
          <Badge className="bg-orange-500 text-white">Most Popular</Badge>
        </div>
      )}
      
      {isCurrentTier && (
        <div className="absolute -top-3 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2">
          <Badge className="bg-green-500 text-white">Current Plan</Badge>
        </div>
      )}

      <CardHeader className="text-center">
        <div className="flex justify-center mb-2">
          {getIcon()}
        </div>
        <CardTitle className="text-xl">{title}</CardTitle>
        <div className="text-3xl font-bold">
          {formatPrice(price)}
          {price !== 'Free' && price !== 'R0' && <span className="text-sm font-normal text-gray-500">/month</span>}
        </div>
        <p className="text-gray-600">{description}</p>
      </CardHeader>

      <CardContent>
        <ul className="space-y-3 mb-6">
          {features.map((feature, index) => (
            <li key={index} className="flex items-start gap-2">
              <Check className="h-4 w-4 text-green-500 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
              <span className="text-sm">{feature}</span>
            </li>
          ))}
        </ul>

        <Button 
          onClick={onSelect}
          disabled={disabled || isCurrentTier}
          className={`w-full ${
            isCurrentTier 
              ? 'bg-green-500 hover:bg-green-600' 
              : isPopular 
                ? 'bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600' 
                : ''
          }`}
          variant={isCurrentTier ? 'default' : isPopular ? 'default' : 'outline'}
        >
          {isCurrentTier ? 'Current Plan' : disabled ? 'Coming Soon' : 'Select Plan'}
        </Button>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default SubscriptionTierCard;

```

### `src/components/TikTokEmbed.tsx`

```tsx

import React from 'react';

interface TikTokEmbedProps {
  url: string;
  className?: string;
}

const TikTokEmbed = ({ url, className = "" }: TikTokEmbedProps) => {
  // Extract TikTok video ID from URL
  const getTikTokEmbedUrl = (url: string) => {
    if (!url || typeof url !== 'string') return null;
    
    try {
      // Handle different TikTok URL formats
      const patterns = [
        /tiktok\.com\/@[^\/]+\/video\/(\d+)/,
        /vm\.tiktok\.com\/([^\/]+)/,
        /tiktok\.com\/t\/([^\/]+)/
      ];

      for (const pattern of patterns) {
        const match = url.match(pattern);
        if (match && match[1]) {
          return `https://www.tiktok.com/embed/v2/${match[1]}`;
        }
      }
      return null;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error parsing TikTok URL:', error);
      return null;
    }
  };

  if (!url) return null;

  const embedUrl = getTikTokEmbedUrl(url);

  return (
    <div className={`tiktok-embed ${className}`}>
      {embedUrl ? (
        <div className="relative w-full max-w-xs mx-auto">
          <iframe
            src={embedUrl}
            width="100%"
            height="500"
            frameBorder="0"
            allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
            allowFullScreen
            className="rounded-lg"
            title="TikTok Review"
          />
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="bg-gray-100 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-4 text-center">
          <div className="text-gray-600 mb-2">
            🎵 TikTok Review
          </div>
          <a
            href={url}
            target="_blank"
            rel="noopener noreferrer"
            className="text-blue-600 hover:underline text-sm"
          >
            Watch on TikTok
          </a>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default TikTokEmbed;

```

### `src/components/TrendingCarousel.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { Carousel, CarouselContent, CarouselItem, CarouselNext, CarouselPrevious } from '@/components/ui/carousel';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Star, MapPin, Shield, CheckCircle } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatCuisineTypes, getHalaalStatus } from '@/utils/formatters';

interface TrendingRestaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  description: string;
  claim_status: string;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  is_verified: boolean;
  image_url?: string;
}

const TrendingCarousel = () => {
  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<TrendingRestaurant[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchTrendingRestaurants();
  }, []);

  const fetchTrendingRestaurants = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('id, name, city, province, cuisine_type, average_rating, total_reviews, description, claim_status, is_halaal_certified, is_verified, image_url')
        .eq('is_active', true)
        .order('average_rating', { ascending: false })
        .limit(8);

      if (error) throw error;
      setRestaurants(data || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching trending restaurants:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const getPlaceholderImage = (restaurantId: string) => {
    // Food and restaurant related placeholder images
    const imageOptions = [
      'photo-1555396273-367ea4eb4db5', // restaurant interior
      'photo-1517248135467-4c7edcad34c4', // restaurant dining
      'photo-1414235077428-338989a2e8c0', // restaurant food
      'photo-1424847651672-bf20a4b0982b', // food plating
      'photo-1559339352-11d035aa65de', // restaurant kitchen
      'photo-1565299624946-b28f40a0ca4b', // food dishes
      'photo-1504674900247-0877df9cc836', // food photography
      'photo-1606787366850-de6330128bfc' // halal food
    ];
    
    const hash = restaurantId.split('').reduce((a, b) => {
      a = ((a << 5) - a) + b.charCodeAt(0);
      return a & a;
    }, 0);
    
    const imageIndex = Math.abs(hash) % imageOptions.length;
    return `https://images.unsplash.com/${imageOptions[imageIndex]}?w=400&h=300&fit=crop`;
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <section className="py-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-amber-50">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-center mb-12 text-gradient">Trending Now</h2>
          <div className="flex gap-4 overflow-hidden">
            {[...Array(4)].map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="min-w-80 h-64 bg-gray-200 rounded-lg animate-pulse"></div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    );
  }

  return (
    <section className="py-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-amber-50">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-center mb-12 text-gradient">Trending Now</h2>
        
        <Carousel className="w-full">
          <CarouselContent className="-ml-4">
            {restaurants.map((restaurant) => {
              const halaalStatus = getHalaalStatus(restaurant);
              return (
                <CarouselItem key={restaurant.id} className="pl-4 md:basis-1/2 lg:basis-1/3">
                  <Link to={`/restaurant/${restaurant.id}`}>
                    <Card className="hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow h-full border-green-100">
                      <div className="relative">
                        <img 
                          src={restaurant.image_url || getPlaceholderImage(restaurant.id)}
                          alt={restaurant.name}
                          className="aspect-video w-full object-cover rounded-t-lg"
                        />
                        <div className="absolute top-3 right-3 flex flex-col gap-1">
                          {halaalStatus.isHalaal && (
                            <Badge className={halaalStatus.badgeClass}>
                              <Shield className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                              {halaalStatus.badgeText}
                            </Badge>
                          )}
                          {restaurant.is_verified && (
                            <Badge className="bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">
                              <CheckCircle className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                              Verified
                            </Badge>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <CardContent className="p-6">
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-3">
                          <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg text-gray-900 line-clamp-1">
                            {restaurant.name}
                          </h3>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                            <Star className="h-4 w-4 text-yellow-500 fill-current" />
                            <span className="text-sm font-medium">{restaurant.average_rating.toFixed(1)}</span>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-3">
                          <MapPin className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
                          <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">{restaurant.city}, {restaurant.province}</span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <Badge variant="secondary" className="mb-3 bg-green-100 text-green-800">
                          {formatCuisineTypes(restaurant.cuisine_type)}
                        </Badge>
                        
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 line-clamp-2">
                          {restaurant.description}
                        </p>
                        
                        <div className="mt-3 text-xs text-gray-500">
                          {restaurant.total_reviews} reviews
                        </div>
                      </CardContent>
                    </Card>
                  </Link>
                </CarouselItem>
              );
            })}
          </CarouselContent>
          <CarouselPrevious />
          <CarouselNext />
        </Carousel>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
};

export default TrendingCarousel;

```

### `src/components/UserFeed.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Star, Heart, MessageSquare, Users } from 'lucide-react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';

interface FeedItem {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  content: string;
  rating: number;
  created_at: string;
  user: {
    id: string;
    full_name: string;
  };
  restaurant: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    city: string;
  };
  likes_count: number;
  user_has_liked: boolean;
}

const UserFeed = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [feedItems, setFeedItems] = useState<FeedItem[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [followingCount, setFollowingCount] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchFeed();
      fetchFollowingCount();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchFeed = async () => {
    try {
      // First get the user IDs that the current user follows
      const { data: followingData, error: followingError } = await supabase
        .from('user_follows')
        .select('following_id')
        .eq('follower_id', user?.id);

      if (followingError) throw followingError;

      const followingIds = followingData?.map(f => f.following_id) || [];

      if (followingIds.length === 0) {
        setFeedItems([]);
        setLoading(false);
        return;
      }

      // Get reviews from users that the current user follows
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('reviews')
        .select(`
          id,
          title,
          content,
          rating,
          created_at,
          user:profiles!reviews_user_id_fkey(id, full_name),
          restaurant:restaurants(id, name, city)
        `)
        .in('user_id', followingIds)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
        .limit(20);

      if (error) throw error;

      // Get like counts and user's like status for each review
      const reviewsWithLikes = await Promise.all(
        (data || []).map(async (review) => {
          const { data: likesData } = await supabase
            .from('review_likes')
            .select('user_id')
            .eq('review_id', review.id);

          const likes_count = likesData?.length || 0;
          const user_has_liked = likesData?.some(like => like.user_id === user?.id) || false;

          return {
            ...review,
            likes_count,
            user_has_liked
          };
        })
      );

      setFeedItems(reviewsWithLikes);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching feed:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const fetchFollowingCount = async () => {
    try {
      const { count } = await supabase
        .from('user_follows')
        .select('*', { count: 'exact' })
        .eq('follower_id', user?.id);

      setFollowingCount(count || 0);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching following count:', error);
    }
  };

  const toggleLike = async (reviewId: string) => {
    try {
      const item = feedItems.find(item => item.id === reviewId);
      if (!item) return;

      if (item.user_has_liked) {
        // Unlike
        await supabase
          .from('review_likes')
          .delete()
          .eq('review_id', reviewId)
          .eq('user_id', user?.id);

        setFeedItems(prev => prev.map(item => 
          item.id === reviewId 
            ? { ...item, likes_count: item.likes_count - 1, user_has_liked: false }
            : item
        ));
      } else {
        // Like
        await supabase
          .from('review_likes')
          .insert({ review_id: reviewId, user_id: user?.id });

        setFeedItems(prev => prev.map(item => 
          item.id === reviewId 
            ? { ...item, likes_count: item.likes_count + 1, user_has_liked: true }
            : item
        ));
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error toggling like:', error);
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Your Feed</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
            {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="h-32 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <span>Your Feed</span>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
            <Users className="h-4 w-4" />
            Following {followingCount}
          </div>
        </CardTitle>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        {feedItems.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="text-center py-8">
            <MessageSquare className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
            <h3 className="text-lg font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">Your feed is empty</h3>
            <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">Follow other users to see their reviews here!</p>
            <Link to="/restaurants">
              <Button>Discover Restaurants</Button>
            </Link>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-4">
            {feedItems.map((item) => (
              <div key={item.id} className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-4">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div>
                    <p className="font-medium text-gray-900">{item.user.full_name}</p>
                    <Link 
                      to={`/restaurant/${item.restaurant.id}`}
                      className="text-green-600 hover:text-green-700"
                    >
                      {item.restaurant.name}, {item.restaurant.city}
                    </Link>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                    {[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => (
                      <Star
                        key={i}
                        className={`h-4 w-4 ${
                          i < item.rating ? 'text-yellow-400 fill-current' : 'text-gray-300'
                        }`}
                      />
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
                
                {item.title && (
                  <h4 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">{item.title}</h4>
                )}
                
                {item.content && (
                  <p className="text-gray-700 mb-3">{item.content}</p>
                )}
                
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm text-gray-500">
                  <span>{formatDistanceToNow(new Date(item.created_at), { addSuffix: true })}</span>
                  <Button
                    variant="ghost"
                    size="sm"
                    onClick={() => toggleLike(item.id)}
                    className={item.user_has_liked ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-gray-600'}
                  >
                    <Heart className={`h-4 w-4 mr-1 ${item.user_has_liked ? 'fill-current' : ''}`} />
                    {item.likes_count}
                  </Button>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default UserFeed;

```

## Dashboard Components

### `src/components/dashboard/AchievementsPanel.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress';
import { Trophy, Award, Target, Users, Gift } from 'lucide-react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';

interface Achievement {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  description: string;
  icon: string;
  unlocked: boolean;
  progress?: number;
  maxProgress?: number;
}

const AchievementsPanel = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [profile, setProfile] = useState<any>(null);
  const [achievements, setAchievements] = useState<Achievement[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchProfileAndAchievements();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchProfileAndAchievements = async () => {
    try {
      // Get user profile
      const { data: profileData, error: profileError } = await supabase
        .from('profiles')
        .select('*')
        .eq('id', user?.id)
        .single();

      if (profileError) throw profileError;
      setProfile(profileData);

      // Calculate achievements based on user stats
      const userAchievements: Achievement[] = [
        {
          id: 'first_review',
          title: 'First Review',
          description: 'Submit your first restaurant review',
          icon: '🌟',
          unlocked: profileData.review_count > 0,
          progress: Math.min(profileData.review_count, 1),
          maxProgress: 1
        },
        {
          id: 'five_reviews',
          title: 'Food Explorer',
          description: 'Submit 5 restaurant reviews',
          icon: '🔍',
          unlocked: profileData.review_count >= 5,
          progress: Math.min(profileData.review_count, 5),
          maxProgress: 5
        },
        {
          id: 'level_up',
          title: 'Level Up!',
          description: 'Reach 100 XP points',
          icon: '⭐',
          unlocked: profileData.level_points >= 100,
          progress: Math.min(profileData.level_points, 100),
          maxProgress: 100
        },
        {
          id: 'social_butterfly',
          title: 'Social Butterfly',
          description: 'Get 10 likes on your reviews',
          icon: '🦋',
          unlocked: false, // Will need to calculate from review_likes
          progress: 0,
          maxProgress: 10
        }
      ];

      setAchievements(userAchievements);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching profile and achievements:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const getLevelInfo = (level: string) => {
    const levels = {
      'Foodie': { next: 'Food Explorer', pointsNeeded: 50 },
      'Food Explorer': { next: 'Food Critic', pointsNeeded: 100 },
      'Food Critic': { next: 'Elite Critic', pointsNeeded: 200 },
      'Elite Critic': { next: 'Master Foodie', pointsNeeded: 500 },
      'Master Foodie': { next: null, pointsNeeded: 0 }
    };
    return levels[level as keyof typeof levels] || levels['Foodie'];
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Achievements</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="space-y-4 animate-pulse">
            <div className="h-16 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
            <div className="h-16 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
            <div className="h-16 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  if (!profile) return null;

  const levelInfo = getLevelInfo(profile.current_level);
  const progressToNext = levelInfo.next ? 
    ((profile.level_points % levelInfo.pointsNeeded) / levelInfo.pointsNeeded) * 100 : 100;

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Trophy className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600" />
          Achievements & Progress
        </CardTitle>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent className="space-y-6">
        {/* Level Progress */}
        <div className="space-y-3">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <div>
              <h4 className="font-medium">{profile.current_level}</h4>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{profile.level_points} XP</p>
            </div>
            {levelInfo.next && (
              <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                Next: {levelInfo.next}
              </Badge>
            )}
          </div>
          
          {levelInfo.next && (
            <>
              <Progress value={progressToNext} className="h-2" />
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 text-center">
                {levelInfo.pointsNeeded - (profile.level_points % levelInfo.pointsNeeded)} XP to next level
              </p>
            </>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Achievements */}
        <div className="space-y-3">
          <h4 className="font-medium flex items-center gap-2">
            <Award className="h-4 w-4" />
            Recent Achievements
          </h4>
          
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {achievements.slice(0, 3).map((achievement) => (
              <div
                key={achievement.id}
                className={`flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg border ${
                  achievement.unlocked 
                    ? 'bg-green-50 border-green-200' 
                    : 'bg-gray-50 border-gray-200'
                }`}
              >
                <div className="text-lg">
                  {achievement.unlocked ? achievement.icon : '🔒'}
                </div>
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <h5 className={`text-sm font-medium ${
                    achievement.unlocked ? 'text-green-900' : 'text-gray-600'
                  }`}>
                    {achievement.title}
                  </h5>
                  <p className="text-xs text-gray-600">{achievement.description}</p>
                  {!achievement.unlocked && achievement.maxProgress && (
                    <Progress 
                      value={(achievement.progress! / achievement.maxProgress) * 100} 
                      className="h-1 mt-1"
                    />
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Invite Friends */}
        <div className="bg-blue-50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-blue-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
            <Users className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-600" />
            <h4 className="font-medium text-blue-900">Invite Friends</h4>
          </div>
          <p className="text-sm text-blue-700 mb-3">
            Invite friends and earn 50 XP for each friend who joins!
          </p>
          <Badge className="bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">
            <Gift className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
            50 XP per friend
          </Badge>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default AchievementsPanel;

```

### `src/components/dashboard/ActivityFeed.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Star, Heart, Bookmark, Clock } from 'lucide-react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';

interface ActivityItem {
  id: string;
  type: 'review' | 'like' | 'bookmark';
  created_at: string;
  restaurant_name: string;
  restaurant_id: string;
  rating?: number;
  title?: string;
  likes_count?: number;
}

const ActivityFeed = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [activities, setActivities] = useState<ActivityItem[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchActivities();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchActivities = async () => {
    try {
      // Get recent reviews
      const { data: reviews, error: reviewsError } = await supabase
        .from('reviews')
        .select(`
          id,
          title,
          rating,
          created_at,
          restaurants (id, name)
        `)
        .eq('user_id', user?.id)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
        .limit(5);

      if (reviewsError) throw reviewsError;

      // Get recent bookmarks
      const { data: bookmarks, error: bookmarksError } = await supabase
        .from('user_favorites')
        .select(`
          id,
          created_at,
          restaurants (id, name)
        `)
        .eq('user_id', user?.id)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
        .limit(3);

      if (bookmarksError) throw bookmarksError;

      // Combine and sort activities
      const allActivities: ActivityItem[] = [
        ...(reviews?.map(review => ({
          id: review.id,
          type: 'review' as const,
          created_at: review.created_at,
          restaurant_name: review.restaurants.name,
          restaurant_id: review.restaurants.id,
          rating: review.rating,
          title: review.title
        })) || []),
        ...(bookmarks?.map(bookmark => ({
          id: bookmark.id,
          type: 'bookmark' as const,
          created_at: bookmark.created_at,
          restaurant_name: bookmark.restaurants.name,
          restaurant_id: bookmark.restaurants.id
        })) || [])
      ].sort((a, b) => new Date(b.created_at).getTime() - new Date(a.created_at).getTime());

      setActivities(allActivities.slice(0, 10));
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching activities:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const getActivityIcon = (type: string) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'review':
        return <Star className="h-4 w-4 text-yellow-500" />;
      case 'bookmark':
        return <Bookmark className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-500" />;
      default:
        return <Heart className="h-4 w-4 text-red-500" />;
    }
  };

  const getActivityText = (activity: ActivityItem) => {
    switch (activity.type) {
      case 'review':
        return `Reviewed ${activity.restaurant_name}`;
      case 'bookmark':
        return `Bookmarked ${activity.restaurant_name}`;
      default:
        return `Activity at ${activity.restaurant_name}`;
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Recent Activity</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="space-y-4">
            {[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="flex items-center space-x-3 animate-pulse">
                <div className="h-8 w-8 bg-gray-200 rounded-full"></div>
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <div className="h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-3/4"></div>
                  <div className="h-3 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/2 mt-1"></div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Clock className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600" />
          Recent Activity
        </CardTitle>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        {activities.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="text-center py-8">
            <Clock className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
            <p className="text-gray-600">No recent activity</p>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Start reviewing restaurants to see your activity here!</p>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-4">
            {activities.map((activity) => (
              <div key={activity.id} className="flex items-center space-x-3 p-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
                <div className="flex-shrink-0">
                  {getActivityIcon(activity.type)}
                </div>
                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                  <Link 
                    to={`/restaurants/${activity.restaurant_id}`}
                    className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900 hover:text-green-600"
                  >
                    {getActivityText(activity)}
                  </Link>
                  {activity.rating && (
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-1">
                      <div className="flex">
                        {[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => (
                          <Star
                            key={i}
                            className={`h-3 w-3 ${
                              i < activity.rating! ? 'text-yellow-400 fill-current' : 'text-gray-300'
                            }`}
                          />
                        ))}
                      </div>
                      {activity.title && (
                        <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">• {activity.title}</span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  )}
                  <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">
                    {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(activity.created_at), { addSuffix: true })}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default ActivityFeed;

```

### `src/components/dashboard/AnalyticsManager.tsx`

```tsx

import React from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { BarChart3, TrendingUp, Eye, Users } from 'lucide-react';

interface AnalyticsManagerProps {
  restaurant: any;
  analyticsData: any[];
  hasFeature: (feature: string) => boolean;
}

const AnalyticsManager = ({ restaurant, analyticsData, hasFeature }: AnalyticsManagerProps) => {
  const totalViews = analyticsData?.reduce((sum, day) => sum + (day.views || 0), 0) || 0;
  const totalProfileVisits = analyticsData?.reduce((sum, day) => sum + (day.profile_visits || 0), 0) || 0;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
              <Eye className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-600" />
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">Total Views</p>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold">{totalViews}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
              <Users className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600" />
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">Profile Visits</p>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold">{totalProfileVisits}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
              <TrendingUp className="h-5 w-5 text-purple-600" />
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">Growth Rate</p>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold">+12%</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>

      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <BarChart3 className="h-5 w-5 text-purple-600" />
            Analytics Dashboard
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          {!hasFeature('hasAdvancedAnalytics') ? (
            <div className="text-center py-12">
              <BarChart3 className="h-16 w-16 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
              <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">Advanced Analytics</h3>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
                Upgrade to access detailed analytics including visitor trends, peak hours, and more insights
              </p>
              <Badge variant="outline">Available in Sizzlin & Super Hot plans</Badge>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="text-center py-12">
              <p className="text-gray-600">Advanced analytics features will be displayed here</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
};

export default AnalyticsManager;

```

### `src/components/dashboard/DashboardHeader.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from '@/components/ui/avatar';
import { Shield, Settings } from 'lucide-react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';

interface DashboardHeaderProps {
  user: any;
  isAdmin: boolean;
}

interface Profile {
  full_name: string | null;
  first_name: string | null;
  surname: string | null;
  avatar_url: string | null;
  current_level: string | null;
  level_points: number | null;
}

const DashboardHeader = ({ user, isAdmin }: DashboardHeaderProps) => {
  const [profile, setProfile] = useState<Profile | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchProfile();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchProfile = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('profiles')
        .select('full_name, first_name, surname, avatar_url, current_level, level_points')
        .eq('id', user.id)
        .single();

      if (error) throw error;
      setProfile(data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching profile:', error);
    }
  };

  const getLevelBadgeColor = (level: string) => {
    const colors = {
      'Foodie': 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800',
      'Food Explorer': 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800',
      'Food Critic': 'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
      'Elite Critic': 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800',
      'Master Foodie': 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'
    };
    return colors[level as keyof typeof colors] || colors['Foodie'];
  };

  const getDisplayName = () => {
    if (profile?.first_name && profile?.surname) {
      return `${profile.first_name} ${profile.surname}`;
    }
    if (profile?.full_name) {
      return profile.full_name;
    }
    return 'Food Lover';
  };

  const getAvatarFallback = () => {
    if (profile?.first_name) {
      return profile.first_name.charAt(0);
    }
    if (profile?.full_name) {
      return profile.full_name.charAt(0);
    }
    return user.email?.charAt(0) || '👤';
  };

  return (
    <Card className="bg-gradient-to-r from-green-50 to-green-100 border-green-200">
      <CardContent className="p-6">
        <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <Avatar className="h-16 w-16">
              <AvatarImage src={profile?.avatar_url || ''} alt={getDisplayName()} />
              <AvatarFallback className="text-lg">
                {getAvatarFallback()}
              </AvatarFallback>
            </Avatar>
            
            <div>
              <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">
                Welcome back, {getDisplayName()}! 👋
              </h1>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
                <Badge className={getLevelBadgeColor(profile?.current_level || 'Foodie')}>
                  {profile?.current_level || 'Foodie'} • {profile?.level_points || 0} XP
                </Badge>
                {isAdmin && (
                  <Badge className="bg-green-100 text-green-800 flex items-center gap-1">
                    <Shield className="h-3 w-3" />
                    Admin
                  </Badge>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <Link to="/profile-settings">
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm">
                <Settings className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                Profile Settings
              </Button>
            </Link>
            {isAdmin && (
              <Link to="/admin-dashboard">
                <Button className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700" size="sm">
                  <Shield className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  Admin Panel
                </Button>
                </Link>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default DashboardHeader;

```

### `src/components/dashboard/DashboardSidebar.tsx`

```tsx

import React from 'react';
import { Link, useLocation, useParams } from 'react-router-dom';
import { 
  Home, 
  Store, 
  Menu, 
  ShoppingBag, 
  Megaphone, 
  MessageSquare, 
  Users, 
  BarChart3, 
  CreditCard, 
  Settings,
  Star,
  Plus,
  Heart,
  User
} from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

interface DashboardSidebarProps {
  userType: 'restaurant' | 'reviewer';
  collapsed?: boolean;
}

const DashboardSidebar = ({ userType, collapsed = false }: DashboardSidebarProps) => {
  const location = useLocation();
  const { id } = useParams();

  const restaurantNavItems = [
    { icon: Home, label: 'Home', href: `/restaurant-dashboard/${id}/home`, fallback: `/restaurant-dashboard/${id}` },
    { icon: Store, label: 'My Restaurant', href: `/restaurant-dashboard/${id}/restaurant` },
    { icon: Menu, label: 'Menu Manager', href: `/restaurant-dashboard/${id}/menu` },
    { icon: Megaphone, label: 'Promotions', href: `/restaurant-dashboard/${id}/promotions` },
    { icon: MessageSquare, label: 'Reviews', href: `/restaurant-dashboard/${id}/reviews` },
    { icon: BarChart3, label: 'Analytics', href: `/restaurant-dashboard/${id}/analytics` },
    { icon: Users, label: 'Staff & Tipping', href: `/restaurant-dashboard/${id}/staff` },
    { icon: CreditCard, label: 'Payments & Subscriptions', href: `/restaurant-dashboard/${id}/payments` },
    { icon: Settings, label: 'Settings', href: `/restaurant-dashboard/${id}/settings` },
  ];

  const reviewerNavItems = [
    { icon: Home, label: 'Home', href: '/dashboard', exact: true },
    { icon: MessageSquare, label: 'My Reviews', href: '/my-reviews' },
    { icon: Star, label: 'Foodie Levels', href: '/foodie-levels' },
    { icon: Heart, label: 'Favorites', href: '/favorites' },
    { icon: Plus, label: 'Add Restaurant', href: '/add-restaurant' },
    { icon: User, label: 'Profile Settings', href: '/profile-settings' },
  ];

  const navItems = userType === 'restaurant' ? restaurantNavItems : reviewerNavItems;

  const isActive = (href: string, fallback?: string, exact?: boolean) => {
    if (exact) {
      return location.pathname === href;
    }
    return location.pathname === href || (fallback && location.pathname === fallback) || location.pathname.startsWith(href);
  };

  const showOverviewNav = userType === 'restaurant' && location.pathname === '/restaurant-dashboard';

  if (showOverviewNav) {
    return (
      <div className={cn(
        "bg-white border-r border-gray-200 h-screen sticky top-0 transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col",
        collapsed ? "w-16" : "w-64"
      )}>
        <div className="p-4 border-b">
          <h2 className={cn(
            "font-bold text-lg text-gray-900 transition-opacity",
            collapsed ? "opacity-0" : "opacity-100"
          )}>
            Dashboard
          </h2>
        </div>
        <div className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center text-center text-gray-600 p-4">
          {!collapsed && <p>Select a restaurant to manage</p>}
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className={cn(
      "bg-white border-r border-gray-200 h-screen sticky top-0 transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col",
      collapsed ? "w-16" : "w-64"
    )}>
      <div className="p-4 border-b">
        <h2 className={cn(
          "font-bold text-lg text-gray-900 transition-opacity",
          collapsed ? "opacity-0" : "opacity-100"
        )}>
          {userType === 'restaurant' ? 'Restaurant' : 'Dashboard'}
        </h2>
      </div>

      <nav className="flex-1 space-y-1 p-2 overflow-y-auto">
        {navItems.map((item) => {
          const Icon = item.icon;
          const active = isActive(item.href, item.fallback, item.exact);
          
          return (
            <Link
              key={item.href}
              to={item.href}
              className={cn(
                "flex items-center px-3 py-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 group relative",
                active 
                  ? "bg-green-100 text-green-700 shadow-sm" 
                  : "text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-900"
              )}
              title={collapsed ? item.label : undefined}
            >
              <Icon className={cn(
                "h-5 w-5 flex-shrink-0", 
                collapsed ? "" : "mr-3",
                active ? "text-green-600" : ""
              )} />
              {!collapsed && <span className="truncate">{item.label}</span>}
              
              {/* Tooltip for collapsed state */}
              {collapsed && (
                <div className="absolute left-full ml-2 px-2 py-1 bg-gray-900 text-white text-xs rounded opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 pointer-events-none whitespace-nowrap z-50">
                  {item.label}
                </div>
              )}
            </Link>
          );
        })}
      </nav>
    </div>
  );
};

export default DashboardSidebar;

```

### `src/components/dashboard/DeleteReviewDialog.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import {
  AlertDialog,
  AlertDialogAction,
  AlertDialogCancel,
  AlertDialogContent,
  AlertDialogDescription,
  AlertDialogFooter,
  AlertDialogHeader,
  AlertDialogTitle,
} from '@/components/ui/alert-dialog';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';

interface DeleteReviewDialogProps {
  reviewId: string | null;
  restaurantName: string;
  open: boolean;
  onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void;
  onReviewDeleted: () => void;
}

const DeleteReviewDialog: React.FC<DeleteReviewDialogProps> = ({
  reviewId,
  restaurantName,
  open,
  onOpenChange,
  onReviewDeleted,
}) => {
  const { toast } = useToast();
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const handleDelete = async () => {
    if (!reviewId) return;

    setLoading(true);
    try {
      // First delete any likes for this review
      await supabase
        .from('review_likes')
        .delete()
        .eq('review_id', reviewId);

      // Then delete the review itself
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('reviews')
        .delete()
        .eq('id', reviewId);

      if (error) throw error;

      toast({
        title: 'Success',
        description: 'Review deleted successfully!',
      });

      onReviewDeleted();
      onOpenChange(false);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error deleting review:', error);
      toast({
        title: 'Error',
        description: 'Failed to delete review. Please try again.',
        variant: 'destructive',
      });
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <AlertDialog open={open} onOpenChange={onOpenChange}>
      <AlertDialogContent>
        <AlertDialogHeader>
          <AlertDialogTitle>Delete Review</AlertDialogTitle>
          <AlertDialogDescription>
            Are you sure you want to delete your review for "{restaurantName}"? 
            This action cannot be undone and you will lose any XP points earned from this review.
          </AlertDialogDescription>
        </AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogFooter>
          <AlertDialogCancel disabled={loading}>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
          <AlertDialogAction
            onClick={handleDelete}
            disabled={loading}
            className="bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700"
          >
            {loading ? 'Deleting...' : 'Delete Review'}
          </AlertDialogAction>
        </AlertDialogFooter>
      </AlertDialogContent>
    </AlertDialog>
  );
};

export default DeleteReviewDialog;

```

### `src/components/dashboard/DiscoveryTools.tsx`

```tsx

import React from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Shuffle, Search, TrendingUp, MapPin } from 'lucide-react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import RouletteGame from '@/components/RouletteGame';

const DiscoveryTools = () => {
  const cuisineTypes = [
    { name: 'Asian', emoji: '🍜', count: 45 },
    { name: 'Middle Eastern', emoji: '🥙', count: 32 },
    { name: 'African', emoji: '🍛', count: 28 },
    { name: 'American', emoji: '🍔', count: 56 },
    { name: 'Indian', emoji: '🍛', count: 38 }
  ];

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Search className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600" />
          Discovery Tools
        </CardTitle>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent className="space-y-6">
        {/* Foodie Roulette */}
        <div>
          <h4 className="font-medium mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Shuffle className="h-4 w-4 text-orange-500" />
            Foodie Roulette
          </h4>
          <RouletteGame />
        </div>

        {/* Cuisine Selector */}
        <div>
          <h4 className="font-medium mb-3">Cuisine Types</h4>
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {cuisineTypes.map((cuisine) => (
              <Link
                key={cuisine.name}
                to={`/restaurants?cuisine=${cuisine.name.toLowerCase()}`}
                className="flex items-center justify-between p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
              >
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <span className="text-lg">{cuisine.emoji}</span>
                  <span className="text-sm font-medium">{cuisine.name}</span>
                </div>
                <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                  {cuisine.count}
                </Badge>
              </Link>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Trending & Nearby */}
        <div className="space-y-2">
          <Link to="/restaurants?sort=trending">
            <Button variant="outline" className="w-full justify-start">
              <TrendingUp className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
              Trending Near You
            </Button>
          </Link>
          <Link to="/restaurants?sort=distance">
            <Button variant="outline" className="w-full justify-start">
              <MapPin className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
              Closest Restaurants
            </Button>
          </Link>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default DiscoveryTools;
```

### `src/components/dashboard/EditReviewDialog.tsx`

```tsx
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
  DialogFooter,
} from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Star, X, Upload, Image as ImageIcon } from 'lucide-react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
import FileUpload from '@/components/ui/file-upload';

interface Review {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  content: string;
  rating: number;
  photos: string[];
  tiktok_url: string;
}

interface EditReviewDialogProps {
  review: Review | null;
  open: boolean;
  onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void;
  onReviewUpdated: () => void;
}

const EditReviewDialog: React.FC<EditReviewDialogProps> = ({
  review,
  open,
  onOpenChange,
  onReviewUpdated,
}) => {
  const { toast } = useToast();
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    title: review?.title || '',
    content: review?.content || '',
    rating: review?.rating || 5,
    tiktok_url: review?.tiktok_url || '',
  });
  const [existingPhotos, setExistingPhotos] = useState<string[]>(review?.photos || []);
  const [newPhotos, setNewPhotos] = useState<File[]>([]);
  const [newPhotoUrls, setNewPhotoUrls] = useState<string[]>([]);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (review) {
      setFormData({
        title: review.title || '',
        content: review.content || '',
        rating: review.rating || 5,
        tiktok_url: review.tiktok_url || '',
      });
      setExistingPhotos(review.photos || []);
      setNewPhotos([]);
      setNewPhotoUrls([]);
    }
  }, [review]);

  const handleRemoveExistingPhoto = (photoUrl: string) => {
    setExistingPhotos(prev => prev.filter(url => url !== photoUrl));
  };

  const handleAddNewPhoto = (file: File, url: string) => {
    if (file) {
      setNewPhotos(prev => [...prev, file]);
      setNewPhotoUrls(prev => [...prev, url]);
    }
  };

  const handleRemoveNewPhoto = (index: number) => {
    setNewPhotos(prev => prev.filter((_, i) => i !== index));
    setNewPhotoUrls(prev => prev.filter((_, i) => i !== index));
  };

  const uploadPhoto = async (file: File, userId: string): Promise<string> => {
    const fileExt = file.name.split('.').pop();
    const fileName = `${userId}/${Date.now()}.${fileExt}`;
    
    const { data, error } = await supabase.storage
      .from('review-images')
      .upload(fileName, file);

    if (error) throw error;

    const { data: urlData } = supabase.storage
      .from('review-images')
      .getPublicUrl(data.path);

    return urlData.publicUrl;
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!review) return;

    setLoading(true);
    try {
      // Upload new photos if any
      let uploadedPhotoUrls: string[] = [];
      if (newPhotos.length > 0) {
        const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
        if (!user) throw new Error('User not authenticated');

        uploadedPhotoUrls = await Promise.all(
          newPhotos.map(photo => uploadPhoto(photo, user.id))
        );
      }

      // Combine existing photos (not removed) with newly uploaded photos
      const allPhotos = [...existingPhotos, ...uploadedPhotoUrls];

      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('reviews')
        .update({
          title: formData.title,
          content: formData.content,
          rating: formData.rating,
          tiktok_url: formData.tiktok_url,
          photos: allPhotos,
          updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
        })
        .eq('id', review.id);

      if (error) throw error;

      toast({
        title: 'Success',
        description: 'Review updated successfully!',
      });

      onReviewUpdated();
      onOpenChange(false);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error updating review:', error);
      toast({
        title: 'Error',
        description: 'Failed to update review. Please try again.',
        variant: 'destructive',
      });
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={onOpenChange}>
      <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-[600px] max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle>Edit Review</DialogTitle>
        </DialogHeader>
        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="rating">Rating</Label>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-1">
              {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((star) => (
                <button
                  key={star}
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, rating: star }))}
                  className="p-1"
                >
                  <Star
                    className={`h-6 w-6 ${
                      star <= formData.rating
                        ? 'text-yellow-400 fill-current'
                        : 'text-gray-300'
                    }`}
                  />
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="title">Title (optional)</Label>
            <Input
              id="title"
              value={formData.title}
              onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, title: e.target.value }))}
              placeholder="Give your review a title..."
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="content">Review</Label>
            <Textarea
              id="content"
              value={formData.content}
              onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, content: e.target.value }))}
              placeholder="Share your experience..."
              rows={4}
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <Label>Photos</Label>
            
            {/* Existing Photos */}
            {existingPhotos.length > 0 && (
              <div className="mt-2">
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2">Current Photos:</p>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                  {existingPhotos.map((photoUrl, index) => (
                    <div key={index} className="relative group">
                      <img
                        src={photoUrl}
                        alt={`Review photo ${index + 1}`}
                        className="w-full h-24 object-cover rounded border"
                      />
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => handleRemoveExistingPhoto(photoUrl)}
                        className="absolute top-1 right-1 bg-red-600 text-white rounded-full p-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity"
                      >
                        <X className="h-3 w-3" />
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* New Photos Preview */}
            {newPhotoUrls.length > 0 && (
              <div className="mt-2">
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2">New Photos to Add:</p>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                  {newPhotoUrls.map((url, index) => (
                    <div key={index} className="relative group">
                      <img
                        src={url}
                        alt={`New photo ${index + 1}`}
                        className="w-full h-24 object-cover rounded border border-green-300"
                      />
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => handleRemoveNewPhoto(index)}
                        className="absolute top-1 right-1 bg-red-600 text-white rounded-full p-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity"
                      >
                        <X className="h-3 w-3" />
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Add New Photo */}
            <div className="mt-2">
              <FileUpload
                id="new-photo"
                label="Add New Photo"
                accept="image/*"
                onChange={handleAddNewPhoto}
                className="mt-2"
              />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="tiktok_url">TikTok URL (optional)</Label>
            <Input
              id="tiktok_url"
              value={formData.tiktok_url}
              onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, tiktok_url: e.target.value }))}
              placeholder="https://tiktok.com/@username/video/..."
            />
          </div>

          <DialogFooter>
            <Button
              type="button"
              variant="outline"
              onClick={() => onOpenChange(false)}
              disabled={loading}
            >
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button type="submit" disabled={loading}>
              {loading ? 'Updating...' : 'Update Review'}
            </Button>
          </DialogFooter>
        </form>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
};

export default EditReviewDialog;

```

```tsx
import React from 'react';
```

### `src/components/dashboard/MenuManager.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Switch } from '@/components/ui/switch';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { Plus, Edit, Trash2, Eye, EyeOff, UtensilsCrossed } from 'lucide-react';
import type { Database } from '@/integrations/supabase/types';

type MenuItem = Database['public']['Tables']['menu_items']['Row'];
type MenuItemInsert = Database['public']['Tables']['menu_items']['Insert'];
type SpiceLevel = Database['public']['Enums']['spice_level'];

interface MenuManagerProps {
  restaurant: any;
}

const MenuManager = ({ restaurant }: MenuManagerProps) => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [menuItems, setMenuItems] = useState<MenuItem[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [showAddDialog, setShowAddDialog] = useState(false);
  const [editingItem, setEditingItem] = useState<MenuItem | null>(null);

  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<Partial<MenuItemInsert>>({
    name: '',
    description: '',
    price: 0,
    category: '',
    spice_level: null,
    is_available: true,
    allergens: [],
    restaurant_id: restaurant?.id
  });

  const categories = ['Appetizers', 'Mains', 'Desserts', 'Beverages', 'Sides'];
  const spiceLevels: { value: SpiceLevel; label: string }[] = [
    { value: 'mild', label: 'Mild' },
    { value: 'medium', label: 'Medium' },
    { value: 'hot', label: 'Hot' },
    { value: 'extra_hot', label: 'Extra Hot' }
  ];

  useEffect(() => {
    if (restaurant?.id) {
      fetchMenuItems();
    }
  }, [restaurant?.id]);

  const fetchMenuItems = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('menu_items')
        .select('*')
        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)
        .order('category', { ascending: true });

      if (error) throw error;
      setMenuItems(data || []);
    } catch (error: any) {
      console.error('Error fetching menu items:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to load menu items');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!user || !restaurant?.id || !formData.name) return;

    try {
      const itemData = {
        name: formData.name,
        description: formData.description || null,
        price: Number(formData.price) || null,
        category: formData.category || null,
        spice_level: formData.spice_level,
        is_available: formData.is_available ?? true,
        allergens: formData.allergens || null,
        restaurant_id: restaurant.id
      };

      if (editingItem) {
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('menu_items')
          .update(itemData)
          .eq('id', editingItem.id);

        if (error) throw error;
        toast.success('Menu item updated successfully');
      } else {
        // Check item limit for basic plan
        const itemsInCategory = menuItems.filter(item => item.category === formData.category);
        if (restaurant.subscription_tier === 'basic' && itemsInCategory.length >= 10) {
          toast.error('Basic plan allows only 10 items per category. Upgrade to add more.');
          return;
        }

        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('menu_items')
          .insert(itemData);

        if (error) throw error;
        toast.success('Menu item added successfully');
      }

      fetchMenuItems();
      resetForm();
    } catch (error: any) {
      console.error('Error saving menu item:', error);
      toast.error(`Failed to ${editingItem ? 'update' : 'add'} menu item`);
    }
  };

  const resetForm = () => {
    setFormData({
      name: '',
      description: '',
      price: 0,
      category: '',
      spice_level: null,
      is_available: true,
      allergens: [],
      restaurant_id: restaurant?.id
    });
    setEditingItem(null);
    setShowAddDialog(false);
  };

  const handleEdit = (item: MenuItem) => {
    setEditingItem(item);
    setFormData({
      name: item.name,
      description: item.description || '',
      price: item.price || 0,
      category: item.category || '',
      spice_level: item.spice_level,
      is_available: item.is_available,
      allergens: item.allergens || [],
      restaurant_id: item.restaurant_id
    });
    setShowAddDialog(true);
  };

  const handleDelete = async (itemId: string) => {
    if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this menu item?')) return;

    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('menu_items')
        .delete()
        .eq('id', itemId);

      if (error) throw error;
      toast.success('Menu item deleted successfully');
      fetchMenuItems();
    } catch (error: any) {
      console.error('Error deleting menu item:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to delete menu item');
    }
  };

  const toggleAvailability = async (item: MenuItem) => {
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('menu_items')
        .update({ is_available: !item.is_available })
        .eq('id', item.id);

      if (error) throw error;
      fetchMenuItems();
    } catch (error: any) {
      console.error('Error updating availability:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to update availability');
    }
  };

  const getItemsByCategory = (category: string) => {
    return menuItems.filter(item => item.category === category);
  };

  const getCategoryItemCount = (category: string) => {
    return getItemsByCategory(category).length;
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="space-y-6">
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-6">
            <div className="text-center py-8">Loading menu items...</div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
        <div>
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Menu Manager</h2>
          <p className="text-gray-600">Manage your restaurant's menu items</p>
        </div>
        <Dialog open={showAddDialog} onOpenChange={setShowAddDialog}>
          <DialogTrigger asChild>
            <Button onClick={() => resetForm()}>
              <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
              Add Menu Item
            </Button>
          </DialogTrigger>
          <DialogContent className="max-w-md">
            <DialogHeader>
              <DialogTitle>
                {editingItem ? 'Edit Menu Item' : 'Add New Menu Item'}
              </DialogTitle>
            </DialogHeader>
            <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
              <div>
                <Label htmlFor="name">Item Name *</Label>
                <Input
                  id="name"
                  value={formData.name}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, name: e.target.value }))}
                  placeholder="Enter item name"
                  required
                />
              </div>

              <div>
                <Label htmlFor="category">Category *</Label>
                <Select
                  value={formData.category}
                  onValueChange={(value) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, category: value }))}
                >
                  <SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectValue placeholder="Select category" />
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    {categories.map(category => (
                      <SelectItem key={category} value={category}>
                        {category} ({getCategoryItemCount(category)}/10)
                      </SelectItem>
                    ))}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              <div>
                <Label htmlFor="description">Description</Label>
                <Textarea
                  id="description"
                  value={formData.description}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, description: e.target.value }))}
                  placeholder="Describe the dish..."
                  rows={3}
                />
              </div>

              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div>
                  <Label htmlFor="price">Price (R)</Label>
                  <Input
                    id="price"
                    type="number"
                    min="0"
                    step="0.01"
                    value={formData.price}
                    onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, price: Number(e.target.value) }))}
                    placeholder="0.00"
                  />
                </div>

                <div>
                  <Label htmlFor="spice_level">Spice Level</Label>
                  <Select
                    value={formData.spice_level || ''}
                    onValueChange={(value) => setFormData(prev => ({ 
                      ...prev, 
                      spice_level: value === '' ? null : value as SpiceLevel 
                    }))}
                  >
                    <SelectTrigger>
                      <SelectValue placeholder="Select spice level" />
                    </SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                      <SelectItem value="">No spice level</SelectItem>
                      {spiceLevels.map(level => (
                        <SelectItem key={level.value} value={level.value}>
                          {level.label}
                        </SelectItem>
                      ))}
                    </SelectContent>
                  </Select>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                <Switch
                  id="is_available"
                  checked={formData.is_available}
                  onCheckedChange={(checked) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, is_available: checked }))}
                />
                <Label htmlFor="is_available">Available for ordering</Label>
              </div>

              <div className="flex gap-3">
                <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={resetForm}>
                  Cancel
                </Button>
                <Button type="submit">
                  {editingItem ? 'Update Item' : 'Add Item'}
                </Button>
              </div>
            </form>
          </DialogContent>
        </Dialog>
      </div>

      {categories.map(category => {
        const categoryItems = getItemsByCategory(category);
        if (categoryItems.length === 0) return null;

        return (
          <Card key={category}>
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span>{category}</span>
                <Badge variant="outline">
                  {categoryItems.length} item{categoryItems.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
                </Badge>
              </CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {categoryItems.map((item) => (
                  <div key={item.id} className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border rounded-lg">
                    <div className="flex-1">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <h4 className="font-medium">{item.name}</h4>
                        {item.spice_level && (
                          <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">
                            {spiceLevels.find(level => level.value === item.spice_level)?.label}
                          </Badge>
                        )}
                        {!item.is_available && (
                          <Badge variant="destructive" className="text-xs">
                            Out of Stock
                          </Badge>
                        )}
                      </div>
                      {item.description && (
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">{item.description}</p>
                      )}
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mt-2">
                        <span className="font-semibold text-green-600">
                          R{item.price?.toFixed(2) || '0.00'}
                        </span>
                        <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                          {item.view_count || 0} views
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Button
                        variant="ghost"
                        size="sm"
                        onClick={() => toggleAvailability(item)}
                      >
                        {item.is_available ? (
                          <Eye className="h-4 w-4" />
                        ) : (
                          <EyeOff className="h-4 w-4" />
                        )}
                      </Button>
                      <Button
                        variant="ghost"
                        size="sm"
                        onClick={() => handleEdit(item)}
                      >
                        <Edit className="h-4 w-4" />
                      </Button>
                      <Button
                        variant="ghost"
                        size="sm"
                        onClick={() => handleDelete(item.id)}
                      >
                        <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4" />
                      </Button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        );
      })}

      {menuItems.length === 0 && (
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="text-center py-12">
            <UtensilsCrossed className="h-16 w-16 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
            <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">No Menu Items Yet</h3>
            <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
              Start building your menu by adding your first dish
            </p>
            <Button onClick={() => setShowAddDialog(true)}>
              <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
              Add Your First Item
            </Button>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      )}

      {restaurant?.subscription_tier === 'basic' && (
        <Card className="border-amber-200 bg-amber-50">
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-amber-800">
              <span className="text-sm font-medium">Basic Plan Limits:</span>
              <span className="text-sm">10 items per category</span>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default MenuManager;

```
