### `src/components/dashboard/QuickStatsCard.tsx`

```tsx

import React from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { LucideIcon } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

interface QuickStatsCardProps {
  title: string;
  value: string | number;
  change?: string;
  changeType?: 'positive' | 'negative' | 'neutral';
  icon: LucideIcon;
  iconColor?: string;
  loading?: boolean;
}

const QuickStatsCard = ({ 
  title, 
  value, 
  change, 
  changeType = 'neutral', 
  icon: Icon, 
  iconColor = 'text-blue-600',
  loading = false 
}: QuickStatsCardProps) => {
  const getChangeColor = () => {
    switch (changeType) {
      case 'positive': return 'text-green-600';
      case 'negative': return 'text-red-600';
      default: return 'text-gray-600';
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <Card>
        <CardContent className="p-6">
          <div className="animate-pulse">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
              <div className="w-16 h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
            </div>
            <div className="mt-4 w-20 h-8 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
            <div className="mt-2 w-24 h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Card className="hover:shadow-md transition-shadow">
      <CardContent className="p-6">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className={cn("p-2 rounded-lg bg-gray-50", iconColor)}>
            <Icon className="h-6 w-6" />
          </div>
          {change && (
            <span className={cn("text-sm font-medium", getChangeColor())}>
              {change}
            </span>
          )}
        </div>
        
        <div className="mt-4">
          <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{value}</h3>
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">{title}</p>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default QuickStatsCard;

```

### `src/components/dashboard/RestaurantDashboardTabs.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useLocation, useNavigate, useParams } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { 
  Home, 
  Store, 
  Menu, 
  Megaphone, 
  MessageSquare, 
  BarChart3, 
  Users, 
  CreditCard, 
  Settings
} from 'lucide-react';

// Dashboard component imports
import RestaurantHomeTab from './RestaurantHomeTab';
import RestaurantProfileTab from './RestaurantProfileTab';
import MenuManager from './MenuManager';
import ReviewsManager from './ReviewsManager';
import AnalyticsManager from './AnalyticsManager';
import StaffManager from './StaffManager';
import PromotionsManager from './PromotionsManager';
import PaymentsManager from './PaymentsManager';
import SettingsManager from './SettingsManager';

interface RestaurantDashboardTabsProps {
  restaurant: any;
}

const RestaurantDashboardTabs = ({ restaurant }: RestaurantDashboardTabsProps) => {
  const location = useLocation();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const { id } = useParams();
  
  // Extract tab from URL path
  const pathParts = location.pathname.split('/');
  const urlTab = pathParts[pathParts.length - 1];
  
  // Map URL segments to tab values
  const getTabFromUrl = () => {
    if (urlTab === id || urlTab === 'home') return 'home';
    if (urlTab === 'restaurant') return 'restaurant';
    if (urlTab === 'menu') return 'menu';
    if (urlTab === 'promotions') return 'promotions';
    if (urlTab === 'reviews') return 'reviews';
    if (urlTab === 'analytics') return 'analytics';
    if (urlTab === 'staff') return 'staff';
    if (urlTab === 'payments') return 'payments';
    if (urlTab === 'settings') return 'settings';
    return 'home'; // default
  };

  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(getTabFromUrl());

  // Update activeTab when URL changes
  useEffect(() => {
    setActiveTab(getTabFromUrl());
  }, [location.pathname]);

  const handleTabChange = (value: string) => {
    setActiveTab(value);
    // Navigate to the appropriate URL
    const basePath = `/restaurant-dashboard/${id}`;
    if (value === 'home') {
      navigate(basePath);
    } else {
      navigate(`${basePath}/${value}`);
    }
  };

  const hasFeature = (feature: string): boolean => {
    if (!restaurant?.subscription_tier) return false;
    
    const basicFeatures = ['home', 'restaurant', 'menu', 'reviews'];
    const premiumFeatures = ['promotions', 'analytics', 'staff'];
    const enterpriseFeatures = ['payments', 'settings'];

    if (basicFeatures.includes(feature)) return true;
    if (restaurant.subscription_tier === 'premium' && premiumFeatures.includes(feature)) return true;
    if (restaurant.subscription_tier === 'enterprise' && enterpriseFeatures.includes(feature)) return true;
    
    return false;
  };

  const getTabContent = () => {
    switch (activeTab) {
      case 'home':
        return <RestaurantHomeTab restaurant={restaurant} />;
      case 'restaurant':
        return <RestaurantProfileTab restaurant={restaurant} />;
      case 'menu':
        return <MenuManager restaurant={restaurant} />;
      case 'promotions':
        return hasFeature('promotions') ? <PromotionsManager restaurant={restaurant} /> : <UpgradePrompt feature="Promotions" tier="Premium" />;
      case 'reviews':
        return <ReviewsManager restaurant={restaurant} />;
      case 'analytics':
        return hasFeature('analytics') ? <AnalyticsManager restaurant={restaurant} analyticsData={[]} hasFeature={hasFeature} /> : <UpgradePrompt feature="Analytics" tier="Premium" />;
      case 'staff':
        return hasFeature('staff') ? <StaffManager restaurant={restaurant} /> : <UpgradePrompt feature="Staff & Tipping" tier="Premium" />;
      case 'payments':
        return hasFeature('payments') ? <PaymentsManager restaurant={restaurant} subscription={null} /> : <UpgradePrompt feature="Payments & Subscriptions" tier="Enterprise" />;
      case 'settings':
        return hasFeature('settings') ? <SettingsManager restaurant={restaurant} /> : <UpgradePrompt feature="Settings" tier="Enterprise" />;
      default:
        return <RestaurantHomeTab restaurant={restaurant} />;
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={handleTabChange} className="w-full">
        <TabsList className="grid w-full grid-cols-9 mb-6">
          <TabsTrigger value="home" className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Home className="h-4 w-4" />
            Home
          </TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger value="restaurant" className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Store className="h-4 w-4" />
            My Restaurant
          </TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger value="menu" className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Menu className="h-4 w-4" />
            Menu Manager
          </TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger 
            value="promotions" 
            className="flex items-center gap-2"
            disabled={!hasFeature('promotions')}
          >
            <Megaphone className="h-4 w-4" />
            Promotions
            {!hasFeature('promotions') && <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1 text-xs">Pro</Badge>}
          </TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger value="reviews" className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <MessageSquare className="h-4 w-4" />
            Reviews
          </TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger 
            value="analytics" 
            className="flex items-center gap-2"
            disabled={!hasFeature('analytics')}
          >
            <BarChart3 className="h-4 w-4" />
            Analytics
            {!hasFeature('analytics') && <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1 text-xs">Pro</Badge>}
          </TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger 
            value="staff" 
            className="flex items-center gap-2"
            disabled={!hasFeature('staff')}
          >
            <Users className="h-4 w-4" />
            Staff & Tipping
            {!hasFeature('staff') && <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1 text-xs">Pro</Badge>}
          </TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger 
            value="payments" 
            className="flex items-center gap-2"
            disabled={!hasFeature('payments')}
          >
            <CreditCard className="h-4 w-4" />
            Payments & Subscriptions
            {!hasFeature('payments') && <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1 text-xs">Ent</Badge>}
          </TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger 
            value="settings" 
            className="flex items-center gap-2"
            disabled={!hasFeature('settings')}
          >
            <Settings className="h-4 w-4" />
            Settings
            {!hasFeature('settings') && <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1 text-xs">Ent</Badge>}
          </TabsTrigger>
        </TabsList>

        <div className="mt-6">
          {getTabContent()}
        </div>
      </Tabs>
    </div>
  );
};

// Upgrade Prompt Component
const UpgradePrompt = ({ feature, tier }: { feature: string; tier: string }) => {
  return (
    <div className="text-center py-12 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300">
      <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">{feature} - {tier} Feature</h3>
      <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
        Upgrade to {tier} to access {feature.toLowerCase()} and unlock more powerful tools for your restaurant.
      </p>
      <button className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-lg">
        Upgrade to {tier}
      </button>
    </div>
  );
};

export default RestaurantDashboardTabs;

```

### `src/components/dashboard/RestaurantHomeTab.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { 
  Eye, 
  Star, 
  TrendingUp, 
  Users, 
  Megaphone,
  Store,
  Menu,
  ExternalLink,
  Calendar
} from 'lucide-react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';

interface RestaurantHomeTabProps {
  restaurant: any;
}

const RestaurantHomeTab = ({ restaurant }: RestaurantHomeTabProps) => {
  const [analytics, setAnalytics] = useState({
    viewsThisMonth: 0,
    uniqueVisitors: 0,
    mostViewedDish: 'Loading...',
    activePromotion: null
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    if (restaurant?.id) {
      fetchAnalytics();
    }
  }, [restaurant?.id]);

  const fetchAnalytics = async () => {
    try {
      // Get views this month
      const startOfMonth = new Date();
      startOfMonth.setDate(1);
      startOfMonth.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);

      const { data: analyticsData } = await supabase
        .from('restaurant_analytics')
        .select('views, profile_visits')
        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)
        .gte('date', startOfMonth.toISOString());

      const totalViews = analyticsData?.reduce((sum, day) => sum + (day.views || 0), 0) || 0;
      const totalVisitors = analyticsData?.reduce((sum, day) => sum + (day.profile_visits || 0), 0) || 0;

      // Get most viewed dish (placeholder for now)
      const mostViewed = 'Butter Chicken'; // This would come from menu analytics

      setAnalytics({
        viewsThisMonth: totalViews,
        uniqueVisitors: totalVisitors,
        mostViewedDish: mostViewed,
        activePromotion: null // Would fetch from promotions table
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching analytics:', error);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Metrics Cards */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">Views This Month</p>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-600">{analytics.viewsThisMonth}</p>
              </div>
              <Eye className="h-8 w-8 text-blue-600" />
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">Average Rating</p>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-yellow-600">{restaurant?.average_rating?.toFixed(1) || '0.0'}</p>
              </div>
              <Star className="h-8 w-8 text-yellow-600" />
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">Most Viewed Dish</p>
                <p className="text-lg font-bold text-green-600">{analytics.mostViewedDish}</p>
              </div>
              <TrendingUp className="h-8 w-8 text-green-600" />
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">Unique Visitors</p>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-purple-600">{analytics.uniqueVisitors}</p>
              </div>
              <Users className="h-8 w-8 text-purple-600" />
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>

      {/* Active Promotion Card */}
      {analytics.activePromotion && (
        <Card className="border-orange-200 bg-orange-50">
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-orange-800">
              <Megaphone className="h-5 w-5" />
              Active Promotion
            </CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <p className="text-orange-700">Your current promotion is running successfully!</p>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      )}

      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
        {/* Quick Actions */}
        <div className="lg:col-span-2">
          <Card>
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle>Quick Actions</CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent className="space-y-4">
              <Button className="w-full justify-start" variant="default">
                <Store className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                Edit Restaurant Profile
              </Button>
              <Button variant="outline" className="w-full justify-start">
                <Menu className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                Manage Menu Items
              </Button>
              <Button variant="outline" className="w-full justify-start">
                <ExternalLink className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                View Your Public Page
              </Button>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </div>

        {/* Subscription Status */}
        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle>Subscription Status</CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <Badge variant="outline" className="w-full justify-center py-2 text-sm">
                {restaurant?.subscription_tier?.toUpperCase() || 'BASIC'} Plan
              </Badge>
              <div className="text-center text-sm text-gray-600">
                {restaurant?.subscription_tier === 'basic' && (
                  <p>Upgrade to unlock more features</p>
                )}
              </div>
              <Button variant="outline" className="w-full">
                Upgrade Plan
              </Button>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>

      {/* Recent Activity */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Calendar className="h-5 w-5" />
            Recent Activity
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-gray-100">
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Profile viewed 12 times today</span>
              <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">2 hours ago</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-gray-100">
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">New review received (4 stars)</span>
              <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">5 hours ago</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2">
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Menu updated successfully</span>
              <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">1 day ago</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
};

export default RestaurantHomeTab;

```

### `src/components/dashboard/RestaurantOverview.tsx`

```tsx

import React from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Clock, CheckCircle, AlertCircle, Plus, Search, Store, BarChart3, Trophy } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  subscription_tier: string;
  is_verified: boolean;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
}

interface RestaurantClaim {
  id: string;
  restaurant_id: string;
  status: string;
  created_at: string;
  restaurants?: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    address: string;
    city: string;
  };
}

interface RestaurantOverviewProps {
  pendingClaims?: RestaurantClaim[];
  ownedRestaurants?: Restaurant[];
  subscription?: any;
}

const RestaurantOverview = ({ 
  pendingClaims = [], 
  ownedRestaurants = [],
  subscription 
}: RestaurantOverviewProps) => {
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Restaurant Dashboard</h1>
        <Badge variant="outline" className="bg-green-50 text-green-700 border-green-200">
          {subscription?.tier || 'Basic'} Plan
        </Badge>
      </div>

      {/* Owned Restaurants Section */}
      {ownedRestaurants.length > 0 && (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900">My Restaurants</h2>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            {ownedRestaurants.map((restaurant) => (
              <Card key={restaurant.id} className="hover:shadow-md transition-shadow cursor-pointer">
                <CardContent className="p-4">
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                    <div className="flex-1">
                      <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg">{restaurant.name}</h3>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{restaurant.address}, {restaurant.city}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex gap-1">
                      {restaurant.is_verified && (
                        <Badge className="bg-blue-500 text-white text-xs">Verified</Badge>
                      )}
                      {restaurant.is_halaal_certified && (
                        <Badge className="bg-green-500 text-white text-xs">Halaal</Badge>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
                    <div className="text-center">
                      <div className="text-xl font-bold text-green-600">{restaurant.average_rating.toFixed(1)}</div>
                      <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">Rating</div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-center">
                      <div className="text-xl font-bold text-blue-600">{restaurant.total_reviews}</div>
                      <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">Reviews</div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-center">
                      <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                        {restaurant.subscription_tier}
                      </Badge>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  
                  <Button 
                    onClick={() => navigate(`/restaurant/${restaurant.id}/dashboard`)}
                    className="w-full bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700"
                    size="sm"
                  >
                    Manage Restaurant
                  </Button>
                </CardContent>
              </Card>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Pending Claims Section */}
      {pendingClaims.length > 0 && (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900">Pending Claims</h2>
          {pendingClaims.map((claim) => (
            <Card key={claim.id} className="border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50">
              <CardContent className="p-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                  <Clock className="h-5 w-5 text-yellow-600" />
                  <div>
                    <p className="font-medium text-yellow-900">Claim Under Review</p>
                    {claim.restaurants && (
                      <p className="text-sm text-yellow-700">
                        {claim.restaurants.name} - {claim.restaurants.address}, {claim.restaurants.city}
                      </p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <p className="text-sm text-yellow-800 mb-2">
                  Your restaurant claim is being reviewed by our team. We'll notify you once approved.
                </p>
                <p className="text-xs text-yellow-600">
                  Submitted on {new Date(claim.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                </p>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Quick Actions for users with no restaurants */}
      {ownedRestaurants.length === 0 && (
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
          <Card className="border-green-200 hover:border-green-300 transition-colors">
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-green-700">
                <Plus className="h-5 w-5" />
                Add New Restaurant
              </CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Add a new restaurant to our platform and claim ownership.
              </p>
              <Button 
                onClick={() => navigate('/add-restaurant')}
                className="w-full bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700"
              >
                Add Restaurant
              </Button>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>

          <Card className="border-blue-200 hover:border-blue-300 transition-colors">
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-blue-700">
                <Search className="h-5 w-5" />
                Search & Claim
              </CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Find your existing restaurant and claim ownership.
              </p>
              <Button 
                onClick={() => navigate('/claim-restaurant-search')}
                variant="outline"
                className="w-full border-blue-300 text-blue-700 hover:bg-blue-50"
              >
                Search & Claim
              </Button>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Stats Overview for restaurant owners */}
      {ownedRestaurants.length > 0 && (
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
          <Card>
            <CardContent className="p-4 text-center">
              <Store className="h-8 w-8 text-green-600 mx-auto mb-2" />
              <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-600">{ownedRestaurants.length}</div>
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Restaurant{ownedRestaurants.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}</div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
          
          <Card>
            <CardContent className="p-4 text-center">
              <BarChart3 className="h-8 w-8 text-blue-600 mx-auto mb-2" />
              <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-600">
                {ownedRestaurants.reduce((sum, r) => sum + r.average_rating, 0) / ownedRestaurants.length || 0}
              </div>
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Avg Rating</div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
          
          <Card>
            <CardContent className="p-4 text-center">
              <Trophy className="h-8 w-8 text-yellow-600 mx-auto mb-2" />
              <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-yellow-600">
                {ownedRestaurants.reduce((sum, r) => sum + r.total_reviews, 0)}
              </div>
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Total Reviews</div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
          
          <Card>
            <CardContent className="p-4 text-center">
              <CheckCircle className="h-8 w-8 text-purple-600 mx-auto mb-2" />
              <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-purple-600">
                {ownedRestaurants.filter(r => r.is_verified).length}
              </div>
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Verified</div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Welcome Message */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Welcome to Your Restaurant Dashboard</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <p className="text-gray-600">
            From here you can manage your restaurant's profile, menu, reviews, and more. 
            {ownedRestaurants.length === 0 && 
              " Start by adding a restaurant or claiming an existing one to unlock all management features."
            }
          </p>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
};

export default RestaurantOverview;

```

### `src/components/dashboard/RestaurantProfileEditor.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { Upload, MapPin, Clock, Shield, CheckCircle } from 'lucide-react';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  phone: string;
  email: string;
  website: string;
  restaurant_type: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  price_range: string;
  is_verified: boolean;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  opening_hours: any;
  claim_status: string;
  owner_id: string;
  subscription_tier: string;
}

interface RestaurantProfileEditorProps {
  restaurant: Restaurant;
}

const RestaurantProfileEditor = ({ restaurant }: RestaurantProfileEditorProps) => {
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    name: restaurant.name || '',
    description: restaurant.description || '',
    phone: restaurant.phone || '',
    email: restaurant.email || '',
    website: restaurant.website || '',
    opening_hours: restaurant.opening_hours || {}
  });
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);

  const handleInputChange = (field: string, value: string) => {
    setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [field]: value }));
  };

  const handleSave = async () => {
    setSaving(true);
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .update(formData)
        .eq('id', restaurant.id);

      if (error) throw error;
      
      toast.success('Restaurant profile updated successfully!');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error updating restaurant:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to update restaurant profile');
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Shield className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600" />
            Restaurant Profile - {restaurant.name}
          </CardTitle>
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            {restaurant.is_verified && (
              <Badge className="bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">
                <CheckCircle className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                Verified
              </Badge>
            )}
            {restaurant.is_halaal_certified && (
              <Badge className="bg-green-100 text-green-800">
                <Shield className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                Halaal Certified
              </Badge>
            )}
          </div>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="space-y-6">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="name">Restaurant Name</Label>
              <Input
                id="name"
                value={formData.name}
                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('name', e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Enter restaurant name"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="phone">Phone Number</Label>
              <Input
                id="phone"
                value={formData.phone}
                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('phone', e.target.value)}
                placeholder="+27 11 123 4567"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="email">Email Address</Label>
              <Input
                id="email"
                type="email"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('email', e.target.value)}
                placeholder="info@restaurant.com"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="website">Website</Label>
              <Input
                id="website"
                value={formData.website}
                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('website', e.target.value)}
                placeholder="https://www.restaurant.com"
              />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="space-y-2">
            <Label htmlFor="description">Description</Label>
            <Textarea
              id="description"
              value={formData.description}
              onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('description', e.target.value)}
              placeholder="Tell customers about your restaurant..."
              rows={4}
            />
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            <Card className="bg-gray-50">
              <CardContent className="p-4 text-center">
                <Upload className="h-8 w-8 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-2" />
                <p className="text-sm font-medium">Restaurant Logo</p>
                <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="mt-2">
                  Upload Logo
                </Button>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <Card className="bg-gray-50">
              <CardContent className="p-4 text-center">
                <Upload className="h-8 w-8 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-2" />
                <p className="text-sm font-medium">Cover Image</p>
                <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="mt-2">
                  Upload Cover
                </Button>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <Card className="bg-gray-50">
              <CardContent className="p-4 text-center">
                <MapPin className="h-8 w-8 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-2" />
                <p className="text-sm font-medium">Location</p>
                <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="mt-2">
                  Set Location
                </Button>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </div>

          <Card>
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <Clock className="h-5 w-5" />
                Operating Hours
              </CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                {['Monday', 'Tuesday', 'Wednesday', 'Thursday', 'Friday', 'Saturday', 'Sunday'].map(day => (
                  <div key={day} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <Label className="w-20">{day}</Label>
                    <Input placeholder="09:00" className="flex-1" />
                    <span>-</span>
                    <Input placeholder="22:00" className="flex-1" />
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>

          <div className="flex justify-end">
            <Button 
              onClick={handleSave}
              disabled={saving}
              className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700"
            >
              {saving ? 'Saving...' : 'Save Changes'}
            </Button>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
};

export default RestaurantProfileEditor;

```

### `src/components/dashboard/RestaurantProfileTab.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Switch } from '@/components/ui/switch';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { 
  Upload, 
  MapPin, 
  Phone, 
  Mail, 
  Globe, 
  Clock, 
  Shield,
  Award,
  Instagram,
  Facebook,
  Camera
} from 'lucide-react';

interface RestaurantProfileTabProps {
  restaurant: any;
}

const RestaurantProfileTab = ({ restaurant }: RestaurantProfileTabProps) => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    name: restaurant?.name || '',
    description: restaurant?.description || '',
    address: restaurant?.address || '',
    city: restaurant?.city || '',
    province: restaurant?.province || '',
    phone: restaurant?.phone || '',
    email: restaurant?.email || '',
    website: restaurant?.website || '',
    instagram_url: restaurant?.instagram_url || '',
    facebook_url: restaurant?.facebook_url || '',
    delivery_available: restaurant?.delivery_available || false,
    pickup_available: restaurant?.pickup_available || true,
    opening_hours: restaurant?.opening_hours || {}
  });
  const [uploading, setUploading] = useState(false);
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);

  const handleInputChange = (field: string, value: any) => {
    setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [field]: value }));
  };

  const handleSave = async () => {
    if (!user || !restaurant?.id) return;

    setSaving(true);
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .update({
          name: formData.name,
          description: formData.description,
          address: formData.address,
          city: formData.city,
          province: formData.province,
          phone: formData.phone,
          email: formData.email,
          website: formData.website,
          instagram_url: formData.instagram_url,
          facebook_url: formData.facebook_url,
          delivery_available: formData.delivery_available,
          pickup_available: formData.pickup_available,
          opening_hours: formData.opening_hours
        })
        .eq('id', restaurant.id);

      if (error) throw error;
      toast.success('Restaurant profile updated successfully');
    } catch (error: any) {
      console.error('Error updating restaurant:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to update restaurant profile');
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  const handleImageUpload = async (type: 'logo' | 'cover') => {
    // Placeholder for image upload functionality
    toast.info('Image upload feature coming soon');
  };

  const provinces = [
    'Western Cape', 'Eastern Cape', 'Northern Cape', 'Free State',
    'KwaZulu-Natal', 'North West', 'Gauteng', 'Mpumalanga', 'Limpopo'
  ];

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
        <div>
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">My Restaurant</h2>
          <p className="text-gray-600">Manage your restaurant information and settings</p>
        </div>
        <Button onClick={handleSave} disabled={saving}>
          {saving ? 'Saving...' : 'Save Changes'}
        </Button>
      </div>

      {/* Images Section */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Camera className="h-5 w-5" />
            Restaurant Images
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="space-y-4">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
            <div>
              <Label>Restaurant Logo</Label>
              <div className="mt-2 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-lg p-8 text-center">
                <Upload className="h-8 w-8 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-2" />
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2">Upload your restaurant logo</p>
                <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => handleImageUpload('logo')}>
                  Choose File
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <Label>Cover Image</Label>
              <div className="mt-2 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-lg p-8 text-center">
                <Upload className="h-8 w-8 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-2" />
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2">Upload cover image</p>
                <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => handleImageUpload('cover')}>
                  Choose File
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Basic Information */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Basic Information</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="space-y-4">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <div>
              <Label htmlFor="name">Restaurant Name *</Label>
              <Input
                id="name"
                value={formData.name}
                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('name', e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Enter restaurant name"
              />
            </div>
            <div>
              <Label htmlFor="phone">Phone Number</Label>
              <Input
                id="phone"
                value={formData.phone}
                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('phone', e.target.value)}
                placeholder="+27 12 345 6789"
              />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="description">Description</Label>
            <Textarea
              id="description"
              value={formData.description}
              onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('description', e.target.value)}
              placeholder="Describe your restaurant..."
              rows={4}
            />
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <div>
              <Label htmlFor="email">Email</Label>
              <Input
                id="email"
                type="email"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('email', e.target.value)}
                placeholder="restaurant@example.com"
              />
            </div>
            <div>
              <Label htmlFor="website">Website</Label>
              <Input
                id="website"
                value={formData.website}
                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('website', e.target.value)}
                placeholder="https://yourrestaurant.com"
              />
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Location */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <MapPin className="h-5 w-5" />
            Location
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="address">Street Address *</Label>
            <Input
              id="address"
              value={formData.address}
              onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('address', e.target.value)}
              placeholder="123 Main Street"
            />
          </div>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <div>
              <Label htmlFor="city">City *</Label>
              <Input
                id="city"
                value={formData.city}
                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('city', e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Cape Town"
              />
            </div>
            <div>
              <Label htmlFor="province">Province *</Label>
              <Select 
                value={formData.province || undefined} 
                onValueChange={(value) => handleInputChange('province', value)}
              >
                <SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectValue placeholder="Select province" />
                </SelectTrigger>
                <SelectContent>
                  {provinces.map(province => (
                    <SelectItem key={province} value={province}>
                      {province}
                    </SelectItem>
                  ))}
                </SelectContent>
              </Select>
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Service Options */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Service Options</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="space-y-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <div>
              <Label htmlFor="pickup">Pickup Available</Label>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Customers can collect orders</p>
            </div>
            <Switch
              id="pickup"
              checked={formData.pickup_available}
              onCheckedChange={(checked) => handleInputChange('pickup_available', checked)}
            />
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <div>
              <Label htmlFor="delivery">Delivery Available</Label>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Offer delivery service</p>
            </div>
            <Switch
              id="delivery"
              checked={formData.delivery_available}
              onCheckedChange={(checked) => handleInputChange('delivery_available', checked)}
            />
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Social Media */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Social Media Links</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="space-y-4">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <div>
              <Label htmlFor="instagram">Instagram URL</Label>
              <div className="flex">
                <span className="inline-flex items-center px-3 rounded-l-md border border-r-0 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50 text-gray-500">
                  <Instagram className="h-4 w-4" />
                </span>
                <Input
                  id="instagram"
                  className="rounded-l-none"
                  value={formData.instagram_url}
                  onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('instagram_url', e.target.value)}
                  placeholder="https://instagram.com/yourrestaurant"
                />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <Label htmlFor="facebook">Facebook URL</Label>
              <div className="flex">
                <span className="inline-flex items-center px-3 rounded-l-md border border-r-0 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50 text-gray-500">
                  <Facebook className="h-4 w-4" />
                </span>
                <Input
                  id="facebook"
                  className="rounded-l-none"
                  value={formData.facebook_url}
                  onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('facebook_url', e.target.value)}
                  placeholder="https://facebook.com/yourrestaurant"
                />
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Verification Status */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Shield className="h-5 w-5" />
            Verification Status
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <Shield className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-600" />
                <div>
                  <p className="font-medium">Restaurant Verification</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Verified via platform review</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              {restaurant?.is_verified ? (
                <Badge variant="default" className="bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">Verified</Badge>
              ) : (
                <Badge variant="outline">Pending</Badge>
              )}
            </div>

            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <Award className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600" />
                <div>
                  <p className="font-medium">Halaal Certification</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Certified by Halaal Foundation</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              {restaurant?.is_halaal_certified ? (
                <Badge variant="default" className="bg-green-100 text-green-800">Certified</Badge>
              ) : (
                <Badge variant="outline">Not Certified</Badge>
              )}
            </div>

            {restaurant?.is_halaal_certified && (
              <div className="mt-4">
                <Button variant="outline" size="sm">
                  <Upload className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  Update Halaal Certificate
                </Button>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
};

export default RestaurantProfileTab;

```

### `src/components/dashboard/RestaurantTabsSection.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { 
  Home, 
  Store, 
  Menu, 
  Megaphone, 
  MessageSquare, 
  BarChart3, 
  Users, 
  CreditCard, 
  Settings,
  Eye,
  Star,
  TrendingUp,
  Calendar
} from 'lucide-react';
import AnalyticsChart from '@/components/AnalyticsChart';
import MenuTab from '@/components/dashboard/MenuTab';
import ReviewsTab from '@/components/dashboard/ReviewsTab';
import StaffTab from '@/components/dashboard/StaffTab';

interface Restaurant {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  province: string;
  phone: string;
  email: string;
  website: string;
  restaurant_type: string;
  cuisine_type: string;
  price_range: string;
  is_verified: boolean;
  is_halaal_certified: boolean;
  average_rating: number;
  total_reviews: number;
  opening_hours: any;
  claim_status: string;
  owner_id: string;
  subscription_tier: string;
}

interface RestaurantTabsSectionProps {
  restaurant: Restaurant;
  hasFeature: (feature: string) => boolean;
  analyticsRange: string;
  setAnalyticsRange: (value: string) => void;
  analyticsData: any[];
  receipts: any[];
}

const RestaurantTabsSection = ({ 
  restaurant, 
  hasFeature, 
  analyticsRange, 
  setAnalyticsRange, 
  analyticsData, 
  receipts 
}: RestaurantTabsSectionProps) => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('home');

  const monthlyViews = analyticsData.reduce((sum, day) => sum + day.views, 0);
  const avgRating = restaurant.average_rating;
  const totalReviews = restaurant.total_reviews;
  const mostViewedDish = "Butter Chicken"; // This would come from menu analytics

  return (
    <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={setActiveTab} className="space-y-6">
      <TabsList className="grid w-full grid-cols-9">
        <TabsTrigger value="home" className="flex items-center gap-1">
          <Home className="h-4 w-4" />
          <span className="hidden sm:inline">Home</span>
        </TabsTrigger>
        <TabsTrigger value="restaurant" className="flex items-center gap-1">
          <Store className="h-4 w-4" />
          <span className="hidden sm:inline">My Restaurant</span>
        </TabsTrigger>
        <TabsTrigger value="menu" className="flex items-center gap-1">
          <Menu className="h-4 w-4" />
          <span className="hidden sm:inline">Menu</span>
        </TabsTrigger>
        <TabsTrigger value="promotions" className="flex items-center gap-1">
          <Megaphone className="h-4 w-4" />
          <span className="hidden sm:inline">Promotions</span>
        </TabsTrigger>
        <TabsTrigger value="reviews" className="flex items-center gap-1">
          <MessageSquare className="h-4 w-4" />
          <span className="hidden sm:inline">Reviews</span>
        </TabsTrigger>
        <TabsTrigger value="analytics" className="flex items-center gap-1">
          <BarChart3 className="h-4 w-4" />
          <span className="hidden sm:inline">Analytics</span>
        </TabsTrigger>
        <TabsTrigger value="staff" className="flex items-center gap-1">
          <Users className="h-4 w-4" />
          <span className="hidden sm:inline">Staff</span>
        </TabsTrigger>
        <TabsTrigger value="payments" className="flex items-center gap-1">
          <CreditCard className="h-4 w-4" />
          <span className="hidden sm:inline">Payments</span>
        </TabsTrigger>
        <TabsTrigger value="settings" className="flex items-center gap-1">
          <Settings className="h-4 w-4" />
          <span className="hidden sm:inline">Settings</span>
        </TabsTrigger>
      </TabsList>

      {/* Home Tab */}
      <TabsContent value="home" className="space-y-6">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
          <Card>
            <CardContent className="p-6">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                <Eye className="h-8 w-8 text-blue-600" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-600">{monthlyViews}</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Views This Month</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>

          <Card>
            <CardContent className="p-6">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                <Star className="h-8 w-8 text-yellow-600" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-yellow-600">{avgRating.toFixed(1)}</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Average Rating</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>

          <Card>
            <CardContent className="p-6">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                <TrendingUp className="h-8 w-8 text-green-600" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-lg font-bold text-green-600">{mostViewedDish}</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Most Viewed Dish</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>

          <Card>
            <CardContent className="p-6">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                <MessageSquare className="h-8 w-8 text-purple-600" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-purple-600">{totalReviews}</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Total Reviews</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          <div className="lg:col-span-2">
            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle>Quick Actions</CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                <Button className="w-full justify-start" onClick={() => setActiveTab('restaurant')}>
                  <Store className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  Edit Restaurant Profile
                </Button>
                <Button variant="outline" className="w-full justify-start" onClick={() => setActiveTab('menu')}>
                  <Menu className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  Manage Menu
                </Button>
                <Button variant="outline" className="w-full justify-start">
                  <Eye className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  View Public Page
                </Button>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </div>

          <Card>
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle>Subscription Status</CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
              <div className="space-y-4">
                <Badge variant="outline" className="w-full justify-center py-2">
                  {restaurant.subscription_tier} Plan
                </Badge>
                <Button variant="outline" className="w-full">
                  Upgrade Plan
                </Button>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </div>
      </TabsContent>

      {/* My Restaurant Tab */}
      <TabsContent value="restaurant" className="space-y-6">
        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle>Restaurant Profile</CardTitle>
            <p className="text-gray-600">Edit your restaurant information and settings</p>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <p className="text-gray-600">Restaurant profile editing interface will be implemented here.</p>
            <Button className="mt-4">Edit Profile</Button>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </TabsContent>

      {/* Menu Tab */}
      <TabsContent value="menu" className="space-y-6">
        <MenuTab restaurantId={restaurant.id} />
      </TabsContent>

      {/* Promotions Tab */}
      <TabsContent value="promotions" className="space-y-6">
        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle>Promotions</CardTitle>
            <p className="text-gray-600">Create and manage your restaurant promotions</p>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <p className="text-gray-600">Promotions management interface will be implemented here.</p>
            <Button className="mt-4">Create Promotion</Button>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </TabsContent>

      {/* Reviews Tab */}
      <TabsContent value="reviews" className="space-y-6">
        <ReviewsTab restaurantId={restaurant.id} />
      </TabsContent>

      {/* Analytics Tab */}
      <TabsContent value="analytics" className="space-y-6">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Analytics Dashboard</h2>
          <Select value={analyticsRange} onValueChange={setAnalyticsRange}>
            <SelectTrigger className="w-48">
              <SelectValue />
            </SelectTrigger>
            <SelectContent>
              <SelectItem value="7">Last 7 days</SelectItem>
              <SelectItem value="30">Last 30 days</SelectItem>
              <SelectItem value="90">Last 90 days</SelectItem>
            </SelectContent>
          </Select>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
          <AnalyticsChart
            data={analyticsData}
            type="line"
            title="Daily Views"
            dataKey="views"
            color="#22c55e"
          />
          <AnalyticsChart
            data={analyticsData}
            type="bar"
            title="Profile Visits"
            dataKey="profile_visits"
            color="#3b82f6"
          />
          <AnalyticsChart
            data={analyticsData}
            type="line"
            title="Menu Views"
            dataKey="menu_views"
            color="#f59e0b"
          />
          <AnalyticsChart
            data={analyticsData}
            type="bar"
            title="Contact Clicks"
            dataKey="contact_clicks"
            color="#ef4444"
          />
        </div>
      </TabsContent>

      {/* Staff Tab */}
      <TabsContent value="staff" className="space-y-6">
        <StaffTab restaurantId={restaurant.id} />
      </TabsContent>

      {/* Payments Tab */}
      <TabsContent value="payments" className="space-y-6">
        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle>Payments & Subscriptions</CardTitle>
            <p className="text-gray-600">Manage your subscription and view payment history</p>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <p className="text-gray-600">Payment management interface will be implemented here.</p>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </TabsContent>

      {/* Settings Tab */}
      <TabsContent value="settings" className="space-y-6">
        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle>Restaurant Settings</CardTitle>
            <p className="text-gray-600">Configure your restaurant preferences and integrations</p>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <p className="text-gray-600">Settings interface will be implemented here.</p>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </TabsContent>
    </Tabs>
  );
};

export default RestaurantTabsSection;

```

### `src/components/dashboard/ReviewSummaryPanel.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Star, Camera, Video, Heart, TrendingUp } from 'lucide-react';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';

interface ReviewStats {
  total_reviews: number;
  total_photos: number;
  total_tiktoks: number;
  total_likes: number;
  impact_score: number;
}

const ReviewSummaryPanel = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [stats, setStats] = useState<ReviewStats>({
    total_reviews: 0,
    total_photos: 0,
    total_tiktoks: 0,
    total_likes: 0,
    impact_score: 0
  });
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchStats();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchStats = async () => {
    try {
      // Get review count and photos/tiktoks
      const { data: reviews, error: reviewsError } = await supabase
        .from('reviews')
        .select('id, photos, tiktok_url')
        .eq('user_id', user?.id);

      if (reviewsError) throw reviewsError;

      // Get total likes on user's reviews
      const { data: likes, error: likesError } = await supabase
        .from('review_likes')
        .select('id')
        .in('review_id', reviews?.map(r => r.id) || []);

      if (likesError) throw likesError;

      const totalPhotos = reviews?.reduce((acc, review) => {
        return acc + (review.photos?.length || 0);
      }, 0) || 0;

      const totalTiktoks = reviews?.filter(review => review.tiktok_url).length || 0;
      const totalLikes = likes?.length || 0;
      const impactScore = (reviews?.length || 0) * 10 + totalPhotos * 5 + totalTiktoks * 15 + totalLikes * 3;

      setStats({
        total_reviews: reviews?.length || 0,
        total_photos: totalPhotos,
        total_tiktoks: totalTiktoks,
        total_likes: totalLikes,
        impact_score: impactScore
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching stats:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <Card>
        <CardContent className="p-6">
          <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
            <div className="h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-32"></div>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
              {[...Array(4)].map((_, i) => (
                <div key={i} className="h-16 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <TrendingUp className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600" />
          Your Impact Summary
        </CardTitle>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
          <div className="text-center p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-lg">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-center mb-2">
              <Star className="h-8 w-8 text-blue-600" />
            </div>
            <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-600">{stats.total_reviews}</div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Reviews</div>
          </div>

          <div className="text-center p-4 bg-purple-50 rounded-lg">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-center mb-2">
              <Camera className="h-8 w-8 text-purple-600" />
            </div>
            <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-purple-600">{stats.total_photos}</div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Photos</div>
          </div>

          <div className="text-center p-4 bg-orange-50 rounded-lg">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-center mb-2">
              <Video className="h-8 w-8 text-orange-600" />
            </div>
            <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-orange-600">{stats.total_tiktoks}</div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">TikToks</div>
          </div>

          <div className="text-center p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-lg">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-center mb-2">
              <Heart className="h-8 w-8 text-red-600" />
            </div>
            <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-red-600">{stats.total_likes}</div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Likes</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-6 p-4 bg-green-50 rounded-lg text-center">
          <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-1">Impact Score</div>
          <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-green-600">{stats.impact_score}</div>
          <Badge className="mt-2 bg-green-100 text-green-800">
            Keep reviewing to boost your score! 🚀
          </Badge>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export default ReviewSummaryPanel;

```

### `src/components/dashboard/ReviewerOverview.tsx`

```tsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { supabase } from '@/integrations/supabase/client';
import QuickStatsCard from './QuickStatsCard';
import { Star, Camera, MapPin, Award } from 'lucide-react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';

interface ReviewerStats {
  reviewCount: number;
  photosShared: number;
  restaurantsAdded: number;
  currentLevel: string;
  levelProgress: number;
  nextLevel: string;
  pointsToNext: number;
  totalPoints: number;
}

const ReviewerOverview = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [stats, setStats] = useState<ReviewerStats | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  const levels = [
    { name: 'Foodie', pointsRequired: 0 },
    { name: 'Food Explorer', pointsRequired: 50 },
    { name: 'Food Critic', pointsRequired: 100 },
    { name: 'Elite Critic', pointsRequired: 200 },
    { name: 'Master Foodie', pointsRequired: 500 }
  ];

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchReviewerStats();
    }
  }, [user]);

  const fetchReviewerStats = async () => {
    try {
      // Get user profile
      const { data: profile, error: profileError } = await supabase
        .from('profiles')
        .select('*')
        .eq('id', user?.id)
        .single();

      if (profileError) throw profileError;

      // Get reviews to count photos
      const { data: reviews, error: reviewsError } = await supabase
        .from('reviews')
        .select('photos')
        .eq('user_id', user?.id);

      if (reviewsError) throw reviewsError;

      // Count total photos
      const totalPhotos = reviews?.reduce((acc, review) => {
        return acc + (review.photos?.length || 0);
      }, 0) || 0;

      // Get restaurants added by user
      const { data: restaurants, error: restaurantsError } = await supabase
        .from('restaurants')
        .select('id')
        .eq('owner_id', user?.id);

      if (restaurantsError) throw restaurantsError;

      // Calculate level progression
      const currentLevelIndex = levels.findIndex(level => level.name === profile.current_level);
      const nextLevel = currentLevelIndex < levels.length - 1 ? levels[currentLevelIndex + 1] : null;
      
      let levelProgress = 100;
      let pointsToNext = 0;
      
      if (nextLevel) {
        const currentLevelPoints = levels[currentLevelIndex].pointsRequired;
        const nextLevelPoints = nextLevel.pointsRequired;
        levelProgress = ((profile.level_points - currentLevelPoints) / (nextLevelPoints - currentLevelPoints)) * 100;
        pointsToNext = nextLevelPoints - profile.level_points;
      }

      setStats({
        reviewCount: profile.review_count || 0,
        photosShared: totalPhotos,
        restaurantsAdded: restaurants?.length || 0,
        currentLevel: profile.current_level || 'Foodie',
        levelProgress: Math.min(Math.max(levelProgress, 0), 100),
        nextLevel: nextLevel?.name || '',
        pointsToNext: Math.max(pointsToNext, 0),
        totalPoints: profile.level_points || 0
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching reviewer stats:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const getLevelBadge = (level: string) => {
    const badges = {
      'Foodie': { color: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800', icon: '🍽️' },
      'Food Explorer': { color: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800', icon: '🔍' },
      'Food Critic': { color: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800', icon: '📝' },
      'Elite Critic': { color: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800', icon: '⭐' },
      'Master Foodie': { color: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800', icon: '👑' }
    };
    
    const badge = badges[level as keyof typeof badges] || badges['Foodie'];
    return (
      <Badge className={badge.color}>
        {badge.icon} {level}
      </Badge>
    );
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Quick Stats Grid */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
        <QuickStatsCard
          title="Reviews Submitted"
          value={stats?.reviewCount || 0}
          icon={Star}
          iconColor="text-yellow-600"
          loading={loading}
        />
        
        <QuickStatsCard
          title="Photos Shared"
          value={stats?.photosShared || 0}
          icon={Camera}
          iconColor="text-blue-600"
          loading={loading}
        />
        
        <QuickStatsCard
          title="Restaurants Added"
          value={stats?.restaurantsAdded || 0}
          icon={MapPin}
          iconColor="text-green-600"
          loading={loading}
        />
      </div>

      {/* Level Progress */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Award className="h-5 w-5 text-purple-600" />
            Foodie Level Progress
          </CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          {loading ? (
            <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
              <div className="h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-3/4"></div>
              <div className="h-2 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
              <div className="h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/2"></div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-lg font-medium">Current Level</p>
                  {stats && getLevelBadge(stats.currentLevel)}
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">{stats?.totalPoints} XP total</p>
                </div>
                {stats?.nextLevel && (
                  <div className="text-right">
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Next Level</p>
                    <p className="font-medium">{stats.nextLevel}</p>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
              
              {stats?.nextLevel && (
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                    <span>Progress to {stats.nextLevel}</span>
                    <span>{Math.ceil(stats.pointsToNext / 10)} reviews to go</span>
                  </div>
                  <Progress value={stats.levelProgress} className="h-2" />
                  <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 text-center">
                    {stats.pointsToNext} XP needed for next level
                  </p>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
};

export default ReviewerOverview;

```

import React, { useState } from 'react';

};
